Description:
Créée en 2019 par le Groupe Open Modal en association avec le Groupe COMBRONDE, Combirail est une entreprise ferroviaire spécialisée dans le transport combiné.

Combirail organise et assure le transport ferroviaire de marchandises, et fourni également des prestations de dessertes ferroviaires.

 𝟳 𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲𝘀 : Lille (59), Créteil et Bonneuil-sur-Marne (94), Dijon (29) Saint-Priest et Givors (69), et Miramas (13)
 Depuis 2021, Combirail forme ses conducteurs de ligne avec son propre programme : 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗯𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗶𝗹 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻.

Name: Pulsar - Opérations et maintenance du REM
Description:
Pulsar – Operations and Maintenance is a consortium created with AtkinsRéalis and Alstom to operate and maintain the Réseau express métropolitain (REM) in Montreal.
Ultimately, the REM project will become one of the most extensive automated transportation networks in the world, with 67 kilometers of track and 26 stations. Born from the combined expertise of two major players in the transportation sector, Pulsar draws on proven know-how and experience both in Canada and internationally.

Name: Alaska Railroad
Description: The Alaska Railroad Corporation is a full-service railroad serving ports and communities from the Gulf of Alaska to Fairbanks. Owned by the State of Alaska since 1985, the Railroad is governed by a seven-member Board of Directors appointed by the Governor of Alaska. The Alaska Railroad is one of North America’s only railroads providing both passenger and freight service, and one of the last railroads with whistle and flag stop service.

Name: European Loc Pool AG
Description:
European Loc Pool (ELP) offers services to railway operators and logistics companies throughout all of Europe. Our services include full-service leasing of modern locomotives. 

ELP's full-service leasing is comprised of a comprehensive daily maintenance, heavy maintenance and insurance package. 

ELP works mainly with six-axle hybrid locomotives. It allows these locomotives to be operated on both electrified and non-electrified tracks, thereby providing significant economical and logistical advantages.

Name: AIF - Association des Industries Ferroviaires
Description:
Aujourd’hui l’AIF, c’est un réseau reconnu (labellisé grappe d'entreprises par le Ministère), qui regroupe un ensemble d’entreprises dans le secteur ferroviaire. Nous entretenons des relations de coopération entre nos entreprises membres et des liens de partenariats avec les institutions (État, Régions, Fédérations, centres de formation et de recherche, laboratoires, associations…).

L’ AIF est un projet de collaborations et de partenariats dont la réussite dépend d’abord du réseau généré par la complémentarité de ses entreprises membres. 

Nous sommes un assembleur de compétences avec l’objectif de développer du business pour nos entreprises afin de préserver et de développer l’Emploi sur notre territoire.

Name: ALLRAIL, the Alliance of Passenger Rail New Entrants
Description:
ALLRAIL, the Alliance of Rail New Entrants, brings together non-incumbent companies from the passenger rail market comprising operators like European Sleeper, RegioJet, Transdev, WESTbahn, Leo Express, NTV-Italo, Flixtrain, multimodal journey planner and online booking platform Trip.com, rolling stock lessor Angel Trains, and infrastructure manager Getlink. 

All our members share the belief that further market liberalisation is the only way to achieve a modal shift to rail and help the European Union (EU) achieve the ambitious targets laid down in the 2016 Paris Climate Agreement. Around Europe, it has been proven that an open rail market leads to: 

- innovation and improved service 
- lower fares 
- passenger growth, and 
- new jobs. 

For example, since NTV-Italo began competing against the incumbent Trenitalia in the Italian high-speed market in 2012, average fares have fallen by 41% while demand increased by 101%. The incumbent is more profitable than before, and both operators have introduced new trains. In addition, wherever competitive tendering has been introduced for publicly-funded rail services, taxpayer cost has decreased, and quality has improved. 

While all stakeholders - passengers, taxpayers, the rail sector and legislators - benefit from liberalisation, over 80% of EU passenger rail does not experience any form of competition, so there is a lot of work still to be done.

Four points are to address in priority to encourage market opening:
1) Lowering track-access charges,
2) Ensuring a vibrant market for new and second-hand rolling-stock,
3) Fixing ticket retail (availability of all data, transparent and impartial retail, FRAND conditions for independent ticket vendors),
4) Public Service Obligations as a last resort, and only through competitive tenders.

Name: Companhia Brasileira de Trens Urbanos - CBTU
Description:
Companhia Brasileira de Trens Urbanos - CBTU, empresa de serviços de transporte ferroviário de passageiros, com sede na cidade de Brasília, está vinculada ao Ministério das Cidades.

Empenha-se, a cada dia, em oferecer serviços de qualidade, através da interação com os demais serviços urbanos que atuam em suas áreas de influência. A CBTU aposta em um sistema de transporte de qualidade que atenda às necessidades de acessibilidade e mobilidade da população e na gestão adequada de seus administradores. 

O trem, modo de transporte de alta capacidade, possibilita a redução do tempo de viagem, trabalha respeitosamente com o meio ambiente, oferece uma tarifa acessível à população, e se empenha em implantar novas tecnologias, dando maior conforto e segurança para seus usuários e contribuindo para a inclusão social.

Name: Auckland One Rail
Description:
From 16 January 2022, Auckland One Rail (AOR) is the operator of Auckland's rail services on behalf of Auckland Transport. Under the contract, AOR is responsible for train operations, station operations, station and depot maintenance (from 2023), and maintenance of the EMUs (from 2025). 

AOR is a joint venture between ComfortdelGro Transit (CDGT) and UGL Rail in a 50:50 equity share.

Name: KONČAR - Electric Vehicles Inc.
Description:
KONČAR - Electric Vehicles Inc. is a leading Croatian and regional manufacturer for low-floor tramways, electric locomotives, electric and diesel-electric multiple units. It's activities include development, production, modernization and maintenance of electric traction vehicles as well as equipment and components for electric vehicles.
KONČAR - Electric Vehicles Inc. is part of the Končar Group.

Name: Technicentre Industriel de Saint Pierre des Corps - SNCF Voyageurs Matériel
Description:
Rattaché à la Direction du Matériel de SNCF Voyageurs, le Technicentre Industriel de Saint-Pierre-des-Corps est au cœur de la maintenance ferroviaire. 

Nos métiers : 
La mission des 720 collaborateurs est d'assurer la maintenance lourde (OP Mi-vie), la rénovation des trains du quotidien (TER/TRANSILIEN) et de ses principaux équipements. Elle porte sur les nouveaux designs extérieurs et aménagements intérieurs avec l'intégration de nouvelles fonctionnalités (Wi-Fi, information voyageurs, télédiagnostic, systèmes de sécurité...). Ces évolutions sont destinées à améliorer la fiabilité, le confort et la sécurité afin de répondre aux nouveaux besoins de nos clients. 

Par ailleurs, le Technicentre Industriel de Saint-Pierre-des-Corps est centre d'excellence pour la révision et la réparation de pièces PRM électronique, attelages - coupleurs, bogies, fenêtres et portes et câblage d’armoires électriques 

En chiffres, cela représente environ 400 000 heures de production sur le matériel roulant (50 trains à l'année) et 150 000 heures pour les pièces (environ 21 500 pièces en un an). 

Nos matériels traités : Rénovation modernisation des TER2N NG de 4 Régions clientes et de la société CFL, Equipement de l’ERTMS sur les TER2N NG des Régions Grand Est et PACA ainsi que sur REGIO2N, Réalisation de chaînes de rénovation rapide et d’opérations mi-vie sur les Z2N des lignes C et D du RER, En préparation : rénovation des NAT. 

Nos engagements : Les opérateurs, les techniciens, les ingénieurs enrichissent l'établissement de leurs compétences au travers de nombreux métiers tels que la mécanique, l'électronique, l'électrique, la peinture, la chaudronnerie, l'aménagement, l'usinage, la logistique industrielle ainsi que toutes les fonctions supports. 

Nous accompagnons nos salariés tout au long de leur parcours professionnel afin de développer leurs compétences et maintenir une grande qualité de service. Pour nous rejoindre : recrutement37@sncf.fr

Name: Institut de Recherche Technologique RAILENIUM
Description:
Véritable outil au service de la filière ferroviaire, l’Institut de Recherche Technologique (IRT) Railenium conduit des projets de recherche et d’innovation partenariales rassemblant académiques et industriels, en lien avec les pouvoirs publics.

Ensemble, ils développent collaborativement, valident et testent des technologies de rupture et des solutions innovantes répondant aux grands défis sociétaux et technologiques de la filière ferroviaire, en France et à l’international.

Né en 2012 dans le cadre du Plan d’investissement d’avenir, Railenium est un Institut de Recherche Technologique (IRT) expert dans le système ferroviaire.

Grâce à l’expertise de ses équipes, Railenium offre des compétences permettant de lever des verrous technologiques et scientifiques, dans les domaines de l’intelligence artificielle, le BIM/RTM, la modélisation numérique, l’IoT, la sûreté de fonctionnement et les facteurs organisationnels et humains (FOH).

Basé dans les Hauts-de-France et présent en région parisienne, Railenium a mené, grâce à son expertise en ingénierie de financement et coordination de projets collaboratifs, plus de 70 projets en 10 ans mobilisant environ 140 partenaires et 80 collaborateurs.

Depuis 2017, i-Trans et Railenium ont mis en commun l’ensemble des outils de leurs dispositifs autour d’une même ambition : soutenir ensemble une stratégie d’innovation forte, répondant aux enjeux des entreprises de la filière ferroviaire afin de couvrir l’intégralité du processus d’innovation de l’émergence du projet à sa valorisation.

Railenium, c’est avant tout une aventure humaine pour inventer et concevoir un transport plus sûr, plus performant et plus durable : le système ferroviaire de demain.

Name: Verband Deutscher Eisenbahn-Ingenieure e.V. (VDEI)
Description: Der VDEI (Verband Deutscher Eisenbahn-Ingenieure e.V.) ist der Berufsverband für Ingenieure in Deutschland, die im Bereich spurgeführter Verkehr tätig sind. Hier sind ca. 4000 Mitglieder aller Alters- und beruflicher Hierarchiestufen aus unterschiedlichen Bereichen wie Wirtschaft, Behörde, Ingenieurbüros oder Hochschule organisiert. Damit bietet der VDEI seinen Mitgliedern ein breites berufliches und soziales Netzwerk.

Name: Uttar Pradesh Metro Rail Corporation (UPMRC)
Description: Official LinkedIn account of UPMRC, dedicated to developing world-class, sustainable metro rail infrastructure across Uttar Pradesh. Connecting cities like Lucknow, Kanpur, and Agra with safe, efficient, and eco-friendly public transport. Stay updated on our latest projects, innovations, career opportunities, and milestones in urban transit.

Name: Trains Spéciaux
Description:
Privatisation d'un train ou même organisation d'un événement hors du commun ?

Découvrez l’offre Trains Spéciaux, dédiée aux entreprises, comités d’entreprise, associations et particuliers qui souhaitent affréter un train avec des services personnalisables.

Vous organisez un événement et souhaitez sortir du lot en offrant à vos participants une expérience unique, alliant confort et convivialité, personnalisée à vos couleurs ?

Bienvenue à vous sur la page de l’offre Train Spécial qui est faite pour vous.

Name: RBD Community
Description: RBD Community is the go-to rail business membership platform for raising your business profile, and discovering new opportunities to win business. Member benefits include thousands of pounds worth of PR, advertising, profile raising, intelligence and networking benefits and free access to The UK Rail Report. Our membership spans the breadth and depth of the UK rail supply chain, and is inclusive of businesses new to the sector and those established in rail. RBD Community is a vibrant and proactive network for helping organisations do more business in rail.

Name: ELECTRANS
Description:
Established in Barcelona in 1977, Electrosistemas Bach S.A. (ELECTRANS) has been a pioneering force in the railway signaling sector since its inception. ELECTRANS has earned global recognition for its commitment to technological innovation and its ability to tailor products to meet the unique requirements of each customer, ensuring adaptability to evolving technological landscapes.

With a product line developed in-house, Electrans proudly boasts a track record of over 10,000 operational units today. The company has emerged as a prominent figure in the signaling industry, acknowledged globally as a manufacturer of comprehensive signaling systems.

Name: Chamber of Railway Industries (Rail Chamber)
Description:
The Chamber of Railway Industries (Rail Chamber), established as a Section 8, not-for-profit company, serves as the apex representative body for the diverse ecosystem of manufacturers, service providers, innovators, and stakeholders within the Indian railway sector. Dedicated to driving sustainable national progress, Rail Chamber's core mission involves fostering collaborative policy dialogue with government and public sector entities, promoting indigenous research and development, and advocating for global best practices in safety, efficiency, and technological modernization. 

Beyond industry growth, the Rail Chamber remains committed to its social mandate, championing educational initiatives, skill development, and social welfare projects to ensure the railway industry's expansion is inclusive and contributes directly to the nation's broader socio-economic development.

Name: SAGES RAIL
Description:
Chez SAGES RAIL, entreprise d'expertise et de sécurité ferroviaire, nous assurons la sécurité ferroviaire des chantiers sur domaines exploités et fermés, dans toute la France. Nous organisons, gérons et exploitons pour SNCF Réseau et les autres acteurs du secteur la prévention et la sécurisation des chantiers ferroviaires.

En tant que filiale de TSO, leader des infrastructures ferroviaires depuis 1927, nous bénéficions de synergies pour relever les défis techniques et environnementaux.

Travailler dans le ferroviaire, c'est œuvrer pour un moyen de transport plus respectueux de l'environnement, contribuant ainsi à un avenir durable.

Name: Rail Track Association Australia - RTAA
Description:
The Rail Track Association Australia, (RTAA) is dedicated to “pursuing and promoting the interests of railway infrastructure within the Australian rail sector”. 

With a proud history which began in 1973, the RTAA brings together owners, contractors, consultants, manufacturers, suppliers, academics, research and development personnel, regulators and individuals who are part of the Australian rail infrastructure community. Members come from all walks of the industry and include individuals and corporate bodies.

Looking to the future of our industry, the RTAA key priorities are: 

•	INCLUSIVE: Make rail more inclusive for everyone
•	NATIONAL: Grow our national footprint
•	COLLABORATION: Foster collaboration 
•	KNOWLEDGE: Promote knowledge sharing
•	SUSTAINABLE: Embed sustainability

Name: Association Française du Rail (AFRA)
GESTE Engineering
Description:
GESTE Engineering Ltd. is a private company with offices in Renens-Lausanne, Bern, Bellinzona, Paris, Lyon and Brussels. Founded in 1999 as a start-up at the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology, Lausanne (EPFL), its headquarters is in Renens,.

Within this dynamic framework, GESTE Engineering gathers the know-how and expertise of experienced engineers and technicians who have contributed and continue to contribute to the success of major projects in Switzerland, France, Belgium and throughout the world. This international dynamic in the company’s activities, which now accounts for more than 30% of our business, can also be found in the composition of our team, who are used to working in multiple languages.

The French name GESTE – whose main meanings in English are « gesture, deed » – also stands for « Groupe d’Étude de Systèmes de Transport dans leur Environnement » (study group of transport systems in their environment). It reflects our energy and our commitment to take action and to consider transportation systems – whether for passengers or freight – to be an integral part or component of an environment that has human beings and their well-being at its core.

Our experience in large projects in Switzerland and worldwide lets us actively support our clients in the development of infrastructure and equipment, by offering custom-built, original and innovative solutions, and by adopting a comprehensive, multidisciplinary approach.

To better meet to our clients' needs, we organise our consulting-engineering services into five sectors of activities, managed as business units:

RAIL | URBAN | ROAD | BUILDINGS | INNOVATION
• System engineering and railway technics
• Signalling and automation for guided and driverless vehicles
• Safety, RAMS, fire safety and pedestrian flows
• Tunnel ventilation, aerodynamics and thermodynamics

Name: DB ESG
Description:
DB ESG, established in 1995, is a leading specialist provider of rolling stock engineering solutions for the UK rail industry.  As part of DB Systemtechnik, we form one of the largest rolling stock consultancies in Europe. Our world-class experts and solutions add value to both our customers and the UK rail sector.

We provide engineering consultancy services for all types of rolling stock, including: -
•	Electrical & systems engineering. 
•	Mechanical design, structural analysis & welding expertise.
•	Technical investigations and feasibility studies. 
•	Digital manufacturing, 3D printing and 3D scanning.
•	Vehicle interiors compliance, human factors & fire performance. 
•	Brake performance optimisation using our WSPER laboratory.
•	Operational compatibility & Automatic Selective Door Operation (ASDO). 
•	Approaches to Remote Condition Monitoring (RCM) and Condition Based Maintenance (CBM).

We are also leaders in the integration and development of new technologies onto rolling stock, such as: 
•	European Train Control Systems (ETCS) integration.
•	Fleet compatibility modifications enabling vehicles to operate more flexibly.
•	Tram safety systems, including a world first SIL2 overspeed protection system.
•	Operational safety systems, such as selective door operation.
•	Major vehicle upgrades to extend operational life and provide resilience.
•	Condition monitoring solutions, cctv, passenger information and communication systems.
•	Infrastructure monitoring equipment for track and overhead line.

DB ESG is focused on innovation and excellence and is leading the sector in exciting and cutting-edge technologies, such as our digital manufacturing service, where we use computer aided processes, 3D printing and 3D scanning, to physically produce parts, helping to address component supply issues and solve engineering problems. 

We are continually seeking solutions that address the challenges faced by our sector.

Name: National Railways of Zimbabwe
Description: The National Railways of Zimbabwe (NRZ) is a designated corporate body established in terms of a Zimbabwean Act of Parliament. It is wholly owned by the Government of Zimbabwe and as such operates in accordance with the public sector rules and regulations, as amended from time to time.

Name: Tanzania-Zambia Railway Authority TAZARA
Description:
The Tanzania-Zambia Railway Authority, popularly known by the acronym TAZARA, is a bi-national railway, jointly owned by the Government of the United Republic of Tanzania and the Government of the Republic of Zambia on an equal share-holding basis. The 1,860km-rail runs from Tanzania and East Africa’s major seaport of Dar es Salaam into the heart of Zambia’s Central Province, terminating at New Kapiri-Mposhi, where it is further linked by road and rail to Zambia’s capital city, Lusaka (about 200km), Zambia’s mining nerve centre, the Copperbelt province (about 100km) and the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). 

TAZARA’s core business is freight and passenger railway transportation services. It is a major transporter of copper and other minerals out of Zambia and the DRC, but also conversely serves as a key conduit for all kinds of bulk imports from all over the world, including fuels, fertilisers, general merchandise, hardware, coke and other critical inputs into the mines and agricultural farmlands of Malawi, Zambia, Tanzania and the DRC, as well as Rwanda and Burundi through the Port of Mpulungu on Lake Tanganyika. With its sprawling interconnectedness and reach, TAZARA is poised to serve as a critical infrastructural backbone for the three regional groupings of the Common Market for Eastern and Southern Africa (COMESA), the Southern Africa Development Community (SADC) and the East African Community (EAC).

Name: Egis Rail Systems & Signalling
Description:

We specialise in providing high quality professional signalling, telecommunications and operational systems engineering and management services to the rail industry throughout Australia. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world.

Name: SIM IMPEX Global Community
Description:
SIM IMPEX promotes transportation systems for sustainable mobility in Latin American cities, due to its high impact on the improvement of urban quality of life, collective welfare, and economic development in general. 

Committed to this important aspect of sustainable development in Latin America, SIM IMPEX contributes to the empowerment of rail system operators in the region. Through our vision based on cooperation and fair, honest, and transparent knowledge transfer, we share the necessary tools to improve their logistics processes, innovation, maintenance, and their technical and human capacities.  To meet the needs of our clients and offer optimal solutions in a timely and efficient manner, the SIM IMPEX team maintains constant communication with international strategic partners and coordinates the delivery of services and products with our team of engineers in several cities in Latin America.

In our ten years of experience, we have specialized in technical services logistics processes, in order to optimize the value chain of organizations that operate assets in the transportation sector and capital goods for the industry. Our experience and level of specialization focuses on two fundamental areas for management: (i) Rolling Stock and (ii) Workshop Equipment.

In the area of Rolling Stock, our expertise has been developed in systems and consumable components of great relevance for system safety and passenger comfort, such as bogies, braking systems, and suspension systems. In terms of workshop equipment, we provide equipment of recognized international brands for different levels and tasks of maintenance and repair, which are carried out in the main workshops of the railway maintenance centres. All this has allowed us to form teams of specialized professionals, located in local markets, with the task of guaranteeing technical support, customer assistance and offering installation services and integral procurement of industrial components.

Name: East Coast Digital Programme
Description:
The East Coast Digital Programme (ECDP) is delivering the next generation of train travel – creating a better performing East Coast Main Line for passengers and everyone else who uses and depends on it.

As part of the Programme, traditional lineside signals will be replaced with state-of the art digital signalling using a system called ETCS (European Train Control System) to create a safer, more flexible, efficient and greener system - with less delays and more capability. 

The East Coast Main Line will be Great Britain’s first intercity mainline to be upgraded to digital and it lays the foundation for further improvements across the network. 

The ECDP brings together 32 industry partners, who are collectively working to create a more efficient railway fit for the future.

Name: Patna Metro Rail Project
Description:
About Patna Metro Rail Project

Patna Metro Rail, spearheaded by Patna Metro Rail Corporation Ltd (PMRCL), is revolutionizing urban transit in Bihar’s capital through a modern Mass Rapid Transit System (MRTS). Phase-1 comprises two strategic corridors:

Red Line (East–West Corridor): ~16.86 km, with 14 stations—9.36 km elevated and 7.5 km underground—connecting Danapur Cantonment and Khemnichak.

Blue Line (North–South Corridor): ~14.56 km, with 12 stations. The 6.1 km priority stretch (Malahi Pakri to New ISBT) is set to inaugurate in August 2025, with full corridor operations expected by 2027–28.

The project is being developed with a robust financial model (20% each from state and center, 60% JICA loan), at an estimated cost of ₹13,400–13,900 crore. Technical specifications include a broad-gauge track system, 25 kV AC overhead electrification, and CBTC signaling, enabling top speeds of 80 km/h and a projected daily ridership of 210,000 commuters.

Key players involved: RITES (DPR), DMRC & Egis JV (consultancy), L&T, HCC, YFC–MCL, NCC, Quality Buildcon, KEC, Otis, Johnson Lifts, among others.

The priority Blue Line stretch is nearing operational readiness, supported by modern depots, control systems, and passenger-centric station amenities including escalators, lifts, commercial spaces, and enhanced safety measures.

 Disclaimer: This is not an official page of the Patna Metro Rail Project; it is an independent informational and community-driven overview.

All information shared is based on publicly available sources and intended to promote awareness about the railway sector. For official updates, please refer to the official website of Patna Metro https://pmrconline.in/

Name: Keolis UK & Ireland
Description:
Keolis is a leading passenger transport business, operating in 13 countries around the world. Since 1996 we’ve operated some of the UK’s busiest rail franchises, delivering one in three rail journeys and employing over 9,000 people.

We draw upon our international best practice as an operator of some of the world’s most advanced railways, and as the biggest operator of light rail services globally, to deliver innovative, partnership–led passenger transport services here in the UK.

At the heart of everything we do is an understanding of the importance of integrated transport systems, and a track record of delivering them successfully the world over. We work with other operators to connect different modes of transport, creating single, simple networks.

We think like a passenger, and use innovation and investment to continually drive improvements in their experience. Our collaborative approach to operating services sees us form close relationships with clients and stakeholders, helping to improve quality while reducing operating costs.

Keolis UK franchises include: GTR, Docklands Light Railway, Manchester Metrolink and Nottingham Trams.

Name: Africa Rail
Description:
Built on 25 years of history, Africa Rail is about investment, development and technology for rail operators, end-users, government and investors.
It’s about the big ideas, new technologies and rail transport infrastructure in demand, that will dramatically increase Africa’s economic success and drive its positive economic trajectory forward.

More and more, governments are focussed on investing in and building rail infrastructure. They are looking at private rail operations and concessions for future development to generate economic benefit from these new assets.

This means that railway operators, government and their partners are aggressively sourcing solution providers to help them develop their railway infrastructure and improve operational efficiencies to maintain international standards in response to increased demand.

This is where Africa Rail comes in – Our mission is to maintain Africa Rail as the industry meeting place for all customers looking to do business in the rail, freight and transport space, and that is why every aspect of our event has been engineered to drive innovation, excellence and collaboration.
An event that unites all leading stakeholders – railway operators, government, regulators, investors and regional associations. Large freight rail end-users in all industries, transport start-ups and incumbent innovators too.

The exhibition is a once-a-year opportunity to meet and do business with new and existing customers. It provides access into Africa’s railway markets that are traditionally difficult to penetrate but, most importantly the show allows sponsors and exhibitors to meet real buyers.

- bocznicami kolejowymi rozmieszczonymi na terenie całego kraju.

W oparciu o nasze doświadczenie, infrastrukturę i tabor kolejowy oferujemy realizację przewozów kolejowych krajowych i zagranicznych.

Dzięki dofinansowaniu unijnemu od stycznia 2021 roku rozpoczniemy przewozy intermodalne.

Nasz projekt to: 
- sześć składów, 
- szlaki kolejowe na terenie całego kraju, 
- zaangażowanie doświadczonych specjalistów na każdym etapie realizacji transportu,
- sprawny dowóz i odbiór kontenerów od klienta.

Name: Solurail
Description:
Solurail Logistique Inc. is a recognized leader in transloading and rail logistics operations, providing innovative and reliable solutions for businesses relying on rail transportation.

We are proud to be the exclusive distributor for North America of custom fiberglass railcar covers, offering industry-leading solutions. Additionally, we are the Eastern Canada Agent for ISG's Pit to Ship Solution (Rotainers), streamlining bulk handling logistics, and the North America exclusive distributor of ExTe bunks, a cutting-edge solution for securing forestry rail freight loads.

Beyond logistics, our Soludust division specializes in producing eco-friendly bio dust suppressants and distributing high-performance dust control solutions to clients worldwide, ensuring sustainable and safe operations across industries.

At Solurail, heath and safety, respect and innovation drive our operations, making us a trusted partner for businesses across North America and beyond. Connect with us to explore how we can enhance your logistics and operational capabilities.

Name: Ferrovia Vigezzina-Centovalli
TechOnBoard
Description:
TechOnBoard helps facing customer's challenges in two ways:

End-to-end solutions, identifying what HW devices fulfill best, and creating the SW integration project, as well as the testing performance in customer's facilities or real environment.

Specialized consultancy for cases where the project's requirements are still opened.

Name: WeRail Group
Description:
WeRail Group continues to support and engage meaningfully with the global Rail Operator, Manufacturing and Asset Management community. WeRail Group has established a worldwide leading position in delivering content lead conferences and events for the rail sector, combining its entire knowhow especially in the areas of rolling stock and infrastructure, to curate multiple series of both live and on-demand technical webinars for our 60,000 direct subscribers and wider global rail community. Whilst across the industry physical meetings have been cancelled, we are committed to continuing to present information and technologies that address the challenges and key opportunities for transforming rail, via direct, effective and convenient digital channels.

Despite the current situation which has impacted rail greatly, the industry must still focus on achieving more to continue its advancement; rail’s challenges are ever-changing.  We believe that physical distancing does not have to mean social distancing, and invite yourself and your peers to be active members of our information and knowledge sharing, professional rail communities.

Name: OLICHON
Description:
Spécialistes de la pose, le renouvellement et l’entretien de voies ferrées, essentiellement dans l’Ouest de la France, nous réalisons également des travaux de génie civil ferroviaire.

En tant que filiale de TSO, leader des infrastructures ferroviaires depuis 1927, nous bénéficions de synergies pour relever les défis techniques et environnementaux.

Travailler dans le ferroviaire, c'est œuvrer pour un moyen de transport plus respectueux de l'environnement, contribuant ainsi à un avenir durable.

Name: PJ Motion GmbH
Description:
PJ Motion GmbH specializes in authorization management and requirements management, which specifically includes requirement capture, verification management and the application for vehicle authorization with the authorities.

Together with PJ Messtechnik as an accredited testing institute and Railway Competence and Certification (RCC) as an accredited conformity and risk assessment body, PJ Motion GmbH offers a comprehensive vehicle authorization package.

PJ Motion GmbH can also submit and support the legal procedures for the customer (as applicant or as entity managing the change) with the corresponding power of attorney.

Name: Strasburg Rail Road Company
Description:
The Strasburg Rail Road Company is America’s oldest short line railroad, incorporated in 1832, located in Lancaster County, Pennsylvania. From our inception, we have served the surrounding farming community with affordable rail transport. 

Today, however, Strasburg Rail Road serves more than just the agricultural community. 

If it is shipped by rail, we can get it for you!

Our customers enjoy public team track access. Some of our most loyal customers are not located along the rail network and yet regularly take advantage of the prices and ladings available only by rail. Our public tracks have a general cargo dock for unloading of sensitive shipments requiring box cars. There is room and storage for lumber products and other products that are not weather-sensitive. And, of course, we handle contemporary conventional and organic bulk agricultural products, rapidly and efficiently.

We can also meet your bulk liquid logistical requirements. Your product may be pumped alongside into your truck, or from your truck into a tank car.

Contact our Freight Office today at 717 687 8421.

(Note: For information on Strasburg Rail Road's famous steam passenger train, please visit strasburgrailroad.com or engage us on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, or Pinterest.)

Name: Thelo Group
Description:
Thelo develops and operationalises integrated (rail, port and rolling stock), multi-freight, multi-user transport corridors to efficiently move Africa’s valuable resources at economies of scale. These resources are largely mining commodities, agricultural produce, containers, and bulk liquids. Alongside its partners, Thelo stands out as one of the rare African entities with the capability and expertise to execute large-scale infrastructure projects across the entire delivery value chain.

We build strategic partnerships with global best-of-breed partners in order to optimise Africa’s Transport and Logistics value chains and realise integrated infrastructure and holistic solutions with strong commercial returns and high development impact.

Name: PKP Linia Hutnicza Szerokotorowa sp. z o.o.
Description:
PKP Linia Hutnicza Szerokotorowa sp. z o.o. jest liderem w branży transportu kolejowego. 
Dzięki specjalistycznej infrastrukturze, nowoczesnym rozwiązaniom oraz wieloletniemu doświadczeniu, oferujemy naszym klientom niezawodne usługi transportowe na szeroką skalę, w tym przewozy towarów w krajowym i międzynarodowym systemie kolejowym.

LHS to najdłuższa w Polsce linia kolejowa szerokotorowa (o rozstawie 1520 mm) przeznaczona do przewozów towarowych. Atutem linii LHS jest transport bez konieczności przeładunku towaru na granicy polsko-ukraińskiej. 

Dlaczego warto wybrać LHS? 
Lider w branży – wieloletnie doświadczenie i ugruntowana pozycja na rynku. 
Międzynarodowy zasięg – nasze trasy obejmują kluczowe połączenia transportowe w Europie i Azji. 
Zrównoważony rozwój – stawiamy na rozwiązania ekologiczne, minimalizujące ślad węglowy transportu. 
Bezpieczeństwo i jakość – każdy etap procesu transportu jest monitorowany, co zapewnia najwyższy poziom usług.

Name: Dhaka Mass Transit Company Limited
Description: A fully Government owned company named as Dhaka Mass Transit Company Limited (DMTCL) was incorporated under the Companies act of 1994 on 03 June 2013 to establish, operate, and maintain including the planning, survey, designing, financing of a state-of-the-art Mass Rapid Transit (MRT) or Metro Rail Network in Dhaka Metropolis and adjoining areas to reduce traffic congestion and improve the environment.

Name: AlertOn bv
Description:
AlertOn is een door RailAlert en ProRail gecertificeerde werkplekbeveiligingsbedrijf. Wij zijn actief op het gebied van spoorwegveiligheid en advies voor bedrijven in de spoorbranche. Ook voor bedrijven die incidenteel of zijdelings werkzaamheden uitvoeren op of nabij spoor en perron, kunnen wij ondersteuning bieden vanaf voorbereiding tot uitvoering. Dit kan bestaan uit het aanvragen van buitendienststellingen en het volledig inrichten hiervan. Echter kunt u ook voor onder andere het organiseren van meeliften of het werken met een veiligheidsman/grenswachter bij ons terecht. Het betreft hierbij dan zowel de benodigde vergunningen en instructies als het gecertificeerde veiligheidspersoneel. Tevens is het het inhuren van van spoorwegveiligheidspersoneel mogelijk en kunnen wij opdrachtgevers projectondersteuning bieden in de vorm van WB-taken of als VGCU.

Verder levert AlertOn personeel in verschillende functies voor spoorbouw,  energievoorziening en groenbeheer.

Voorbeelden van functies die wij kunnen vervullen:

Facilitaire medewerkers (klaarzetten materialen, opruimen, schoonmaken etc.)
Monteurs (algemeen, seinwezen etc.)
Uitvoerend personeel (spoorleggers en groenvoorziening etc.)

Indien u vragen heeft over wat AlertOn voor uw organisatie kan betekenen dan horen wij dit graag.

Name: Altex Energy Ltd.
Description:
Altex is a rail terminal and logistics company. 

Working closely with Canadian National Railway, we pioneered the idea of moving Western Canadian produced heavy oil and bitumen to market in railcars without adding expensive and volatile condensate. Moving oil to market without condensate has safety and other benefits and is substantially more economic benefitting the sellers (producers) of Western Canadian heavy oil and the purchasers (refiners) of that oil. We have helped customers move oil from western Canadian to markets all across Canada and North America but also globally. 

At our strategically-located terminals, we do move crude oil but also a number of other products which are either produced or consumed around our terminal locations. Included among those products is chemicals, refined products and waste streams - in addition, we are actively involved in energy transition products such as renewable diesel using our terminal and logistic assets, experience and expertise to accelerate the production of sustainable fuels and products for the changing world.

We complement our terminal and logistic services with value-add services including emulsion treating, oil aggregation, oil storage, railcar storage, and railcar repairs.

Our focus is providing services to our customers that help them make more money. We do this by being an industry leader in technology that optimizes efficiency and by a customer-focused mindset.

Name: JURNYON
Description:
At JurnyOn, we are at the forefront of blending technology with transportation. Specializing in blockchain and AI, we are transforming the public transport landscape with our pioneering technology. This subscription-based mobile ticketing service not only simplifies your commute but also makes it rewarding, integrating cutting-edge conversational AI, dynamic gamification, and a robust loyalty program.

Transforming your journey into an adventure-
Our platform redefines travel by making it immersive and enjoyable. We offer a variety of rewards such as discounts and digital collectibles that can be earned and tiered rewards that turn every journey into an engaging adventure. By fostering a vibrant community of travelers, we facilitate meaningful connections and unforgettable experiences.

Advanced Security and Anti-Fraud Measures-
We prioritize your security by employing Fort Knox-level protections. Our use of blockchain technology ensures protection against ticketing fraud, significantly reducing revenue loss for rail operators and eliminating the need for additional capital expenditures.

Streamlined Booking and Customer Service-
Our conversational AI technology simplifies booking and inquiries, enhancing operational efficiency and reducing the need for extensive customer service support. Research has shown that our AI-driven approach can improve service efficiency by 25% and increase sales of higher-tier tickets by 30%, providing substantial business advantages.

Our Vision-
Our vision is simple: to revolutionize how people view and experience public transport. With JurnyOn, every trip is more than just a journey—it’s an adventure enriched with excitement, savings, rewards, and new friendships.unforgettable adventures.

Name: Quality Transportation Services, Inc.
Description:
Quality Transportation Services is a modern Rail Logistics Company providing expert professional services and state of the art software applications that allow industry leaders to effectively manage their rail program.  Our offerings include shipment tracking, fleet management, EDI data exchanges, freight procurement, invoice auditing, and rail plant management which are leveraged by some of the biggest names in the Chemicals, Energy, Metals, Food, Aggregates and Paper Products sectors.  
With nearly 40 years in business, QTS is widely recognized as an advocate of rail shippers, a uniquely qualified and dependable service provider, and an innovator in the North American freight rail sector.  
QTS:  Called to Serve.

Name: LOGI-RAILWAY

LOGI-RAILWAY (LRW) société crée en juillet 2022 a pour objectif d’inciter les transporteurs et logisticiens à réaliser leurs transports de manières plus éco-responsables en intégrant le maillon ferroviaire dans leurs schémas logistiques.

Name: Öresundståg AB
Description: Öresundståg är ett gemensamt tågtrafiksystem i Sydsverige och Danmark. Name: MI-Concept Ferroviaire
Description:
Bureau d'étude de signalisation ferroviaire fondé le 06 Mars 2021.
Passion, sens, challenge : chez Mi-Concept, nous sommes animés par l’avenir, et c’est pour cela que nos collaborateurs imaginent chaque jour un monde où les transports innovants et écologiques contribuent au bien être de chacun et à l’avenir de tous. Rejoindre Mi-Concept, c’est évoluer au cœur des défis de demain, aux côtés de femmes et d’hommes passionnés et exigeants, pour réaliser, ensemble, l’impossible.

L'étude de la signalisation ferroviaire consiste à analyser et comprendre les systèmes de signalisation utilisés sur les voies ferrées pour assurer la sécurité des trains et de leurs passagers. Cette étude peut inclure des aspects tels que la conception, l'installation, la maintenance et la mise à niveau des équipements de signalisation ferroviaire.

L'étude de la signalisation ferroviaire peut également comprendre des aspects techniques tels que la compréhension des différents types de signaux et de feux utilisés, la manière dont les signaux sont contrôlés et surveillés, ainsi que les systèmes informatiques et de communication associés.

Les ingénieurs, les techniciens et les professionnels de l'industrie ferroviaire travaillent sur l'étude de la signalisation ferroviaire pour garantir que les systèmes de signalisation sont à jour et conformes aux normes de sécurité en vigueur. Cela peut inclure la recherche et le développement de nouvelles technologies et techniques pour améliorer la fiabilité et l'efficacité de la signalisation ferroviaire.

En fin de compte, l'étude de la signalisation ferroviaire est essentielle pour assurer la sécurité et la fiabilité du transport ferroviaire, en veillant à ce que les trains circulent en toute sécurité sur les voies ferrées.

Description: Llevamos más de 20 años a cargo de la administración de la infraestructura vial ferroviaria en el Sur y Sur Oriente del Perú, siendo el concesionario de la red ferroviaria más extensa del país.

Name: LOTRAS SRL
Description: Il Terminal Ferroviario Lotras, basa la sua attività su un grande obiettivo: organizzare, in Italia e all’estero, il trasporto merci privilegiando la modalità ferroviaria su lunghe percorrenze. Sostituendo il cosiddetto tutto gomma, utilizzando gli scali ferroviari quali punti di riferimento per aziende pubbliche e private, rivolti all’utente finale. Lotras è una società che desidera sottoporre una questione a tutti, evidenziando il valore per la collettività dell’uso del treno come mezzo ecologico, sicuro e performante in questione di tempi, annullamento degli sprechi e abbattimento dei costi di usura e manutenzione a carico della collettività.

Name: Koleje Mazowieckie - KM sp. z o.o.
Description: Koleje Mazowieckie - KM sp. z o.o. is a company based out of Poland.

Name: RailConnect
Description:
RailConnect ontwikkelt en organiseert opleidingen voor getalenteerde professionals in de spoorsector. 

Opleidingen die gebaseerd zijn op ons Kickstart-concept. Dit concept gaat ervan uit dat je het beste leert in een netwerk setting. Met collega's uit verschillende bedrijven die actief zijn in het spoor werk je aan o.a:
- Begrip van het spoorsysteem
- Inzicht in de keten en je eigen rol in die keten
- Innovatieve oplossingen voor de uitdagingen van de sector

Kickstart RAIL
Kickstart RAIL is een introductieprogramma voor nieuwe, hoogopgeleide medewerkers in de spoorsector. Een programma waarin je in drie dagen de wereld van het spoor leert kennen. Begeleid door een universitair docent en samen met vakspecialisten krijg je een uniek kijkje achter de schermen. 

Kickstart PRO
Kickstart PRO is een versnellingsprogramma voor collega’s van verschillende bedrijven met vijf tot tien jaar werkervaring in de spoorsector. Een programma waarin deelnemers diepgaander kennis opdoen van de werking van het spoorsysteem en samen, onder begeleiding van ervaren docenten en consultants werken aan innovatieve oplossingen voor de uitdagingen van vandaag en morgen. Doel is om jouw prestaties verder te verbeteren door verdieping van kennis en verbreding van netwerk en inzicht.

Basisopleiding treinverkeersleider 
De basisopleiding treinverkeersleiding is het eerste gedeelte van de opleiding tot treinverkeersleider. Dit gedeelte wordt afgesloten met een examen waarna de opleiding wordt voortgezet op een verkeersleidingspost van ProRail. De opleiding bestaat uit voornamelijk uit theorie en oefenen op de simulatieset. Tijdens het simuleren ligt de nadruk op het scherp krijgen van wat er aan de hand is, het bepalen van de impact en het toepassen van de juiste procedure. De opleiding wordt verzorgd door opleiders die allen ruime ervaring hebben als treinverkeersleider. Vanuit het principe "vakman leidt vakman op" kiezen wij voor een praktische insteek met een dosis enthousiasme!

Name: United Rail Engineering
Description: At United Rail Engineering, we specialize in providing expert railway signalling labour hire services and project management, offering access to highly skilled and competent professionals throughout the infrastructure. With years of experience and a commitment to excellence, we understand the unique demands of the rail sector and strive to provide top-tier signalling staff that meet both technical and industry standards.

Name: JBE
Description:
Since 1992 JBE has developed a reputation for service and excellence. Our focus is on innovative electrical systems for commercial, industrial, mining and governmental requirements. We now have a dedicated Signalling team who are committed to servicing the Railway Signalling industry. Based in Queensland & Victoria we provide our services nationwide.

Our vision is to:
• Provide turn key solutions for all signalling and electrical industries.

JBE Signalling has an exemplary track record in providing services for a range of projects throughout Queensland. We have developed a reputation for using innovative strategy, methodology and delivery of projects and now our clients can benefit from our teams experience.

Name: STRETTO (KEOLIS/SNCF)
Description:
STRETTO, filiale du groupement KEOLIS/SNCF Voyageurs est l'exploitant de diverses lignes de Tram-Train pour le compte d'Ile-de-France Mobilités : le T11, passant du Bourget à Epinay Sur Seine, le T4, allant de Bondy à Montfermeil, sans oublier Aulnay Sous Bois et le T14, desservant Esbly à Crecy La Chapelle. 

STRETTO c'est 400 collaborateurs, tous métiers confondus : conducteurs(trices), agents commerciaux polyvalents, agents information voyageur, superviseurs, techniciens(nes) de maintenance, etc.

STRETTO c'est :

* 926 courses par jour
* Un fonctionnement de 4h30 du matin à 02h30 du matin toute l’année

Name: Rail Technical Strategy
Description:
The Rail Technical Strategy (RTS) sets a clear direction for the development and uptake of existing and new solutions needed by the railway industry. It is a live, evolving strategy designed to reflect the changing landscape, celebrate successes, and highlight where further effort and attention is needed to unlock technical progress.

During 2024 the strategy is undergoing a refresh. We are engaging with stakeholders to ensure that the functional priorities reflect the latest changes in industry and society. Visit our website to find out more and have your say.

Our unwavering commitment to delivering safe, timely, and cost-effective projects is driven by our passion for driving progress and transforming transportation in the region.

Name: Avenir Ferro
Description:
Avenir Ferro est une société de conseil et de services en ingénierie, fondée en 2021, avec pour mission d’accompagner les acteurs du monde ferroviaire et des transports urbains à chaque étape de leurs projets. Nous intervenons sur un large éventail d’expertises, des sciences de l’ingénieur (signalisation, automatisme de conduite, voie, caténaire et génie électrique) aux fonctions transverses/supports comme la gestion de projet, les achats et la qualité.

Notre groupe repose sur trois piliers fondamentaux : l’excellence opérationnelle grâce à des consultant(e)s hautement qualifié(e)s, l’épanouissement et le développement continu de nos collaborateur(trice)s, ainsi que notre engagement à avoir un impact positif sur notre environnement et notre écosystème. 

Chez Avenir Ferro, nous avons à cœur de combiner expertise technique et engagement humain. Depuis nos débuts, notre mission est de créer un impact positif en apportant des solutions sur mesure qui répondent aux défis uniques des secteurs du ferroviaire et de la mobilité urbaine. Que ce soit dans la signalisation, l'automatisme de conduite, les télécoms, l'énergie ou les infrastructures, notre équipe d’expert(e)s passionné(e)s travaille main dans la main avec nos clients pour transformer leurs visions en réalité. 

Avenir Ferro propose plusieurs modalités d’intervention : assistance technique (réalisation de prestations intellectuelles en intervenant à différentes étapes du projet), forfait (pilotage entièrement externalisé au sein de nos bureaux d’ingénierie ou bien en plateau chez nos clients).

Name: LTG Cargo Ukraine
Description:
LTG Cargo Ukraine provides competitive rolling stock (locomotives and wagons) rental services, develops freight forwarding service and seeks to strengthen logistics supply chains between Lithuania and Ukraine, as well as to attract transit cargo flows from Turkey, the Caucasus / Caspian countries to the Scandinavian region and back. 
LTG Cargo Ukraine LLC is 100% owned by the Lithuanian freight company AB LTG Cargo, which is a part of the Lithuanian state-owned company AB Lietuvos Geležinkeliai (LTG) and ranks 8th in the European Union in terms of freight volumes. The company started operations in Ukraine in 2020.
Services:
• Rental of shunting and main locomotives;
• Freight forwarding services by rail;
• Wagon rental;
• The project of transportation of semi-trailers on the route Klaipeda - Odessa and back is being developed.
The semi-trailers will be transported by rail platforms and handed over the intermodal for the "last mile" service. Currently, two different models of platforms have been prepared and pilot transports of semi-trailers have been carried out in the territory of Lithuania. 
• Container transportation
LTG Cargo Ukraine, together with its partners, offers its customers a portfolio of container train services in the Central and Eastern European markets:
• Intermodal train "Baltic Ukraine Shuttle".  Klaipeda (Draugystė) - Kiev (Brovary)
• Intermodal train "Viking Train". From / To Klaipeda (Draugystė) - Vilnius - Minsk - Kiev - Chornomorsk.

Name: Cargo Wagon, a.s.
Description:
Simple wagon offer
  
We operate (lease) standard freight wagons identical in terms of operating parameters, equipment as well as controls. All our wagons are equipped with LL brake blocks and GPS trackers. To simplify our customers´ fleet administration, all up-to-date vehicle data and maintenance history are available online. 
  
Swift spare-parts delivery
  
Cargo Wagon has a permanent stock of spare parts and wheelsets for all types of freight wagons that our customers rent. As a result, we are able to dispatch any parts within 5 days from receiving a H/HR form.
  
High maintenance standard
  
The revision repairs of our fleet are carried out exclusively in certified workshops. The works are dully monitored by our engineers on-site. Before handing-over the wagons to our customers we conduct preliminary checks and preventive maintenance of the vehicles and thus increase their operational reliability. Thanks to the overall digitalization, our customers can then have an up-to-date overview of maintenance works performed.
  
Tracking wagon movements
  
All our wagons are equipped with GPS tracking units. Customers can use a web browser to monitor the exact location and mileage run as well as view the current technical data of each wagon they have rented. The tracking system can notify customers of suspect movements of the wagons or, for example, of entering pre-defined geographical areas like workshops, marshalling yards, or sidings.

Name: CERTIFER Solutions
Description:
Experts in consultancy & advisory for railway projects

CERTIFER Solutions is the consulting and advisory activity of CERTIFER, expert in mobility for 25 years and present in nearly 50 countries..

Name: IFTEC GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Wir sind kompetenter Problemlöser bei allen Instandhaltungsfragen im Bereich Fahrweginfrastruktur und Schienenfahrzeuge. In Leipzig verwurzelt sind wir in Deutschland und europaweit als zuverlässiger Partner für ÖPNV-Unternehmen aktiv.

Name: Trinsight Logistics Platform
Description: For updates on Trinsight, please follow TrinityRail at https://www.linkedin.com/company/trinityrail. Trinsight, an innovative solution by TrinityRail, is a cloud-based platform purpose-built to deliver real-time visibility and rail-time efficiency. Trinsight allows you to transform and streamline your supply chain with the real-time tracking, analysis, and management features that modern logistics demands. The result: Your freight is protected, your fleet is optimized, and your working capital is maximized.

Name: LTE Polska sp. z o.o.
Description:
Grupa LTE to innowacyjna, prywatna firma kolejowa, specjalizująca się w transporcie towarowym
i logistyce. Naszą misją jest zapewnienie klientom usług i rozwiązań transportowych na najwyższym
poziomie. Najważniejsze atuty Grupy LTE to umiejętność opracowywania zaawansowanych
i zindywidualizowanych koncepcji logistycznych, elastyczność w działaniu, otwartość na wyzwania
stawiane przez kontrahentów oraz wykorzystywanie najnowocześniejszych systemów monitoringu
pociągów oraz wagonów. Szybkość działania procedury przekazania składów przy przewozach
transgranicznych, stosowanych przez spółki całej grupy, optymalizuje cykl czasów transportu.
Nieustannie rozwijamy i udoskonalamy naszą ofertę, aby Grupa LTE gwarantowała swoim klientom
bezpieczeństwo oraz najwyższe standardy świadczonych usług, o które dba ponad
200 wykwalifikowanych i doświadczonych pracowników Grupy. Międzynarodowy zespół zarządzający
naszej grupy ma ogromny wpływ na rozwój naszych klientów, partnerów.
Utworzenie LTE Polska Sp. z o.o. było naturalną konsekwencją działalności grupy w Europie Zachodniej i Środkowej. Miało przede wszystkim na celu uzupełnienie wschodnioeuropejskich korytarzy transportowych i uczynienie oferty grupy kompleksową.
LTE Polska Sp. z o.o. mieści się w Gdyni i dzięki swej lokalizacji ma znakomity dostęp do portowych terminali przeładunkowych, w których koncentrowane są towary przeznaczone w dalszej kolejności do transportu kolejowego.
Polska spółka Grupy LTE funkcjonuje jako licencjonowany przewoźnik kolejowy od 2017 r., realizując przewozy różnorodnych towarów.

Name: Sheridan road rail
Description:
Sheridan Road Rail Truck Hire has been a trusted supplier of Road and Rail (Hirail) Equipment to Sydney Trains, Railway Infrastructure Contractors, and Operators on an on-call basis for over 30 years.

Proud to lead the industry, we are home to the first Hirail Hybrid MEWP Knuckleboom in Australia, showcasing our commitment to innovation and sustainability.

We continuously update our fleet with the latest technology, ensuring we remain the preferred supplier of on-rail equipment for the NSW railway network. Our services are also expanding to cover the entire nation, providing the same level of excellence and reliability.

Our extensive fleet includes Hirail Trucks, Telehandlers, Access Equipment, Excavators, and Light Vehicles, all designed to meet the diverse needs of our clients. Whether your project involves track, overhead, or signaling work, maintenance, or construction, we have the specialist equipment to get the job done efficiently and effectively.

At Sheridan Road Rail Truck Hire, we pride ourselves on our ability to offer tailored solutions to meet your specific requirements. Our team of experts is dedicated to delivering exceptional service, ensuring your projects are completed on time and within budget.

Choose Sheridan Road Rail Truck Hire for your Hirail Wet and Dry Hire needs and experience the difference that 30 years of industry-leading expertise can make.

Name: Positive Traction
Description:
Re-engineering locomotives for a greener future.

Recently launched the 08e, a battery powered re-engineered 08 shunter. Future projects to be announced.

Name: PJ Motion GmbH
Description: PJ Motion GmbH offers – together with specialised partner companies – a comprehensive full-service package for the approval of track-bound vehicles. This includes vehicle and vehicle type approvals according to the 4th railway package or according to TSI and country-specific, national regulations such as Germany, Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands or Norway. In addition, PJ Motions deals with operating licences for Switzerland and national procedures for track-laying machines.

Name: Track Safety Australia
Description:
Track Safety Australia (TSA) is a labour hire business born out of over 30 years experience in the labour hire industry. TSA exclusively services Australia's rail industry with a pressence in QLD, NSW, VIC and SA.
TSA is part of the Ashley Services Group (ASX: ASH) which is a holistic provider of recruitment, labour hire and training solutions.

Name: Eredi Giuseppe Mercuri S.p.A.
Description: Eredi Giuseppe Mercuri SpA mira al miglioramento continuo del business facendo leva sulla sua esperienza pluriennale ed esperienza nella progettazione ingegneristica, costruzione, messa in servizio e manutenzione di sistemi di segnalamento ferroviario e accessori per la Rete Ferroviaria Italiana nonché per Ferrovie in Concessione e Metropolitane.

Name: Kolej Bałtycka S.A.
Description:
Jesteśmy doświadczonym operatorem w branży usług transportu kolejowego.  Specjalizujemy się przede wszystkim w obsłudze bocznic i ostatniej mili, w przewozach towarów masowych w wagonach Klienta oraz w realizacji usług specjalistycznych tj. obsługa kolejowa budów na infrastrukturze, obsługa pociągów roboczych i transport maszyn torowych /pociągów sieciowych. 
W ciągu niespełna 20 letniej historii zdobyliśmy zaufanie Klientów spełniając oczekiwania pod względem jakości usług i bezpieczeństwa. Całodobowo obsługujemy porty w Szczecinie, Świnoujściu i Wrocławiu. Świadczymy usługi transportu kolejowego na terenie całej Polski a dzięki obecności w grupie OT Logistics możemy dostarczyć naszym partnerom kompleksowych rozwiązań logistycznych obejmujących zasięgiem całą Europę.

Zapraszamy do kontaktu i współpracy.

Name: SDEL Transport Grands Projets
Description: SDEL Transport Grands Projets est un établissement secondaire de SDEL INFI, société de VINCI Energies. SDEL Transport Grands Projets est spécialisée dans le pilotage de grands projets d'infrastructures de transport en Ile-de-France.

Name: LokoTrain
Description:
With over 15 years of industry expertise, LokoTrain operates in 4 countries, with a fleet of 24 locomotives and skilled engine drivers and wagon inspectors at your disposal. 

The company´s mission is to elevate railway operators to the top level. We offer modern locomotives, highly skilled personnel and state-of-the-art dispatch centres to ensure the best service delivery.

More than 2450 employees have been trained in our training programs that are renowned for their quality, time and cost efficiency, addressing the most challenging areas in railway staffing.

At the core of our services is a comprehensive offer tailored to every aspect of railway operations. From renting an advanced Vectron 193 locomotive to hiring skilled professionals or providing expert training for your employees, we're committed to your success.

Member of EP Logistics International, more at https://www.eplogistics.cz/.

Name: C Rail Safety ApS
Description:
Vi udfører krævende jernbaneanlægsarbejde, udlejer personale til både byggeri, sikkerhed og fremføring af person- og godstog i hele Danmark. Der er ingen opgave, vores erfarne medarbejdere ikke kan udføre. ERTMS er også en kompetence - og vi kan tilmed uddanne lokomotivførere til det nye system.

Benyt os som leverandør og samarbejdspartner på små såvel som store opgaver, gods- og persontogskørsel.

Name: Fratelli Censi SA
Description:
Fratelli Censi SA è un’azienda svizzera attiva nel settore ferroviario con un'esperienza consolidata nella costruzione, manutenzione e risanamento di infrastrutture su rotaia, sia su binari a scartamento normale che metrico.
Siamo il partner ideale per progetti complessi grazie alla qualificata competenza tecnica del nostro personale e a un’organizzazione flessibile e orientata all’efficienza.

Name: OnTrain
Description:
OnTrain to innowacyjna platforma wynajmu lokomotyw, oferująca najem krótko- i
długoterminowy. Każda maszyna wyposażona jest w system ECTS (ang. European
Train Control System), który pozwala na efektywniejsze zarządzanie flotą – tym
samym spełniając najwyższe standardy jakości i bezpieczeństwa.

Nasz zespół składa się ze specjalistów swojej dziedziny. Lata doświadczenia oraz
znajomość specyfiki rynku kolejowego są gwarantem jakości usług. Za powstaniem
spółki stoi silne partnerstwo uznanych inwestorów:
- Marguerite
- Griffin Capital Partners
- WBW Invest

Współpraca z liderami branży pozwala oferować naszym klientom nie tylko
nowoczesny tabor, ale również kompleksowe wsparcie i doradztwo, oparte na
wiedzy i doświadczeniu ekspertów.

Inwestujemy w nowoczesność i elastyczność, aby sprostać potrzebom
dynamicznego rynku kolejowego – który wymaga modernizacji oraz wymiany
wyeksploatowanego taboru. Aktywnie włączamy się w proces transformacji, oferując
lokomotywy wyposażone w najnowsze technologie, wraz z kompleksowymi usługami
ich utrzymania.

Razem zmieniajmy przyszłość kolei #OnTrain

Name: Freight Wagon Brief
Description:
Freight Wagon Brief is a professional intelligence platform focused on the global freight wagon market.

We collect and analyse information from regulators, manufacturers, operators, lessors and technical bodies around the world, and turn it into clear, neutral insights about what is really changing in freight wagon technology, regulation and operations.

This is not PR and not news recycling.
We filter out noise and focus on developments that have real commercial and technical impact.

Our objective is to show:

how technical requirements are evolving,

where cost, risk and compliance are shifting,

where competitive advantage is emerging,

and how these changes affect the design, value and lifecycle of freight wagons.

Every publication answers one key question:
what this means in practice for manufacturers and ROSCOs.

Name: PBi
Description:
Solve major industry issues and bring new Transit and Rail products to market.
From "IDEA to LAUNCH" and everything in between!  Making
Product Monetization a Reality for technology in Rail and Transit.

Name: Gemini Trains
Description:
We aim to change the face of European rail travel. We believe that an unashamed ‘customer first’ service culture, coupled with great value fares and truly innovative offerings, will help reinvigorate rail travel.

Gemini Trains will be stylish, comfortable and a real pleasure to travel on, with routes planned between the UK, France and Belgium. In future, we plan to expand our offering to several new destinations across Europe.

Name: Railway Challenge at Sheffield
Description:
Railway Challenge at Sheffield (RCAS) is a student-led, co-curricular activity at the University of Sheffield. It involves the design and manufacture of a 10 1/4' gauge locomotive to compete in the annual Institution of Mechanical Engineers (IMechE) Railway Challenge competition. The locomotive is assessed in various areas such as traction, ride comfort, and business viability. 
The team is split into three main teams, Mechanical Systems, Structures and Electronics. Students from all disciplines of engineering work together in these teams to collaboratively produce a locomotive in time for the current competition.
The team has approximately thirty undergraduate students from across engineering disciplines. New members immediately get stuck into the design process, looking at structural, mechanical and electrical components and systems. Manufacturing and testing stages allow students to experience all parts of the engineering process. Additional personal skills are developed by working in the team, such as management, communication and financial planning.

Name: BIM nos Trilhos
Description: O "BIM nos Trilhos" é uma iniciativa privada focada na padronização do uso da metodologia BIM na engenharia ferroviária brasileira. Nosso objetivo é promover boas práticas, interoperabilidade e eficiência na infraestrutura ferroviária, baseando-se no "Manual Sistema de Clasificación Ferroviaria BIM - RIH" da Espanha.

Name: Stockholmståg
Description: Stockholmståg KB utförde på uppdrag av SL, pendeltågstrafiken i Stockholmsregionen 2006-2016. Ägare var SJ AB.

It is incorporated as a non-profit organisation according to Belgian law as AISBL.

Name: GREEN BUFFERS
Description:
Green Buffers is an innovation created by the company RXD – Research eXchange Development AB, with the core mission to provide the global rail industry with cutting edge train safety solutions that save lives, minimize post-crash repair cost, and contributes to lower carbon emissions. 

Based in Sweden, and with more than 35 years’ experience in the Rail Industry, the core team and partners behind Green Buffers have created an award-winning patented solution that makes a life-changing impact to train safety and crashworthiness.

Our passive safety system of energy dissipation devices can be applied to both new trains as well as existing ones making upgrades fast and cost efficient.

Together, we can radically upgrade onboard safety through small but effective measures.

Green Buffers has successfully dynamically tested their system on real trains and is now ready to apply it on all types of trains. Patented, with patents pending.
 
Visit our website to learn more about how to implement Crashworthiness 2.0 into your projects and simultaneously contribute to reduce the cost of ownership of the trains.

At Total Transload, we hold ourselves to the highest standards of integrity in both our business and personal affairs. Our safety-minded workforce is dedicated to ensuring your product is handled and delivered with the utmost care and efficiency, giving you peace of mind.

With a team of engineers whose experience spans 30 years, we provide comprehensive solutions for inspection, repair and maintenance. Name: Bombela Concession Company
Description:
In 2006, the Bombela Concession Company was appointed by the Gauteng Provincial Government to design, build, operate, maintain and partially finance the Gautrain project. The Gautrain project is a Public-Private-Partnership that includes a 15 year contract for the maintenance and operation of the Gautrain rapid rail system.

The Bombela Concession Company implements its obligations through diverse contractual relationships with the primary contract being the Concession Agreement, which is held between the Gauteng Provincial Government and the Bombela Concession Company.

The Bombela Concession Company contracted with specialised entities to design, construct and operate aspects of the Gautrain rapid rail system.

The Bombela Concession Company strives to achieve excellence in the execution of our contract with the Gauteng Provincial Government and to be recognised as a world leader in concession management. We aim to achieve this through consistently delivering a safe, clean and reliable integrated public transport system – The Gautrain. Together with the Bombela Operating Company, we have shown that this vision can be achieved.

The Gautrain commenced operation in 2010 and to date we have transported in excess of 60 million passengers on the Gautrain system. With an average punctuality of 98.4%, the Gautrain is one of the most reliable passenger train services in the world – an achievement that we are exceptionally proud of.

Name: Trainbutlers GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Genau die Dienstleistungen, die Du brauchst – on Demand und mit garantierter Qualität. Wir denken weiter. Unsere Butler stehen Euch zur Seite.

Name: ITU Railway Systems Laboratory
Description: This is the official communication page of ITU EEF Rail Systems, Control and Automation Laboratory. You can always contact us via the message box on our page to participate in internships, projects and product development groups.

Name: Vanguard Sustainable Transport Solutions
Description:
We have established Vanguard Sustainable Transport Solutions to deliver clean, decarbonised mobility by developing solutions across the technology stack. 
 
Vanguard is a fast growing spin-out from one of the UK’s leading universities, building on decades of cutting edge research.  We work across the mobility and energy sectors to deliver the holistic solutions necessary to provide decarbonised transport systems.  We are committed to enabling transport systems to decarbonise rapidly, delivering sustainable solutions and developing the exceptional engineering talent needed to deliver them.

Initially focused on the rail market, Vanguard is driving the decarbonisation of heavy transport through the development of hydrogen and battery solutions comprising both the propulsion system and the long-term supply of hydrogen and charging infrastructure.
 
Vanguard employs a systems approach focused on demand-led solutions providing clean mobility for people and goods.

Name: TIME FRET EXPRESS FRANCE
Description:
TFEF is an independent rail company based in Metz, with its own Single Safety Certificate (SSC).

Specialising in the transport of both conventional and specialised railway equipment, TFEF operates across France and throughout Europe, relying on a robust network of over 150 partners.

To ensure high-quality service, the company operates four locomotives certified for use in France, Germany, and Switzerland, and employs a team of highly experienced professionals.

Name: TER Nouvelle-Aquitaine - SNCF Voyageurs
Description:
TER Nouvelle-Aquitaine, le train au cœur des territoires.

Chez SNCF Voyageurs, nous nous engageons à relier les territoires en combinant toutes les solutions de mobilité disponible autour du train.

En région Nouvelle-Aquitaine cela représente 67 millions de voyageurs par an dont 95000 empruntant plus de 750 TER chaque jour.

Porté par notre raison d’être, "agir pour une société en mouvement solidaire et durable", nous engageons toutes nos équipes et notre savoir-faire pour vous fournir le service de transport le plus fiable et adapté à vos besoins.

Pour rester informés sur nos projets à venir, nos dernières actualités, et nos offres d’emplois rejoignez notre page.

Name: OHB Teledata GmbH
Description:
Our work focuses on the electrification and digitalisation of infrastructure. We have decades of experience with the processes of power generation and the distribution of electrical energy, especially in the railway sector. In addition, we have built up in-depth knowledge in the processes of digital control, command and signalling technology for railways and have contributed our expertise to numerous customer projects.

Contact us: pcs-vertrieb@ohb.de

Name: Transkeo T12 - T13 (SNCF/Keolis)
Description:
Découvrez le tram-train T12 et T13, au service de votre mobilité.

T12 : Depuis le 10 décembre 2023, le T12 relie Massy à Évry-Courcouronnes à travers 16 stations desservant 12 villes et de nombreux projets urbains.
T13 : Lancé le 6 juillet 2022, le T13 connecte Saint-Germain-en-Laye à Saint-Cyr-l’École en environ 30 minutes. Avec une voie dédiée et une fréquence élevée, il facilite des déplacements rapides et confortables dans les Yvelines. Disponible tous les jours de 6h à minuit, week-ends inclus.
Ces deux lignes incarnent l'innovation du tram-train, capable de circuler aussi bien sur des voies ferrées nationales que sur des voies urbaines de tramway.

Suivez cette page pour ne rien manquer de l'actualité et des évolutions des lignes T12 et T13 !

Name: FAPROVE

FAPROVE, Asociación de Propietarios y Operadores de Vagones de España, agrupa a las más importantes empresas privadas del sector de mercancías por ferrocarril, transportando más del 60% de las mercancías que se mueven en España.

Los dos objetivos generales de FAPROVE son servir de altavoz y defender la posición de los socios en los aspectos que les afecten y fomentar el transporte de mercancías por ferrocarril en un mercado ferroviario abierto con condiciones equitativas de competencia.

Name: SIGNOTECH
Description:
As a leading force in the rail industry, we bring a legacy of precision solutions and a commitment to shaping the future of rail infrastructure.  At Signotech, we're not just a company, we're a partnership where innovation, expertise, and unwavering commitment converge to pave the way for unparalleled success in the rail industry. Our vision propels us towards global leadership in integrated rail services, reshaping the future with innovation and efficiency.

We understand that our esteemed clientele forms the cornerstone of our journey. Together, we shape the future, extending our global commitment to supporting multinational companies with a comprehensive spectrum of professionals and procurement services. Upholding the highest standards of data security and confidentiality, we forge partnerships built on trust and mutual success.

Our core offerings include Engineering Outsourcing Services, where we specialise in signalling systems, consulting and design solutions. Through onshore and offshore support in India, Malaysia, and Australia, we provide dedicated signalling design expertise, ensuring excellence through meticulous hiring and training.

End-to-End Design Solutions are our specialty, where we seamlessly manage projects from preliminary design to testing and commissioning phases, adhering to the highest safety and quality standards. Supply chain and procurement services complete our offerings, as we leverage strategic partnerships to access cutting-edge technologies across communication networks, train control systems, and more.

At Signotech, our ethos revolves around driving transformative engineering solutions, shaping the future of rail signalling with innovation and excellence. We stand as your trusted partner on the journey towards rail revolution.
 #Signotech #RailInnovation #EngineeringExcellence #GlobalCollaboration "

Name: HŽ Cargo
Description: HŽ Cargo provides rail freight transport services and implements highly standardized technologies with the help of their trained and motivated employees. While relying on the longstanding tradition of transport operation in Croatia, the company is turning to new technologies and business solutions.

  Slovenske železnice’s passenger division SŽ-Potniški promet is a company which operates passenger trains in Slovenia and abroad.

We operate rail passenger services in domestic, cross-border (regional), and international public transport.

Name: Women in Rail Sverige
Description:
Women in Rail Sverige vill stärka kvinnor i järnvägsbranschen.
Vi vill skapa en plattform för erfarenhetsutbyte, mentorskap och karriärutveckling.
Vi vill öka mångfalden i järnvägssektorn genom att drämja jämställdhet och lyfta vikten av fler kvinnliga förebilder.
Vi vill bygga professionella nätverk och jälpa kvinnor att hitta jobb, utveckla sin kompetens och knyta kontakter.
Vi vill påverka beslutsfattare och skapa opinion för att fler kvinnor ska attraheras till järnvägsyrken, både inom produktion, teknik, service och administrativa roller.

Name: CCL Universal Rail
Description:
We are Operations and Maintenance Training and Consultancy providers to the UK and International Rail Industry.

We have 25 years of demonstrable delivery which is on time and on budget.

Name: LCR
Description:
Formada y dirigida por profesionales del sector con más de 10 años de experiencia. Prestamos servicios de transporte de mercancías por ferrocarril, ofreciendo a nuestros clientes un servicio garantizado basado en la excelencia.

Queremos convertirnos en tu Operador Logístico Integral utilizando las sinergias de los diferentes medios de transporte para conseguir el mejor precio posible y asegurar un servicio de calidad.

Name: North Rail Oy
Description: Rail transports within Finland.

Name: Hanson + Hall Rail Services Solutions Ltd
Description:
Through our small team of dedicated professionals, supported by a growing network of approved suppliers, our combined experience and track record of excellence will contribute to a complete and flexible packaged solution.
