We aim to manage and execute all your Rail Services needs, be it rail or road logistics, components, storage, or disposal, and provide a single individual at a senior business level as your point of contact.

Name: Railfinder
Description: Railfinder is the easiest way to plan & book any train trip throughout Europe.

Name: OFFICE NATIONAL DES CHEMINS DE FER
Description: OFFICE NATIONAL DES CHEMINS DE FER is a company based out of 8 Bis Rue Abderrahmane Ghaffik, Rabat, Rabat-Sale-Zemmour-Zaer, Morocco.

Name: Short Line Safety Institute
Description:
The Short Line Safety Institute (SLSI) is focused on the people side of the safety equation, working to bolster railroad safety culture, hazardous materials transportation safety and compliance, and develop railroad leadership.

Safety culture is a top priority for the short line and regional railroad industry. While large Class I railroads have invested millions to improve their safety culture over the last decade, Class II and III railroads often lack the resources to make the same investment. SLSI was formed to fill this need for the over-600 smaller railroads across the U.S.

The goal of SLSI and its programs is for the short line and regional railroad industry to perform at an increasingly high level of safety because of a focus not only on compliance, but on safety culture, defined as the shared values, actions, and behaviors that demonstrate a commitment to safety over competing goals and demands. SLSI is able to offer a variety of resources, training opportunities, on-site safety assessments and more at no cost to railroads.

Name: Railtech Innovations Limited
Description: Permanant Way, Civil Engineering, Design, Build, CRT management, Consultancy, Track drainage, Track slab, level crossing installations, Track Monitoring

Name: Cowley Branch Line
Description:
The Cowley Branch Line project will sustainably, quickly and affordably restore a rail link, closed to the public for 60 years, to create two new stations in East Oxford and a new direct service to London Marylebone running twice hourly. Follow the Campaign for Cowley Branch Line to hear about the latest news on this exciting project.

https://www.campaignforcowleybranchline.com/

Name: JR EAST Paris
Description:
JR East Paris is one of the overseas branch offices of East Japan Railway Company (JR East) group.
JR East is the largest passenger railway company in Japan, established since 1987. JR East have branch offices in Los Angeles and Paris.

To learn more about JR East, please visit https://www.linkedin.com/company/jreast/

Name: Railway Study Network
Description: The Railway Study Network is a membership network that provides a forum for the exchange of experience, knowledge and opinion on issues relating to all aspects of the railway industry. Founded in 1909, the Railway Study Network (formally the Railway Study Forum and Railway Study Association) is one of the rail industry's longest-standing bodies. The RSN membership includes individuals with a wide range of backgrounds and expertise – embracing operations, engineering, business planning, project management, marketing and consultancy. It is operated on a voluntary basis. Through the events it organises, the RSN provides a forum for sharing knowledge on issues relating to all aspects of the railway industry. These events are valuable opportunities for networking, education and personal and professional development.

Name: TSO
Description:
With more than 90 years’ experience in France and internationally, TSO (subsidiary of NGE) puts its expertise to work on:

• rail services resumed between Oloron and Bedous
• track construction, replacement and maintenance
• electrification and catenary upgrades
• survey and rail software development
• rail safety
• maintenance, repair and rebuilding of powered rolling

Developing synergies between the specialties of TSO and the complementary expertise available within NGE allows
the Group to offer a comprehensive package for the most technically demanding projects. This ability to work effectively as a team is perfectly illustrated in the delivery of major mobility projects.

Name: DB Cargo
Description:
DB Cargo – Deutsche Bahn's rail freight operator is one of the leading providers of rail freight transport in Europe, with around 29.000 employees and activities in 17 European countries and all the way to China. As the only company to offer business customers from any sector rail transports across Europe from a single source, DB Cargo provides access to one of the largest rail networks worldwide. More than half of DB Cargo transports cross at least one national border. With around 92,000 freight wagons and 2,700 locomotives, DB Cargo has the largest fleet on the European continent.

Legal: https://www.dbcargo.com/legal

Name: Rail Analysis - Insights
Description:
Rail Analysis is the Most Prominent magazine on Railways, Metro and High Speed Rail projects in India.

We invite you to connect with us for regular insights!

Name: ETF
Description:
Au sein des métiers Réseaux France de VINCI Construction, ETF conçoit, construit et entretient chaque jour les infrastructures ferroviaires nationales, urbaines et privées en France et à travers le monde.  

Partenaire de vos transports, notre mission est de développer une mobilité ferroviaire sûre, rapide et durable au service des Hommes et des territoires. 

Vous souhaitez nous rejoindre ? Toutes les candidatures doivent être déposées en ligne. Rendez-vous sur notre site internet : jobs.etf.fr 

----------------------- 

As part of VINCI Construction's “Réseaux France” business line, ETF designs, builds and maintains national, urban and private railway infrastructure in France and around the world.  

As your transport partner, our mission is to develop safe and rapid rail mobility, serving people and regions. 

You would like to join us? All applications must be submitted online: jobs.etf.fr

Name: Metrô de São Paulo
Description:
A Companhia do Metropolitano de São Paulo – Metrô foi constituída no dia 24 de abril de 1968. É controlada pelo Governo do Estado de São Paulo sob gestão da Secretaria de Estado dos Transportes Metropolitanos (STM). É responsável pela operação e expansão de rede metroviária e pelo planejamento de transporte metropolitano de passageiros da Região Metropolitana de São Paulo.  

A rede metroviária da cidade de São Paulo é composta por 6 linhas, totalizando 97,2 km de extensão e 86 estações, por onde passam mais de 5 milhões de passageiros diariamente. Está integrada à CPTM nas estações Luz, Tamanduateí, Brás, Palmeiras-Barra Funda, Tatuapé, Corinthians-Itaquera, Pinheiros e Santo Amaro e aos outros modais de transporte na cidade de São Paulo.

O Metrô de São Paulo é responsável pela operação das Linhas 1-Azul (Jabaquara - Tucuruvi), 2-Verde (Vila Prudente – Vila Madalena), 3-Vermelha (Corinthians-Itaquera – Palmeiras-Barra Funda) e o sistema monotrilho da Linha 15-Prata (Vila Prudente – Jardim Planalto), somando 65,8 km de extensão e 59 estações. Pela rede administrada pelo Metrô, passam 4 milhões de passageiros diariamente.

A Linha 4-Amarela é operada pela Via Quatro em regime de PPP desde 2010. Possui 11,4 km de extensão e 10 estações.

A Linha 5-Lilás passou a ser operada em regime de concessão pela Via Mobilidade em 04 de agosto de 2018. Possui 20 km e 17 estações.

Em 2018, o Metrô de São Paulo foi responsável pelo transporte de 1,092 bilhão de passageiros, destacando-se mundialmente pelos resultados obtidos na produção e na qualidade do serviço prestado no transporte público de passageiros sobre trilhos.

Name: SETRAM
Description:
SETRAM « Mobilité Réinventée » est la Société d'Exploitation des Tramways en Algérie. 

La SETRAM, place la confiance et la satisfaction des clients, au centre de ses préoccupations. Ce sont les éléments clefs pour le développement et la réussite de sa mission.

SETRAM vise à porter la qualité au cœur de ses activités et s'engage à répondre aux exigences auxquelles elle a souscrit son Système Management Qualité.

Nos Valeurs

Sécurité 
La sécurité ferroviaire est notre ligne de conduite ; Nous appliquons nos procédures et nos modes opératoires avec rigueur pour garantir la sécurité des personnes et des biens.

Innovation 
L’innovation est notre approche d’amélioration ; Nous exploitons des pratiques novatrices en investissant dans des technologies modernes pour améliorer l'expérience des voyageurs.

Flexibilité 
La flexibilité reflète notre capacité à nous accommoder aux circonstances de notre environnement ; Nous nous adaptons aux spécificités des localités, tout en assurant un niveau élevé de qualité de service.

L’engagement envers le client 
Le Client est au cœur de notre activité ; Nous plaçons ses besoins et ses attentes au centre de nos préoccupations. Cela se traduit par une écoute attentive et une réactivité efficace à toute épreuve. 

Collaboration 
Notre ligne directrice est la synergie efficace avec les entreprises de transport en commun ; nous collaborons activement avec les autorités locales et toutes les parties prenantes, pour garantir une coordination optimale et offrir des solutions de transports harmonieux.

Name: Transnordestina Logística
Description:
A Transnordestina Logística S/A é uma empresa privada do Grupo CSN que está construindo uma ferrovia de padrão internacional com 1.206 km de extensão que será uma solução logística integrada para atender a região Nordeste do Brasil, com foco no agronegócio. A malha da Transnordestina vai interligar Eliseu Martins, no sertão do Piauí, ao porto de Pecém, no Ceará.

Somos um dos maiores complexos industriais da América Latina composto por cinco negócios: Siderurgia, Mineração, Logística, Cimento e Energia. Buscamos  atrair e desenvolver os profissionais que se identifiquem com a nossa cultura, formando talentos com potencial diferenciado, para que possam assumir futuras posições estratégicas na empresa. 

Venha você também fazer parte da nossa história que tem como essência Fazer Bem, Fazer Mais e Fazer Para Sempre.

Name: ARTC
Description:
ARTC is a vital link in the nation’s transport supply chain – operating and maintaining the national rail network to connect our regions, cities and ports.

We help enable the safe and efficient transit of freight and passenger trains across Australia, managing more than 9,600km of rail track across five states (SA, VIC, NSW, QLD and WA) and the lands of more than 50 First Nations. 

We’re unashamed champions of rail as a safe, responsible and cost-efficient way to transport people and products. In fact, on average, our people manage the transit of 415 freight and passenger trains every day to help keep Australia moving. 

We foster an inclusive, values-led culture and have an uncompromising commitment to the health and safety of everyone who works at ARTC. We embrace diversity in all forms and are committed to building a respectful, fair and flexible workplace. 

We're proud to be a part of Australia's rail industry and are determined to keep modernising our network to further enhance safety, reliability and efficiency for our customers and communities.

Name: Cross River Rail Delivery Authority
Description:
Cross River Rail is a 10.2km rail line from Dutton Park to Bowen Hills, which includes 5.9 kilometres of twin tunnels under the Brisbane River and Brisbane CBD.

The project includes construction of four new underground stations at Boggo Road, Woolloongabba, Albert Street and Roma Street.

It will also deliver upgrades to eight above ground stations including: Salisbury, Rocklea, Moorooka, Yeerongpilly, Yeronga, Fairfield, Dutton Park, and Exhibition as well as three new stations for the Gold Coast.

Name: ONxpress Transportation Partners
Description:
Subscribe to this page for the latest news and job opportunities from ONxpress. 

ONxpress Transportation Partners  (ONxpress) will transform transit as they begin work on the design, construction and operation of new and modern GO rail services as part of the Metrolinx On-Corridor GO Rail Expansion program. The multi-billion dollar project will transform the GO regional rail network with electrification, more frequent service, shorter journey times and a more modernized system and services for the Greater Toronto and Hamilton Area. 
 
ONxpress is comprised of an international partnership that brings established expertise to each area of the project: Aecon Construction Group, ALSTOM Transport Canada, DB International Operations, Part of DB E.C.O. Group, and FCC Canada Ltd. have come together to deliver on Metrolinx's vision that will transform GO transit rail service.

The Project will bring frequent, all day, two-way rail service to the Greater Toronto and Hamilton Area.  The investment will generate thousands of new jobs and create economic opportunities across the region. The project will include adding over 200 kilometres of new track and electrifying over 600 kilometres of track. A new electric train fleet will also be introduced. The GO Expansion project also includes a re-design of Union Station platforms, upgraded track and signal technology, plus new quieter, cleaner electric locomotives that will improve the passenger experience. 

More trains means greater options, fewer cars on the road, and better air for everyone. 

Check out our job openings and join the team that's transforming transit today!

Name: DB Fernverkehr
Description:
Willkommen in der Bahn zum Büro oder in den Feierabend, zum Geschäftstermin oder wieder zurück.
 
Egal wohin die Fahrt geht, hier bekommst du Antworten auf deine Fragen. Außerdem findest du die Inhalte, die für dich wirklich wichtig sind: von neuen Angeboten im Bordbistro über hilfreiche Features in der DB Navigator App bis hin zu diversen Rabattaktionen.

Mit unseren Themen und News möchten wir deine Geschäftsreisen und den täglichen Arbeitsweg noch komfortabler und unterhaltsamer gestalten – der eine oder andere Wortwitz sei uns also gegönnt.
 
Mit uns bist du immer informiert und vor allem klimafreundlich unterwegs – im DB Nah- und Fernverkehr – und stellst so ganz nebenbei die Weichen für eine bessere Zukunft.

Mehr Informationen unter www.bahn.de/beruflich-unterwegs

Netiquette
Wir nehmen jeden Kommentar ernst und wollen möglichst keinen Kommentar löschen. Damit dieses Vorhaben gelingt, beachtet bitte beim Kommentieren unsere Netiquette und Hinweise:
https://www.bahn.de/netiquette

Name: Dedicated Freight Corridor Corporation of India Limited
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of DFCCIL – a Government of India (Ministry of Railways) enterprise.
We share project progress, infrastructure highlights, leadership insights, and milestones from the Dedicated Freight Corridor initiative.
Follow us to stay informed and engaged with one of India’s largest rail infrastructure ventures.

Name: LRT Jakarta
Description:
Official Page of PT LRT Jakarta.
Light Rail Transit Operator in Jakarta

Name: Iarnród Éireann Irish Rail
Description: Iarnród Éireann (Irish Rail) is the national rail services operator and infrastructure manager of Ireland, as well as being Port Authority for Rosslare Europort. Established on 2 February 1987, it is a subsidiary of Córas Iompair Éireann (CIÉ). It operates all internal Intercity, DART, Commuter and freight railway services in Ireland, and, jointly with Translink, the Enterprise service between Dublin and Belfast.

Name: Setrag Entreprise
Description: Société d'Exploitation du Transgabonais, l'entreprise a pour vocation la gestion des infrastructures ferroviaires et l’exploitation des services liés au transport ferroviaire.

Name: Great Western Railway (GWR)
Description:
As one of the largest train companies in Britain, more than 100 million customers a year join us on board. When the Great Western Railway was built, it opened the West and Wales to trade and tourism. And now, along with our partners at Network Rail, we’re proud to have the chance to look after your railway.

As well as electrifying our main routes, and upgrading key stations, we have carried out the biggest upgrade of trains in the country.

But GWR isn’t just about new signs, uniforms, or even the colour of our trains. It’s about being different. With every smile we give, every bag we carry, and every snack we serve, we want your journey with us to be the best it can be.

Name: Network Rail Consulting
Description:
Our Rail Experts Have Transformed The Performance Of Britain’s Railway…They Can Help You Transform Yours

Network Rail Consulting is the wholly owned international consultancy arm of Network Rail, the owner and operator of Britain’s mainline railway. Uniquely, Network Rail Consulting has access to the full range of technical expertise and experience within Network Rail. In delivering operational, maintenance, planning and technical services for the UK railway, Network Rail Consulting’s consultancy team makes available the comprehensive technical expertise and operational experience of Network Rail.

Network Rail, the owner and operator of Britain’s rail infrastructure, has transformed the country’s railways. We’ve revitalized our aging infrastructure, built world-class track, signals & stations and modernized our operations. Today, we help people take more than 1.8bn journeys by rail every year.

In Britain, the operation of railway infrastructure is separated from the operation of train services - Network Rail owns and operates Britain’s railway infrastructure. Our railway network is heavily used by 28 train-operating companies and 7 freight-operating companies - the most open railway in the world.

Network Rail’s job is to keep it running every day and continuously maintain, enhance and expand the network. Our main responsibility is to accommodate many train operators on our network, whose performance depends on ours. We’re investing £47bn in the railway by 2024 to deliver a more reliable, safer and efficient railway.

Name: BART
Description:
The San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit District (BART) is a heavy-rail public transit system that connects the San Francisco Peninsula with communities in the East Bay and South Bay. BART service currently extends as far as Millbrae, Richmond, Antioch, Dublin/Pleasanton, and Berryessa/North San José.  For 50 years BART has provided fast, reliable transportation to downtown offices, shopping centers, tourist attractions, entertainment venues, universities and other destinations for Bay Area residents and visitors alike.

BART's vision is to support a sustainable and prosperous Bay Area by connecting communities with seamless mobility.

BART's mission is to provide safe, reliable, clean, quality transit service for riders.

Name: Infrabel
Description:
Infrabel builds, maintains and renews the railway infrastructure in Belgium: tracks, switches, bridges, tunnels, overpasses and signals. We also coordinate and and monitor all the trains that run on our rail network. 24 hours a day 7 days a week. This means that 600,000 travellers a day and 50 million tons of goods a year safely reach their destination. 

With around 10,000 employees, we work on a reliable and modern railway network, in order to help develop the mobility needs of our society and to contribute to a sustainable society. Our employees are all passionate workers who stand out in their areas of speciality (technology, ICT, traffic management, finance, etc.) and dedicate their talents each day to their job. And they do so in a company where innovation is in full swing, with the help of the latest technologies, with a great deal of flexibility and opportunities to grow. 

Would you like to work with us on the mobility of tomorrow? Will you help us achieve our ambitious goals? Would you like a job with impact?

Name: California High-Speed Rail Authority
Description: The California High-Speed Rail Authority is responsible for planning, designing, building and operation of the first high-speed rail system in the nation.  California high-speed rail will connect the mega-regions of the state, contribute to economic development and a cleaner environment, create jobs and preserve agricultural and protected lands. By 2029, the system will run from San Francisco to the Los Angeles basin in under three hours at speeds capable of over 200 miles per hour. The system will eventually extend to Sacramento and San Diego, totaling 800 miles with up to 24 stations. In addition, the Authority is working with regional partners to implement a state-wide rail modernization plan that will invest billions of dollars in local and regional rail lines to meet the state’s 21st century transportation needs.

Name: Brightline Trains
Description:
Connecting Florida with stations in Miami, Aventura, Fort Lauderdale, Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, and Orlando. Brightline West is on the way, connecting Los Angeles and Las Vegas.
 
Guests enjoy an elevated experience with in-station lounges, free WiFi, and much more. As the only privately owned, operated, and maintained passenger rail system in the United States, Brightline is here to connect everyone to new experiences. We blend premium train travel and hospitality to make the journey just as fun as the destination. 
 
A team of smart, experienced, and entrepreneurial individuals has been assembled to move Brightline forward, challenging the monopoly of the car and introducing a smarter way to get there. #RideBrighter #GoBrightline

Name: Transport for Wales
Description: Teimlad Trenau Newydd / That New Train Feeling

Name: Rail Cargo Group
Description:
Rail Cargo Group: the freight transport division of the ÖBB 
As a leading rail logistics provider in Europe, we are shaping the industry. 365 days a year – 24 hours a day. Across Europe and beyond into Asia. With our presence in 18 countries worldwide, we connect people, businesses and markets – from the first to the last mile. 

 It’s thanks to our 5,887 logistics professionals from 34 nations that 448,000 trains a year, respectively 1,230 a day, reach their destinations safe and sound. 

 With our efficient end-to-end logistics services, we transport over 88 million net tonnes of freight each year. 

 A modal share of 27.5 % (preliminary value) of the total freight market in Austria makes us top of the league in Europe. 

 Operational management of the Rail Cargo Group lies with Rail Cargo Austria AG.

Name: London North Eastern Railway
Description:
London North Eastern Railway is one of the UK’s leading long-distance train operators. Our services link London King’s Cross directly with many destinations in the East Midlands, Yorkshire, North East England and Scotland operating on a 936 mile route.

We operate 155 services a day and help more than 19 million passengers reach their destinations every year. For further details on our train times and fares, please visit www.lner.co.uk

Name: Northern
Description:
Here at Northern, we connect tens of thousands of people in the North of England to work, leisure, education and more every day.

Northern Trains Limited (as we're more formally known) is publicly owned, and our parent company is DfTO. We've got headquarters in York, Manchester and Leeds but our network spans over 500 stations and we provide more than 2,500 services each day.

Right now, we’re building a new kind of workplace. One where people feel included, where they thrive, and where everyone contributes to a culture that embraces diversity. We’re looking for talented people from all backgrounds to help us create a service for our customers that we can all be proud of.

It means that whoever you are, as part of our team, you’ll get to enjoy a career that could really take you places. And with over 7,000 people here at Northern in hundreds of different roles, the number of career paths and development opportunities that are open to you is endless.

Are you ready to find your platform?

Name: Bane NOR
Description:
Bane NOR har ansvar for jernbaneinfrastrukturen i Norge. Det inkluderer blant annet spor, stasjoner, signalanlegg og trafikkstyring. Vi drifter, vedlikeholder og bygger jernbane over hele landet – med mål om å utvikle en trygg, effektiv og bærekraftig transportløsning for fremtiden.

Her på LinkedIn deler vi innsikt fra prosjekter, viser frem dyktige fagfolk og gir et innblikk i hvordan vi jobber – både strategisk og operativt. Vi ønsker å være en åpen og informativ kanal for deg som er interessert i jernbane, infrastruktur, teknologi og samfunnsutvikling – eller vurderer en karriere hos oss.

 Vi setter stor pris på engasjement og gode samtaler i kommentarfeltet. Samtidig oppfordrer vi til saklighet, respekt og hensyn til personvern. Vennligst unngå å dele sensitive personopplysninger om deg selv eller andre.

 Utforsk mer:

Våre prosjekter: banenor.no/prosjekter
Karrieremuligheter: banenor.no/karriere
Forklaringer og faginnhold: banenor.no/forklarer
For leverandører: banenor.no/leverandor

Name: RKH Qitarat
Description:
RKH Qitarat is a joint venture between RATP Dev, Keolis and the Hamad Group. French public transport operators, RATP Dev and Keolis, bring global expertise to metro and tram operations. At the same time, Hamad Group provides local knowledge and contributes to developing domestic railway capabilities and industry in Qatar. RKH Qitarat operates and maintains the Doha Metro and Lusail Tram.
 
RKH Qitarat’s client is Qatar Rail, the state-owned railway company responsible for rail transport in Qatar. Established in 2011, the company leads the design, construction, commissioning, operation and maintenance of the entire rail network and systems.
 
Key facts – Doha Metro
- Three lines each able to carry more than 8000 customers an hour in each direction
   - The red line opened in May 2019
   - The gold line opened in November 2019
   - The green line opened in December 2019
- Speeds of up to 100 km an hour
- One of the world’s fastest driverless networks
- 37 stations and 110 trains, each with three cars
- Operating on 76 km of track
 
Key facts - Lusail Tram
- Four lines planned Orange, Turquoise, Pink and Purple
- Orange line opened in January 2022 with 7 stations, above and below ground
- 28 trams, with 5 cars
- One tram replaces around 40 cars on the road
- Once all four lines are open there will be 28 km of track
 
Career opportunities
A range of exciting opportunities are available at RKH Qitarat. We are looking for talented people who are customer-focused and want to make a difference to our passengers' everyday travel experience.

Name: Rail, Train Control & Signalling
Description: Rail Systems & Civil Engineering

Name: ViaMobilidade
Description: A ViaMobilidade é a concessionária responsável pela operação e manutenção da Linha 5-Lilás de metrô e das Linhas 8-Diamante e 9-Esmeralda de trens metropolitanos de São Paulo.

Name: GTR (Govia Thameslink Railway)
Description:
Govia Thameslink Railway is a train operating company, made up of a family of trusted regional brands - Southern, Gatwick Express, Thameslink and Great Northern. Almost 1 in 6 of UK passenger journeys are made with us. 

From gatelines and depots, to control room and boardroom, our 7,400 staff have a passion for going the extra mile and keeping our customers at the heart of everything we do. 

We work with industry partners and with the local communities we serve, to build a stronger and better railway for all. 

GTR is part of Govia – a partnership between two world-class transport operators – the Go-Ahead Group and Keolis.

Name: Rail Delivery Group
Description: We partner with Britain’s train operators to put customers at the heart of everything we do, delivering essential services and dedicated experts who keep the nation’s railway running efficiently.

Name: RSSB
Description:
The Rail Safety and Standards Board (RSSB) is the independent safety, standards and research body for Great Britain’s rail network. We work across an evolving railway to improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability. We help our members keep Britain moving – with safer, smarter rail.

We make sure that industry knowledge gaps are addressed, and we work collaboratively with an evolving industry to ensure that innovative and sustainable technology is operated safely, efficiently and cost-effectively. We codify and share best practice, both in Britain and abroad.

We are proudly impartial, and home to some of rail’s leading experts on technical matters. Guided by facts and analysis, we help to bridge knowledge gaps, optimise use of the latest technology and disseminate and systemise industry best practice.

Expertise
We guide and deliver safety, standards and research outputs on infrastructure, passenger and public safety, rolling stock, safety intelligence, sustainable development, taking safe decisions, workforce health and wellbeing and workforce safety. 

Services
Our services are wide-ranging and include things designed to improve industry performance, standards, risk analysis and safety reporting, research, development and innovation. Some examples are The Rule Book, Railway Industry Standards, Rail Social Value Tool, The Precursor indicator Model, Consultancy services, training and many more. 

LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/41244/admin/ 
Facebook: www.facebook.com/RSSB.Rail/ 
Explore the benefits of joining RSSB: www.rssb.co.uk/join-rssb 
Want to work with us, visit our careers page: www.rssb.co.uk/about-rssb/career-opportunities

Name: iryo
Description: iryo es el primer operador privado ferroviario de alta velocidad que opera en el mercado español por número de frecuencias y está participado por los socios de Trenitalia, Air Nostrum y Globalvia. La compañía ofrece una propuesta de movilidad integrada y sostenible basada en la calidad.

Name: METROVIAS
Description:
Somos la empresa concesionaria de la Línea Ferroviaria Urquiza.

Contamos con más de 25 años de experiencia en la gestión del transporte metropolitano subterráneo y ferroviario.

Pertenecemos a la unidad de negocio de Transporte del grupo Roggio, un grupo argentino líder en infraestructura y servicios, con más de 100 años de trayectoria en el desarrollo y ejecución de emprendimientos a nivel nacional e internacional.

El servicio de la Línea Urquiza se opera y mantiene bajo el contrato de concesión original, aprobado por decreto Nº 2608/93 del Gobierno Nacional.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: VLT Carioca
Description:
Em junho de 2016, a inauguração do VLT Carioca mudou completamente a forma de se deslocar pelo centro do Rio de Janeiro. O sistema interliga a região portuária ao centro da cidade de forma rápida, eficiente e sustentável.
 
São 26,71 quilômetros de trilhos que levam os passageiros às diversas regiões que compõem a área central da cidade. Com 4 linhas, 29 paradas e estações e 1 Terminal, o sistema se conecta a ônibus convencionais, metrô, trens, barcas, porto onde atracam os cruzeiros, além do aeroporto Santos Dumont, da Rodoviária do Rio e do Terminal Intermodal Gentileza. O sistema inédito no país caiu no gosto do carioca e detém 88% de aprovação, segundo pesquisa Datafolha.
 
No ano de 2023, a Concessionária ganhou o prêmio de Melhor Operadora de VLT da Revista Ferroviária. No mesmo ano, também ganhou o reconhecimento de Melhores Práticas, na 20º Assembleia da América Latina, organizada pela International Association of Public Transport (UITP) pelo lançamento do AudioGuia, ferramenta do app do VLT que conta com áudios descritivos sobre 200 pontos históricos e turísticos do entorno do traçado do sistema.
 
Mais de 1,4 milhão de viagens realizadas, 126 milhões de passageiros transportados desde o início da operação e 84 mil passageiros transportados todos os dias. A equipe da concessionária conta com um time de 476 colaboradores e trabalha todos os dias para melhorar a vida das pessoas através da mobilidade e ser a melhor opção de transporte no Centro do Rio.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Salcef Group
Description:
Salcef is an Italian industrial group active on the international market, specializing in the renewal and construction of railway infrastructures, tram and metro networks.

For over 70 years, Salcef has been helping to develop sustainable mobility, guaranteeing safe rail transportation of freight and people every day, in urban areas and over long distances.

Thanks to six highly specialized business units, the Group offers integrated solutions in all sectors of the railway industry: from developing an idea to designing and building new networks, for maintenance and quality control, and for supplying materials and vehicles.

Name: V/Line
Description:
V/Line is connecting our communities.

We are Australia’s largest regional public transport operator and customers take more than 17 million trips on V/Line train and coach services each year. 

Through our Customer Charter we are committed to making each journey safe, comfortable and reliable, as well as being helpful and keeping customers informed. 

We also work towards a connected and prosperous regional Victoria by forging strong relationships with other organisations and stakeholders, vital to the strength of the community.

V/Line has more than 2200 staff across more than 700 different positions working at 74 locations across the network.

We are a diverse organization with staff from many different backgrounds and we value the contribution they make to the community as well as the work they do for V/Line.

Name: TTX Company
Description:
We’re TTX, a company that provides railcars and related freight car management tools to the North American rail industry.

Our pool of railcars – nearly 175,000 strong – helps support shippers in a wide range of industries. From automotive and machinery companies to paper & forest, metals and wind energy industries, shippers throughout the country rely on TTX’s flatcars, boxcars and gondolas.

We’re owned by North America’s strongest railroads, and our free-running cars help minimize empty miles – so risks and costs are lowered, too. Our bright yellow cars are recognizable, and so is our commitment to meeting the country’s transportation needs.

Our values:
Serve Our Railroad Customers: We act in the best interest of our internal and external customers, industry, and TTX.  We invest in high-trust, mutually beneficial relationships across our customers, industry, and TTX. We advance outcomes making decisions based on required TTX and customer perspectives and expertise.

Live Safety: We require full compliance and accountability for safety benchmarks and practices across TTX. We thrive on shared accountability for the health and well-being, and security of our people, data, physical assets, and customers. We prioritize the health and well-being of our people in all decisions and actions. 

Do the Right Thing: We encourage diverse qualities and perspectives of our people. We operate consistently with equity, integrity, and professionalism.

Seek Excellence: We all hold ourselves accountable and demand the highest level of quality and service in all we do. We cultivate and optimize the passion, talent, and potential of our people. We initiate meaningful change and continuous improvement. We navigate our work with the honesty, rigor, and flexibility required to deliver great value.

Know Our Business: We strive to strengthen TTX’s value and presence as an industry leader and partner. We equip our people with real-time, inclusive industry knowledge.

Name: Azərbaycan Dəmir Yolları - ADY / Azerbaijan Railways
Description: 1878-ci ildə Dövlət fərmanına əsasən Azərbaycanda ilk dəmir yolunun çəkilişinə başlanılıb və 1880-ci ilin 20 yanvar tarixində Azərbaycan Dövlət Dəmir Yolu yaradılıb.

Name: DB E.C.O. Group
Description:
Welcome! DB E.C.O. Group consists of DB Engineering & Consulting, Deutsche Bahn International Operations, infraView, ESE Engineering und Software-Entwicklung and inno2grid as well as local companies, subsidiaries and investments worldwide.  

Deutsche Bahn’s combined know-how from engineering, consulting and operations results in infrastructure expertise that is at the core of our every service and creates innovative and sustainable solutions for future mobility.
Since the end of 2019, we merge our in-depth knowledge of the integrated rail system with digital technology along the entire length of the value chain. As a full-service provider with 8,000 employees from 89 nations, we provide our customers with a portfolio that focuses on the future, as well as making an important contribution to protecting the environment. We work closely with our business partners to deliver reliable, cost-effective solutions for complex projects. Visit our website and learn more!

Imprint & Privacy Statement: https://db-eco.com/en/db-eco-group-privacy-policy/imprint-and-privacy-statements-for-social-media-presences/

Name: Genesee & Wyoming Inc.
Description: G&W owns or leases more than 100 freight railroads throughout North America with 4,000 employees serving 2,000 customers over more than 13,000 track miles.

Name: UIC - International union of railways #UICrail
Description: UIC is the worldwide organisation for the promotion of rail transport at a global level and collaborative development of the railway system. It brings together some 200 members on all 5 continents, among them rail operators, infrastructure managers, railway service providers, etc. UIC maintains close cooperation links with all actors in the rail transport domain right around the world, including manufacturers, railway associations, public authorities and stakeholders in other domains and sectors whose experiences may be beneficial to rail development. The UIC's main tasks include understanding the business needs of the rail community, developing programmes of innovation to identify solutions to those needs and preparing and publishing a series of documents known as IRS that facilitate the implementation of the innovative solutions.

Name: Kansas City Southern
Description: Headquartered in Kansas City, Mo., Kansas City Southern (KCS) (NYSE: KSU) is a transportation holding company that has railroad investments in the U.S., Mexico and Panama.  Its primary U.S. holding is The Kansas City Southern Railway Company, serving the central and south central U.S.  Its international holdings include Kansas City Southern de Mexico, S.A. de C.V., serving northeastern and central Mexico and the port cities of Lázaro Cárdenas, Tampico and Veracruz, and a 50 percent interest in Panama Canal Railway Company, providing ocean-to-ocean freight and passenger service along the Panama Canal.  KCS' North American rail holdings and strategic alliances with other North American rail partners are primary components of a unique railway system, linking the commercial and industrial centers of the U.S., Mexico and Canada.  More information about KCS can be found at www.kcsouthern.com

Name: CP - Comboios de Portugal, EPE
Description:
A CP E.P.E. é uma entidade pública empresarial detida a 100% pelo Estado.

Como agente ativo da sociedade, a CP assume a responsabilidade de contribuir para o desenvolvimento económico e para a coesão social do país e dos seus cidadãos, através de um bom desempenho da sua atividade comercial.

Com cerca de 144 milhões (em 2019) de passageiros transportados por ano, a CP é uma das mais representativas empresas portuguesas e a maior empresa de transportes terrestres a operar em Portugal.

Name: Knorr-Bremse Rail Vehicle Systems
Description:
As the global market leader for braking systems and other rail vehicle systems, the Rail Vehicle Systems (RVS) division of Knorr-Bremse is the worldwide driver of the rail transportation revolution and next-generation mobility. The division supplies highly innovative system solutions that make rail transportation of people and goods more reliable and better connected, safer and cleaner, and more comfortable and efficient.

Knorr-Bremse RVS delivers higher capacity, greater availability and maximum safety for the mass transit, mainline and freight markets.  The division also offers eco-friendly technologies and solutions as part of the rail industry’s contribution to a more climate-friendly transportation system, and provides integrated life cycle management throughout a rail vehicle’s service life.

In all its activities around the world, Knorr-Bremse RVS is driven by the goal of adding value for its customers and making an effective and positive contribution to society and the environment. This is the ambition that the division pursues every single day, with its sights firmly set on both the needs of its partners and the future of the planet.

The Munich site is home to the Management Board, together with the aftermarket (RailServices), development, project management, quality, supply chain management and procurement functions and the Group’s global administration team. The Systems, Sales,  Digital Products, and Innovations business units and the corresponding Brake Control, Electronics, Air Supply, Hydraulics and Bogie Equipment Centers of Competence are also managed from Munich. With its production, sales and service centers, the division is represented in 29 countries around the globe. 

We refer to our privacy policy: https://rail.knorr-bremse.com/en/de/footer/data-protection/data-protection.json

Impressum: https://rail.knorr-bremse.com/en/de/footer/imprint/

Name: Great British Railways Transition Team (GBRTT)
Description:
The work achieved at GBRTT made the case for reform, demonstrated the potential to work in a more joined-up way before Great British Railways is fully realised, and laid the foundations for an integrated railway in the future.

This has been achieved through working with a whole-industry mindset in close collaboration with our partners including in the Department for Transport, Network Rail and Rail Delivery Group.
 
GBRTT ceased to exist as an Arm’s Length Body on 1 April 2025. However, there are important activities and programmes that need to continue, which are being carried out by three core teams - Customer & Revenue Growth, Industry Finance, and Fares Ticketing & Retail - alongside the work of the partnerships and projects teams. These teams will work across the whole industry.
 
For the latest information about rail reform and how we are integrating as an industry, please visit the websites of the Department for Transport, DfT Operator and Network Rail.

Name: European Union Agency for Railways
Description: The European Union Agency for Railways is carrying out technical work on railway safety and interoperability based on the requirements of European law. The Agency is contributing to the creation of an integrated European railway area where railway undertakings can run trains and organise their transport services freely, safely, effectively and without interruption at national borders. The objective is to allow the rail transport sector to realise its competitive advantages in relation to other transport modes.

Name: Yarra Trams
Description:
Melbourne’s Yarra Trams is the largest operating tram network in the world. With more than 160 million passenger trips taken each year, Yarra Trams connects thousands of people with places every day. 

Since the first cable tram travelled along Bourke Street in 1885, the city’s tram network has become an iconic and much loved part of Melbourne’s identity. Melbourne isn’t Melbourne without trams. 
 
Yarra Trams is proudly operated by Yarra Journey Makers, a joint venture between Transdev Australia and John Holland.

We work with the Department of Transport and Planning, alongside its transport agencies and operators to provide a fully integrated, sustainable transport service for the people of Melbourne.

We're all Journey Makers, creating great journeys that connect people and communities across Melbourne.

Name: Freightliner Group Ltd
Description:
We're proud to be forward thinkers, as well as forward movers. 

For decades, we've been turning knowledge, ideas and technology into pioneering logistics solutions. Thanks to our dedication and expertise, our ever-advancing intermodal and bulk freight services are some of the most sustainable, efficient, and advanced in the entire industry. 

With Intermodal Logistics, we’re proud to offer a uniquely comprehensive service offering. Our end-to-end capability when it comes to the safe and
responsible transportation, delivery and storage of your valued goods makes us the one and only logistics provider you’ll ever need. 

You can trust Heavy Haul to transport your largest loads safely, swiftly and sustainably on rail. Nothing can get in the way of our commitment
to responsibly moving your goods with powerful speed and unshakeable security - every single time.

We treat every wagon load as if it were our own, and every journey as another chance to help keep UK businesses and the very fabric of our
infrastructure firmly on track.

Name: Railcoop
South Western Railway
Description:
Operating over 1,500 services each weekday, SWR provides commuter, regional and long distance services to customers in South West London, the southern counties of England and the Isle of Wight.

As well as commuters and business travellers, SWR transports leisure travellers across the region, to many tourist and heritage sites, and the numerous major sporting and social events that take place along the route every year.

SWR provides easy and convenient mobility, improving quality of life by connecting people and communities.

Visit southwesternrailway.com and follow us on X (formerly Twitter) @SW_Help for the latest information

About DFTO
DFTO is the government’s public sector rail owning group. Its purpose is to bring all currently privately-owned train operators into public ownership in advance of the creation of Great British Railways in 2027.

The group’s current train operating companies are: LNER, Northern, Southeastern, TransPennine Express and SWR. It has over 23,000 employees.

DFTO runs over 6,000 services a day and delivers over 450 million customer journeys across its networks every year. This accounts for 26% of total UK passenger journeys and 30% of passenger miles.

Name: Long Island Rail Road
Description:
The Long Island Rail Road is the busiest commuter railroad in North America, carrying an average of 301,000 customers each weekday on 735 daily trains. Chartered on April 24, 1834, it is also the oldest railroad still operating under its original name.
Thee LIRR system is comprised of over 700 miles of track on 11 different branches, stretching from Montauk -- on the eastern tip of Long Island -- to the refurbished Penn Station in the heart of Manhattan, approximately 120 miles away. Along the way, the LIRR serves 124 stations in Nassau, Suffolk, Queens, Brooklyn and Manhattan, providing service for some 82 million customers each year, taking them to and from jobs, homes, schools, sporting events, concerts, beaches, Broadway shows, and the multitude of other attractions around the New York metropolitan region.

Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/mtalirr

Name: Avanti West Coast
Description: Hello. We're Avanti West Coast. Our customers will be at the heart of everything we do, and we have big plans over the next five years.

Name: Railway Academy
Description:
We are Asia’s top railway and smart mobility-focused training company with credentials of training 5000+ professionals across the world.
Whom do we serve?
We serve three major segments in railway and related sectors
Working professionals looking at career growth and knowledge to grow in railway career
Working professionals looking at shifting to a particular railway domain eg signaling, RAMS, OHE etc
Freshers looking at starting career in railways especially signaling and safety

How are we different?
We only offer courses which can help you enhance employability and career prospects
We offer courses at prices which are affordable for whole world across countries and not specific regions/countries
All our courses come with industry recognised certifications ( TUV, Premium Academic Institutes etc)
Our Course content is relevant and taught only by industry experts

Name: SJ AB
Description:
SJ is a Swedish train operator that offers sustainable travel, both independently and in collaboration with others. As the market-leading train operator, we link Sweden together and open the doors to Scandinavia’s capitals: Stockholm, Copenhagen and Oslo. We make it possible for many people to choose to travel by rail — the most sustainable mode of travel for longer distances. Every day, some 140,000 people choose to travel with SJ availing themselves of more than 1,200 departure times from 284 stations. 

We are part of the solution for meeting Sweden’s climate targets and all our trains in Sweden carry the Good Environmental Choice (Bra Miljöval) label. The Group has sales of around SEK 7.9 billion and about 4,600 employees.

SJ’s own rail services are primarily long-distance comprising high-speed and night-trains as well as regional rail services between major cities in Sweden and the Scandinavian capitals. Tendered services mainly comprise shorter rail journeys for commuting to work or school within one county or region.

Are you interested in working at SJ? Our market is growing and we are in the midst of an exciting phase of focused renewal and development — and we have many diverse opportunities. 

Click here for vacancies at SJ: www.sj.se/sv/om/om-sj/jobba-pa-sj.html (Swedish only)

Click here for information on student opportunities: www.sj.se/sv/om/om-sj/jobba-pa-sj/student.html (Swedish only)

Follow us on Instagram @resmedsj: http://instagram.com/resmedsj (Swedish only)

Name: OUIGO España
Description: Llega OUIGO, una forma diferente, cómoda y económica de viajar. Nuestros trenes de alta velocidad y sus  billetes a bajo precio van a hacer que Madrid, Barcelona, Zaragoza y Tarragona estén más cerca que nunca. Redescubre con nosotros el placer de viajar.

Name: TIC Trens
Description:
Somos a TIC Trens, concessionária responsável pela implantação, operação e manutenção do Trem Intercidades Eixo Norte (TIC), que ligará São Paulo a Campinas, além da implementação do Trem Intermetropolitano (TIM), conectando Jundiaí a Campinas com paradas estratégicas em Louveira, Vinhedo e Valinhos. 

O nosso projeto também conta com a operação, manutenção e modernização da Linha 7-Rubi de trens metropolitanos de São Paulo.

Name: ScotRail
Description:
We're responsible for delivering more than 97 million customer journeys each year, getting people where they need to be.

The investment we are making in new and upgraded trains, better stations, and improved infrastructure is delivering faster journeys, more seats, and better services for our customers.

It's all part of our plan to build the best railway Scotland has ever had.

Find out more at www.scotrail.co.uk

Name: Australasian Railway Association (ARA)
Description:
We are the peak body for rail in Australasia, representing all sectors of the rail industry. We represent an array of rail organisations, including private and public, passenger and freight operators, track owners and managers, manufacturers of rolling stock, construction companies and all other organisations supplying and contributing to the Australasian rail sector.

We provide a coordinated and unified voice on relevant issues of national importance. The ARA engages political leaders at both the state and federal level in forward-looking discussions around industry potential. We bring about key policy reform to effectively enhance Australia’s productivity, economic and social prosperity, as well as its international competiveness.

The ARA creates an avenue for industry to connect, knowledge-share and work together to achieve greater results for rail. As Australasia’s leading voice for rail, we facilitate, coordinate, promote and communicate on behalf of the industry. We work to create an environment for the rail industry to prosper; we want to ensure a better rail future for all.

The ARA promotes rail along with specific projects and initiatives. Policies are developed across a range of areas including safety, telecommunications, disability and infrastructure. The ARA meets with Ministers, shadow Ministers, senior departmental officials, key organisations and decision makers regularly to promote these policies and discuss other matters raised by members.

Name: TRANSNAMIB LIMITED
Description: TransNamib serves as the sole State-owned national transport logistics provider in Namibia – a leader in provision of rail and road transport solutions. The Head Office is based in Mburumba Kerina Street, 16, Windhoek, Namibia.

Name: Southeastern Railway
Description:
Southeastern runs train services into London from Kent and East Sussex, operating some 1600 trains a day, carrying more than 400,000 passengers each weekday, serving 181 stations and covering 540 miles of track. We operate one of the busiest networks in the country including the UK’s first domestic high speed service with Javelin trains.

SE Trains Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of DfT OLR Holdings Limited (known as DFT Operators, or DFTO) the Public Sector Owning Group which also operates LNER, Northern, South Western Railway, c2c, TransPennine and Greater Anglia services.

Name: Keolis.MHI
Description:
Keolis MHI is a unique partnership between Keolis Group and Mitsubishi to work with Dubai’s Roads & Transport Authority (RTA) to operate and maintain Dubai’s world-class metro and tram networks. Through 1,850 committed employees trained to the highest standards, Keolis MHI will enhance the passenger experience and raise their expectations in terms of safety, customer service, performance and Innovation.

We aim to make the Dubai metro and tram systems a world-class public transport service for the next 15 years.

Name: Chennai Metro Rail Limited
Description: The Government of Tamil Nadu created a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) for implementing the Chennai Metro Rail Project. This SPV named as "Chennai Metro Rail Limited" was incorporated on 03.12.2007 under the Companies Act. It has now been converted into a Joint Venture of the Government of India and Government of Tamil Nadu with equal equity holding.

Name: Metro-North Railroad
Description:
Founded in 1983 when the MTA assumed control of Conrail commuter operations in the states of New York and Connecticut, Metro-North Railroad’s roots can be traced back to the New York & Harlem Railroad, which began in 1832 as a horse-car line in lower Manhattan. Today, with 384 route miles and 775 miles of track, Metro-North’s territory covers seven counties in New York State--Dutchess, Putnam, Westchester, Bronx, New York (Manhattan), Rockland, and Orange-and two counties in the state of Connecticut--New Haven and Fairfield.

Three main lines east of the Hudson River--the Hudson, the Harlem, and the New Haven -- operate out of Grand Central Terminal in New York City. Two lines west of the Hudson River--the Port Jervis and the Pascack Valley--operate out of New Jersey Transit's terminal in Hoboken, N.J., and connect with service out of Penn Station, NY via the Secaucus Transfer. The Hudson Line extends 74 miles from Grand Central Terminal to Poughkeepsie; the Harlem, 82 miles to Wassaic; and the New Haven, which also has three branch lines--the New Canaan, Danbury, and Waterbury--72 miles to New Haven. The Port Jervis Line runs 95 miles from Hoboken to Port Jervis, with 30 of those miles in New Jersey; the Pascack Valley Line extends 31 miles from Hoboken to Spring Valley, 25 of those miles being in New Jersey. Total square mileage of the service territory is approximately 2,701 miles.

The railroad also manages the Hudson Rail Link feeder bus service in the Bronx, and The Haverstraw-Ossining and Newburgh-Beacon ferries, all of which connect with the Hudson Line.

Name: CCR Metrô Bahia
Description:
O Metrô Bahia é concessionária do metrô de Salvador e Lauro de Freitas. São 38 km de extensão, duas linhas, 22 estações e dez terminais integrados, sendo nove deles administrados pela concessionária. 

O Sistema Metroviário de Salvador e Lauro de Freitas já gerou um impacto positivo de R$11,1 bilhões na economia da Bahia e transporta cerca de 400 mil pessoas por dia. Desde a sua inauguração, já foram realizadas mais de 1,9 milhões de viagens, cerca de 27 milhões de quilômetros rodados e mais de 578 milhões de passageiros transportados. 

O Metrô Bahia conta com cerca 2.500 colaboradores diretos e indiretos, e foi reconhecida pelo jornal O Estado de São Paulo como uma das 100 empresas mais influentes do Brasil em mobilidade no ano de 2023.

Name: Metro Istanbul
Description:
Metro Istanbul was established as an affiliate company by Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality in 1988 to operate railway system network in Istanbul. Metro Istanbul continues to operate existing tram, metro, light rail, funicular and aerial cable car lines as an affiliate company of Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality.

Metro Istanbul has a vision of becoming an exemplary brand in the world. Length of urban rail system network in Istanbul is 297,22 km and Metro Istanbul operates 207,72 km of this network and metro Istanbul render services to nearly 3 million passengers every day with its 18 urban rail system lines within this network.

With the acceleration of rail system investments and the commissioning of new lines, service network of Metro Istanbul is constantly growing. Metro Istanbul is constantly improving its service quality with a passenger-oriented understanding. Metro Istanbul provides excellent, fast and effective transportation services, constantly develops transportation technologies, and continuously invests in R&D and human resources whilst continuing its activities with the aim of carrying Istanbul to the future.

Metro Istanbul also carries out maintenance and repair works of the railways system vehicles, stations, facilities, line infrastructure, electrical and electronic systems under its management. In addition to its operational, maintenance and repair services, Metro Istanbul also renders engineering and consultancy services for Istanbul’s future metro projects along with the public transportation projects at home and abroad.

Name: Hafeet Rail
Description:
شبكة السكك الحديدية المشتركة بين سلطنة عمان ودولة الإمارات
Joint railway network between Sultanate of Oman & UAE

Name: Trenes Argentinos Cargas
Description:
Trenes Argentinos Cargas opera desde agosto de 2013 las principales líneas ferroviarias cargueras de nuestro país para reimpulsar las posibilidades de producción y dinamizar las economías regionales con criterio federal.

La red atraviesa 17 provincias: Salta, Jujuy, Chaco, Santiago del Estero, Formosa, Entre Ríos, Corrientes, Misiones, San Juan, San Luis, Córdoba, La Rioja, Tucumán, Santa Fe, Catamarca, Mendoza, Buenos Aires y llega hasta la terminal de Retiro, en la Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires. Este tendido está integrado por la línea Belgrano, que alcanza el norte de la República, la línea San Martín, que cubre la zona Central y Cuyo, y la línea Urquiza, que se extiende por la mesopotamia argentina.

Name: Metra Commuter Rail
Description:
Metra is more than just a rail system. We are a team of professionals who help connect our community members to the people and places that matter most. We serve the residents, visitors and businesses of Cook, DuPage, Will, Lake, Kane and McHenry counties in northeastern Illinois, with a system that spans more than 500 route miles, 11 rail lines and 243 stations.
 
Our service relies upon the expertise, dedication and teamwork of every individual at Metra. We all contribute to Metra’s success, no matter the role. Our mission is to provide on-time, reliable rail service that meets our passengers’ expectations, all at an affordable rate. Our most important resource is a committed and diverse team that brings together a wealth of knowledge, skill and experience.
 
My Metra is for all of us.

Name: MEDWAY Transports and Logistics
Description:
Established in Portugal following the acquisition of CPCarga in 2016, MEDWAY today has a strategic focus in Iberia, Italy and Belgium, and is evaluating the potential for growth in other northwest European markets. MEDWAY operates its own trains and provides tailormade and reliable services to customers. It invests in locomotives, wagons and specialised equipment such as gensets for reefer containers (for refrigerated and frozen cargo), swap bodies for general cargo, and tank containers for liquid and gases. 
By moving more and more cargo via rail instead of trucks, MEDWAY’s activities help minimise the cost and carbon footprint of shipping goods around Europe. MEDWAY is ultimately owned by MSC Mediterranean Shipping Company, the world’s largest container carrier. It provides rail operation services to multiple customers including MSC and MSC’s logistics subsidiary MEDLOG.

Name: c2c Railway Limited
Description:
c2c is an award-winning train operator running services between London Fenchurch Street and Shoeburyness, serving 26 stations in East London and South Essex. 

In 2015 we were named Passenger Operator of the Year at the National Rail Awards, and as London’s best commuter operator in Which? magazine’s 2015 survey of rail companies. In 2017 we won the Innovation of the Year Award for our Automatic Delay Repay scheme at the National Rail Awards. 

We are committed to putting the customer at the heart of everything we do.

Name: SBB Cargo
Description: SBB Cargo steht für nachhaltigen Güterverkehr auf der Schiene. Mit fast einem Viertel der gesamten Güterverkehrsleistung sind wir die Nummer eins im Schweizer Güterverkehr. Wir beschäftigen rund 3000 Mitarbeitende und verfügen über mehr als 7000 Güterwagen sowie rund 500 Triebfahrzeuge. Dank konsequenter Ausrichtung auf die Stärken der Schiene erreichte SBB Cargo 2013 mit CHF 14,7 Mio. bei einem Umsatz von CHF 953 Mio. zum ersten Mal seit über 40 Jahren ein positives Ergebnis. SBB Cargo transportiert Güter sicher und mit hoher Pünktlichkeit – und entlastet darüber hinaus die Strasse nachhaltig und wirkungsvoll. Wir bieten Schweizer Qualität, kreative Lösungen und entwickeln neue Geschäfte: So tragen wir zum Erfolg unserer Kunden bei.

Name: METRONET
Description:
METRONET - the single largest investment in public transport in Perth  

With approximately 72 kilometres of new passenger rail and 23 new stations, METRONET is the single largest investment in public transport Perth has seen.

Name: TELT Lyon Turin
Description:
TELT is the binational public promoter responsible for the realisation and operation of the cross-border section of the freight and passenger Lyon-Turin railway line.
Founded in 2015 by the Italian and French states, the company coordinates the design and construction of the 65 km of railway between Susa, in Italy, and Saint-Jean-de-Maurienne, in France. The main element of the project is the Mont Cenis base tunnel: an infrastructure consisting of two tubes of 57.5 km each, 4 access adits, 2 international stations, 1 underground safety site, 4 ventilation shafts and 204 safety bypasses.
The base tunnel is intended to replace the historic Fréjus tunnel for logistics and international mobility in the western Alpine region, contributing to the achievement of the climate neutrality goal set by Europe. Indeed, the project is part of the Mediterranean Corridor of the European TEN-T network, which aims to connect the continent via 9 long-distance rail corridors.
Currently, 19% of the works have been completed and 10 construction sites are operational with more than 1,400 people at work.

Name: BLS AG
Description:
Was uns antreibt? Menschen verbinden und Güter umweltfreundlich ans Ziel bringen. Zuverlässige Mobilität, darin sind wir richtig gut. Dieser Erfolg hat fast 4000 Gesichter. Auf die Stärken aller kommt es an. Diese grosse Vielfalt macht uns aus. Was uns dabei verbindet? Der Stolz auf das, was wir jeden Tag tun. 

bls.ch/einsteigen

Name: SFERIS
Description:
Date de création : Février 2012
Groupe : SNCF 
Directeur : M. Yvan PACCHIODO
Effectif total : 1 245
CA 2024 : 150 M€


SFERIS, UNE OFFRE MULTI-METIERS
Riche des compétences issues de sa maison mère SNCF Réseau, SFERIS déploie une offre multi-métiers dans les secteurs suivants :
- Sécurisation des chantiers (annonce des circulations, sécurité sur lignes fermées, gestion de bases travaux, gestion des circulations)
- Voie ferrée (maintenance, régénération, travaux neufs, expertise)
- Caténaires (perchage, maintenance, régénération, travaux neufs)
- Signalisation ferroviaire (SES & SM, VT, travaux neufs, LTV, aide SE)
- Expertise, Conseil et Formation ferroviaire


VALEUR AJOUTEE SFERIS : LA SECURITE AU COEUR DE NOTRE METIER
Animée par des professionnels attentifs à la qualité de nos services, SFERIS fonde son offre sur une Culture Sécurité omniprésente, et ce pour toute la chaîne de valeur. On y allie ainsi réactivité, innovation et fiabilité, sur tous les chantiers


UN POSITIONNEMENT MULTI-CLIENTS
Cette relation client, SFERIS la déploie auprès :
- De SNCF Réseau et de SNCF Mobilités
- Des autorités portuaires
- Des collectivités territoriales
- Des entreprises propriétaires d’embranchements privés
- De gestionnaires d’infrastructure à l'étranger


CERTIFICATIONS 
- Qualifications SNCF : mise en sécurité des chantiers, travaux de voie, installations fixes de travaux électriques, prestations d’annonce de circulation
- Obtention de la triple certification : ISO 9001, ISO 14001 et OHSAS 18001
- Ecovadis OR

Name: R. J. Corman Railroad Group, LLC
Description:
In 1973, Richard J. “Rick” Corman began his career in railroad construction with a backhoe, a dump truck, and a tenacious spirit. Driven first by his remarkable operator skills and then by his commitment to safe and reliable service, Rick’s goal was to become one of the nation’s leading railroad service providers. For the next 40 years he worked to establish the railroad service company that is now known as R. J. Corman.

Today, R. J. Corman Railroad Group is headquartered in Rick’s hometown of Nicholasville, Kentucky, and has field locations in 24 states. The company serves all seven Class I railroads, many regional and short line railroads as well as various rail-served industries. These operations encompass an array of services, including: railroad construction, short line railroad operations, dispatch, industrial switching services, emergency response, track material logistics, distribution centers, signal design and construction, and an excursion dinner train. The company’s diversity has given them the ability to service all aspects of the freight railroad industry at any scale.

Name: Trenitalia France
Description:
Trenitalia

Trenitalia est la compagnie ferroviaire italienne, filiale du groupe Ferrovie dello Stato Italiane fondé en 1905 et exploitant du réseau national des chemins de fer italiens. Elle est née le 1er juin 2000 pour respecter l'obligation de séparation des activités de service de transport ferroviairede celles de gestion du réseau, imposée par lalégislation européenne.
Aujourd’hui, elle opère quotidiennement environ 10000 trains et transporte chaque année plus d’1 milliard de voyageurs en train et en bus.
3ème opérateur en Europe, elle est déjà présente en Grèce, en Allemagne, au Royaume-Uni et en Espagne.

Trenitalia en France 

Trenitalia France est le premier opérateur européen à faire son entrée sur le marché ferroviaire français. Lancée en décembre 2021, son offre de train à grande vitesse Frecciarossa vient compléter l'offre existante sur la ligne Paris-Milan et depuis avril 2022 sur la ligne Paris-Lyon (Part-Dieu et Perrache). 
À la suite d’un éboulement en Maurienne survenu fin août 2023, le trafic ferroviaire entre la France et l’Italie est suspendu jusqu’à nouvel ordre. Dès la réhabilitation des voies, les trains Frecciarossa desserviront à nouveau la ligne entre Paris et Milan. Plus d’informations sur www.trenitalia.com 

Frecciarossa, le train à grande vitesse de Trenitalia

LesFrecciarossasont les trains grande vitesse deTrenitaliaqui fontvoyager lesitaliensdepuis plus de 10 ans. Ils circulent partout en Italie et désormais aussi en France, entreParis, Lyon, Chambéry, Modane, Bardonecchia, Turin et Milan.

Vous souhaitez nous rejoindre ? 
Rendez-vous sur trenitalia.com

Name: ViaQuatro
Description:
A ViaQuatro é a concessionária responsável pela operação e manutenção da Linha 4-Amarela de metrô de São Paulo, primeiro contrato de PPP (Parceria Público-Privada) assinado no País e atualmente emprega cerca de 1,6 mil colaboradores. Já foram investidos US$ 450 milhões entre sistemas, equipamentos e trens e ao longo dos 30 anos de concessão, o total será de US$ 2 bilhões.

Com 12,8 quilômetros de extensão e 11 estações em operação, liga a região da Luz, no centro de São Paulo, ao bairro de Vila Sônia, na zona oeste, transportando 700 mil pessoas em média diariamente com eficiência, rapidez e conforto. Toda a energia elétrica utilizada para movimentar a frota de 29 trens é limpa, o que impacta positivamente o meio ambiente.

Na América Latina, a Linha 4-Amarela foi pioneira no uso do sistema driverless, operação automática sem a presença de condutor dentro do trem, o que permite a supervisão permanente de velocidade, conferindo mais segurança e precisão à operação. Foi a primeira também a operar com as portas de plataforma em todas as estações.

Name: CFS Chemin de Fer du Sénégal
Description:
La Société Nationale Les Chemins de Fer du Sénégal (CFS), créée le 22 mai 2020, est chargée de la gestion et du développement du secteur ferroviaire. Elle se substitue à l’Agence des Nouveaux Chemins de Fer (ANCF) et à la défunte société TRANSRAIL, avec pour mission de redonner au rail toute sa place dans le système de transport national et sous-régional.

CFS est l’acteur public de référence pour la modernisation, la valorisation et l’expansion du réseau ferroviaire sénégalais. Placée au cœur des ambitions du Référentiel Sénégal 2050, l’entreprise incarne la volonté des nouvelles autorités de bâtir un réseau performant et structurant.

Notre priorité actuelle : la construction de la ligne Dakar–Tambacounda à écartement standard d’ici 2029. Ce projet stratégique s’inscrit dans une dynamique plus vaste : la réalisation de 2000 km de voies ferrées d’ici 2050, pour une meilleure connectivité des territoires.

Nos missions s’articulent autour de quatre axes majeurs :
	•	Gestion du patrimoine ferroviaire : recherche de financements, développement du réseau, valorisation foncière, mise en œuvre de PPP.
	•	Ingénierie : maîtrise d’ouvrage des projets ferroviaires, maîtrise d’œuvre études et travaux.
	•	Gestion des infrastructures : exploitation, maintenance, sécurité du réseau, déploiement d’une police ferroviaire.
	•	Coopération internationale : membre de l’Union Internationale des Chemins de Fer (UIC), CFS est acteur des grands corridors régionaux.

CFS s’engage à faire du rail un levier de transformation économique, sociale et territoriale du Sénégal.

Name: Madhya Pradesh Metro Rail Corporation Limited
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn page of Madhya Pradesh Metro Rail Corporation Limited (MPMRCL). 
MPMRCL is incorporated to implement metro rail projects in the state.
Our goal is to offer a rail-based Sustainable Urban Transport System. To develop Smart and Healthy Cities that increase the quality of life and better access to goods and services. We aim to generate employment opportunities and mitigate climate change resulting in a livable city environment that is health-supportive with more allocation of road space to people for daily transit routines rather than vehicles.

Name: Alto
Description: La voie du futur – transformer le transport ferroviaire avec un train à grande vitesse entre Québec et Toronto | The track of the future – transforming rail travel with a high-speed train connecting Toronto and Québec City

Name: Railofy
Description:
Railofy is a travel tech start-up and an IRCTC Authorized Premium Partner with the mission to transform the train travel experience for Bharat! Our services include-
1. Hotplate - Order hot & fresh food from the top restaurants in town and get it delivered at your train seat.
2. Train ticket booking - with an AI-powered recommendation engine as well as free cancellation feature.
3. Confirm Guarantee - protection against Waitlist and RAC tickets. Get flight, bus, tatkal tickets and more at train ticket prices, if your ticket doesn’t get confirmed. 
4. Whatsapp Bot - Check PNR Status now directly on your Whatsapp. Hassle free and without any downloads. Get automatic updates on Whatsapp. Just Whatsapp your PNR no to 9881193322.

Name: Scarborough Transit Connect
Description:
The Scarborough Subway Extension will bring the TTC’s Line 2 subway service nearly eight kilometres farther into Scarborough.

It will extend from Kennedy Station to Sheppard Avenue and McCowan Road, providing quick and seamless transit for those heading into and out of the downtown core and those travelling within Scarborough. The extension will replace Line 3 (the Scarborough RT), helping to reduce travel times and improve access to jobs, schools and other key destinations throughout the city.

To deliver the Scarborough Subway Extension as quickly as possible, construction has been split into two contracts – an advanced tunneling contract that is already underway, and the stations, rail and systems (SRS) contract. The SRS contract is kicking off with a development phase before the construction phase begins, with Scarborough Transit Connect selected as the partner for the development phase.

This consortium is made up of Aecon Infrastructure Management Inc., and FCC Canada Ltd. 

Key Facts:

Number of stations - Three
Connections to other transit options - Up to six
Three bus services - GO Transit, Durham Region Transit and TTC buses
Route length - 7.8 km
Ridership - 105,000 daily boardings
Increase in transit use - 52,000 daily boarding by new users
Improved access to transit - 38,000 more people within walking distance to transit
Improved access to jobs - 34,000 more jobs within walking distance to transit
Yearly reductions in greenhouse gas emissions - 10,000 tonnes

Name: Southern Railway
Description:
On 26 July 2015, Gatwick Express and Southern joined Great Northern and Thameslink to operate under one company, Govia Thameslink Railway.

Southern is a very successful rail franchise operator, providing train services for commuters, airport users, business and leisure travellers in south London, between central London and the South coast, through East and West Sussex, Surrey and parts of Kent and Hampshire.  We are focused on improving the customer experience by supporting and developing our people.  With nearly half a million passengers journeys every day, would you like to be part of our aim to create great journeys every day for a sustainable future.

Our network is one of the busiest in the country. 

Southern manages 155 stations. Our two principal London stations are London Victoria and London Bridge (managed by Network Rail). 

We operate a fleet of around 252 trains seven days a week across 414 miles of track and up to 24 hours a day. Each weekday, we provide 1,700 services while on Saturdays we provide 1,563 and 1,040 on Sundays. 

Our commitment to continuous improvement has seen tangible improvements to our stations, our trains and to our passengers’ overall travelling experience. We’re constantly seeking new talent to help us continue this trend.

Having achieved the Investors in People (IiP) Champion status, we are also committed to our employees. 

We are a passionate, customer-centred organisation. We want honest, innovative people who are equally passionate about customer service and have the ability to work together safely to deliver results.

For our current opportunities please visit https://www.gtrailwaycareers.com

Name: Global Railway Review
Description:
We deliver high-quality analysis across all aspects of the industry, from digitalisation and infrastructure to rolling stock and passenger experience.

What sets us apart?

- Global focus: We cover the entire railway landscape, reflecting the industry's international shift.
- Unbiased content: Our articles are written by industry leaders and experts, providing in-depth analysis without marketing influence.
- Trusted source: For over 30 years, Global Railway Review has built a reputation for editorial integrity, keeping readers informed on the latest developments.

Explore our website for in-depth articles on:

- Digitalisation
- Infrastructure
- Regulations & Legislation
- Rolling Stock
- Safety & Security
- Signalling & Telecommunications
- Sustainability
- The Passenger

Connect with us and stay ahead of the curve!

Subscribe Free on our website (it only takes a minute!):
https://www.globalrailwayreview.com/zmember/subscribers/register_new/

Name: Bombela Operating Company (PTY) LTD
Description: The Gautrain system (Johannesburg new railway network - nearly 80km long, 10 stations - and bus feeder services) is operated and maintained by the Bombela Operating Company under contract to the Bombela Concession Company. The Operating Company consists of RATP Development in partnership with SPG and Murray & Roberts.

Name: Rail Baltica
Description: RB Rail AS is a multi-national joint venture of the Republics of Estonia, Latvia and Lithuania, which has been established to implement Rail Baltica – the first pan-Baltic infrastructure project of its kind. RB Rail is the central coordinator for the Rail Baltica project.

Name: Fret SNCF
Description:
Fret SNCF fait partie de Rail Logisitics Europe. Fret SNCF est une entreprise ferroviaire capable de répondre à tous vos besoins de transport, même les plus spécifiques, grâce à sa couverture territoriale et à la gestion capacitaire.

La densité de son réseau et ses liaisons régulières à forte capacité lui permettent de se situer au 1er rang des transporteurs de marchandises en France et au 3eme rang en Europe. 

Reconnu pour la sécurité de ses acheminements, Fret SNCF s’engage dans l’amélioration de son bilan environnemental.

Name: PKP Polskie Linie Kolejowe S.A.
Description:
KP Polish Railway Lines Company is a manager of national rail network. Our basic product is a timetable constructed in compliance with our customer’s order – the customer being a passenger or freight rail operator. The product is sold within a contract defining an allocated train path.

PKP Polnische Eisenbahnlinien S. A. ist ein Verwalter des nationalen Bahnnetzes. Unser grundlegendes Produkt ist das Fahrplan geordneter auf der Bestellung des Kunden: Bahnfuhrunternehmer, Fahrgäste oder Güterverkehr.  Dieses Produkt ist auf dem Grund des Vertrags in Form von der angegebenen Route verkauft.

Name: Rail Media
Description:
We are Rail Media and we create opportunities to connect - whether it’s connecting you to industry news, with like-minded professionals or even with that ideal candidate for a role in your company. We keep you connected with the latest developments and projects within the industry, through reading one of our magazines or by attending one of our many events.

Rail Media has the rail industry covered - here’s how:

RailStaff
A monthly news magazine and website for the UK rail industry. Print readership: 141,811. Monthly digital readership: 93,000.

RailwayPeople.com
Launched in 2001, RailwayPeople.com is the largest dedicated rail job site in the world.
260,000 Registered Candidates; Between 800-2,000 live rail jobs at any one time; 1.2m page views per month. 

Rail Engineer
A must read for any rail engineers, project managers, directors and leading rail executive decision makers.
