Print readership: 58,500. Monthly digital readership: 112,800.

The RailStaff Awards
Started in 2007 with the aim of recognising the heroic people in the UK rail industry. 
20 categories, 1,350 nominations; 47,000 votes and 1,200 guests at the party.

RailUK.com
A rail news site delivering up-to-the-minute industry news from around the UK.
An average of 232,000 pageviews per month.

Rail Summits
Each year, Rail Media organises various Rail Summits covering a wide variety of topics. These conferences see expert industry professionals present the latest information and developments within their field. For 2018, Rail Media will be hosting the Rail Asset Management Summit, the Rail Technology Summit and the Rail Safety Summit.

Rail Creative
The creative arm of Rail Media, with a passion for innovative thinking. Whether you need help with your company’s brand, advertising, onscreen design or print marketing, we can help you.

www.rail-media.com

Name: FIPS - Ferrovia Interna do Porto de Santos
Description:
Somos a FIPS, cessionária responsável pela gestão da operação, manutenção e expansão da infraestrutura ferroviária que atende o Porto de Santos. 

Nascemos de uma parceria de empresas referências do modal ferroviário no país – Rumo, MRS e VLI – reunidas com o objetivo de aumentar a eficiência da operação no local, oferecendo também mais segurança e benefícios para a comunidade portuária, movimentando a economia, gerando negócios e empregos.

Name: DB RRTS Operations India Private Limited
DB International Operations
Description:
DB International Operations, founded in 2017, acquires and manages railway operations and maintenance projects outside of Europe. 

We are part of Deutsche Bahn, the no. 1 operator for passenger and freight rail transport in Europe and one of the largest mobility providers worldwide. Applying the long-standing rail experience of the DB Group to international railway projects, we take over operational responsibility and build high-performing O&M organizations. We offer both passenger rail transport (metro, commuter, tram, intercity, high-speed) and freight rail transport for newly built and existing railway systems. Our clients benefit from the high quality and performance culture of the DB network and the expertise and passion of our employees. 

Visit our website to learn more about our services and career opportunities.

Imprint and Privacy Statement: https://io.deutschebahn.com/en/imprint-and-privacy-statements-for-social-media-presences/

Name: OmniTRAX, Inc.
Description:
Reliable Rail Services. Proven Real Estate Solutions.
OmniTRAX is a smarter way to ship.

Powered by Rail & Real Estate.

We’re proud of who we are, and what we’ve been able to accomplish in a relatively short time. Working in conjunction with our sister company BREG we combine the advantages of real estate and rail with capabilities to will build buildings, develop infrastructure, and provide lease options to suit your needs as an invested partner. We continue to add new services, new companies, and new railroads to help businesses of all sizes grow. We’re dedicated to Powering your Business through our bundled services that include rail freight, terminal and switching services, multimodal transloading, car storage as well as land purchase and industrial development. With access to more than one Class I railroad at most of our properties, we offer a competitive option to suit your supply chain needs. Above all we are committed to service consistency and safety in everything that we do.

Name: Metro Trains Sydney
Description:
MTS is Redefining Rail. 

As the private operator and maintainer of the M1 Northwest and Bankstown Line, we are the first in Australia to run a fully automated network.

We are proud of our expertise, performance and customer service through the delivery of safe, seamless, fully accessible metro services.

This site celebrates our success, showcases what it’s like to work at MTS, and promotes current career opportunities.

Name: SIANA - Société Marocaine de Maintenance des Rames à Grande Vitesse
Description:
SIANA, C’EST..
La marque commerciale de la Société Marocaine de Maintenance des Rames à Grande Vitesse. C’est une joint-venture entre deux piliers du secteur ferroviaire, L’ONCF (Office National des Chemins de Fer Marocain) et la SNCF (Société Nationale des Chemins de Fer Français).

La SMMRGV (Société Marocaine de Maintenance des Rames à Grande Vitesse), est née de la volonté de l’ONCF de doter la nouvelle Ligne à Grande Vitesse d’une maintenance des rames « Al Boraq » conforme aux standards Internationaux.

Name: Railway Association of Canada
Description:
The Railway Association of Canada (RAC) represents close to 60 freight and passenger railway companies—railways that transport millions of passengers and approximately $380 billion worth of goods across our country each year. RAC also counts a growing number of industrial railways and railway supply companies in its associate membership. As part of the fifth largest rail network in the world, RAC members are the backbone of Canada’s transportation system.

Our values:
- Safety
- Respect
- Excellence
- Leadership
- Inclusiveness

Name: SNCF Voyageurs Matériel
Description:
SNCF Matériel est un acteur incontournable du monde ferroviaire, grâce à son réseau de technicentres et de son offre de service de maintenance. 

Au sein de SNCF Voyageurs, le métier Matériel gère la maintenance de près de 17 000 matériels roulants, afin d’assurer la mobilité des personnes comme des marchandises.
Responsable de la maintenance du matériel roulant, la Direction du Matériel assure une performance industrielle de haut niveau au service du Groupe et de ses clients. Sécurité, qualité et expertise technique sont ainsi garanties lors de l’entretien des matériels et des pièces de rechange.

S’appuyant sur ses 2 grands métiers que sont la maintenance industrielle et l’ingénierie, l’offre de la Direction du Matériel se structure par type de clients (propriétaires, exploitants et mainteneurs). 

L’ambition de Matériel est de mieux servir ses clients internes et externes avec sa filiale Masteris.

Name: Axiom Rail Services
Description: Axiom Rail Services is a leading provider of FRA-approved training, compliance audits, and rail consulting solutions. We serve clients of all sizes from US Military operations to small logistics terminals, offering tailored programs that enhance safety, efficiency, and operational excellence. With a proven safety, record industry expertise, and hands on support. We help rail operators stay compliant, secure, and ready for future challenges. Partner with Axiom Rail - your trusted rail services expert.

Name: EAGLE RAILCAR SERVICES
Description: Eagle Railcar Services the nation’s leading independent provider of railcar repair services. We have 13 full-service railcar repair and maintenance facilities, which are located in Georgia, Indiana, Kansas, Louisiana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Texas. We have 24/7 Mobile Repair Service!

Name: VR Snabbtåg
Description: VR erbjuder den bästa tågupplevelsen mellan Stockholm och Göteborg. Vi ger dig ett tryggt, snabbt och personligt resande både för fritid och arbete. Därför erbjuder vi resor med högst punktlighet, bra priser och en överlägsen serviceupplevelse.

Name: Hull Trains
Description: Hull Trains is an award winning, open-access operator running 94 direct services a week from Hull and the Humber region direct to the capital. A £60 million investment has seen five new world-class Hitachi 802 trains replace our entire Class 180 fleet. The new Paragon fleet has been fully operational by 2021. The hi-tech electric and diesel trains are one of the most modern and innovative trains on the UK’s rail network.

Name: RailNetEurope (RNE)
Description: RaiNetEurope is an association of European rail infrastructure companies established in 2004 to harmonise conditions in European railway transport. Its objectives are: to promote railway traffic on the European rail infrastructure network; enable train operators to gain easy and fast access to the network; enhance the quality of international rail services; and increase the efficiency of related timetabling and operational processes.

Name: Tyne & Wear Metro
Description: The Metro is an iconic light rail network serving the five districts in Tyne & Wear.  With our customers at the heart of everything we do,we employ over 1000 people, serve 60 stations, run 500 services a day enabling nearly 40 million passenger journeys per year, so we are an essential part of everyday life in the North East.

Name: TasRail
Description:
TasRail is a State-owned Company, established on 1 December 2009 by an Act of the Tasmanian Parliament. The principal objectives of the business are set out in the Rail Company Act 2009 and require the Company to operate a rail business in Tasmania, effectively and efficiently and to operate its activities in accordance with sound commercial practice. 
 
With a workforce of around 250 men and women, Tasmania’s current freight task is approximately 2.5 million tonnes per year – generating annual revenue in the order of $30 million. Since it was established, TasRail has spent $97.7 million purchasing goods and services from more than 900 Tasmanian Companies.

Name: VBB Verkehrsverbund Berlin-Brandenburg GmbH
Description: Der Verkehrsverbund Berlin-Brandenburg (VBB) gehört zu den größten Verkehrsverbünden in Europa. Mehr als vier Millionen Fahrgäste nutzen täglich die Busse und Bahnen der rund 40 im VBB organisierten Verkehrsunternehmen. Sie erleben einen kundenorientierten Nahverkehr mit aufeinander abgestimmten Fahrplänen, vielfältigen Verkehrsverbindungen, einem einheitlichen Tarif und einer umfassenden Fahrgastinformation. Der VBB setzt sich für eine smarte Vernetzung der Verkehrsmittel in der Stadt genauso wie auf dem Land ein und treibt innovative Lösungen für den ÖPNV von morgen voran, z.B. beim Ticketing, Infrastrukturausbau und der Angebotsplanung . Dies gestaltet der VBB im Hinblick darauf, so viele Menschen wie möglich ins Boot der Verkehrswende zu holen.

Name: Mosaic Rail Ltd
Description:
Specialising primarily in signalling, we provide flexible support to a variety of other disciplines without the need for full scale mobilisation. Whether you require an assessment, plan, sketch or even full scale detailed design services, Mosaic can provide you with the necessary skills to deliver either as a delivery partner or embedded within an existing project team. We are happy to work along side local authorities, developers and also other rail project stakeholders.
Our core aim is to provide a high quality service without making signalling design interfaces and
alterations unnecessarily expensive as we do not have the huge overheads and framework ties the larger more established companies carry. We firmly believe this is actively driving away much needed investment in railway infrastructure and we aim to provide best value for taxpayer investment whilst not compromising on either 
quality or safety.
Whatever your requirements Mosaic can support you in a variety of capacities for single discipline or 
multi-disciplinary schemes through our unique partnership with Integrated Rail, our multidisciplinary infrastructure partner.

Our core capabilities are:-
GRIP stage 1-4 signalling scope determinations, assessments, reports and technical advice 
Signalling scheme plans and sketches.
Braking and TPWS calculations.
Signal sighting services
Risk assessments
Design management
CRE capability
CEM capability
Project engineering capability
CBI / RRI control tables
CBI interlocking data preparation
SSI / CBI trackside design
RRI free-wired interlocking trackside design
Panel and signaller interface design
Signalling bonding design
Level crossing design
Remote control designs (TDM/FDM)
TPWS trackside design
Fringe specifications
Signalling design specifications
Tender and bid submission support / estimating
IDC / IDR assistance and multidisciplinary coordination
IRSE licence workplace assessments
Expert witness capability
Test plans / strategies

Name: LISEA
Description:
LISEA, concessionnaire de la ligne à grande vitesse Sud Europe Atlantique entre Tours et Bordeaux (LGV SEA).

LISEA est une société détenue par VINCI Concessions (42.045%), Meridiam (41,945%) et Caisse des dépôts et des consignations (16,01%).

Ses missions premières : garantir la sécurité, la performance, la gestion et l’exploitation de l’infrastructure aux bénéfices des voyageurs et des territoires ; d’offrir de nouvelles perspectives de mobilité régionales, nationales et européennes ; de contribuer à l’attractivité et au développement économique des territoires traversés ; de soutenir des projets environnementaux et d’insertion sociale via le Fonds SEA pour la transition des territoires ; d'assurer la gestion et le suivi des 3 800 ha de mesures environnementales avec un réseau de 500 partenaires.

LISEA s’est vu confier, par SNCF Réseau, la concession de la Ligne à Grande Vitesse Sud Europe Atlantique entre Tours et Bordeaux (LGV SEA). Le contrat de concession, signé le 16 juin 2011 entre SNCF Réseau et LISEA pour une durée de 50 ans, émane d’une décision commune de l’État, de SNCF Réseau et des collectivités territoriales. 

Ce contrat de concession a permis de limiter les investissements publics (51 % pour la LGV SEA contre 75 % au minimum pour d’autres LGV).

LISEA continue aujourd’hui d’innover, avec notamment un investissement sur fonds privés de plus de 200 M€ dans un site de maintenance de trains à grande vitesse (à Marcheprime), afin de renforcer l’offre et faciliter l’ouverture à la concurrence. 

Quelques éléments : 
- 2 juillet 2017 : lancement du service commercial
- 302 km de ligne à grande vitesse
- 140 millions de voyageurs depuis juillet 2017 dont 22 millions en 2024
- 1 Observatoire socio-économique
- 1 Observatoire environnemental
- 1 application collaborative innovante de gestion et de suivi des mesures compensatoires : CompenSEA.
- 1 application de maintenance prédictive : SEACloud

Nous retrouver : http://www.lisea.fr/

Name: GPMM Opération & Maintenance
Description: The Groupe des Partenaires pour la Mobilité des Montréalais (Groupe PMM) is a consortium created with SNC-Lavalin and Alstom to operate and maintain the Réseau Express Métropolitain (REM) in Montreal, Canada. The REM project will be one of the largest automated transportation network in the world, with 67 kilometres of track and 26 stations. Born from this mutual expertise between these two major players in the transportation industry, Groupe PMM Operations and Maintenance relies on proven knowledge and accomplishments both in Canada and internationally.

Name: Railcenter
Description:
Railcenter is dé unieke plek die vakmanschapsontwikkeling, technologie en vakmensen met liefde voor het spoor met elkaar verbindt.

Bij Railcenter enthousiasmeren en inspireren zij elkaar over de vooruitgang, de verbinding en de verwondering die het Nederlandse spoor biedt en brengt. Met als doel het bijdragen aan het veilig en op tijd vervoeren van reizigers en goederen.

Vakmensen komen hier voor het volgen van een opleiding, kennisuitwisseling, dagen elkaar uit, doen ontdekkingen, testen samen, delen hun passie, sparren, leren en scherpen zich aan elkaar. 

Ook bieden wij de railsector een podium waar zij kan laten zien waar ze voor staat en wat ze waard is.

Met en voor wie
Railcenter werkt nauw samen met partners als infrabeheerders, ingenieursbureaus, spooraannemers, leveranciers, onderzoek- en kennisinstituten, overheden en andere stakeholders. We werken met en voor elkaar. We hebben elkaar nodig om te werken aan een beter en veiliger spoor. 

Onze aanpak
Wie in de spoorsector werkt, weet dat het een dynamisch speelveld is. Maar weet de buitenwereld dat ook? Kennen de werknemers van de toekomst de uitdagingen die er liggen? Hebben ze enig idee van de loopbaanmogelijkheden die er zijn? En wat te denken van politici en overheden? Hoe blijven zij op de hoogte van ontwikkelingen op het gebied van rail? 

En van onderzoeks- en kennisinstituten wil je graag dat ze je weten te vinden, want hun kennis en kunde helpen de sector verder. Railcenter wil dit inzichtelijk maken en dat doen wij aan de hand van vier speerpunten: vakmanschapsontwikkeling, testen en simuleren, ontmoeten en inspireren en promotie.

Name: OSLO
Description: OSLO Entreprise Ferroviaire est une filiale de SNCF Voyageurs qui produit les trains Ouigo Train Classique

Name: Mantena Nordic
Description:
Som specialister inom underhåll av järnvägsfordon för Mantena vidare en lång tradition järnvägsdrift i Norden. Vår kompetens sträcker sig från de största och tyngsta lokomotiven till de minsta och mest avancerade komponenterna. Mantenas huvudkontor ligger i Jernbanetorget 1 i Oslo, medan enheter och verkstäder för underhåll är fördelat på flera ställen i Norge och Sverige.

Vår kärnkompetens är kunskap och erfarenhet med utrustningen som ska underhållas, vår förmåga att leverera i rätt tid samt vår fokus på innovation. Vår ambition är att kontinuerligt stärka positionen som en nytänkande aktör i en framtidsorienterad bransch.

Name: Velvet
Description:
Velvet est la première compagnie française indépendante de train à grande vitesse. 
Notre ambition est de répondre à la demande de voyages en forte croissance sur la façade Atlantique en apportant 10 millions de places supplémentaires entre les villes d’Angers, Bordeaux, Nantes, Rennes et Paris, sur des trajets directs de 2h en moyenne

Nous proposons une alternative qui met le plaisir et la simplicité au cœur de l’expérience de voyage, avec une offre efficace qui répond aux besoins des voyageurs. Pour voyager plus et mieux !

Name: GCC Railways Authority
Description:
The GCC RAILWAYS AUTHORITY (GCCRA) was approved by the Supreme Council in December 2021, to ensure the contribution to the further development and effective functioning of GCC Railway Mainline as one regional and integrated railway linking all member states and networking with their national railway networks.

GCCRA plays a crucial role in fostering connectivity and promoting transportation efficiency in the Gulf Cooperation Council region.

Name: Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Italia
Description:
Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Italia, based in Florence and since 1990 member of the Knorr-Bremse Group, is leader in the designing, manufacturing, marketing and servicing of brake systems for railway vehicles. The Rail Vehicle Systems division equips mass transit vehicles such as metro cars and light rail vehicles, as well as freight trains, locomotives, mainline passenger trains and high-speed trains with highly advanced products. Along with braking systems the range of products includes intelligent entrance systems, HVAC systems, auxiliary power supply systems, control components and windscreen wiper systems, platform screen doors, friction material, driver assistance systems, and control technology and the new sanitary system concept with ecological closed circuit system. With RailServices, our company offers a full range of activities for the entire KB portfolio , from maintenance to on-site support from original part logistic to modernization.

In 2023 Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Italia acquired Alisea S.r.l. an engineering company founded in 1985 in Taranto and in 2024 we inaugurated the new Electronic Repair Center in Grottaglie (TA). We are specialized in repairs, reverse engineering and obsolescence prevention of digital, analog, hydrid and multivendor power electronic modules and electronic boards. Visit the Electronic Repair Center page at: https://www.linkedin.com/company/electronic-repair-center-kb/?viewAsMember=true

The privacy notice is available at the link https://www.knorr-bremse.com/en/footer/data-protection/data-protection-declaration-knorr-bremse-ag/

Name: SYSTRA Asia
Description:
SYSTRA Asia is part of SYSTRA Group, one of the world’s leading engineering and consulting groups specializing in transport and mobility solutions. SYSTRA Asia offers a complete range of consultancy services for traffic, transport, pedestrian, and systems engineering.

Working closely with governments, NGOs, operators, financial institutions, developers, architects, planners, engineers and contractors, in both public and private sectors, our specialists create movement solutions aimed at meeting the mobility needs for rapidly evolving cities and regions throughout Asia for the present and the future.

Name: MTR Corporation (UK) Limited
Description:
Every day, MTR connects people and communities. As a recognised world-class operator of sustainable rail transport services, we are a leader in safety, reliability, customer service and efficiency.

MTR has extensive end-to-end railway expertise with more than 40 years of railway projects experience from design to planning and construction through to commissioning, maintenance and operations. Going beyond railway delivery and operation, MTR also creates and manages dynamic communities around its network through seamless integration of rail, commercial and property development.

With more than 40,000 dedicated employees*, MTR carries over 13 million passenger journeys worldwide every weekday in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, Sweden, Australia and the Mainland of China. MTR strives to grow and connect communities for a better future.

*includes our subsidiaries and associates in Hong Kong and worldwide

Name: The Pway Engineer
Description:
The Pway Engineer is your go to source for comprehensive educational content on railway engineering, specialising in track systems. Our mission is to empower railway professionals, engineers, and enthusiasts by providing clear and actionable tutorials, technical insights, and project case studies.

We cover critical topics such as track design, construction, maintenance, and safety, with a focus on practical applications and real-world problem solving. From track geometry to ballast management, The Pway Engineer is here to support your growth and expertise in railway engineering.

 Follow our page for regular updates on new educational videos and resources, and sharpen your skills in the field of railway engineering!

Why not download our free Guide to Cant eBook?
Hit the link to get yours 
https://thepwayengineer.ck.page/cantpdf

Name: JBR Services
Description:
1 La société JBR Services fondée en Octobre 2012 est spécialisée dans le domaine des prestations ferroviaires (Formation - Production - Ingénierie) pour train fret - travaux - voyageurs - tourisme. 
Vente en ligne / Demande de devis : EPI - Matériels & Agrès de sécurité ferroviaire.

Services :

Name: THEMA
Description:
THEMA S.A., the Operation and Maintenance Company managing the Thessaloniki Metro Network, is a company formed by ATM Group and EGIS Group, globally acknowledged for their excellence in providing top quality infrastructure and mobility services. 
ATM is a world leading expert in the operations and maintenance of driverless metro systems and EGIS is an international key player active in the consulting, construction, engineering, and mobility service sectors.   
With the primary focus on a high standard transportation, THEMA is committed to offer to passengers, citizens and city-users an upgraded travel experience based on the operation efficiency, the passenger safety, and the environmental sustainability.  
THEMA, using its expertise and know-how coming from its mother companies, combined with the outstanding infrastructure and the cutting edge Automatic Driverless Metro Technology provided by ELLINIKO METRO S.A., responsible for the development and the construction of the Thessaloniki Metro, will facilitate the daily transportation of more than 300.000 passengers granting safe and immediate access to the entire city axis. 
Moreover, the daily quality of life of Thessaloniki citizens will be upgraded as road traffic and air pollution will be significantly reduced.

Name: go.Rheinland
Description:
Gemeinsam mit dem Aachener Verkehrsverbund (AVV) und dem Verkehrsverbund Rhein-Sieg (VRS) agiert die go.Rheinland GmbH als Vorreiter und Motor einer modernen, nachhaltigen Mobilität in der Region.

Unsere Aufgaben:

• die Planung des SPNV-Angebots
• die Durchführung von Wettbewerbsverfahren im SPNV
• die Bestellung von Verkehrsleistungen im SPNV
• die Investitionsförderung im gesamten straßen- und schienengebundenen 
   öffentlichen Personennahverkehr (ÖPNV/SPNV)

Wir als Arbeitgeberin bieten:

• Sichere Arbeitsplätze
• Familienfreundlichkeit (flexible Arbeitszeiten zur Vereinbarkeit von Beruf und Familie)
• Attraktive tarifliche Leistungen nach TVÖD-V (VKA)
• Betriebliche Altersvorsorge (RZVK)
• Arbeitnehmer*innenfreundliche Zusatzleistungen (z. Bsp. JobTicket)
• Modern ausgestattete Arbeitsplätze in angenehmer Arbeitsatmosphäre
• Temporäres Arbeiten von zu Hause
• Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten

Name: CG Railway Business Division
Description:
CG Power and Industrial Solutions Limited is a Murugappa Group Company. CG is a pioneer in providing solutions for Railway in Rolling stock and signalling equipment with the most comprehensive product portfolio. CG stands for decades of experience in providing solution to railways and rolling stock equipment’s for locomotives. CG Business consists of 3 main product lines viz. Traction Machines and Systems- AC & DC Traction Motors, Traction Alternators, solutions for self-propelled vehicles, Traction Electrics -IGBT based Propulsion Systems & Loco Panels, Railway signaling products -Signaling relays, point machines, data logger and coach products like panels and Carriage fans. We also manufacture and supply track side transformer, Stamping for traction motors, auxiliary motors for locomotives, Circuit Breakers, Surge arrestors and Instrument transformers.

CG Railway business started its operations in the year 1982 to develop various products for Indian Railways. Today CG is a major supplier for traction machines & system, Propulsion system and signaling & coach products to Indian Railways.

Name: Kaupunkiliikenne Oy
Description: Pääkaupunkiseutu kasvaa ja kehittyy ennennäkemättömällä tavalla. Haluamme olla kestävien kaupunkien paras liikuttaja ja kehittäjä. Siksi rakennamme tulevaisuuden kaupunkia ja pidämme sen liikkeessä jo tänään. Perustehtävämme on tuottaa ja kehittää pääkaupunkiseudun kestävän liikkumisen palveluita ja infrastruktuuria laadukkaasti ja kustannustehokkaasti. Vastaamme joukkoliikenneinfran, metrojunien ja raitiovaunujen liikennöinnistä, kunnossapidosta sekä kehittämisestä. Meillä työskennellään ainutlaatuisten joukkoliikenteen ja kaupunkikehityshankkeiden parissa 1200 huippuammattilaisen voimin 130:ssa eri ammatissa.

Name: RailTravel
Description: Railway Systems

Name: Women in Rail Awards
Description:
The Women in Rail Awards aim to showcase and reward individuals and companies (large and small) who have made a signiﬁcant contribution to improving gender balance, equality, diversity and inclusion within the UK railway industry.

The event is attended by a cross section of the UK rail sector, including key stakeholders and decision makers, infrastructure providers, operators, manufacturers, rolling stock companies, technical consultancy companies and suppliers, to name only a few.

Name: GBRX
Description:
GBRX is the strategic innovation body for Britain's railway. Its purpose is to convene the sector to expose and overcome the barriers to technological adoption to improve how the railway works for people and to develop sustainable skills for the future.

In January 2025, the Secretary of State of Transport set out her five priorities for Shadow GBR. GBRX’s mandate is to deliver priority four: 'unlock strategic innovation by partnering with world leading innovators to improve how the railway works for people and support the UK as a technology and AI power.’ 

GBRX is focussed on unlocking strategic innovation where it is most challenging, at the crossroads of track and train, partnering with world leading innovators, academia, supporting SME’s, and collaborating across the sector, to improve how the railway works for people and stakeholders.

Name: Pinsly Railroad Company
Description:
Pinsly Railroad Company is a short line railroad holding company that is focused on safe and sustainable growth through acquisitions, strategic investments, and superior service

Our team has an established reputation for acquiring and profitably operating freight railroads in the United States. Pinsly draws on the depth of experience of its team to achieve its goals.

Freight railroads play a crucial role in the world's transportation network. Our mission is to provide rail customers with safe, reliable, customized, and efficient transportation solutions to move their product to end markets. Through targeted investment in capital improvements, our company enhances operations and customer service to attract and retain top customers.

Our railroads:
FGA, GRYR, CKIN, CAMY, PVRR, HRR, & VVRR
Our transloading and logistics companies:
Railroad Distribution Services
Pinsly Trucking
Pinsly Bulk Commodities

Name: Snälltåget
Description:
Vi på Snälltåget drivs av att ge våra resenärer en trevligare resa till ett bättre pris. Vi har minst två tåg som vi kör mellan Malmö och Stockholm. Under sommaren och vintern kör vi även till Åre och Jämtland. Vintertid kör vi till Österrike och under resterande del av året kör vi även till Berlin.

Snälltåget är mindre än de flesta aktörer i tågbranschen och kan därför erbjuda dig en lite mer personlig resa. Vi vill få dig som resenär att alltid känna dig sedd och välkommen ombord och försöker ge dig så bra service som möjligt. Vi har också en riktig restaurangvagn som vi kallar för Krogen, med varm mat, kall dryck och mysig inredning. Och det kanske bästa av allt; vi håller våra priser låga!

Name: ADComms
Description:
ADComms is a leading provider of intelligent telecoms infrastructure and On-Train solutions for the UK rail industry.

We connect people, technology and systems to deliver safer, smarter and more reliable journeys. As a trusted partner, we specialise in the design, delivery and integration of advanced communications, security and information systems across stations, trackside and onboard.

From smart stations and trackside telecommunications to intelligent onboard systems, our work keeps the network moving. Innovation drives us forward — our engineers, designers and technicians continually push boundaries to meet the evolving needs of tomorrow’s railway.

Let’s shape the future of rail, together.

Name: ASSET Rail
Description:
ASSET Rail - partner in spoorwegonderhoud.

Een hoge beschikbaarheid van het spoor is van groot belang voor een punctuele treindienst. Gedegen en vooruitziend onderhoud is daarvoor essentieel. ASSET Rail maakt dit mogelijk. 

ASSET Rail staat voor verbetering van de betrouwbaarheid, beschikbaarheid, onderhoudbaarheid en veiligheid van railinfrastructuur. ASSET Rail integreert duurzaamheid in alle stadia van ontwikkeling en gebruik. ASSET Rail beschikt over specialistische kennis van alle relevante vakdisciplines binnen de railinfrastructuur. Opereert van concept naar realisatie en van onderhoud tot sloop. ASSET Rail fungeert als aanbieder en contractmanager met advies voor onderhoud, vernieuwing, monitoring en realisatie.

Lees op deze website meer over de activiteiten van ASSET Rail. Maak kennis met de mensen die dit mogelijk maken. 

Wilt u ook uw kennis en ervaring inzetten voor ASSET Rail? Kijk dan snel naar de mogelijkheden die ASSET Rail u biedt.

Name: Technicentre Industriel de Bischheim - SNCF Voyageurs Matériel
Description:
Situé dans la ville de Bischheim, le Technicentre Industriel représente un pilier essentiel dans la maintenance et la modernisation des TGV et des TER en France. Notre mission : garantir une mobilité sûre, efficace et durable pour des millions de voyageurs.

Grâce à un outil industriel à la pointe de la technologie et son vivier de savoir-faire uniques, le Technicentre Industriel de Bischheim s'inscrit dans une démarche de flexibilité et de réactivité pour répondre à des projets dynamiques, de grande envergure et à fort impact.

Contact recrutement : tc.bischheim.recrutement@sncf.fr

Name: Ferroeste
Description: Ferrovia de economia mista, tem o governo do estado do Paraná como seu maior acionista. O trecho atual da Ferrovia vai do municipio de Cascavel até Guarapuava, totalizando aproximadamente 250km. Tem no transporte ferroviário a sua atividade econômica principal e no terminal de cargas e porto seco de Cascavel concentra o escoamento de produção de grão da região e recebe insumos e produtos oriundos de importação e da região metropolitana de Curitiba.

Name: Iowa Interstate Railroad
Description:
Iowa Interstate Railroad, LLC is a privately held Delaware Limited Liability Company and subsidiary of Railroad Development Corporation. It is also one of the few Regional Railroads that connects with the entire Class 1 railroad system (BNSF, UP, CN, CP, KCS, CSXT, and NS) at multiple locations. Our service runs from Council Bluffs, Iowa to Chicago with a branch line to Peoria, Illinois. We also provide daily service to Cedar Rapids, Iowa over the CIC railway. As a result, IAIS customers have the capability to ship and receive their goods to or from anywhere in North America. We also provide Intermodal facilities at Blue Island, Illinois and Council Bluffs, Iowa. Our service pattern is 7 days per week between the Omaha area and Chicago. We also offer access to the Mississippi and Illinois River terminals for rail to barge or barge to rail service. Trans-load facilities are also located in Council Bluffs and Newton Iowa.

Our locomotive fleet, track, and facilities are maintained to high standards and continually upgraded to provide safe reliable service to our customers and employees. We handle a wide range of commodities that include agricultural products, plastics, paper, steel, scrap, lumber and coal. We currently have access to over 1 billion gallons of ethanol and as such, we are one of the top carriers in the ethanol/feed market, sending many unit trains of product to markets throughout the U.S. each week. We are a member of the Association of American Railroads (AAR) and American Short-line and Regional Rail Association (ASLRRA).

Name: CRMServices
Description:
CRM Services est une filiale à 100 % de SNCF Voyages experte dans les métiers du CRM, de la fidélisation, et de la production de services, pour TGV INOUI.
CRM Services a pour mission d’apporter son expertise sur des projets, de concevoir et mettre en œuvre des services qui ont vocation à compléter ou enrichir l’expérience de la grande vitesse (Bagages à Domicile, Junior et Cie, Restauration TGV, Programme de Fidélisation...).

Name: Rail Freight Group
Description: The Rail Freight Group (RFG) is the representative body for UK rail freight.

Name: Lelylijn
Description: Description

Name: Yellow Rail Limited
Description: Yellow Rail is an innovative engineering service company based in Pride Park, Derby. The company provides remote field services for the passenger and freight sectors, bogie overhaul and repair, material supply services, RaiLatheTM wheel lathe products and services and engineering services to the UK rail sector.

Name: VPI - Verband der Güterwagenhalter in Deutschland e. V.
Description:
GUT AUF DER SCHIENE

88.000 GÜTERWAGEN, 300 MITGLIEDER, 1 VERBAND

Der VPI vertritt die Interessen der privaten Halter von Güterwagen in Deutschland. Wir sorgen für gute technische, rechtliche und betriebliche Rahmenbedingungen im Schienengüterverkehr. Mit engagierter Interessenvertretung und vielfältigem Service unterstützen wir unsere 290 Mitgliedsunternehmen bei der richtigen Weichenstellung auf der Fahrt in die Zukunft.

Name: Connect 6ix
Description:
The Connect 6ix consortium is delivering the Ontario Line's trains, the signalling system, and the operations, storage and maintenance facility. Connect 6ix will also operate the Ontario Line for a 30-year term once it comes into service. 

Connect 6ix is based in Toronto and the team's members are Plenary, Hitachi Rail, webuild, NGE and transdev. 

The Ontario Line will be a 15.6-kilometre subway line that will make it faster and easier to travel within Toronto and beyond.

The line will bring 15 new stations to the city and will run from Exhibition Place, through the heart of downtown, all the way to the Ontario Science Centre. It will give people more time back in their days, with a trip from one end to the other taking less than 30 minutes compared to the 70 minutes it takes on transit today. There will also be significant relief from crowding throughout the existing transit network thanks to connections to more than 40 other travel options along the way, including the TTC’s Line 1 and Line 2, three GO Transit rail lines, and the Eglinton Crosstown LRT. 

Construction is now underway.

Name: DB Systel UK Ltd
Description: Systematic digitalisation is of crucial importance to creating a strong rail system. In a joint undertaking with all of DB’s business units, we are working on the digitalisation of countless rail-related business processes and holistic digital solutions to create high-performance user features that deliver maximum customer value. We have established a comprehensive range of services that meet the highest IT standards and requirements for this purpose. We implement effective and efficient solutions that are based on platform and service technologies. As a partner for long-term undertakings, we contribute extensive rail and IT expertise and operate in a vendor-neutral way so that we can all reach our common goal.

Name: Tealinc LLC
Description: At Tealinc, we offer a comprehensive suite of rail services that cater to a wide range of industries. Whether you want to lease, buy, sell, or trade railcar equipment; want support services for your railcar fleet; or want to strategize about the development, growth, or downsizing of your rail network, we’re here to help. Our leadership team is here to help you find the right solution for your business. We’re dedicated to providing top-notch customer service and we are committed to ensuring that your experience with us is smooth, efficient, and hassle-free.

Name: Network Rail High Speed
Description:
We look after the country's only high speed line, HS1, under contract to HS1 Ltd. 

Running operations, maintenance and renewal activities along the route from the channel tunnel to St Pancras, as well as the three stations, St Pancras International, Stratford International and Ebbsfleet International. 

We are contracted to HS1 to operate, maintain and manage both the line of route and stations and also to provide engineering support.

Name: Arriva UK Trains
Description: Arriva UK Trains is a major player in the UK's rail market. We now operate all the different models currently in use on Britain's railways; from the purely commercial, open access model with Grand Central, and high performing operations such as CrossCountry and Chiltern, through to the successful concession model, or passenger service contract, operated by Arriva Rail London, better known as the London Overground.

Name: Rail Partners
Description: Rail Partners is now closed. It was a trade body for rail freight and passenger train companies, which existed to make the railway better by harnessing the expertise and creativity of the private sector, providing advocacy, policy solutions and operator services to its industry members.

Name: Express Rail Link Sdn Bhd
Description:
Express Rail Link Sdn Bhd (ERL) is the operator of KLIA Ekspres and KLIA Transit train services that connect Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA T1 & T2) and the city. Cruising at a top speed of 160 km/h, KLIA Ekspres is South East Asia’s fastest train with a 99.7% on-time service performance. To date, ERL has carried more than 90 million passengers. 

ERL is a part of Global AirRail Alliance (GARA), a common group of airport express services worldwide. ERL was named AirRail Link of the Year at the Global AirRail Awards in 2012, 2014, 2015 and 2016. On the home front, ERL has received numerous awards from Suruhanjaya Pengangkutan Awam Darat (SPAD) including the Best Operator Award (Rail) in 2014 and 2017 . 

ERL prides itself on consistently providing high standards in the air-rail service industry. We focus on customer experience, embrace innovation and foster partnerships to drive growth and remain sustainable. We are proud of the diverse talents in the company who are the driving force behind our success. 

Join us if you share our passion, are talented and energetic to take up the challenge!

Name: OTTOBAHN
Description:
We are engineering an emission-free and fully autonomous transportation system above today's traffic. It is made by hanging pods running on railway technology. The system is based on individually scheduled trips. We bring you door-to-door. Intermediate stops, changing means of transport or searching for a parking spot will belong to the past. The service is for people and goods. 

We believe in green future cities. Our transportation system transforms streets to urban green lungs. We will give soil back to families and nature. Our transportation service will be 100% renewable-powered.

Let’s make the world a better place!

Name: Ferrocarril de Antioquia
Description: Somos la Promotora del nuevo Ferrocarril de Antioquia y brindamos soluciones en el transporte y la movilidad con énfasis ferroviario

Name: West Coast Partnership Development
Description:
West Coast Partnership Development is the future operator of High Speed 2. 

We are planning and will be delivering high-speed, high capacity rail connecting London, the Midlands, the North of England, and Scotland – safe, simple, reliable, cost effective and designed around the customer. Integrated with the national network, we will enable seamless journeys and unlock economic growth, housing, and jobs.

Name: Rail Freight Forward
Description:
Rail Freight Forward is a coalition of European rail freight companies that are committed to drastically reduce the negative impact of freight transport on the planet and mobility, through innovation and a more intelligent transport mix.

To draw the attention to the topic, we sent Noah's Train our climate ambassador on its way through Europe.

Name: Rail Open Lab
Description:
The Rail Open Lab association is dedicated to the digital and technological acceleration for a more efficient railway sector. Its main objective is to encourage open innovation to create more efficient and sustainable railway infrastructure. The key focus areas include circular economy, employee assistance, new connectivities, and predictive maintenance.

Partnership: 

The association aims to foster and facilitate collaboration among stakeholders in this sector. This collaboration is achieved by connecting infrastructure managers and industrial partners for the co-development of innovative solutions on short 4-month cycles, under real operating conditions.

Our missions for the railway industry:

- Improve the maintenance and operation of railway networks
- Strive for economic optimization
- Integrate circular economy and sustainable development in our projects
- Innovate in a just and equitable manner.

Key milestones: 

The Rail Open Lab was founded in 2020, succeeding the Digital Open Lab established in 2018. The entity became an association governed by French law (loi 1901) in December 2022, with FIF, RATP, SERCE, and SNCF Réseau as its founding members.

Key figures:

- 30 partners (large corporations, SMEs, startups, competitiveness clusters, etc.)
- Over 100 regular contributors
- 29 experiments completed, 7 ongoing, and 2 in preparation
- 2 patents filed
- 9 industrialized products.

Name: North Carolina Railroad Company
Description: The North Carolina Railroad Company (NCRR) owns and manages the 317-mile rail corridor that stretches from Charlotte to the Port Terminal in Morehead City. Our rail corridor is a vital route for freight moving east to west, and north to south. It connects to routes carrying freight and people throughout the eastern United States. The railroad corridor is a rich asset, which we proudly protect and manage for the benefit of North Carolina’s citizens.

Name: SNCF Optim'services
Description:
SNCF Optim’services est une entité comprenant plus de 3 000 salariés, qui regroupe des services du quotidien dédiés aux cinq sociétés de la SNCF et à leurs salariés. Ces services sont organisés en neuf centres de services partagés, sur 200 sites répartis sur l’ensemble du territoire : 
 
• Paie et prestations administratives 
• Services médicaux
• Action sociale
• Agences de recrutement cadres et transverse 
• Comptabilités
• Relation salariés – Agence logement 
• Déplacements professionnels
• Excellence opérationnelle
• SARDO (documentation et archives historiques de la SNCF et du personnel)

Name: IRISET Indian Railways Institute of Signal Engineering and Telecommunications
Description:
Setup in 1957 by the Ministry of Railways, Government of India, to cater to specialised training needs of their own staff and officers in the field of Railway Signalling and Telecommunication, the Institute today caters to the needs of the entire Afro-Asian region as well.

Located in the southern part of India in beautiful city of Secunderabad, the Twin of the capital city of Hyderabad in Telangana, the Institute is spread over 28 hectares. IRISET provides Initial as well as Advanced training, theory as well as hands-on, in Railway Signalling and Telecommunications. It caters to complete training requirement of the Officers and the Supervisors of Signal and Telecommunication department of Indian Railways, Public Sector Undertakings as well as Industry and Partners.


IRISET is in the approved list of ESCAP and UNDP. It provides training in Railway Signalling and Telecommunications to private and public sector enterprises as well. It also train officials of Foreign Railways.

There are four hostels in the campus itself, one for officers and three for supervisors. There are laboratories for all the important areas of Railway Signalling & Telecommunication to provide hands on training in the Institute. The lecture halls are equipped with the modern teaching aids.

Name: Rail Force One
Description:
Day in day out, our men and machines are on their way running trains through Europe. With the power equivalent of more than 8.700 horses, our locomotives pull every cargo to manufacturing plants, distribution centers or shipping ports.

Our trained drivers and modern fleet of locomotives can handle block trains for many kinds of products such as bulk, liquid or containerized cargo. We know what it takes and we know how to act to maintain a sustainable supply chain. Here at Rail Force One, performing day in and day out is our motivation number One.

Name: FC Vias Serviços Ferroviários
Description: A FC Vias oferece serviços técnicos especializados voltados a engenharia civil como: consultoria, elaboração de projetos, gerenciamento e execução de obras, atendendo instituições públicas, privadas e concessões, em todo território nacional. Somos especializados em infra e superestrutura ferroviária, vias de rolamento para pontes rolantes, pórticos e transelevadores, além da construção de pátios logísticos para tráfego pesado.

Name: SARA Rail
Description:
The SADC Protocol on Transport, Communications and Meteorology (PRCM), Article 13.13 specified the formation of regional associations for each Transport Mode – with the Southern African Railway Association (SARA) formed specifically to address the needs of the region's railways.
 
The vision of SARA is to ensure that when it comes to supporting and bolstering regional intra-African trade, and assisting the region's manufacturers, exporters, and mining customers, that not only is rail the mode of choice but that it is seamless.
 
The Association which incorporates regional railway operators provides the platform for all stakeholders, regional economic communities, international development partners, as well as, OEMs and suppliers -  to play a role in enhancing railway transport at a regional, continental and global level.

Don’t miss out on connecting with our railway operators during our annual SARA Rail Conference and Exhibition. Visit the website for more information.  
 
Together we are better.

Name: Oc'Via Maintenance
Description:
Oc’Via Maintenance est en charge de la surveillance, de la maintenance (préventive et corrective) et du renouvellement des installations du Contournement ferroviaire de Nîmes et Montpellier (CNM), dans le cadre d’un Partenariat Public Privé (PPP) signé entre Oc'Via, son client, et SNCF Réseau.
Nous intervenons sur l’ensemble du patrimoine du CNM : la voie ferrée, la caténaire, la signalisation, les télécommunications, les bâtiments, les ouvrages d’art, en terre et hydrauliques.

Name: DB Cargo Nederland N.V.
Description:
DB Cargo Nederland N.V. is het grootste railtransportbedrijf van Nederland en is een dochteronderneming van DB Cargo AG. DB Cargo AG is de leidende railtransportonderneming van Europa. 

De treinen van DB Cargo doen dagelijks de zeehavens van Amsterdam, Delfzijl, Moerdijk, Rotterdam, Terneuzen, Vlissingen aan. Net als de daar aanwezige opslag- en verwerkingsbedrijven. Landinwaarts is DB Cargo iedere dag opnieuw te vinden bij bijna alle grote bedrijven en de belangrijkste industriële centra. Het bedrijf biedt zijn opdrachtgevers in Nederland direct toegang tot het Europese railnetwerk van DB Cargo.

Bij DB Cargo werken in Nederland zo’n 650 mensen. Als werkgever besteedt DB Cargo Nederland veel aandacht aan goede en veilige arbeidsomstandigheden en biedt het zijn medewerkers mogelijkheden voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Training en instructie maakt een vast onderdeel uit van de bedrijfsvoering.

DB Cargo streeft er naar zijn treinverkeer zoveel mogelijk op een duurzame wijze met energiezuinige elektrische locomotieven af te wikkelen. Met opdrachtgevers in de chemische industrie en bij de grote tankoverslagbedrijven werkt het bedrijf intensief samen om het transport van gevaarlijke stoffen op een zo’n veilig mogelijke wijze uit te voeren.

Voor meer informatie kunt u terecht op onze website.

Vacatures: https://nl.dbcargo.com/rail-nederland-nl/carriere/vacatures

DB Cargo Nederland N.V. is the largest rail transport company in the Netherlands and is a subsidiary of DB Cargo AG. For more information please visit our website.

Name: Transport Asset Manager of NSW (TAM)
Description:
We’re TAM, the Transport Asset Manager of New South Wales – a NSW Government agency and custodian of the expansive NSW rail network. 

TAM owns the network’s assets including rail embankments, cuttings and tunnels, track, signals, power systems, rolling stock, stations and significant land holdings around stations.  Every year, millions of people in metropolitan and regional NSW rely on our network to keep them moving safely and efficiently. 

Our assets have been serving the community for over 100 years. At TAM, we strategically manage NSW transport assets that facilitate a safe, resilient, and sustainable network that supports economic growth and meets the needs of current and future generations 

We partner with private business and government to find innovative and sustainable ways to make transport assets work for the people of NSW. 

TAM is committed to being an agile and responsive organisation, transforming as necessary to make sure we are well positioned for the future. We strive to create sustainable value, opportunities for our people, and a great experience for our customers.

Name: Ferronor S.A.
Description:
Ferronor es una empresa chilena especializada en transporte ferroviario de carga que opera en la zona Norte del país. La Empresa proporciona servicios a distintas industrias, entregando beneficios que agregan valor a sus clientes, tales como: eficiencia, confiabilidad, seguridad, y menores impactos al medio ambiente asociado al transporte de carga.

Su red se compone de una línea Principal de trocha métrica entre la Estación de Iquique en la Primera Región y la Estación de la Calera en la Quinta Región y, de un conjunto de ramales ferroviarios, principalmente transversales. En conjunto forman una red de 2.300 kilómetros, que conecta los principales puertos y centros mineros de Chile. A través del ramal internacional Augusta Victoria - Socompa (II Región), Ferronor tiene conexión con las redes ferroviarias de Argentina, Bolivia y Brasil.

Ferronor is a Chilean company specialized in railway freight transport with operations in Northern Chile. The company provides services of excellence to various industries, delivering benefits that translate to added value for its customers. Benefits of freight transportation include efficiency, reliability, safety, and minor impact on the environment.

The network consists of a metric gauge main line that runs between Iquique station, in the First Region, and Calera station, in the Fifth Region, with a variety of railway branches, mostly transverse. All together there is a network of 2,300 kilometers, connecting the main ports and mining sites in Chile. Through the international branch Augusta Victoria - Socompa (II Region), Ferronor has connection with the rail networks of Argentina, Bolivia and Brazil.

Name: International Monorail Association (IMA)
Description:
The International Monorail Association provides a global platform for interaction between National, Regional, and Local Public Authorities as well as the Monorail OEM Industry, the Monorail Operating and/or Maintenance Companies, Monorail Consulting Engineering Companies and Monorail System Builders, with the purpose to aid in the responsible and efficient use of Monorail for Public Mass Transit.
#monorail #monorailsystem #transportation #masstransportation #internationalmonorailassociation #transit #publictransportation #driverless

Name: Ferrovia Tereza Cristina
Description: Somos uma Concessionária de Transporte Ferroviário de Carga, que integra porto e terminais com capacidade para atender a região Sul de Santa Catarina, movimentando a economia do estado e do país. Com 164 km de extensão, temos como principal atividade o transporte de carvão mineral, produzido na região Sul do Estado com destino ao Complexo Termelétrico Jorge Lacerda (Diamante Geração de Energia Ltda), em Capivari de Baixo, para geração de energia elétrica, e o transporte de cargas em geral, conteinerizadas, para o Porto de Imbituba e para o Terminal Intermodal Sul.

Name: Rhomberg Sersa Rail Group (Ireland)
Description:
Rhomberg Sersa Rail Group (Ireland) is a daughter company of the Swiss / Austrian Rhomberg Sersa Rail Group which is a full service railway engineering company. In Ireland, we deliver On Track Machine operations on behalf of Iarnród Éireann / Irish Rail.

Our portfolio ranges from track construction, track renewal, track maintenance and the rehabilitation of railway tunnels, to railway power supply and communication technology, through to consultancy, planning and design, and logistics services. 

The Group's focus is on customer-oriented and tailor-made solutions for light rail, main-line railways, freight lines and private infrastructure, which it implements in the role of general contractor or design and build contractor.

Rhomberg Sersa Rail Group Ireland works with Iarnród Éireann - Irish Rail to deliver tamping, ballast regulating, ballast cleaning and other On Track Machine operations.

Name: VTG Rail UK Ltd
Description:
VTG is the UK's largest railway wagon hire company and the first choice for all of your rail freight leasing requirements. Our 4,400 wagon fleet is managed by a team of 30 dedicated staff based at our Bromsgrove office and co-located within our customer's organisations. As an independent, UK based ECM we are in full control of the maintenance of our wagons, and our team of engineers and controllers work with customers and maintainers on a daily basis to ensure maximum safety, availability and reliability, allowing the uninterrupted rail delivery of your goods.
Our UK fleet comprises a "Standard Freight" sector, with wagons for dry and solid products, a "Tank" sector containing special wagons for liquids, chemicals and powders plus an "Intermodal" sector featuring various designs of container wagon including the award winning "Ecofret" and a variety of other platforms including "Megafrets" and 60' FEA wagons. New wagons are added regularly as part of a continuous replenishment process and are chosen to meet customers’ specific requirements, with interfaces designed to speed the flow of goods through loading and unloading points. VTG can supply purpose built or modified vehicles as required, with flexible leasing arrangements for short and long-term hire. All VTG wagons come fitted with our innovative “VTG Connect” telematics system which enables you to track and trace your products on a wagon-by-wagon basis.
VTG Rail UK is a subsidiary of VTG GmbH (www.vtg.com), Europe’s leading wagon hire and rail logistics company, with approximately 90,000 wagons, plus rail and tank container logistics operations. As part of this group, we have access to huge experience and resources to support our UK operations. With innovative offerings such as purchase & leaseback and wagon management, its fully independent UK organisation and its ability to facilitate additional services like loading, discharge or haulage, VTG remains the number one choice for independent rail wagon provision.

Name: Guardian Rail
Description:
Guardian Rail is a leading freight rail services and transportation company, providing trusted, nationwide rail solutions with a focus on safety, reliability, and client care.

We are proud to operate one of the country's leading freight rail services and transportation companies with a large national network of freight and tank car repair facilities; a nationwide network of running repair agents; and a rail services division that operates short line railroads and contract switching & transloading sites.

Our nationwide network of Guardian Rail employees is committed to delivering dependable rail solutions that keep the nation’s supply chains moving safely and efficiently.

Name: Commtrex
Description: Commtrex is a tech-enabled rail logistics provider with a team of experienced rail professionals, an extensive network of partners, and a best-in-class technology platform that simplifies the movement of freight and creates a competitive advantage. As a highly trusted, effective, and data-driven platform, Commtrex is improving how shippers manage their rail fleets and move freight across North America. Commtrex has grown to over 3,000 active members and has partnered with all seven Class I Railroads. More information about Commtrex can be found at www.commtrex.com.

Name: ABIFER - Associação Brasileira da Indústria Ferroviária
Description:
Fundada em 08 de Agosto de 1977, a ABIFER é uma entidade que defende os interesses da indústria ferroviária nacional. 

Reunimos os principais fabricantes de locomotivas diesel-elétricas, vagões de carga e montadoras de trens de passageiros nacionais e multinacionais com unidades fabris instaladas no Brasil. 

Incluí-se também toda a cadeia produtiva ferroviária, caracterizada por empresas de menor porte, como fabricantes de baterias,  motores de tração, transformadores, compressores, freios, pantógrafos, ar condicionado, etc.

Name: Первая грузовая компания - ПГК
Description:
Первая грузовая компания (АО «ПГК») — одна из крупнейших частных логистических компаний в России. 
 
Мы предлагаем партнерам эффективные логистические решения под любые бизнес-задачи, перевозим различные виды продукции: от металлов до продовольственных товаров.  
 
Эффективную работу компании обеспечивают около 2 тыс. сотрудников. У нас развитая филиальная сеть: офисы компании располагаются в 14 городах России, а также в Казахстане.  
 
Наши клиенты – крупнейшие представители российского бизнеса, компании среднего и малого бизнеса. В своей работе мы опираемся на лучшие современные практики и прорывные технологии.  
 
Сегодня наша IT-команда создает нестандартные для транспортной отрасли цифровые продукты, активно развивает направления математического и оптимизационного моделирования, анализа данных и машинного обучения, создает интеллектуальные системы прогнозирования.  
 
Мы меняемся сами и меняем всю транспортную отрасль.

Name: ACC M
Description:
ACC M – Patrimoine ferroviaire, modernité durable au service des territoires

Depuis 1919, ACC M s’engage dans la préservation et la remise en valeur des matériels roulants, alliant l’authenticité patrimoniale du ferroviaire à l’excellence technique contemporaine. Spécialiste indépendant de la rénovation et de la modernisation des trains, nous redonnons vie aux TER, tramways, métros et voitures voyageurs, en France, en Europe et à l’international.

 Notre vocation patrimoniale : chaque projet est une mission de gestion du patrimoine roulant. Nous prolongeons la durée de vie des matériels, restaurons leur identité et les adaptons aux nouveaux usages, tout en réduisant l’impact environnemental et en participant pleinement à l’économie circulaire ferroviaire.
 Nos piliers techniques : plus de 30 métiers intégrés – chaudronnerie, désamiantage, sellerie, électronique embarquée, pneumatique ferroviaire… – adossés à un haut niveau d’exigence qualité.
Notre expertise couvre aussi bien la rénovation complète des trains que la prise en charge de leurs sous-ensembles critiques : bogies, organes de frein, systèmes de climatisation, équipements électriques et de sécurité.
Nous sommes certifiés :

ISO 9001:2015 pour notre système de management de la qualité,
EN 15085 et ISO 3834 pour nos compétences en soudage ferroviaire,
ECE/ECM (Entity in Charge of Maintenance) selon le règlement (UE) 2019/779, garantissant notre conformité européenne pour la maintenance et la sécurité du matériel roulant.

 Notre engagement : contribuer à la vitalité des territoires en soutenant les mobilités du quotidien, créer de l’emploi industriel local, innover dans la transition énergétique et accompagner les collectivités dans leurs projets structurants de mobilité durable.

 Notre ambition : faire d’ACC M le partenaire de référence des autorités organisatrices, opérateurs et exploitants ferroviaires pour conjuguer héritage et innovation, et bâtir ensemble les solutions ferroviaires de demain.

Name: TechniNAT - SNCF Voyageurs Matériel
Description:
Le TECHNINAT est un acteur incontournable de la maintenance des Wagons et des Locomotives grâce à son réseau d’ateliers de maintenance et à son offre de maintenance Mobile répartis sur l’ensemble du territoire. 

Doté d’installations stratégiques, le TECHNINAT offre une solution de maintenance à la fois complète et agile.

Soucieux de satisfaire pleinement ses clients, la Sécurité, la Qualité et l’Expertise technique sont ainsi garanties lors de nos interventions. 

Notre dispositif est gage d’une expertise et d’un Savoir-Faire Unique !

Name: Tågföretagen
Description:
Vi driver spårtrafikens intressefrågor
Tågföretagen driver frågor av intresse för kommersiella tågoperatörer verksamma i Sverige och andra kommersiella aktörer i järnvägssektorn. I framtiden kommer järnvägen genom ny kapacitet och högre hastigheter ännu starkare binda samman Sveriges växande regioner och bidra till att revolutionera sättet att bo och arbeta.

Name: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC)
Description: Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) is a centre-state joint venture that operates the Delhi Metro and Noida Metro. The Delhi Metro Rail Corporation is also involved in the planning and implementation of metro rail, monorail, and high-speed rail projects in India, and abroad. The work of the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation is fragmented into various parts which are controlled by directors under the direction of a managing director.

Name: LTG Link
Description:
„LTG Link“ misija – jungti  žmones ir verslus tvaresnei ateičiai. 

Mes tikime, kad išnaudodami prigimtinius keliavimo traukiniu privalumus, tokius kaip saugumas, patogumas ir draugiškumas aplinkai, bei kurdami naujas pridėtines vertes, įtvirtinsime pagrindą reikalingoms jungtims ir šalies viduje, ir su kitomis Europos šalimis. 

Kurdami tvarią ateitį mums visiems, judame link savo vizijos – būti transporto sistemos stuburu, vertinamu dėl aukšto lygio paslaugų, veiklos efektyvumo ir valdymo. Savo veikloje vadovaujamės šiomis vertybėmis: atsakomybė, klientas, bendradarbiavimas, tobulėjimas.

Name: Captrain Deutschland-Group
Description: Whether it's international traction, industrial railway operations or transport concepts tailored to your individual processes, we are your partner for innovative, customised and efficient logistics solutions. Our operational offices in Germany, the Netherlands and Poland, licences in Austria and the Czech Republic, as well as affiliates in Belgium, France, Italy, Spain and Switzerland, ensure that we have both an international and local presence.

Name: KB Signaling
Description: KB Signaling delivers unparalleled end-to-end wayside and onboard conventional signaling Control, Command, and Signaling (CCS) platforms and solutions. A trailblazer, we are driven to provide the best solutions for improved safety, performance, and lower overall operating cost for today’s transit and freight railway systems and operators in North America and beyond. Our team is fueled by innovation and grounded in solid values, like giving back to the communities where we do business and embracing sustainability to help protect our planet. KB Signaling is part of a global, high-tech company that will challenge you and help you grow. Discover what’s waiting for you.

Name: Summit Infrastructure
Description:
Summit Infrastructure is a Canadian rail survey and monitoring company delivering independent, high-accuracy data for freight, passenger, and light-rail networks across Canada.

We specialise in track geometry, clearance assessments, mobile LiDAR, rail wear, and infrastructure monitoring, providing rail owners and contractors with reliable information to support safe, informed decisions.

Independent. Accurate. Rail-focused.

Name: Thurbo AG
Description: Die Regionalbahn Thurbo AG verbindet die Ostschweiz auf einem dicht verzweigten Bahnnetz und stellt gemeinsam mit der SBB die überregionale Verknüpfung sicher. Thurbo ist ein Unternehmen der SBB mit Beteiligung des Kantons Thurgau. Sie ist selbstständig und eigenverantwortlich.

Name: Northrail GmbH
Description:
Northrail ist einer der führenden Vermieter, Asset-Manager und Entwickler von innovativen Investments für Schienenfahrzeuge. Northrail managt ein Portfolio von aktuell rund 430 Fahrzeugen für den Güter- und Personenverkehr in Europa, davon rund 250 Lokomotiven sowie rund 180 Triebzüge und Reisezugwagen, mit einem Investitionsvolumen von rund 1,5 Milliarden Euro. Zur Flotte im Management von Northrail gehören sowohl hochmoderne Elektro- und Hybridlokomotiven sowie 
batterieelektrische Regionalzüge als auch traditionelle Rangier- und
Universallokomotiven. Zudem entwickelt Northrail maßgeschneiderte Vermietungs- und Serviceangebote für seine Kunden und organisiert die Instandhaltung der Fahrzeuge auf Grundlage seiner Lizenz für ECM I bis III. Northrail, mit Sitz in Hamburg (Deutschland), beschäftigt aktuell rund 50 Mitarbeiter und ist ein Tochterunternehmen von RIVE Private Investment, einer unabhängigen europäischen Investmentgesellschaft mit Büros in Paris, Luxemburg und Genf, die sich auf Transportmittel und die Energiewende spezialisiert hat.

Weitere Informationen zur Northrail-Gruppe unter: www.northrail.com

Unser Impressum finden Sie unter dem untenstehenden Link. Auf unserer Webseite finden Sie ebenfalls unsere aktuelle Datenschutzerklärung.

Name: Cathcart Rail
Description: Cathcart Rail is a leading freight rail services and transportation company. The company currently operates the largest railcar services network, encompassing 18 repair facilities and over 75 field services locations, as well as a rail services division that operates three shortline railroads and a dozen contract switching and transloading sites, among other services such as railcar storage, track maintenance, and railcar parts. Cathcart Rail was founded in February 2016 by the father and son team of Thomas Cathcart and Casey Cathcart, and currently employs nearly 1,000 people across 110+ locations in 33 states.

Name: PSOVL RAILONE PVT. LTD
Description: PSOVL RAILONE PVT. LTD is a daughter company of the PCM Group, which is the leading manufacturer of concrete sleepers and track systems for urban transit and long-distance rail transportation. The technology leader also offers its expertise in the fields of engineering and plant construction. At present, PSOVL RAILONE PVT. LTD. is proudly associated with the Mumbai Ahmedabad High Speed Rail project, which is India's first bullet train.

Name: State Agency for Railway Safety
Description:
Railway safety is present in every component of the railway system—from the lines and the trains running on them, to the personnel, regulations, and procedures governing their operation. All actors within the system, from those most directly involved—such as infrastructure managers and railway companies—to those providing supporting services—such as maintenance entities, centers, or manufacturers—contribute to achieving safety, each within their area of responsibility.

The State Agency for Railway Safety is one more element within this system, acting as the authority responsible for railway safety, as established by Directive (EU) 2016/798 of 11 May 2016 on railway safety, applicable to the General Interest Railway Network.

To fulfill these responsibilities, the Agency is structured as a public body in accordance with the provisions of Law 40/2015, of 1 October, on the Legal Regime of the Public Sector. Its Statute was approved by Royal Decree 1072/2014, of 19 December, which established the official start of its operations on 1 April 2015.

Name: Permanent Way Institution - New South Wales (PWI-NSW)
Description:
The Permanent Way Institution - New South Wales (PWI-NSW) is the Institution for Rail Infrastructure Engineering. Our purpose is to share   knowledge, build community and to support industry capability development for people working in rail infrastructure systems. 
We are a technical Institution which aims to provide technical knowledge, advice and support to the rail industry by providing technical seminars, conferences and networking opportunities.

Name: TrenLab
Description: We are the open innovation hub in the mobility, transport and logistics sector. We work hand in hand with the startups and business units of Renfe to accelerate the best projects and generate business opportunities together.

Name: High Speed Rail Solutions
TSO SIGNALISATION
Description:
Nous proposons une offre globale en signalisation ferroviaire de la conception aux essais en passant par la maintenance : études techniques des réseaux de signalisation, génie civil, génie électrique, signalisation, télécommunication et signalisation mécanique.

En tant que filiale de TSO, leader des infrastructures ferroviaires depuis 1927, nous bénéficions de synergies pour relever les défis techniques et environnementaux.

Travailler dans le ferroviaire, c'est œuvrer pour un moyen de transport plus respectueux de l'environnement, contribuant ainsi à un avenir durable.

Name: Arenaways
Description: Arenaways is an Italian private train operating company (international passenger and freight license n. 81/2024) founded on the heritage of over 30 years of experience of the Arena family in the industry, together with the expertise of Renfe Proyectos Internacionales and Serena Industrial Partners.

Name: Norske tog
Description:
Norske tog’s activities are procuring, owning and managing rolling stock,
which shall preferentially be used for the execution of passenger transport
by train as a public service obligation. The company’s rolling stock shall be
offered on competition-neutral terms. The company shall operate efficiently.
The company’s activities comprise of procuring, owning and managing rolling
stock, which shall preferentially be used for the execution of passenger
transport by train as a public service obligation. The company’s rolling stock
shall be offered on competition-neutral terms. The company also has an
advisory function with respect to the Norwegian state. The company shall
operate efficiently.

Norske tog AS is 100 % owned by the Norwegian Ministry of Transport and
Communications and is a Category 3 company, meaning that the state has
sector policy objectives for its ownership.

Name: Texas Short Line and Regional Railroad Association (TSLRRA)
Description: TSLRRA is a nonprofit professional organization representing the interests of the more than 40 short line railroads and industry-related businesses in Texas.  Established in 2003, TSLRRA’s purpose has been to promote the state’s economy, champion public safety issues, partner with local governments and organizations to enhance the transportation infrastructure and bring new jobs and prosperity to Texas communities. For more information, visit tslrra.org.

Name: SMH Rail Group
Description:
SMH Rail is Malaysia's largest privately-owned rolling stock manufacturer and service provider. Established in the Year 2000 to undertake railway engineering projects.

Over the years, SMH Rail has acquired and developed its local engineering expertise and technology through strategic collaborations with its OEM partners. 

SMH Rail has a permanent presence in various overseas locations including India, Tanzania, Zambia, Namibia, Botswana, Thailand, and Cambodia.
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur

Name: Knorr-Bremse Mödling
Description:
Die Knorr-Bremse GmbH in Mödling trägt seit über 55 Jahren mit der Entwicklung und Produktion von Schienenfahrzeugsystemen und dem Vertrieb von Nutzfahrzeugsystemen bei, Mobilität auf Schiene und Straße sicher, zukunftsfähig und umweltfreundlich zu machen. 
IFE Einstiegssysteme am Standort Kematen/Ybbs ergänzen das umfangreiche Produktportfolio an Systemen für Schienenfahrzeuge. 
Die Tochterfirma Zelisko am Standort Mödling entwickelt und produziert Messwandler und Sensoren für Industrie und Energieversorgung, Signalsysteme für Bahnstrecken und Eisenbahnkreuzungssicherung sowie Verkehrsmanagementsysteme für den ÖPNV.
Gemeinsam beschäftigen die Unternehmen mehr als 1.000 Personen in Österreich sowie rund 1.000 an weiteren Standorten in Osteuropa.
Sie sind Teil des Knorr-Bremse Konzerns mit Firmensitz in München, dem Weltmarktführer für Bremssysteme und einem führenden Anbieter sicherheitskritischer Subsysteme für Schienen- und Nutzfahrzeuge.

Besuchen Sie uns auch auf unserem Linkedin-Kanal von Zelisko:
 www.linkedin.com/company/zelisko/


Wir verweisen auf unsere Datenschutzhinweise auf
https://www.knorr-bremse.com/de/fusszeile/data-protection/data-protection-declaration-knorr-bremse-ag/ 

Impressum: https://www.knorr-bremse.com/de/fusszeile/imprint/

Name: CFR Infrastructura
Description:
CFR Infrastructură este  Compania Naţională de Căi Ferate „CFR” SA, companie care administrează infrastructura feroviară publică - desfăşoară o activitate de interes public şi contribuie la libera circulaţie a persoanelor, mărfurilor şi a bunurilor în interiorul ţării şi peste graniţă, în condiţii ecologice, eficiente şi de siguranţă. 

CFR Infrastructură asigură dezvoltarea și modernizarea infrastructurii feroviare din România în concordanță cu standardele europene de performanță și interoperabilitate. Eforturile noastre se concentrează pe modernizarea rețelei existente, cu prioritate maximă acordată infrastructurii feroviare interoperabile incluse în Coridoarele Europene, în scopul asigurării performanțelor și exploatării eficiente a acestora.

Ne aflăm în compania unui număr important de parteneri ce contribuie activ la revenirea căilor ferate pe poziția pe care o merită: clienți, călători, personalul și sindicatele, societatea civilă, autoritățile administrative, autoritatea tutelară, organismele europene, parteneri financiari, furnizori, asociații de transportatori.

Mobilitatea face parte azi din modul de viață cotidian și trebuie să urmeze un model de dezvoltare durabil și sustenabil, concretizat prin  optimizarea consumului de energie, reducerea emisiilor de carbon și a zgomotului, în condițiile în care va contribui activ la accesibilitatea către toate comunitățile locale.

Politica pe care o promovăm este înscrisă în dimensiunea internațională generată de Statutul României de stat membru al Uniunii Europene și răspunde obiectivelor sale de deschidere a pieței și interoperabilității pentru creșterea potențialului și importanței transportului feroviar în Europa. Infrastructura feroviară din România face parte din două coridoare europene - IV și IX, precum și din Coridorul 7 de Marfă.

Echipa CFR Infrastructură

Name: CZ LOKO
Description: CZ LOKO patří mezi přední evropské výrobce diesel-elektrických lokomotiv a speciálních drážních vozidel. Firma dosud vyrobila nebo zmodernizovala 960 lokomotiv a úspěšně se prosazuje na trzích v Itálii, Finsku, Turecku, Pobaltí nebo na Balkáně. Hlavní výrobní závody jsou v České Třebové, Jihlavě a Přerově, vedení společnosti sídlí v Nymburku.

Name: Hartasuma
Description: Hartasuma Sdn Bhd is a leading integrated rolling stock and rail services company in the region. Utilizing modular technology at its production facility which sits strategically in Pulau Indah, Port Klang, its core competencies lie in innovative engineering, refurbishment, overhaul, operations and maintenance, assembly and supply of rolling stock which includes passenger coaches, Electric Multiple Unit (EMU), Light Rail Transit (LRT) and Mass Rapid Transit (MRT) cars.

Name: Rail Cargo information Netherlands
Description: Vervoer van goederen speelt bij veel bedrijven een belangrijke rol. Steeds meer bedrijven streven naar het optimaliseren van hun logistiek proces. Niet alleen uit oogpunt van kostenbesparing, maar ook door de aandacht voor duurzaam en maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen. Daarbij komt vaak de vraag naar voren of het vervoer per spoor mogelijk is. Het voorlichtingsbureau Rail Cargo information Netherlands is speciaal opgericht om hulp te bieden aan bedrijven die meer inzage wensen in de mogelijkheden die het spoorgoederenvervoer kan bieden voor de logistieke keten.

Name: NBM Railways
Description:
NBM Railways is a group of short-line railways (New Brunswick Southern, Eastern Maine, and Maine Northern) proudly operating since 1995. Headquartered in Saint John, NB, with operations in Mattawamkeag, ME and Oakfield, ME, we maintain and operate over 550 miles/885km of rail in New Brunswick and Maine.  

Through partnerships with other major railways, NBM Railways cargo is delivered to destinations across North America, providing railway transport and truck/rail reload operations to industries that include construction lumber, pulp, paper, chips & log, chemicals, consumer products, automobiles, bulk & liquid products.  With an extensive and diverse fleet, and a reputation for excellence, safety and reliability, NBM Railways is well equipped to meet customer needs ranging from freight transportation and distribution to maintenance and mechanical services.
