Description: - Description -

Name: Portail Entreprises SNCF
Description:
Le Portail Entreprises SNCF est une solution agile pour gérer tous vos déplacements professionnels en train et en quelques clics.

C’est un outil simple et intuitif, une offre personnalisable selon vos besoins, un tarif connu à l’avance, une visibilité pour optimiser le budget train et une équipe avec des interlocuteurs dédiés.

Vous gérez un volume important de voyages professionnels et vous faites partie d’une grande entreprise, un groupe public ou une PME, nous vous proposons une solution simple pour vos achats de billets de train.

Le Portail Entreprises SNCF vous permet de:  

- Faciliter votre quotidien et celui de vos collaborateurs
- Centraliser la gestion de vos déplacements
- Optimiser votre budget

En adhérant à l’une de nos offres Portail Entreprises SNCF, vous accédez aux fonctionnalités principales :

- Acheter des billets de train en France (TGV INOUI, INTERCITÉS, TER) et en Europe (Eurostar, Thalys, Lyria..),
- Acheter des cartes de réduction dont la Carte Liberté,
- Réaliser vos après ventes en ligne,
- Consulter vos comptes-rendus mensuels de consommation,
- Bénéficier d’un service client dédié, basé en France, joignable par mail ou téléphone (non surtaxé).

Pour plus d'informations rendez-vous sur https://www.sncf.com/fr/offres-voyageurs/offres-entreprises/portail-entreprises
Location: Paris La Défense, Ile de France

Name: i2030
Description:
Das Gemeinschaftsprojekt i2030 der Länder Berlin und Brandenburg, der Deutschen Bahn und dem Verkehrsverbund Berlin-Brandenburg (VBB) treibt den Ausbau der Schieneninfrastruktur in der Hauptstadtregion voran. Öfter, verlässlicher, bequemer – das soll für die Fahrgäste Schritt für Schritt spürbar werden. So kann der Regional- und S-Bahnverkehr in den kommenden Jahren einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Mobilitätswende leisten. 

In acht Ausbaukorridoren und einem Maßnahmenpaket für die Berliner S-Bahn laufen aktuell die Planungen. Damit erstellen wir die Voraussetzung für eine gemeinsame Umsetzung mit Hilfe des Bundes. 

Unser Ziel: ein attraktives, klimafreundliches und zukunftsfestes Mobilitätsangebot für die Menschen in unserer Region.

Name: Northeast Corridor Commission
Description: The Northeast Corridor Commission’s mission is to bring the states, commuter agencies, Amtrak, and US DOT together to modernize and improve the Northeast Corridor rail system through increased collaboration, transparency, and accountability. Through this partnership, the Commission’s members can achieve more together than by working alone.

Name: APD Advanced Power Dynamics Inc
Description:
Who we are
Advanced Power Dynamics Inc. (APD) is a Canadian rail-engineering and manufacturing company and a subsidiary of INPS Group Inc. With more than 40 years of group experience, we operate in Canada, the USA, Mexico and Egypt, delivering solutions to freight rail operators and industrial customers in both domestic and international markets.

What we do
APD specializes in the overhaul, upgrade and lifecycle support of freight locomotives, combining engineering, manufacturing, and on-site technical services. We are currently leading a major program to overhaul and upgrade 180 locomotives for Egyptian National Railways, working alongside local partners to build sustainable, “made-in-Egypt” capabilities. Through strategic alignments with our partner companies and global production centers, we develop and industrialize components, localize manufacturing, and support our clients with long-term technical support and training.

Name: S&T Cover Ltd.
Description:
S&T Cover Limited is an industry leading Project and Asset Management Company for signalling installation, maintenance and signal testing works as well as E&P installation and testing works throughout Southern England. We provide professional, competent, and reliable signalling and E&P project management staff, expanding our capabilities as we continue to deliver high quality services to the public and private sectors.

Our Project Management and support team ensure that every aspect of our railway projects are compliantly managed in line with EU Legislation and Network Rail standards. The projects that we deliver are focused towards achieving the best value-for-money, balancing costs with performance and technical innovation with safety being our prime directive and always at the forefront of everything we do.

S&T Cover offer professional turn-key solutions for railway signalling and E&P works, delivering complete Project Management services covering the planning, project design, resourcing, installation, maintenance and testing of S&T and E&P works. We are accredited by Lloyds Register for ISO9001, 14001 & OHSAS 18001 and are a licensed Principal Contractor to Network Rail. We are also registered through Achilles RISQS and the IRSE licensing scheme.

The company was established in 1998 with the vision of providing reliable and competent labour to make a difference, striving to find solutions where others may only find problems.

As part of an alliance with our Signalling designers, S&T Cover can now offer a ‘One Stop Shop’ which delivers signalling and E&P projects through Management, Design, Installation and Testing & Commissioning.

Name: Strategic Connections Group
Description:
Specialised in Rail and Defence industries, our goal is to support our clients  into their compliance requirements and resolve unexpected technical situations. To do so, we activate a unique set of skills, knowledge and background.
Formed in 2009, Strategic Connections Group provides engineering, supply chain, project management and business support services.
Through its agile processes, SCG's team is able to cover a broad spectrum of projects as well as answering and delivering upon specific challenges.

evb - so nah ist ganz weit vorn!

Für unsere jährlich ca. 2 Mio. Zugfahrgäste sind wir seit Sommer 2022 mit den weltweit ersten Wasserstoffzügen im regulären Fahrgastbetrieb unterwegs. Auch unsere 4 Mio. Fahrgäste in den Bussen bringen wir im Elbe-Weser-Dreieck sicher an ihr Ziel. Darüber hinaus befördern wir Güter aller Art auf der Schiene; in der Region und deutschlandweit. 

Die evb ist heute in sechs verschiedene Geschäftsbereiche unterteilt, die wir unter https://www.evb-elbe-weser.de vorstellen.

Alles rund um den Wasserstoffzug: https://www.evb-wasserstoffzug.de/

Name: Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Denmark
Description:
Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Denmark serves as a regional service hub for aftermarket solutions, supporting rail operators throughout Scandinavia and Central Europe.
Operating from four service centers in Aarhus and Copenhagen, our team of over 300 specialized service technicians ensures the reliability, safety, and availability of rail vehicle components. As part of Knorr-Bremse's global component services network, we offer customized service solutions and comprehensive lifecycle support, including testing, overhaul, repair, and refurbishment of critical systems such as electrical, mechanical and electromechanical components. With profound engineering expertise, we help operators manage obsolescence challenges through reverse engineering to ensure long-term performance and cost efficiency.

We refer to our data protection information at https://rail.knorr-bremse.com/en/de/footer/data-protection/

Imprint: https://rail.knorr-bremse.com/en/de/footer/imprint/

Name: Rail Industry Connect
Description: Our aim is to help businesses win work and grow, and influence their positive progression within the rail industry by creating connections, and providing promotional activity to support business development efforts.

Name: Rio Grande Pacific Corporation
Description:
Rio Grande Pacific Corporation (RGPC), founded in 1986, is a privately-held, Texas-based railroad holding company for regional freight railroads, signal construction and design, passenger operations, equipment remanufacturing, dispatching services, and investment grade tenant lease assets and ranching.

The firm’s operations include four short line railroads operating on some 700 total route miles in six states. RGPC properties serve approximately 140 freight customers, including many Fortune 500 firms, and move a diverse mixture of commodities in the agricultural, chemical, lumber, mineral and recycling industries.

Name: Semaphore Software- Railroad Signal Troubleshooting and Training Software - Signal Scout
Description:
Signal Scout Software makes troubleshooting faster and smarter by integrating Logged or Live Status with Application Logic in one easy-to-use, interactive platform. It streamlines the learning process so new employees get up to speed quickly. Signal Scout makes accurate troubleshooting simple, whether your team is working remotely or on-site. Give your staff the tools to troubleshoot correctly the first time and eliminate the frustration of outdated methods.
Semaphore Software, the team behind Signal Scout, creates software solutions that make life easier for railroad professionals. We believe in leveraging software and automation to minimize human error or frustration and create railroads that run more reliably with maximum throughput.

Name: #Einfachbahn
Description:
Unsere Vision:
Einfacher Zugang zur Schiene durch moderne Prozesse für eine zukunftsfähige und begeisternde Eisenbahn.

Unsere Mission:
Wir bringen Züge auf die Schienen Deutschlands und verbinden Digitalisierung, Eisenbahn-Wissen und Projektmanagement. Wir treiben Innovationen voran, weil wir alle dafür einstehen, dass der Zugang zur Schiene deutlich einfacher werden muss.

Team:
Wir sind bewusst heterogen zusammengesetzt. Das Team zeichnet sich vor allem durch Diversität, Kundennähe, Fachwissen, die Leidenschaft für das System Schiene und die gemeinsame Vision aus.
Wir möchten Neues wagen und bewegen. Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit des Systems Schiene nur gemeinsam mit allen Beteiligten erreicht werden kann. Wir wollen gemeinsam erfolgreich optimieren und Leidenschaft erleben; voneinander lernen, zuhören und verstehen.

Name: Hyperloop Manchester - University of Manchester
Description:
Hyperloop Manchester is a student-led initiative based at the University of Manchester, dedicated to advancing the future of transportation through the development of a scaled Hyperloop prototype. Our mission is to compete in leading Hyperloop competitions across Europe and beyond, while fostering a culture of innovation, technical excellence, and knowledge-sharing.

As students of the University of Manchester, we aim to showcase our university’s engineering talent on the global stage by designing and building a Hyperloop Pod that embodies cutting-edge research and creativity. Through this platform, we not only deepen our own technical skills, but also contribute to the broader Hyperloop community by exploring novel solutions and continuously iterating on our designs.

Our long-term goal is to establish a robust, multidisciplinary technical team that can serve as both a competitive force and a research demonstrator in the evolving Hyperloop landscape.

Name: Turun raitiotie
Description:
Suunnittelemme raitiotietä Turun satamasta keskustan ja Kupittaan kautta Varissuolle. Reitin pituus on noin 12 kilometriä, ja sen varrella sijaitsee 20 pysäkkiparia.

Nyt on käynnissä raitiotien viimeinen suunnitteluvaihe ennen mahdollista rakentamista. Toteutussuunnittelun aikana laadimme luonnokset katusuunnitelmista ja liikenteenohjauksen periaatteet, laskemme raitiotien rakentamisen kustannukset, teemme rakentamisaikataulun sekä valmistelemme raitiovaunujen hankintaa. 

Lisäksi teemme pohjatutkimuksia, luontoselvityksiä ja arkeologisia koekaivauksia raitiotielinjan varrella. Suunnittelun aikana tehdään myös tarvittavat asemakaavamuutokset ja arvioidaan raitiotien vaikutuksia laajasti, muun muassa maankäyttöön, kuntatalouteen sekä yrityksiin.

Raitiotietä ryhdytään rakentamaan, jos Turun kaupunginvaltuusto päättää investoida raitiotiehen arviolta loppuvuonna 2025.

Lue lisää: www.turunraitiotie.fi

Rail Systems Project Management & Consulting Services
RailProMac is an independent railway consultancy that provides services in various areas such as railway consultancy, project management, mentoring, fostering collaboration with domestic and foreign companies in the global business world, reviewing and interpreting documents of international railway projects, and conducting training and research.

Name: Fenniarail
Description:
Fenniarail Oy
is a private Finnish freight rail operator established in 2009. Fenniarail is focusing on competitive and customer oriented services. Fenniarail has commenced operation in 2016.
 
Owners
Fenniarail is owned by 41 Finnish private people or companies. Most main owners have extensive experience in logistics or rail business and strong entrepreneurial background. Fenniarail understands its customers’ needs.
 
Our target
Our target is to create a strong and independent rail company, which will improve its customers’ competitive position and economic activity. Increasing rail transportation and its market share will improve the rail network’s utilization rate. This has an impact on the environment and the energy use.
 
Our operation
Our organization is lean and effective. We utilize  our equipment at a high rate. Safety and reliability are key cornerstones for Fenniarail.

Name: Nordic Rail Service GmbH
Description:
Die Nordic Rail Service GmbH (NRS) ist im Jahr 2003 als 100%ige Tochtergesellschaft der LHG Service-Gesellschaft mbH gegründet worden.

Der  Bereich  Eisenbahnverkehr  (EVU) stellt Wagenmeister,  Rangierpersonal, Lotsen und Triebfahrzeugführer. Mit einer Flotte aus Dieselloks der Leistungsklasse 600, 1.000, 2.000 und 4.000 kW führen wir Kurz- und Mittelstreckenverkehre aus.

Die NRS-Waggonwerkstatt nahe des Lübecker Hauptbahnhofes verfügt über zwei 70 Meter lange Grubengleise und ist nach ECM-VO und VPI-Regelwerk zertifiziert. Unsere Kunden sind EVUs und Wagenhalter. Die Werkstatt der NRS ist Schweißbetrieb nach DIN 27201-6 und EN 15085-C1 für die  Instandsetzung  von  Schienenfahrzeugen  und  hat  eine  Zulassung für die ZfP-Verfahren VT und MT. 

Der Bereich Gleis- und Signalinstandhaltung (Inspektion, Wartung und  Reparatur)  umfasst  die  Durchführungen  aller  notwendigen Prüf-,  Wartungs-,  Reparatur-  und  Erneuerungsarbeiten  an  Gleis-,  Signal- und Fernmeldeanlagen, vornehmlich die des Lübecker Hafens.

Wir sind Mitglied des AVV, VPI, NEE und der CRSC.

Nordic Rail Service GmbH is a 100% subsidiary of LHG Service-Gesellschaft mbH. 

Our company employs highly motivated and qualified staff in the fields of railroad services (EVU), maintenance workshop for freight cars or track and signal construction.

Die Lokomotion Gesellschaft für Schienentraktion mbH ist ein eingetragenes Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen (EVU), das sich seit der Gründung im Jahr 2000 als einer der führenden Traktionäre im alpenquerenden Schienengüterverkehr etabliert hat. Die besondere Stärke des Unternehmens ist der Alpentransit über die Brenner- und Tauernachse zwischen den Ländern Deutschland, Österreich und Italien bzw. Slowenien. In Zusammenarbeit mit leistungsstarken Partnern befördert Lokomotion Ganzzüge des unbegleiteten kombinierten Verkehrs und Wagenladungsverkehrs europaweit.

Expertise nutzen, Position beziehen, Perspektiven der Frauen* abbilden, Bahnrealität mitgestalten – Nachhaltigkeit und Diversity mit Fokus auf Mobilität und Wirtschaft: die Bahnindustrie muss jetzt auf den Zug der Zukunft aufspringen.

Description:

200 employees in our top equipped sales- and production plants in Austria, USA and Great Britain guarantee the perfect solution and a quick and professional supply of your product in highest quality.

Name: Schuylkill River Passenger Rail Authority
Description: The mission of the Schuylkill River Passenger Rail Authority is to facilitate the successful return of reliable passenger rail service between the communities of Reading, Pottstown, and Phoenixville, Pennsylvania and beyond by securing federal funding, aligning partners, guiding strategy, and engaging and informing the public.

STUDY RAIL est une entreprise dynamique spécialisée dans l'ingénierie ferroviaire et urbaine, en pleine expansion sur les marchés français et internationaux. 
Nous sommes un des acteurs de référence dans le secteur de la signalisation ferroviaire, proposant des solutions durables et innovantes pour les infrastructures de transport de demain. 
Notre management expert et expérimentés est garant de ce positionnement.

Name: DB Cargo Czechia s.r.o.
Description:
With its location in the Czech Republic - in the heart of Europe - DB Cargo Czechia offers an excellent partner when it comes to the planning and implementation of central European transports.

Flexibility and adaptability are the main competences that we represent as a company. As a rail transport company that has established itself among the top 10 in the Czech Republic, even large transport volumes are for us no obstacle. Whether it is standard goods or exceptional transports, we are up to any challenge with the strong support of our partners and DB Cargo AG. With this step we are actively working on the shift of freight transport from road to rail.

Our new multimodal locomotives are a decisive factor here, as they make lengthy and time-consuming border transfers obsolete and ensure the punctuality of your trains. 

Our young and motivated team will be happy to help you implement your tailor-made transports also for international connections.

Description:
Srbijavoz je nacionalna kompanija za železnički prevoz putnika koja nastoji da vaše putovanje vozom učini što lepšim i komfornijim!

Кonstantnim unapređenjem usluga i kapaciteta, skraćenjem vremena putovanja i velikim brojem polazaka želimo da građanima obezbedimo najpristupačniji i najkvalitetniji železnički transport kako bi vozovi bili prvi izbor prilikom donošenja odluka o putovanju.

Preporučujemo vam vožnju našim ,,Sokolom” -  najsavremenijim vozom u regionu koji od marta 2022. godine saobraća rekonstruisanom prugom na relaciji Beograd – Novi Sad. 

Ime i naziv ovog brenda izabrani su na konkursu „Pusti inspiraciju da te vozi“ , a uskoro ih očekujemo i na ostalim prugama Srbije.

Uživajte u putovanju sa nama!

Name: Quantum Rail
Description:
Quantum Rail is a specialist consultancy firm specialising in Railway Signalling and Rail Systems engineering across Australia and New Zealand. Our engineering specialists bring comprehensive expertise spanning the full Signalling system lifecycle with a focus on specification, concept design, tendering, project execution, safety assurance and commissioning.
 
Our expertise and experience enable us to provide design, safety certification, and type approval of rail signalling systems. Additionally, our in-house-developed technologies, including QuVDU, facilitate the efficient delivery of both advanced commercial-off-the-shelf and proprietary signalling and train control systems. 
 
Our team has extensive experience working with major Accredited Rail Transport Operators, including Metro Trains, V/Line, ARTC, Queensland Rail, and the Department of Infrastructure and Transport (SA), delivering complex infrastructure safely, efficiently, and collaboratively. We combine technical excellence with practical delivery experience to provide tailored, outcome-focused solutions that enhance network performance and reliability.

Name: ProTrain - Utbildning, Bemanning, Trafik
Description:
Vi tar företag framåt!

Med lång erfarenhet av järnväg och moderna marknadsanpassade strategier skapar vi affärsnytta för våra kunder.

ProTrain levererar utbildningar och bemannar med förare, växlare och tillsyningsmän för både persontransporter och godstransporter.
Med tillstånd som järnvägsföretag kan vi också erbjuda tågtjänster, exempelvis växlingstjänster eller som underentreprenör åt godstransportföretag.
Vi har lång erfarenhet och gedigen kompetens inom tågbranschen, med rötter i det som en gång var SJ-skolan. Kontor finns i Mjölby och Stockholm men verksamheten är spridd över landet – där kunderna finns.

ProTrain är ett expansivt företag med en växande marknad även i Norge.

Name: VÄTE Bolagen AB
Description:
Genom vår kunskap och kontakter i såväl järnvägsbranschen som andra branscher ligger vi alltid steget före för att skapa snabba, enkla och unika lösningar. VÄTE innehar gemensamt säkerhetsintyg med tillstånd för tågdragning, växling samt tillstånd för farligt gods & farligt avfall.  

Vi erbjuder tågdragning,  lok- och vagnväxling, färjeväxling, terminalväxling, verkstadsväxling, motorvagnsväxling, spärrfärd, utbildning i växling/spärrfärd, uthyrning av personal m.m. 

Vi står också till tjänst med terminalservice, såsom yttre vård av tågfordon. Servicen utförs av depåoperatörer och består av utvändig manuell tvätt, fronttvätt, insektstvätt, påfyllning av spolarvätska och vatten samt gråvattentömning. Vid behov utförs gråvattentömning med mobila enheter. I tjänsten ingår också viss service av material och anläggningar.

 Vi har mångårig erfarenhet av drift av kombiterminaler.  Där sköter vi all hantering som har med terminalen att göra såsom in och utlämning gods. Vi erbjuder självklart växling på kombiterminalen. Vår personal har erfarenhet av portalkranar och reachstackers som sköter av och pålastning av tåg och lastbilar. Vi hanterar trailers, tankar, containers i alla storlekar samt lastflak, samtliga enhetstyper kan även hanteras med tilläggstjänster som farligt gods samt elkoppling av kylaggregat, mindre reparationer av trailers.

Name: Western Railway
Description: The Western Railway (abbreviated WR) is one of the 19 zones of Indian Railways and is among the busiest railway networks in India, headquartered at Mumbai, Maharashtra. The major railway routes of Indian Railways which come under Western Railways are: Mumbai Central–Ratlam, Mumbai Central–Ahmedabad and Palanpur–Ahmedabad. The railway system is divided into six operating divisions: Ahmedabad, Vadodara, Rajkot, Bhavnagar, Ratlam, and Mumbai WR. Vadodara railway station, being the junction point for the Ahmedabad–Mumbai route and the Mumbai–Ratlam route towards New Delhi, is the busiest junction station in Western Railways and one of the busiest junctions of Indian Railways too, while Ahmedabad Division earns highest revenue followed by Mumbai Division and Vadodara Division. Surat railway station is one of the busiest railway station in Western Railway in non-junction category where more than 180 trains pass per day.

Name: Brotherhood Of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen
Description:
The Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen exists to promote and protect the rights, interests, and safety of its members through solidarity, aggressive representation, and education.

Founded in 1863, BLET is a Division of the Rail Conference of the International Brotherhood of Teamsters and represents approximately 57,000 active and retired locomotive engineers, conductors, and other train service employees across the United States. The BLET is the senior national labor organization in the United States and also North America’s oldest rail labor union.

The BLET National Division is located at: 7061 East Pleasant Valley Road, Independence, Ohio 44131. The National Legislative Office is located at Teamster Headquarters in Washington D.C.

Description:

With bipartisan support, FRPRD is working with local leaders, state agencies, the federal government, and community members to deliver a rail system that supports economic growth, reduces congestion, and provides Coloradans with real mobility choices.

Regional vision.
Environmental benefits.

Local control with statewide impact.

In only a few years we have become a worldwide leader in operations planning for all types of rail-based transport from metros to high-speed lines, for projects ranging from day-to-day operations to long-term planning.

Description:
Die W&S Technik GmbH ist spezialisiert auf dem Gebiet der Leit- und Sicherungstechnik (LST) und damit bundesweit im Einsatz. 24h Bereitschaft zur Havariebeseitigung.

Name: AGIFI -Association Française des Gestionnaires d'Infrastructures Ferroviaires Indépendants
Description:
L'AGIFI regroupe des acteurs alternatifs de la gestion et de la maintenance d'infrastructures ferroviaires contribuant, aux côtés du groupe ferroviaire public et en particulier de SNCF Réseau et des pouvoirs publics, au développement et à la modernisation du formidable patrimoine ferroviaire français. 
Acteurs alternatifs, car indépendants du groupe public historique, ils sont porteurs de nouvelles méthodes, nouvelles approches et de nouveaux modèles, qu'ils mettent au service du développement du secteur ferroviaire. 

Après avoir conçu, financé et construit près d'un quart du réseau à Grande Vitesse français, les membres de l’AGIFI s’engagent à l’entretenir et à l’exploiter sur 20, 30 ou 50 ans en garantissant la sécurité des circulations et le meilleur niveau de performance des lignes et des systèmes dont ils ont la charge. 

Œuvrant sur le long terme, les membres de l’AGIFI sont fortement mobilisés afin de faciliter l’insertion de leurs équipements dans les territoires, tant du point de vue de la mobilité que d’un point de vue environnemental. Ils sont particulièrement vigilants quant à l’impact de leurs projets sur la biodiversité et les écosystèmes qu’ils traversent. Ils ont de ce fait déployé d’importants savoir-faire pour limiter cet impact sur la totalité du cycle de vie de leurs projets.

Name: Artelia People Solutions
Description:
Nous sommes… des ingénieurs passionnés. Des créateurs et des facilitateurs de projets d’exception dans des domaines très divers, de leur conception à leur réalisation. Très concrètement, Artelia People Solutions est une société d’assistance technique fondée fin 2021. 
Juste avec ces éléments, rien de très particulier à priori, non ? Mais ! 
Pensée comme une nouvelle offre de services du Groupe Artelia, Artelia People Solutions intervient aussi bien sur des missions directement chez nos clients, que sur des missions d’appui auprès des équipes opérationnelles d’Artelia.
Des transports à l’énergie, et du rail à l’EPR, nous sommes unis par une caractéristique commune : la passion des projets pour créer des solutions positives.
Notre ambition est en effet d’allier qualité de l’offre et proximité entre les équipes, afin de proposer à nos clients un modèle d’accompagnement simple et accessible. 

Pourquoi rejoindre APS ? 
Tout est dans le nom ! APS est une Solution centrée sur le terme « people ». Autrement dit… vous ! Et pour prendre en compte ce à quoi vous aspirez, notre singularité réside dans la richesse des parcours que peut offrir le Groupe Artelia.
Que vous souhaitiez monter en responsabilités ou diversifier vos domaines d’intervention, nous pouvons vous affirmer que vous gagnerez en expertise. Entre les parcours de formation proposés par Artelia et la renommée/qualité de nos experts, vous disposez de nombreuses opportunités pour améliorer vos connaissances et votre expertise professionnelle. 
Avec la simplicité, le partage et l’exigence comme valeurs fondamentales, vous serez surpris par la diversité des opportunités qui s’ouvrent à vous !

Name: EDI Charter for Rail
Description:
In 2020, the Railway Industry Association (RIA) and Women in Rail (WR) launched a Charter to champion equality, diversity and inclusion in the UK railway industry.

The joint ‘Equality, Diversity & Inclusion Charter’ is a commitment to work together to build a more balanced, fair and high performing sector. This is a voluntary initiative, open to all companies, clients and organisations working in the UK rail sector who wish to play a role in promoting positive change in our industry. It seeks to recognise and build upon the progress which has already taken place, providing the basis to encourage further collaboration and action across the sector.
 
The Charter involves several key commitments, including to:

- Appoint a member of the senior leadership team as an ‘EDI Champion’;
- Agree an action plan, monitor and report on progress made;
- Provide opportunities for training and education of employees, support the 
 progression of diverse individuals into senior roles to improve diverse 
 representation at senior and executive level of the UK railway industry;
- Create a culture that fosters inclusion and provide a safe space for all 
 employees to talk openly, including at industry events and in meetings; and
- Make recruitment and progression processes accessible and attractive to all to 
 attract retain and develop people of all backgrounds, ages, genders and 
 identities.

To enquire about becoming a signatory, contact the team at info@edicharter.co.uk

Name: K2C Rail Canada
Description:
Our company provides comprehensive solutions to the Canadian railway industry, specializing in training, personnel, innovation, and consultancy services. Our team of experts is dedicated to delivering the highest quality services, aimed at helping our clients achieve their goals and stay ahead in a rapidly evolving industry.

Training: Our training programs are designed to enhance the skills and knowledge of railway personnel, ensuring that they are equipped to meet the demands of the industry. We offer a range of courses, from basic railway operations to advanced technical training, delivered by experienced professionals.

Personnel: We understand the importance of having a well-trained and motivated workforce. Our personnel services include recruiting and staffing solutions, ensuring that our clients have access to the best talent in the industry.

Innovation: We are committed to driving innovation in the Canadian railway industry. Our team works with clients to identify and implement cutting-edge solutions, helping to increase efficiency and reduce costs.

Consultancy: Our consultancy services offer a range of support, from strategic planning and risk management to performance optimization and project management. We provide tailored advice to meet the specific needs of each client, helping them to achieve their objectives and stay ahead of the competition.

Name: Land Transport Chamber of Commerce
Description:
The Land Transport Chamber of Commerce brings together companies from across Poland operating in the fields of railway transport, industry, and construction. We unite more than 80 entities – from large corporations to specialized companies within the railway sector.
As a representative of entrepreneurs and a trusted partner in dialogue with public administration, we cooperate with key industry institutions – the Ministry of Infrastructure, the Office of Rail Transport, the Railway Institute, the Centre for EU Transport Projects, technical universities, as well as companies from the PKP Group, PKP Polskie Linie Kolejowe S.A., and the Central Communication Port (CPK).
Our mission is to protect the interests of our member companies and to actively contribute to shaping regulations and policies related to railway transport. We are a key market partner in the PLK Investment Forum and the initiator and originator of the CPK Technical Dialogue Forum.
Membership in the Chamber offers a real opportunity to influence the conditions of doing business in the railway sector, co-create its development directions, and exchange knowledge and experience with industry leaders.
Within IGTL, two sectoral divisions operate: Rail Transport and Rolling Stock, and Railway Construction. These divisions address current legal, technical, and financial topics, as well as strategic issues related to the market's future.
We act with transparency and strive to build common, compromise-based positions that support the development of the entire railway industry – not just selected participants.

Once operational, it will significantly enhance connectivity, reduce traffic congestion, and improve accessibility for residents and visitors. Stay tuned for updates on this transformative development in urban transportation!

Welcome to CTE Group, the dynamic holding company behind a legacy of excellence in the rolling stock refurbishing industry. With a commitment to innovation, empowerment, and sustainable growth, we have been at the forefront of transforming rail transport and empowering communities for over two decades.

At CTE Group, our purpose goes beyond business success. We envision a future where railways serve as catalysts for progress, connecting people, industries, and opportunities. As the holding company of three business units, we are proud to lead the way in revitalising and modernising rolling stock, bringing new life to trains that serve as lifelines to communities around the country.

Name: Vossloh Australia
Description:
Vossloh is an established name in Australia which stands for design expertise as well as quality, offering 3 categories of rail solutions: Design and manufacture of Turnouts, Switches and Crossing; Fastening Systems; Design and manufacture of Concrete Bearers.

Vossloh in Australia is a highly experienced turnout designer and manufacturer for the local market, who supplies turnouts and special trackwork components to the major rail operators in Australia, including the national carrier, all state-country and state-metropolitan networks. Vossloh has also supplied turnouts into South East Asia.

Vossloh is the largest supplier of Heavy Haul Turnouts in Australia. The Heavy Haul turnouts are capable of safely and efficiently managing movements of 2 km-long iron ore trains, with wagon masses in excess of 40 Tonne axle loads.
Vossloh designs and manufactures a full range of turnout geometries, with a variety of rail sections, track gauges and special geometry, including Special Turnouts, Diamonds, Single Slips, Double Slips, Catchpoints and so on.

Vossloh’s other strengths include detailed rail yard design. We provide full steelwork, bearer and signalling interface solutions. Vossloh is regarded as the foremost expert in Dual Gauge Turnout design, including the latest innovative DG designs.

Vossloh has provided turnouts and special trackwork for some of the nation’s largest infrastructure projects, across Australia, including both government and private enterprises.

Vossloh provides extensive pre-engineering services, after sales support and can provide on-site technical personnel when needed for all Vossloh-supplied products.

Name: COSTAN GP
Description:
Née de la fusion des activités d’EXID AAP et Global Project, COSTAN GP est la nouvelle filiale du Groupe Sentiles spécialisée en pilotage et gestion de projets, notamment dans les secteurs de la mobilité. 

Nos principaux métiers ? 
1)	Assistance technique 
-	Management de projets : PMO, planification, cost control, maîtrise des risques, doc control, etc.
-	Pilotage et ingénierie de projets : organisation générale, coordination et pilotage de projet OPC, réception de travaux, etc.

2)	Prestation de formation
-	Méthodes et outils : MS Project, chef de projet, Primavera P6, etc.

3)	Conseil /Expertise
-	Conseil et Audit : études de marché, rédaction de spécifications, rédaction de réponses à appel d’offre, audit, etc. 
-	Expertise : signalisation, infrastructure, courants forts/courants faibles
-	Conduite du changement : organisation de service, optimisation des processus, formation, assistance méthodologique et capitulation d’expériences, architecture et déploiement de systèmes d’information

Name: C-RAIL Fribourg SA
Description:
La société a pour but de réaliser des mandats de conseil, des prestations d'ingénierie, de project managing et d'autres services dans le domaine de l'infrastructure ferroviaire.

L'obiettivo della società è fornire servizi di consulenza, di ingegneria, di gestione di progetti e altri servizi nel campo dell'infrastruttura ferroviaria.

Ziel der Gesellschaft ist es, Beratungs-, Ingenieur-, Projektmanagement- und andere Dienstleistungen im Bereich der Eisenbahninfrastruktur zu erbringen.

Name: Rallumons l'Étoile
Description:
« Rallumons l’Étoile », souhaite réunir les acteurs toulousain de la mobilité dans une nouvelle démarche collective, pour obtenir ensemble un RER pour notre métropole et sa banlieue.

Les difficultés de déplacements dans l’agglomération vont s’aggraver, malgré les importants projets portés par les différents acteurs (Etat, Région, Département, Tisséo et Toulouse Métropole).
Comme cela existe dans la plupart des métropoles européennes de taille équivalente, il manque un RER, complémentaire du métro et des TER, pour irriguer et structurer la grande agglomération (25 km autour de Matabiau) en offrant une alternative forte à la voiture là où cela n’existe pas.

Comme première étape, nous souhaitons étudier la création d’une ligne de RER cadencée toutes les jours et tous les heures, entre Castelnau-d’Estrétefonds et Baziège, en plus des TER existants. Ce serait déjà une avancée formidable pour de nombreux habitants, entreprises et communes.
En effet, la plupart des investissements nécessaires sont d’ores et déjà prévus (simplification des circulations à Matabiau, améliorations des petites gares, nouveaux trains) ou pourraient être débloqués (réalisation d’une petite partie des travaux des Aménagements Ferroviaires du Nord Toulousain).

En 2019, nous voulons être capables de soumettre au débat public un dossier argumenté et compréhensible par tous sur les modalités possibles de réalisation de cette ligne.modalités possibles de réalisation de cette ligne.

Name: Metra Consultant Engineers
Description:
Metra Engineering Consulting Company, established in 1984, has grown into one of the most prominent and innovative engineering consultancies in the transportation sector. Initially focused on the design and supervision of national infrastructure projects, Metra has expanded its operations to deliver forward-thinking strategies and integrated solutions across rail, road, metro, transit logistics, and urban development.

With a proven track record of excellence, Metra has designed and supervised more than 11,200 kilometers of railway infrastructure in Iran and numerous projects internationally. In addition, the company has played a major role in planning and executing hundreds of kilometers of highways and roads, reflecting its vast capacity and technical expertise.

To date, Metra has successfully completed over 460 engineering and consulting contracts, covering a wide range of services including strategic planning, feasibility studies, detailed engineering, project supervision, and management. The firm’s multidisciplinary approach encompasses areas such as transportation master planning, infrastructure design, geology and hydrology, operations and fleet planning, signaling systems, Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS), urban planning, and technical and economic justifications for rail, road, and building projects.

Metra’s strength lies in its team of more than 200 certified professionals whose expertise and commitment have consistently delivered value and satisfaction to clients across both public and private sectors

Name: Axial Projects
Description:
We are Axial Projects – a new and innovative company in the Rail industry offering a Planning, Integration and Data driven Control systems.

Our team can offer a variety of skills, services and digital tools. Our experience spans the project lifecycle from pre-contract feasibility through to successful delivery and handback.

We have a proven history of bidding and supporting major, multi-disciplinary Rail Projects and have a strong history in developing bespoke solutions for our clients.

We are fully accredited with RISQS, BuildersProfile and Constructionline. Our Business Management System is compliant with the requirements of ISO 9001, 14001 and 18001.

Name: S&C Alliance
Description:
Formed in 2022, the S&C Alliance brings together complementary suppliers with a common goal - to help our customers optimise their Switches & Crossings performance. 
 
With over 200 years of experience in all elements of the engineering, manufacture and maintenance of switches and crossings, we are uniquely placed to offer on site advice, support and engineering and technology solutions. Our members work together to offer best in class capabilities to safely and efficiently resolve the S&C reliability challenges faced by Infrastructure Managers
 
The S&C Alliance currently consists of DWG Infraco, Flexilube, Interflon, Intelrail, KONUX, One Big Circle and Staytite and we are always open to new members.

The Alliance members are,
Interflon (lubrication)
Flexilube (Automated Lubrication Systems)
DWG Infraco (Spikefast & Fastpatch)
Staytite (Hardlock Nuts & Bolts)
Konux (Remote Monitoring Systems)

We also have industry renowned experts as part of the group in the areas of Standards and procedures, S&C Reliability and S&T component installation and set up.
Darren Sharp (Former Principal Engineer S&C LUL)
Neil Denton (Former Network Rail S&C Reliability Specialist)
Brett Nelson (S&T Points Specialist)

Associate Members of the Alliance are,
OneBigCircle (Automated Intelligent Video Review)
Alphatek (Hyperformance Coatings for Rail/Wheel Interfaces)

Name: Die Länderbahn GmbH DLB
Description:
Als führendes privates Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen im Personennahverkehr treten wir am Markt mit den Bahnen alex, oberpfalzbahn, trilex, vogtlandbahn und waldbahn auf und bieten hochwertige Verkehrsdienstleistungen in Deutschland, Tschechien und Polen an. Ab Dezember 2026 werden wir einen großen Teil des S-Bahn-Netzes Mitteldeutschland übernehmen und von Halle (Saale) und Leipzig den Anschluss an unser vogtlandbahn-Netz schaffen.

Die Gesellschaft sitzt seit 1889 in Viechtach. In unseren Werkstätten in Görlitz, Neumark, Schwandorf, Lam, Viechtach und Zwiesel stellen wir die Instandhaltung unserer Fahrzeugflotte sicher. Zusätzlich bieten wir unsere Leistungen auch den Betreibern anderer Bahnen an.

Name: VPI - Verband der Privatgüterwagen-Interessenten Österreichs
Description:
LEISTUNGSSTARK UND ZUKUNFTSFÄHIG 

12.800 GÜTERWAGEN, 60 MITGLIEDER

Der VPI fördert und vertritt die Interessen aller unabhängige Wagenhalter im Schienengüterverkehr in Österreich. Wir setzen uns national und international für die optimalen Rahmenbedingungen unserer über 50 Mitgliedsunternehmen ein. Gemeinsam machen wir den Schienengüterverkehr leistungsstark und zukunftsfähig.

Name: Wakhan Corridor Transit and Forwarding Company
Description:
OUR COMPANY IS ONE OF THE LEADING TRANSIT AND FORWARDING COMPANIES
Wakhan Corridor Transit and Forwarding Company established on 2019 is fully owned by Afghan Nationals and have been active in sea, land, air and railway transport.
Our Company is operating in local transportation as well as International transportation.
We have our branch offices in the main transit borders inside the country as well as the neighboring countries in order to facilitate transportation and customs documentations. We provide full package of transport-loading/unloading- warehousing-cross border facilitation and customs clearance

Name: Havelländische Eisenbahn AG
Description:
Kundenzufriedenheit steht bei der HVLE an erster Stelle. Als privates EVU haben wir die Möglichkeit, in besonderer Weise auf die speziellen Wünsche jedes Kunden einzugehen und bieten maßgeschneiderte Transportlösungen von hoher Effizienz und Qualität. Unsere erfahrenen Mitarbeiter und ein sehr moderner Maschinenpark sind dabei Garanten für Flexibilität, Schnelligkeit, Zuverlässigkeit und Sicherheit. Besondere Expertise bieten wir im Schwerlastbereich sowie bei Gefahrgütern und Spezialtransporten.

Seit der Gründung 1892 als Osthavelländische Eisenbahn im brandenburgischen Havelland konnten wir immer wieder unsere Kompetenzen unter Beweis stellen und können heute auf eine lange Eisenbahntradition zurückblicken. Von dieser jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung profitieren heute unsere Kunden. Als privates Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen (EVU) sind wir im Güter- und Personenverkehr sowie als Eisenbahninfrastrukturunternehmen (EIU) zugelassen.

Unser Geschäft betreiben wir derzeit von fünf verschiedenen Standorten in Deutschland. Als Eisenbahninfrastrukturunternehmen betreiben wir etwa 100 Kilometer Gleisanlagen.
Über unsere Tochtergesellschaft, die Rail & Logistik Center Wustermark GmbH & Co. KG, betreiben wir mit dem Rangierbahnhof Wustermark den größten privat geführten öffentlichen Bahnhof in Deutschland. Wir sind aktives Mitglied im Netzwerk europäischer Bahnen, im Verband Deutscher Verkehrsunternehmen, in der Allianz pro Schiene sowie in der Entsorgergemeinschaft Transport & Umwelt e.V. und besitzen eine Zertifizierung als Entsorgungsfachbetrieb (Anforderungen nach dem Kreislaufwirtschaft & Abfallgesetz).

Weiterführende Informationen finden Sie unter: http://www.hvle.de.

Name: Lake State Railway
Description: Lake State Railway Company (LSRC) is a Michigan - based progressive short line railroad that has been providing "excellence in transportation" since 1992. LSRC's approximate 300 miles of track run from Flint through its headquarters in Saginaw, up to Gaylord and Alpena. Lines also run to Midland, Bay City, and Paines.

Name: RATH Gruppe
Description:
der neue LinkedIn Info text:
Die RATH Gruppe ist eine inhabergeführte Unternehmensgruppe mit Schwerpunkt auf Schienenverkehr und Mobilität. Mit Sitz in Düren bündeln wir unter dem Dach der RATH Gruppe regional und überregional tätige Unternehmen entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette des Bahnverkehrs.
Zur RATH Gruppe gehören unter anderem Rurtalbahn, Rurtalbus, RTB CARGO, RATH Bahntechnik, LUKAS, VIAS und LSB. Unsere Gesellschaften sind in den Bereichen Güterverkehr, Personenverkehr, Infrastrukturmanagement, Werkstattbetrieb, Ausbildung sowie Service-Lösungen tätig und bieten damit ein breit aufgestelltes Leistungsportfolio rund um die Schiene und den öffentlichen Personennahverkehr.
International ist die RATH Gruppe insbesondere mit RTB CARGO im europäischen Schienengüterverkehr aktiv. Lizenzen in Deutschland, den Niederlanden, Belgien, Österreich und Ungarn ermöglichen grenzüberschreitende Transportlösungen aus einer Hand.
Mit der VIAS sind wir erfolgreich im SPNV auf den Schienen in Hessen, Rheinland-Pfalz und Nordrhein-Westfalen unterwegs. Unsere fünf Netze stehen für zuverlässigen Nahverkehr, nachhaltige Mobilität und eine abwechslungsreiche Arbeitswelt.
Ergänzt wird die Gruppe durch ein eigenes Kompetenzzentrum für Aus- und Weiterbildung, das Triebfahrzeugführer sowie Mitarbeiter im Eisenbahnbetrieb qualifiziert – für die Unternehmen der RATH Gruppe und in Zusammenarbeit mit externen Partnern.
Mit rund 1.800 Mitarbeitern gestalten wir Mobilität auf der Schiene – verlässlich, zukunftsorientiert und europaweit vernetzt.

Name: SHN cargo
Description: Vi erbjuder pålitliga och miljövänliga godstransporter på järnväg till företag som är i behov av hållbara logistiklösningar. Detta gör vi genom att vara kreativa och lyhörda för kundens behov.

Name: Silverstar Railways
Description:
Silverstar Railways GmbH wurde im August 2024 gegründet und nahm im Oktober 2024 den operativen Betrieb auf.

In mehreren Projektstufen ist geplant, als fixer und nachhaltiger Bestandteil der Zentraleuropäischen Eisenbahnlandschaft zu etablieren.

Wir wollen die Eisenbahn-Welt nicht neu erfinden - aber wir wollen bestehende Systeme überdenken und optimieren! Für unsere Kunden - für eine nachhaltige Wirtschaft.

Name: IMechE Railway Division - South Western Centre
Description:
Welcome everyone to the site for the South Western Centre of the Railway Division of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers - IMechE. We have now, along with other Railway Division Centres, changed from planning events for the academic year to a normal calendar year. We have extended our, already published, events for early 2024 and now look forward to welcoming you to our face-to-face meetings arranged for the whole of the year.  The planned events for the whole of 2024 are shown in our 2024 programme 

Our AGM this year is in its traditional slot of April 22nd and I hope to see as many of you as possible.

We are continuing our successful engagement with universities with a career fayre and presentation at Southampton University in March.

Up to date information about our programme and a PDF copy is available on our website, please do keep checking the link below.
https://nearyou.imeche.org/near-you/UK/Western/south-west-rd-centre


All our meetings are free and open to everyone, please do help us to spread this message amongst friends, family, and colleagues.

Please do let us know if you have any ideas for topics or events you would like us to put on. Also, have you considered joining the organising committee? We would be very pleased to hear from you.

In May we have a technical visit planned to see the fast charge battery train in action on the Greenford branch, meeting at West Ealing station - booking for this event is essential please click on the event title below and register your name.

Similarly the summer social on Wednesday 10 July is a return to our successful events at the Great Western Society Didcot Depot and also requires pre registration to attend the event. There is likely to be a small attendance fee to participate in this event, more details will be available closer to the date.

So wishing everyone a healthy and successful 2024 and look forward to meeting you at our events 

 

Tom Moore

Centre Chair

Name: Rafflesia Technology
Description: We are engineering service provider, specializing in traction power, rail transportation and energy segment & power generation.

Name: Inter-rail S.p.A.
Description:
We are an innovative MTO (Multimodal Transport Operator) offering companies all the logistics services they need for the procurement and distribution of goods by rail and road.
 
Like a winning coach, we deploy and manage the most suitable team to:

• accompany the client in the choice of modes, equipment, railway companies
and suppliers of reference for the supply chain in the European context; 

• organise, coordinate and manage all the logistical activities of freight transport defined with the customer.
Founded with a strong specialisation in the iron and steel and wood sectors for the flow of raw materials and products, over time we have broadened our skills in the cereals, chemical and any product that lends itself to handling on rail wagons in Italy and Europe.

Name: HI-SIM Technology
Description:
HI-SIM provides an easy-to-use powerful software that helps railway engineers and operators with design and performance optimization for traction power systems, train movement & operation, and energy consumption.

Do you need simulations for traction power system or headway analysis or train movement or energy efficiency studies or all of them in one project? For these, HI-SIM can provide probably one of the best value in the market that you can find and trust.

Name: JPDM Ferroviaria | Constructora | Maquinaria
Description:
JPDM cuenta con una trayectoria enfocada inicialmente en la construcción y mantenimiento, tanto de infraestructura como superestructura ferroviaria y electrificación. La reputación de nuestro sistema de gestión, capacidades operacionales y de ingeniería, junto a profesionales altamente capacitados, nos convierten hoy en un actor competente y destacado dentro del área de obras civiles.

Durante nuestros diecinueve años de trabajo en el sector, nos hemos destacado por el compromiso con los altos estándares de calidad y seguridad, convirtiéndonos en un referente en el sector ferroviario y de construcción de obras civiles.

En JPDM trabajamos bajo un modelo de confianza que se sustenta en el cumplimiento de los compromisos de forma íntegra, priorizando la seguridad de las personas y promoviendo la rentabilidad del negocio de nuestros clientes.

Name: Korea Railroad Research Institute
Description:
KRRI is a government-funded research institute contributing to the development of the nation and industry through research in public transportation. (Governing body: Ministry of Science and ICT)
<Major Achievements>
- KTX-Sancheon System (Korean high speed train)
- K-AGT (Korean self-driving lightweight train transit)
- Increased the top speed of HEMU-430X (421.4km/h)
- Official operator of the designated railway test track in Osong, Korea
- Completed the real-scale prototype test run of Hydrogen Power Train
- Autonomous Train Control System reduced the driving time by 35% compared to current CBTC
- Success in aerodynamic test of miniature Hypertube at 1,019km/h

Name: Rail Signalling
Description: Rail Signalling is a dedicated Rail management company offering Rail and Signalling project management and testing services. Our range of services provide for a complete, integrated, system and commissioning solution for complex multi disciplinary rail projects. The Rail Signalling team work collaboratively to develop and deliver complete commissioning strategies.

Name: TRY & CERT
Description: With its test laboratories (#LEF) and its network of NoBo (CERTIFER Group), TRY&CERT is close to its customers to offer them ever more services. Its history and experience, acquired over the last 30 years, allow LEF to have 10 independent test laboratories covering all the certification needs of railway signalling solutions. Five of the LEF's laboratories are accredited to ISO 17025, guaranteeing independence, impartiality and high competence in ERTMS. This accreditation allows LEF to offer tests for EVC on-board solutions according to ERTMS Subset-026 094 and 076 standards. LEF also has 3 other laboratories for testing interoperability according to the ERTMS Subset-111 and 112 standards, but also EuroRadio according to the ERTMS Subset-092 standard and STM according to the ERTMS Subset-074 standard. Finally, LEF has 2 laboratories enabling railway IT manufacturers to obtain the label according to the ITxPT technical specifications. All our laboratories are equipped with state-of-the-art fully automated test benches with 24/7 operation. Coupled with our IRYSS testing robot, they ensure the repeatability and accuracy of the results provided by LEF by removing the human factor through fully automated processes. LEF also has its own R&D department with experts in AI, vision, software and design engineering. Our laboratories allow us to test complex environments by connecting, for example, to the Radio Block Center (RBC) and interlocking equipment (IXL) of OEM or infrastructure manager laboratories. Finally, LEF is one of the few laboratories to have obtained recognition from the European Railway Agency (ERA) for the development of ERTMS tests. LEF is developing the new ERTMS TSI CCS 2022 standard and maintaining the current ERTMS standards.

Name: GR Environmental & Rail Inc
Description: GR is a leading full-service railway contractor based in Southern Ontario, specializing in a comprehensive range of rail infrastructure solutions. With a commitment to safety, efficiency, and quality, we provide expert services in track construction, maintenance, rehabilitation, and emergency repairs. Our experienced team works closely with clients across the rail industry, including Class I and shortline railroads, industrial facilities, and transit authorities, to deliver reliable and cost-effective solutions. At GR, we take pride in our strong safety culture, skilled workforce, and dedication to meeting the evolving needs of the rail sector while ensuring the longevity and efficiency of railway operations.

Name: Neotec America
Description: Since 1991, Neotec has been designing and manufacturing light rail, catenary and OHL vehicles, for construction and maintenance purposes. With head-quarters in France, the company is renown for its strong engineering capabilities in the design of reliable, safe and eco-friendly vehicles.

Name: Captrain Deutschland CargoWest GmbH
Description:
Die Captrain Deutschland CargoWest GmbH ist im Jahr 2015 aus der Verschmelzung der Captrain Deutschland-Gesellschaften Bayerische CargoBahn GmbH und TWE Bahnbetriebs GmbH hervorgegangen. Mit eigenen Standorten in Gütersloh und Ulm transportiert sie nicht nur Güter für regional ansässige Unternehmen, sondern hat sich im Verbund der Captrain Deutschland als Full-Service-Anbieter für grenzenlose Logistiklösungen auf der Schiene etabliert.

Die individuell auf Sie abgestimmten Logistikkonzepte der Captrain Deutschland CargoWest  reichen dabei weit über die sichere und zuverlässige Traktion im Nah- und Fernverkehr hinaus. Mit ihrer Expertise für Vor-Ort-Logistik rangiert sie auf Ihrem Werksgelände, sorgt für die Be- und Entladung und übernimmt bei Bedarf die Betriebsführung Ihrer Werks- oder Anschlussbahn. Als Spezialist für grenzüberschreitende Verkehre nach Frankreich, Italien, Österreich, Skandinavien sowie in die Niederlande bringt die Captrain Deutschland CargoWest Ihre Güter auch international sicher und zuverlässig ans Ziel.

Dabei kooperiert sie eng mit den europäischen Schwestergesellschaften der Captrain Deutschland und greift zudem auf ein Netzwerk von internationalen Partnern zurück. Somit hat das Unternehmen auch außerhalb Deutschlands direkten Zugriff auf die für Sie richtigen Ressourcen und stellt die notwendigen Marktkenntnisse sicher.

Das Dienstleistungsportfolio der Captrain Deutschland CargoWest umfasst darüber hinaus die Wartung und Instandhaltung von Schienenfahrzeugen.

Name: SEL Rail Systems
Description: SEL was formed by three colleagues in December 2020 to deliver signalling and systems engineering services to the rail industry in Australia and internationally. We have a wide array of experience, from signalling design and independent review internationally, through testing and commissioning in Europe, Asia and Australia, and CBTC system definition in Malaysia and Australia, to Independent Safety Assessor (ISA) in Australia - we have done it all!

Name: Transkeo T13 (SNCF/Keolis)
Description:
Lancé le 6 juillet 2022, le T13 rapproche Saint-Germain-en-Laye à Saint-Cyr-l’Ecole en une trentaine de minutes afin de favoriser des déplacements plus rapides et confortables au cœur du département des Yvelines grâce à sa voie de circulation dédiée et sa fréquence de passage élevée. Le T13 est en service tous les jours de la semaine, week-end compris, de 6h à minuit.

Grâce à ses connexions avec de nombreuses lignes de bus, mais aussi le RER et le train, le T13 s’intègre pleinement dans le réseau de transport régional pour améliorer les déplacements du quotidien dans l’Ouest Parisien.

Name: Traktion
Description: Traktion is a start-up developing a digital co-pilot for freight train drivers. By analysing the line profile, timetables and GPS position, our eco-driving assistance application promotes smoother, more fuel-efficient and better controlled driving. Designed from the outset with end users in mind, Traktion aims to reduce energy consumption by up to 15%, while improving driving comfort and extending the life of locomotives by limiting braking. Our approach is open, modular and collaborative. Traktion is part of an open source ecosystem that promotes collective innovation for more efficient and sustainable rail freight.

Name: MINERVE
Description: Le compte officiel du projet MINERVE (BIM & Jumeau Numérique des infrastructures ferroviaires) de SNCF Réseau, RATP Infrastructures, Colas Rail, l’IREX, Centrale Supelec et Kayrros, financé par l’Etat dans le cadre  de France 2030

Name: Belpre Industrial Parkersburg Railroad
Description: The Belpre Industrial Parkersburg Railroad (BIP) is your connection to the Ohio River metals, plastics, and petrochemicals corridor. Operating seven days per week across 50 miles with CSX interchange in Parkersburg, WV.

Name: Napraw mój wagon
Description:
Napraw mój wagon to dynamicznie rozwijająca się firma, która od 2020 roku świadczy kompleksowe usługi dla sektora kolejowego. 

Nasza działalność opiera się na nowoczesnych rozwiązaniach technologicznych oraz najwyższych standardach jakości, dzięki czemu możemy sprostać 
nawet najbardziej wymagającym zadaniom.

Mamy do dyspozycji cztery w pełni wyposażone samochody serwisowe, które umożliwiają diagnostykę układu hamulcowego, pomiary zestawów kołowych oraz wykonywanie napraw wagonów wraz z mobilną wymianą zestawów kołowych. Magazyn oraz ciężarówka HDS umożliwiają płynną logistykę w zakresie transportu zestawów kołowych oraz części zamiennych.

Nasi pracownicy posiadają ponad 30-letnie doświadczenie, co gwarantuje najwyższy poziom usług. 
Posiadamy również certyfikat ECM na funkcję utrzymania taboru, co potwierdza Naszą kompetencję i profesjonalizm. 

Posiadamy bazy techniczne w Gliwicach oraz w Rożnicy k. Sędziszowa (woj. świętokrzyskie) 
Jesteśmy do Państwa dyspozycji 24h na dobę, 7 dni w tygodniu.

Name: RailTraining GmbH
Description: Wir bieten zielgerichtete und praxisnahe Schulungen & Seminare rund um Schienenfahrzeuge an!

Name: SIGMA STS
Description:
SIGMA STS est une entreprise dynamique et ambitieuse spécialisée en signalisation ferroviaire. Elle met à disposition son
expertise sur les différentes phases d'un projet pour les lignes conventionnelles et à grande vitesse. Son personnel
hautement qualifié met un point d'honneur à fournir une valeur ajoutée et des solutions qui répondent aux besoins de ses différents
clients.

Name: Cascadia Rail
Description: Cascadia Rail is a new organization of advocates spanning from Vancouver, Bellingham, Seattle, Spokane, Tacoma, and Portland who support multi-state efforts to connect the Cascadia region through high-speed intercity transport.

Name: RAIL CoLAB
Description: The RAIL CoLAB aims to develop innovative solutions for adaptable, intelligent, resilient, and sustainable rolling stock and infrastructures. It will address the main challenges faced by the rail ecosystem, which also encompasses the complete life cycle of the equipment, including data, and information empowered design, manufacturing, integration of innovative materials, both at manufacturing and at operation and maintenance, 3D manufacturing and robotization, BI based on ICT-enhanced operations and management of the rail system, energy efficiency, power electronics for power quality innovative solutions, and up to decommissioning, recycling or reuse through a circular economy approach.

Name: California Passenger Rail Summit

Name: ROCvA opleiding Machinist Railvervoer
Description:
Welkom op de LinkedIn-pagina van de Opleiding Machinist Railvervoer - ROC van Amsterdam.

Opleiding voor de toekomstige machinisten
De Opleiding Machinist Railvervoer bij het ROC van Amsterdam biedt solide onderwijs voor degenen die geïnteresseerd zijn in een carrière in het railvervoer. Ons programma is ontworpen om studenten zowel de theoretische kennis als de praktische vaardigheden te geven die nodig zijn om succesvol te zijn in deze branche.
We bieden een mix van klassikaal leren en praktijk ervaringen, waaronder stages en excursies in samenwerking met bedrijven in de railsector. Dit bereidt onze studenten voor op de werkzaamheden in de praktijk en biedt hen een voorsprong bij het vinden van een baan na hun afstuderen.

Waarom onze opleiding?
-	Praktijkervaring: We benadrukken het belang van praktische ervaring, met kansen om te leren in echte werkomgevingen.
-	Relaties met bedrijven: Onze relaties met de spoorwegindustrie bieden studenten unieke kansen voor stages en werk na het afstuderen.
-	Gericht op carriére: We richten ons op het uitrusten van studenten met vaardigheden die direct toepasbaar zijn in hun toekomstige banen.
Start je carrière bij ons

Als je geïnteresseerd bent in het railvervoer en klaar bent om de eerste stappen te zetten naar een carrière als machinist, dan is onze opleiding een uitstekende keuze.

Volg ons voor het laatste nieuws! 

Voor meer informatie over de opleiding en hoe je je kunt aanmelden, neem contact met ons op.

Name: Rail Academy Vienna
Description:
RAIL ACADEMY VIENNA_________  office@railacademy.at____+43664 520 8325_________

Description:

Notre force : un réseau d’experts reconnus, une organisation à taille humaine et un encadrement technique de proximité qui garantit la performance sur le terrain.

Name: Hollidaysburg Rail Car Services, LLC

Name: MRC Engineering
Description:
MRC Engineering is an independent and standalone Railway Telecoms Design Consultancy in the UK. We also provide telecoms engineering, railway governance and railway assurance consultancy. We specialise in the technical support for design and construction of new and altered railway telecoms systems and railway telecoms design for Operational Communications and SISS for the UK railway infrastructure.

MRC Engineering was established in 2013 primarily as an engineering consultancy specialising in design engineering support. We are based in Doncaster and have been RISQS audited and qualified since 2017 and achieved the full 4 star accreditation possible for a first audit.

We supply our services in the following areas:

•	Consultancy, including Technical Advice and Support;
•	Telecoms Asset Condition Assessments, Correlation and Surveys;
•	Railway Telecoms Governance and Assurance, and Telecoms Design for GRIP Stages 3 – 8.
•	Safety Critical Engineering Roles as Contractors Responsible Engineer (CRE) for both Design and Construction Phases.
•	Feasibility, Concept and GAP Reports.
•	Technical Telecoms Engineering Support
•	Telecoms Standards Technical Review
•	Technical Review of Client Requirements
•	Telecoms Informed Buyer Support to Larger Companies with no in house Telecoms Engineering Support. 

MRC Engineering's ethos is CAT 1 Day 1 and a collaborative working approach with all our clients and Network Rail, we are committed to achieving the highest standards of professional competence and safety in all that we do.

Name: IKube Ltd
Description:
We are IKube Ltd, a specialist rail engineering consultancy established in 2017. We support Tier 1 to Tier 3 organisations with the design, integration, testing and compliance of Rolling Stock and Signalling systems , from concept through to final delivery, across both new build and major retrofit projects.

Our team brings over 25 years’ experience and has contributed to high-profile programmes including Crossrail, 4LM, Norway’s ERTMS rollout and Traffic Management System deployments. Our clients include Alstom, Bombardier, Hitachi, Transport for London (TfL) and Bane NOR.

We’re particularly strong in integrating complex subsystems such as ETCS (ATLAS 2.0/3.0 and EBICAB 2000), TCMS, CCTV, PIS and DAS — with deep experience in lab and on-train testing.

Name: Cargo Rail Italy Srl
Description:
CargoRail Italy è una società del Gruppo Captrain Italia, filiale italiana del Gruppo SNCF attiva nel trasporto ferroviario delle merci.
Opera come impresa ferroviaria che gestisce treni e servizi di manovra all’interno di terminal e siti industriali, garantendo soluzioni logistiche integrate.

Fondata il 13 luglio 2011 per perseguire il business a valore aggiunto delle manovre ferroviarie, complementare al trasporto merci ferroviario, Cargo Rail Italy favorisce l’integrazione tra attività ferroviarie e quanto necessario a completare il ciclo treno. Lo sviluppo del concetto di integrazione tra il ciclo treno e quanto relativo al ciclo merci, successivo alle attività di manovra Ferroviaria, è la vera carta vincente che Cargo Rail Italy sta giocando nel panorama nazionale italiano, ambendo ad operare con la massima professionalità per confermarsi sempre di più come azienda leader in questo delicato settore. 

Cargo Rail Italy è un’azienda certificata sia per quanto previsto e richiesto in ambito ferroviario, che nella qualità e sicurezza dei servizi resi. Particolare attenzione anche agli aspetti ambientali, attualmente in via di certificazione. 
Nell’ambito della profonda evoluzione del settore della manovra ferroviaria, Cargo Rail Italy si propone quindi di:
- fornire servizi integrati di manovra di qualità e competitività superiori;
- costituire un punto di riferimento per la sicurezza nelle attività di manovra;
- far leva su staff e risorse Captrain Italia per garantire i più alti standard di qualità.

Oltre allo svolgere attività di carico/scarico dei carri ferroviari gli operatori si occupano poi della loro movimentazione in totale sicurezza, sia presso gli impianti chimici che nelle aziende agroalimentari. 

Cargo Rail Italy è, inoltre, certificata ISO 9001 2015 e ISO 450012018, e detiene un proprio Sistema di Gestione della Sicurezza certificato dall’Agenzia Nazionale per la Sicurezza delle Ferrovie (ANSF).

Name: Midwest Signal & Railroad Services
Description:
MSRS specializes in providing critical services to the rail industry, focusing on emergency signal knockdown, crossing maintenance, and safety operations. In the event of accidents at rail crossings or weather-related disruptions, MSRS offers swift and effective signal knockdown services to restore safety and prevent further incidents. Our team of qualified maintainers is equipped to perform regular testing, maintenance, and inspections of rail crossings, ensuring compliance and minimizing downtime.

In addition to our core services, MSRS also offers comprehensive project management, consulting, and flagging services to help businesses navigate complex rail-related projects. Whether you need expert advice, operational support, or safety oversight, MSRS is committed to delivering reliable, high-quality solutions tailored to your needs.

Contact us today to learn how MSRS can assist your business and enhance your rail safety and operational efficiency.

"The ultimate asset class requires no energy to produce, never degrades nor depreciates and cannot be stolen or lost. Finally, new technology is unlocking hidden value in the asset previously unavailable to investors. The asset is AIR RIGHTS."

Name: Rail97
Description:
Rail97 was established in June 2023 by Director, Adrian Mills.

We provide specialist rail safety consultancy services to support WA's major infrastructure projects, with a growing team of professionals who live and breathe Safeworking.

Adrian and long-time colleague Jamie bring over 22 years of combined experience in Safeworking and Track Access Planning. Both are trained to the highest levels of PTA Safeworking and have a detailed understanding of Rail Safety National Law (RSNL). 

Adrian has worked on some of Perth's largest rail shutdowns and assisted with new Safeworking rule development and implementation. Jamie is a highly regarded PTA PO3 and PPO as well as an accomplished Safeworking Coordinator, with major project experience including Acciona's Bayswater Blockade, the Morley Ellenbrook Line and years inside the PTA managing track access with expert-level knowledge of eTAS.

As the business has grown, so too has our team. We're proud to have Jared as a senior Safeworking professional coordinating complex rail operations and shutdowns. We also have Zoe, a skilled and well-respected casual team member who brings high-level infrastructure access planning knowledge and frontline protection experience to the business. Zoe also boasts a Cert IV in Raily Safety Management.

The team are supported by Beth in the background to who keeps the operations running smoothly.

Each individual shares Rail97's commitment to practical, high-quality rail safety solutions and are respected for the work they do.

If you're planning a project or shutdown - large or small - and need a team who knows the realities of the rail corridor, get in touch. Adrian is available for a one-hour initial consultation to talk through your needs and support your rail safety obligations.

Name: UIC Harmotrack Project
Description:
Welcome to Harmotrack, a dynamic UIC project committed to advancing the safety and efficiency of rail transportation through cutting-edge technology and innovative analytics. Our team of passionate global experts works tirelessly to develop and deploy state-of-the-art solutions that address the most pressing challenges facing the rail industry today.

From improving infrastructure and equipment maintenance to optimizing onboard monitoring systems, we are dedicated to transforming the way railways operate. By leveraging data and analytics, we provide rail operators with real-time insights and predictive capabilities that enable them to make better decisions, reduce risks, and enhance the overall railway experience.

But we don't just focus on the technology. At Harmotrack, we believe that collaboration and partnership are essential to achieving our goals. That's why we work closely with industry leaders, policymakers, and other stakeholders to ensure that our solutions are practical, effective, and aligned with the needs of the entire rail ecosystem.

Join us on our mission to revolutionize rail transportation and create a safer, more sustainable future for everyone. Follow us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest projects, initiatives, and insights, and learn how you can get involved in this exciting journey.

For further information please contact Mr. Danilo Sorrentino, Head of Vehicle-Track interaction section at SNCF Réseau, at danilo.sorrentino@reseau.sncf.fr or the Harmotrack Management Team at harmotrack@reseau.sncf.fr

At RIC (Rail Industry Consultant), our dedication lies in orchestrating intricate railway projects, encompassing metro and mainline networks globally. Description:

Name: SNCF - Mont-Blanc Express
Description:
LE GROUPE SNCF :
Le groupe SNCF est l’un des premiers acteurs mondiaux de transport de voyageurs et de logistique de marchandises. 
SNCF propose aux voyageurs des solutions de transport collectif intégrées et adaptées à la mobilité de chacun. Cinq millions de voyageurs comptent sur la SNCF pour effectuer leurs déplacements quotidiens personnels comme professionnels.
En nous rejoignant, vous œuvrez au bon fonctionnement d’un service ferroviaire de qualité et accessible à tous, indispensable au dynamise économique, au lien social, au développement des territoires et à la transition écologique. 


SNCF – MONT-BLANC EXPRESS :
Une ligne UNIQUE !
Le Mont-Blanc Express est une ligne ferroviaire française reliant Saint-Gervais-les-Bains à Vallorcine, en passant par Chamonix. La ligne dessert dix gares françaises et comporte près de trente-sept kilomètres de ligne. 
C’est un train unique car il relie la France et la Suisse. Ce train transfrontalier vous permettra de découvrir les sublimes paysages du pays du Mont-Blanc.
Chaque année le Mont-Blanc Express permet le voyage de cinq cents passagers par jour en basse saison et jusqu’à six mille passagers en haute saison, soit environ huit cent mille voyageurs par an.

Name: Transrail FN27

As the only facility of its kind in Abitibi-Témiscamingue, we handle the reception, transfer, storage, and shipment of fuels, minerals, and industrial products with efficiency and reliability.

Our site spans more than one million square feet and is equipped with a railcar mover, heavy loaders, and a 24/7 certified scale. With dual rail access via CN and CPKC, we ensure seamless logistics solutions that reduce costs and improve turnaround times.

Family-owned and community-driven, Transrail FN27 is dedicated to delivering safe, sustainable, and value-added services to industries across the region since 2013

Name: TRANSCAER Canada
Description: The Transportation Community Awareness and Emergency Response initiative (TRANSCAER) was started in Canada in 1985 by the Chemistry Industry Association of Canada (CIAC). Today, it’s led by CIAC and the Railway Association of Canada (RAC). TRANSCAER members work with municipalities, emergency responders, and residents in communities along transportation routes to make sure they are informed about the products being moved through their area and prepared to respond to potential incidents involving dangerous goods.

Jesteśmy przygotowani do obsługi dużych inwestycji oraz pojedynczych zamówień, zawsze dostarczając najwyższą jakość usługi.

Sie stellt das zehntgrößte von ca. 150 deutschen Eisenbahnunternehmen dar und verfügt über ein jahrzehntelanges Praxis-Know-How. Neben den zahlreichen Logistikdienstleistungen, betreibt die VPS den Binnen- und Industriehafen in Salzgitter Beddingen und wirkt bei der Entwicklung innovativer Eisenbahntechniken mit.

Name: railML.org

Transforming the future of rail connectivity, railML.org is a non-profit organisation dedicated to advancing standards and improving collaboration within the railway industry. Our mission is to simplify communication between different railway applications, tackling the challenges of connecting various software systems. We believe in open-source principles, freely sharing our work for the benefit of the entire railway sector. 

As trailblazers in rail data exchange, we empower rail industry stakeholders worldwide with innovative solutions to create seamless and efficient railway operations. Whether you are an invidual or organisation, join us on this exciting journey to shape the future of rail technology!

Name: SwissRail Concepts Sàrl
Description:
SwissRail Concepts SARL est une entreprise suisse dynamique basée à Renens spécialisée dans la fourniture de services de conducteurs de train et d'accompagnateurs qualifiés. Fondée avec une vision claire de répondre aux besoins du secteur ferroviaire, notre entreprise s'engage à offrir des solutions professionnelles et fiables pour garantir un transport ferroviaire sûr et efficace en Suisse romande.

Notre gamme de services comprend la mise à disposition de conducteurs de train de catégorie B100, A et A40 ainsi que d'accompagnateurs qualifiés de catégorie Ai, Ai40 et Bi. Nous nous efforçons d'offrir des équipes hautement compétentes et expérimentées pour répondre aux exigences de nos clients. 

Notre plan d'action s'étend à travers une grande partie de la Suisse romande, ce qui nous permet de fournir une couverture étendue et une réponse rapide aux besoins de nos clients. Que ce soit pour des services réguliers ou des missions spéciales, nous sommes prêts à répondre avec flexibilité et efficacité.

Notre stratégie repose sur l'offre de services sur mesure, avec des coûts adaptés à chaque fonction et mission demandée. Nous mettons en avant les besoins réels sur le terrain pour garantir des solutions pertinentes et efficaces. Plus la mission est de longue durée, plus les prix seront ajustés en conséquence, offrant ainsi une économie substantielle pour l'entreprise mandataire. Cette approche renforce également l'image d'adaptabilité et de sens commercial de SwissRail Concepts, favorisant ainsi la fidélisation de notre clientèle.

En résumé, SwissRail Concepts s'engage à offrir des services ferroviaires de première classe, en mettant à disposition des équipes qualifiées et une couverture étendue à travers la Suisse romande. Nous sommes déterminés à être un partenaire fiable pour nos clients, en contribuant à l'efficacité et au succès de leurs opérations ferroviaires, tout en participant activement au développement des compétences dans le secteur.

Nippon Signal India focuses on providing advanced signaling solutions, such as signaling and control systems, railway automation systems, and safety-related technologies, for the Indian and South Asian markets.

The company plays a significant role in improving railway safety, efficiency, and operational standards by offering products like interlocking systems, track circuits, and train control systems, all of which are vital components of modern railway infrastructure.

ELL stands for reliability, innovation and climate protection.

Photo  by Patrick Böttger
