Name: Lockelec Rolling Stock
Description:
Lockelec Rolling Stock is a company that excels in innovation and local manufacturing.

Here's what sets us apart:

Design: We employ innovative engineering techniques and cost-effective manufacturing methods to ensure the best design for efficient manufacturing. We are accountable partners throughout the entire process and beyond.

Problem-solving: We identify and define your problem, design efficient solutions using the latest manufacturing methods, and strive to achieve the highest rail standards for the most effective outcome.

Leading disability access supplier: Lockelec Rolling Stock is proud to be Australia's top supplier of disability access solutions for rolling stock. We specialise in inclusive and accessible solutions for railway systems.

We understand the importance of equal access for all passengers, including those with disabilities. Our dedicated team works closely with railway operators and manufacturers to design and implement innovative solutions that meet the highest accessibility standards. From wheelchair ramps to audiovisual announcements, our solutions create an inclusive environment onboard trains.

At Lockelec, we combine excellence in design and engineering with a deep understanding of disability access regulations and best practices. Our solutions not only comply with relevant guidelines but also set new industry standards for inclusivity.

Partnering with Lockelec means receiving quality products and services that prioritize accessibility and passenger experience. We are committed to enabling equal access to public transportation for individuals of all abilities.

By choosing our comprehensive range of disability access solutions, railway operators can confidently provide an inclusive and accessible travel experience. We empower individuals with disabilities to navigate the railway system with ease and independence.

Name: Rail Industry Neuroinclusive Community (RINC)
Description:
Realising a Neuroinclusive Rail Industry

- A significant proportion of the people who work in the rail industry and the people who travel on trains are neurodivergent. 

- At a time when our industry needs revenue growth and to recruit and retain talented people, making the rail industry more neuroinclusive is a huge opportunity. 

- Bringing about a neuroinclusive industry where all passengers and employees feel they belong and are treated equitably, will contribute to a better, cheaper, greener, growing railway.

- Realising this change is achievable, with cross-industry education, leadership and allyship.

Name: Tri-Valley - San Joaquin Valley Regional Rail Authority
Description:
The Tri-Valley – San Joaquin Valley Regional Rail Authority was established on January 1, 2018 through the enactment of Assembly Bill 758 with the mandate to plan and deliver cost-effective and responsive transit connectivity between the BART system in the Tri-Valley and the Altamont Commuter Express that meets the goals and objectives of the communities it will serve.

Valley Link aims to:
=> Improve connectivity within the Northern California Megaregion: connecting housing, people, and jobs.
=> Create rail connectivity between the San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit District’s rapid transit system and the Altamont Corridor Express commuter service.
=> Have project implementation that is fast, cost-effective and responsive to the goals and objectives of the communities it will serve.
=> Be a model of sustainability in the design, construction and operation of the system.
=> Support the vision of the California State Rail Plan to connect the Northern California Megaregion to the State rail system.

Name: DAC4EU - Digital Automatic Coupling for Europe
Description:
Welcome to the DAC4EU Linkedin channel.
DAC4EU is a consortium commissioned and financed by the German Federal Ministry for Digital an Transport (BMDV) to carry out a project that aims at demonstrating, testing and obtaining regulatory approval for digital automatic coupling (DAC) in rail freight transport.
The consortium consists of Deutsche Bahn AG, its subsidiary DB Cargo,  the Swiss and Austrian rail freight companies SBB Cargo and Rail Cargo Austria, along with wagon keepers Ermewa, GATX Rail Europe and VTG Rail Europe.
The Project began in July 2020. 
The goal is to gain detailed technical data about the tested couplers.
The data plays an important part in the decision-making process of the European DAC Delivery Programme (EDDP) regarding the selection of a particular coupling design for an introduction throughout Europe.

DAC will open the door to a system of rail freight transport that is fully automated and digitalized. 
A coordinated approach within Europe will be key to achieving full-scale implementation of the technology.
You're welcome to visit our website www.dac4.eu and find out more about the project.

Follow us for more information !
Contact us if you want to install an Ecotrain railway in your Region: contact@ecotrain.eu

Name: Rail Freight, The Future is Ours

Wij vervoeren en transporteren hoofdzakelijk containers, trailers, droge en natte bulk. In zowel Nederland als Duitsland vervoeren wij zelf op eigen licentie, in andere Europese landen werken wij samen met andere LTE-ondernemingen en met derde maatschappijen. Onze focus ligt op veiligheid, kwaliteit, efficiëntie, flexibiliteit en duurzaamheid. 

LTE Netherlands is in 2012 opgericht en inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een organisatie van zo’n +/- 100 medewerkers. Er is een informele, open en no-nonsense bedrijfscultuur. Onze stimulerende werkomgeving is gericht op innoveren en verbeteren van processen en mensen.

Name: Ferromove
Description:
Fondée fin 2023, Ferromove est une entreprise ferroviaire qui oeuvre sur le réseau ferré national français.
Ferromove est issu de rencontres humaines de passionnés, animés par 6 valeurs clés : le collectif, la confiance et le bien-être - qui constituent notre socle managérial -  la modernité, la rigueur et la sécurité qui forment nos fondamentaux. 
Notre ambition : aider nos clients à promouvoir et développer le ferroviaire dans leur chaîne logistique.

Name: SNCF Voyageurs -  Agences de Voyages
Wheel Rail Seminars
Description: The Wheel Rail Interaction Conference is designed to inform and educate professionals who work for railroads, transit agencies, contractors, and consulting firms. The conferences focuses on the complex and critical interaction between the wheel and the rail (vehicle/track). It brings together researchers, suppliers and rail road professionals who hear technical papers presented, learn about new products and services, and get a chance to network with experts in railway industry. Attendees leave with the latest information about new and existing technologies.

Name: SNCF VOYAGEURS SUD AZUR
Description: SNCF VOYAGEURS SUD AZUR

Name: FerCargo - Confederazione del Cargo Ferroviario
Description:
FerCargo rappresenta tutte le IIFF nate con lo scopo di sostenere le azioni necessarie per lo sviluppo del trasporto ferroviario delle merci in un mercato sempre più integrato a scala europea e ispirato alle regole della liberalizzazione dei servizi. La Confederazione è costituita da: 
- Associazione FerCargo che rappresenta le Imprese Ferroviarie del trasporto merci, indipendenti dal Gruppo FSI. 
- FerCargo Manovra che rappresenta le principali imprese di manovra ferroviaria che operano nei porti ed interporti nazionali. 
- Assorotabili che rappresenta le principali imprese di costruzione di locomotive merci, le principali imprese italiane di manutenzione locomotive e le imprese di noleggio di materiale rotabile. 
- FerCargo Terminal che rappresenta i principali gestori di terminal e raccordi ferroviari italiani.

Name: PlasmaTrack Ltd
Description: PlasmaTrack is a commercially viable and sustainable rail cleaning solution for the 21st Century. It introduces a whole new system for cleaning rail heads that restores the track to a clean, dry, and uncontaminated state able to support optimum braking conditions with a single pass.

Name: G&K Rail Group
Description: Wszystko po kolei. Wsparcie przedsiębiorstw kolejowych oraz podmiotów spokrewnionych w różnych obszarach przemysłu kolejowego. Szkolenia, doradztwo ekspercie, obsługa systemowa, budowanie struktur – Twój rozwój naszym celem.

Name: Rail.S e. V.
Description:
Rail.S zählt mit 100 Vereinsmitgliedern aus Wirtschaft und Wissenschaft zu den größten Bahntechnikclustern in Deutschland. Unsere Mission ist es, die Bahnindustrie und insbesondere die mittelständischen Bahnzulieferunternehmen zu stärken. Ob Kooperationsprojekte, Absatzförderung oder Zugang zu internationalen Märkten – als Austausch- und Vernetzungsplattform vernetzt Rail.S Sie stets mit den richtigen Partnern.

With over 100 members from industry and science Rail.S belongs to the largest railway technology clusters in Germany. Our mission is to strengthen the railway industry and, in particular, the medium sized railway suppliers. Whether cooperation projects, sales promotion or access to international markets – as an exchange and networking platform, Rail.S always connects you with the right partners.

Name: SDEL Rail
Description:
SDEL Rail est une entreprise filiale à 100% du groupe VINCI Energies. 
L’entreprise a été créée en novembre 2017 de la séparation des activités RATP et SNCF au sein de l’entreprise SDEL Transport en Commun. Cette séparation a pour but de répondre de manière toujours plus exigeante aux attentes et aux besoins de nos clients.
SDEL Rail a pour vocation de réaliser pour la SNCF des marchés de courants forts et courants faibles. Organisée sous la forme d’une PME, l’entreprise compte aujourd’hui 80 salariés. Comme toutes les entreprises du groupe VINCI Energies, la structure de l’entreprise est très horizontale et offre une très forte proximité de terrain à l’ensemble du personnel encadrant. Cette proximité, couplée à notre expertise client et métier, permet d’assurer un lien fort avec nos clients dans une démarche partenariale gagnant-gagnant ainsi qu’une réactivité importante sur l’ensemble de nos chantiers.

Name: Beitbridge Bulawayo Railway (Grindrod Rail)
Description: BBR is a full-fledged, private, railway company that provides a cost effective, efficient, predictable and seamless rail transport service along the corridor between South Africa and Bulawayo into hinterland for the benefit of the people of Africa and the world at large.

Name: Anacostia Rail Holdings
Description:
Anacostia Rail Holdings Company is a leading owner and operator of shortline freight railroads and rail-served logistics platforms across the United States. It delivers neutral, reliable access to the North American Class I rail network, connecting ports, terminals, and industrial customers to the markets they serve.

Anacostia’s services include shortline rail operations, car switching for intermodal terminals and industrial facilities, track maintenance, freight transloading, and train dispatching. These capabilities help customers streamline supply chains, maximize efficiency, and leverage the environmental benefits of rail, providing a sustainable alternative to road-based freight.

Our portfolio of shortline railroads includes:

•Chicago South Shore & South Bend Railroad (CSS), supporting both freight mobility and regional transportation networks

•Gulf Coast Switching (GCS), delivering high-performance rail switching services in the Houston market

•Louisville & Indiana Railroad (LIRC), connecting Midwest shippers to major Class I railroads

•New York & Atlantic Railway (NYA), providing freight rail service across Long Island

•Northern Lines Railway (NLR), serving industrial and agricultural customers in central Minnesota

• Pacific Harbor Line (PHL), serving the Ports of Los Angeles and Long Beach, the largest container port complex in the United States

Complementing its rail operations, Precision Terminal Logistics (PTL), a jointly owned platform with Brown Brothers Harriman Capital Partners, operates, develops, and acquires rail-served transloading terminals and warehouse facilities nationwide. PTL enables customers without direct rail access to tap into rail’s efficiency, sustainability, and reach.

Across our railroads and logistics businesses, Anacostia Rail Holdings Company is committed to operational excellence, customer partnership, and long-term value creation, connecting industries and strengthening supply chains nationwide.

Name: LOSSAN Rail Corridor Agency
Description: The LOSSAN Rail Corridor Agency is a joint powers authority originally formed in 1989 that works to increase ridership, revenue, capacity, reliability, coordination and safety on the coastal rail line between San Diego, Los Angeles and San Luis Obispo. It is governed by a 11-member Board of Directors composed of elected officials representing rail owners, operators, and planning agencies along the rail corridor. The LOSSAN Agency is staffed by the Orange County Transportation Authority. In 2015, the LOSSAN Agency assumed administrative and oversight responsibility for the Amtrak Pacific Surfliner service, including identification of cost-effective strategies for the administration and operation of the service.

Name: GoRail
Description:
GoRail works with thousands of community leaders across the country to tell the local story of freight rail — stronger economies, more jobs and cleaner skies. Founded in 2004 on the principle that “all politics is local,” we believe that direct input from constituents is the best way to communicate with elected officials. 

Many Americans don’t realize that freight railroads pay their own way with little help from taxpayers — to the tune of over $20 billion annually, on average. These investments make American industry more competitive by maintaining and enhancing the rail network that connects companies and communities to markets all over the world.

Working with the support of U.S. freight railroads and rail supply companies, our coalition of community leaders reminds Congress how freight rail investments and rail policy decisions have real impacts back home, from local jobs and economic development to air quality and road congestion.

Name: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY
Description: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT AUTHORITY is a Transportation Agency 130 LIVINGSTON ST, Brooklyn, New York, United States.  My Location is at Rail Control Center, Department of Subways an emergency management subdivision.

Name: AEGIS Certification
Description: At AEGIS Certification, our mission is to support the railway industry with the best inspection and certification services contributing towards a safe, reliable and interoperable railway. Operating out of Derby, and Madrid and Toronto, we provide our accredited services in the UK, and Spain and Canada as well as across the EU and the rest of the world.

Name: First Rail
AZVINDI Ferroviario

PROYECTO INTEGRAL O.P.
PROYECTO EJECUTIVO, SUMINISTRO DE MATERIALES Y CONSTRUCCIÓN DE PLATAFORMA Y VÍA

Name: Länsimetro Oy
Description: Länsimetro Oy is a limited liability company that is jointly owned by the cities of Espoo and Helsinki. Länsimetro Oy is the owner of the modern metro infrastructure that will stand the test of time. Länsimetro Oy’s task is to own and develop the metro stations, rail line and metro systems. Länsimetro operates in the background of the public transport operators as the expert organisation for owning and developing the metro infrastructure. With its expertise, Länsimetro contributes to ensuring that the metro remains an attractive and safe transport option and serves customers for decades to come.

Name: Táilte Tours
Description:
Táilte Tours is a new, voluntary led fundraising initiative. Our organisational team currently consists of Niall Kelly, Alex Richardson and David Walsh, all of whom have long experience in heritage and tourist train operation and management. Our aim is to assist Ireland's voluntary run heritage railways and museums raise extra funds to further their projects. 

We aim to do this through holding railway-themed fundraising and awareness events.

Name: High Speed Rail Alliance
Description: The High Speed Rail Alliance is a member-supported, non-profit organization advocating for fast, frequent and dependable trains linking the entire country. We are promoting an integrated network of new, 220-mph high-speed lines combined with modernized Amtrak trains linked to strong local transit networks.

Name: FERWEST
Description:
FERWEST, entreprise de travaux et de prestations de sécurité ferroviaire.

Pour toute demande : contact@ferwest.bzh 
Retrouvez-nous également sur www.ferwest.bzh

Name: Rail Concept
Description:
Fondée en 2006, Rail Concept est une société indépendante spécialisée dans les activités d’études et de conseil liées à la création et l’aménagement d’infrastructures et de services ferroviaires. Nous accompagnons les Maîtres d’Ouvrage et Collectivités afin d’analyser, d'optimiser et de promouvoir leurs projets ferroviaires. 

Notre expertise dans les domaines des études de mobilité, d’exploitation et des études techniques nous permet d’apporter une approche globale, innovante et rationnelle. Rail Concept propose un haut niveau d’expertise grâce à une équipe très expérimentée, reconnue dans le milieu ferroviaire national et international. Cette équipe dispose de deux atouts majeurs : sa capacité à créer des outils experts, puissants et innovants grâce à sa division Recherche et Innovation et son approche collaborative orientée vers les besoins du Client.

Grâce à son expertise et à une approche pluridisciplinaire, Rail Concept intervient à tous les stades de la conception des infrastructures ferroviaires : définition des besoins, prévision de trafic, optimisation des capacités de l’infrastructure, amélioration des performances du réseau y compris la création d’infrastructures nouvelles, évaluation du coût d’un projet (coûts d’investissement, d’exploitation et coûts de maintenance), montages contractuels financiers et juridiques, pilotage de projets, gestion des coûts.

La société compte aujourd'hui une trentaine de salariés, répartis entre le siège situé aux Angles (près d'Avignon) et les locaux à Paris.

Name: TELEKOMUNIKACJA I INFORMATYKA NA KOLEI | KONFERENCJA
Description:
Innowacyjna oraz bezpieczna kolej wymaga implementowania do jej systemów najnowszych rozwiązań i technologii z zakresu telekomunikacji i informatyki. 

Na konferencji będziemy mówić o kolei jako innowacyjnym środku transportu oraz o implementowaniu do branży systemów z zakresu telekomunikacji i informatyki.

Name: Olavion sp. z o.o.
Description: Realizujemy przewozy kolejowe w Polsce oraz organizujemy spedycję międzynarodową

Name: Rail Freight Corridor Rhine-Alpine EWIV
Description:
As one of eleven European Rail Freight Corridors, the RFC Rhine-Alpine increases the attractiveness and efficiency of international rail freight traffic in order to foster competitiveness and to promote a modal shift from road to rail in the European freight transport market. 

RFC Rhine-Alpine links the countries Netherlands, Belgium, Germany, Switzerland and Italy. It has a total of 3,900 km of corridor lines, is connected to 6 seaports and is used by over 100,000 freight trains annually. 

By working on our six focus topics defined in a joint Memorandum of Understanding agreed on by all involved Transport Ministries we want to make a shift to rail happen. 

We
-	improve international path offer
-	coordinate transparent information on international temporary capacity restrictions
-	Increase cross-border operability by harmonizing technical and regulatory requirements
-	Support ETCS roll-out
-	Monitor our performance and
-	Improve coordination on International Contingency Management and re-routings in case of disruptions.

Giving transparent information and cooperating closely  with infrastructure managers, allocation bodies and partners along the entire logistics chain are of utmost importance for us.

You have a greater interest in our work and would like to learn more about our current projects? Then we kindly invite you to visit our website:
www.corridor-rhine-alpine.eu

Name: Transtar LLC
Description: Transtar LLC and its operating companies deliver reliable and comprehensive transportation and logistics services in a culture that supports employee involvement, innovation, and ethical behavior while continually improving our safety performance, our environmental stewardship, and our commitment to quality.

Name: Ferest Rail SpA
Description: We want to simplify the rail shipping process by offering a flexible, tailor-made service together with and for the client.

Name: CCF - Associação Centro de Competências Ferroviário
Description:
A visão do CCF é posicionar Portugal como referência na indústria ferroviária, no desenvolvimento de tecnologias e de novos produtos, na capacitação de capital humano e do tecido industrial nacional e na aceleração de ideias, projetos e empresas com capacidade de internacionalização.

A missão do CCF é liderar o sistema ferroviário nacional desde a conceção e geração de ideias e projetos inovadores, teste e validação de provas de conceito, aceleração de projetos empresariais para o mercado, geração de oportunidades e desenvolvimento de competências, desenvolvimento e integração de tecnologias em novos produtos e sistemas até à sua operação.

Name: SCN
Description:
Desde 1989, actuamos con criterios de independencia económica. Siendo una empresa especializada en aportar soluciones integrales de gestión documental y teniendo como objetivo alcanzar la excelencia en la prestación del servicio ofrecido.

Para lograr dicha excelencia, aportamos como valor añadido una atención personalizada, flexibilidad, agilidad, confianza y calidad. Valores que nuestros clientes destacan en las encuestas de calidad, en las que analizan los servicios recibidos por nuestra compañía.

Estamos en constante incorporación de soluciones innovadoras, las cuales nos consolidan en el mercado como empresa de servicios plenos para el Tratamiento Digital de la Información.

Estamos preparados para adaptarnos y ofrecer una respuesta inmediata de máximo nivel y calidad a las necesidades cambiantes de cada uno de nuestros clientes.

Esto se consigue aportando soluciones globales e integradas, generando una relación de confianza y ofreciendo una atención personalizada, que cubra las expectativas de nuestros clientes.

Queremos contribuir al crecimiento de nuestros clientes aportándoles tecnologías de la información que posibiliten la gestión del conocimiento, su capital intelectual y sus activos intangibles.

Name: ilisto
Description: Kevin Speed est une entreprise ferroviaire française fondée en 2021, présidée par Laurent Fourtune et dirigée par 4 associés experts du ferroviaire. Avec son service ilisto, elle vise à offrir « la grande vitesse pour tous, tous les jours ». Son objectif est de lancer des trains rapides (300 km/h) et abordables (« low-cost ») entre les métropoles et les villes situées proches de celles-ci à l’horizon fin 2028.

Name: Railify
Description:
Supporting the industry in setting the standard for sustainability. The Railify organization has its roots and extensive experience from large and complex railway, rolling stock, service and signalling projects, and has since then applied the tried-and-tested tools to other industries.

Railify is the connecting bridge between politics, academia, and the industry, through a transfer of competence and experience. By understanding the pressure that the industry is facing, we want to provide our services and expertise to achieve and exceed sustainability targets, thus help make our society and climate a better place – for everyone.

Name: Deutsche Bahn Cargo Romania
Description:
At European level, Deutsche Bahn Cargo Romania uses all the resources of the European DB Cargo network, with the help of which it meets all customer needs.

At home in Bucharest - This is where all transport and local-delivery services are planned and managed, in a dedicated control center, by qualified personnel.

Deutsche Bahn Cargo Romania holds the safety certificates required to operate on the entire Romanian railway network.

Following the signing of a transport service contract in Europe between DB Cargo AG, Mainz (later Railion Deutschland and then DB Schenker AG) and Continental AG, Hanover on 20th May 2000, DB Cargo AG decided to set up Logistic Center Romania S.R.L. (later known as Logistic Services Danubius S.R.L.) in Timisoara, providing for Continental Automotive Products S.R.L. Timisoara - tire manufacturer - shipping and transport activities by rail.

The company continued to develop, so that in 2009 the office in Bucharest has been established, and in 2010, the first international transports fully operated by Logistic Services Danubius were crossing Romania.

In May 2011, the name of the company had been changed from Logistic Services Danubius to DB Schenker Rail Romania S.R.L.

Wanting to offer its customers the best quality services, DB Schenker Rail Romania established in the summer of 2012, its own depot in Turceni.

In 2016, DB Schenker Rail Romania became DB Cargo Romania, and in November 2018, the company's headquarters had been moved from Timisoara to Bucharest, the office in Timisoara remaining a working point.

Continuing the upward trend, DB Cargo Romania is today a railway operator that provides premium quality services, reliable for customers, economically viable, safe for employees and environmentally friendly, through a fleet of locomotives and wagons impressive in number and performance, as well as motivated and qualified staff, deployed on the entire Romanian railway network.

Name: RCR Rail Co.
Description: RCR Rail Co. develops rail-served logistics parks to fulfill a critical, demonstrated market need and yield superior, risk-mitigated returns for investors. As part of McAlister Assets, RCR Rail Co. is distinguished by its unparalleled due diligence, in-depth market study, and value creation. McAlister Assets, guided by a proven approach and trusted experience, manages private investments on behalf of high net-worth individual, family office, and institutional investors. The McAlister family of companies has completed in excess of $1 billion in real estate transactions over the past 40-plus years.

Name: IFE Doors – Knorr-Bremse GmbH
Description:
IFE, based in Kematen/Ybbs, Austria, develops, manufactures and sells electrically driven entrance systems for railway vehicles.

Together with vehicle manufacturers and operators IFE consistently pursues the objective of improving entrance systems for rail vehicles and to revive the market with innovative impulses.

IFE sets new standards with its sliding and sliding plug doors for light rail vehicles, metros, regional and commuter trains as well as high-speed trains and passenger coaches. More than one million IFE entrance systems are in daily use worldwide. IFE is a division of the Knorr-Bremse GmbH, Mödling, Austria, and a member of the Knorr-Bremse Group.

Knorr-Bremse (ISIN: DE000KBX1006, ticker symbol: KBX) is the global market leader for braking systems and other systems for rail and commercial vehicles. Knorr-Bremse’s products make a decisive contribution to greater safety and energy efficiency on rail tracks and roads around the world. Around 31,500 employees at over 100 sites in more than 30 countries use their competence and motivation to satisfy customers worldwide with products and services. For more than 115 years, the company has been the industry innovator, driving developments in mobility and transportation technologies with an edge in connected system solutions. Knorr-Bremse is one of Germany’s most successful industrial companies and profits from the key global megatrends: Urbanization, Sustainability, Digitalization and Mobility.

The Austrian Knorr-Bremse GmbH employs more than 1,000 people at the Austrian sites Mödling and Kematen/ Ybbs as well as more than 1,000 people in Germany, Northmacedonia, Poland, Romania, the Czech Republic and Turkey.

Please refer to our data protection information: https://www.ife-doors.com/en/footer/9400-data-protection/

Imprint: https://www.ife-doors.com/en/footer/9200-imprint/

Name: Certus Rail Solutions
Description:
Het vervoer van spoorgebonden materieel en materiaal is een nichemarkt waarin slechts een beperkt aantal spoorvervoerders haar diensten aanbiedt. 
Het transport van werfmateriaal en de bijhorende grote machines is echter van primordiaal belang voor de bedrijven die in deze sector actief zijn. 
Certus Rail Solutions wil een oplossing op maat bieden voor dit hiaat in het Belgische spoortransport en Belgische spooraannemers én hun klanten ‘ontzorgen’ bij het verplaatsen van grote spoormachines, het leveren of afvoeren van spoormateriaal en het uitvoeren van korte verplaatsingen binnen spoorbundels en stelplaatsen.

Name: CTSF
Description: Compagnie de Traction et de Services Ferroviaires

Name: Big Sky Passenger Rail Authority
Description:
Revitalizing Communities and Building Sustainable Economies. Restoring regional passenger rail across southern Montana and beyond.

Our Vision: To lead the expansion and enhancement of passenger rail service throughout Montana and the greater northwest region for the development of economic, environmental, social, and comprehensive benefits, now and into the future.
Our Mission: To provide for the reestablishment of safe, reliable, and sustainable passenger rail service across southern Montana that increases opportunity and contributes to the health and well-being of people across the state and beyond.

Name: RAILBUS
Description: RAILBUS is a start-up company that creates a state-of-the-art, green and low-cost mass transportation system developed by a team of ambitious visionary entrepreneurs, industrial designers and transportation experts.

Name: Apex Signalling Design & Consulting
Description: At Apex, we are passionate about delivering efficient and effective rail signalling design solutions from early feasibility to detailed design. With years of experience in the industry, we have a deep understanding of the complexities involved in railway signalling design, and we work closely with our clients to ensure that their projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest standards.

Name: Omtag Svensk Järnväg
Description:
Vi är ett initiativ som arbetar för att reformera Sveriges järnvägssystem för att möta framtidens utmaningar och främja kompetensförsörjning, tillväxt och konkurrenskraft.

Sverige står inför global konkurrens, klimatförändringar och ett behov av ökad produktivitet. Järnvägen spelar en nyckelroll i att lösa dessa utmaningar och skapa ett effektivt och fossilfritt transportsystem för hela landet.

Följ med oss på resan mot en bättre järnväg. Utforska våra rapporter, vår vision och hur vi arbetar tillsammans i branschen för att forma framtidens svenska järnvägssystem.

Name: Ferrovie Appulo Lucane
Description: Ferrovie Appulo Lucane è una srl partecipata al 100% dal Ministero delle Infrastrutture e dei Trasporti; è affidataria dei servizi di trasporto ferroviario ed automobilistico, nonché gestore delle relative infrastrutture ferroviarie tra Puglia e Basilicata. La rete ferroviaria (183 km) è composta da tre linee principali: Bari – Altamura – Matera; Altamura – Avigliano; Potenza – Avigliano. La rete automobilistica si estende per oltre 1000 km. Integra e completa quella ferroviaria. Il parco mezzi è composto da 40 treni e 130 autobus operanti tra Puglia e Basilicata. Negli ultimi anni è stato rinnovato al 100%. Innovazione, sostenibilità, accessibilità sono le tre headlines che negli ultimi anni hanno caratterizzato l’azione e gli investimenti della Società, avendo sempre come obiettivo principale quello di migliorare i servizi e rispondere alla crescente domanda di Tpl dei cittadini di Puglia e Basilicata.

Name: Železničná spoločnosť Cargo Slovakia, a. s.
Description:
Železničná spoločnosť Cargo Slovakia, a. s. (ZSSK CARGO) is a freight transport operator  established in 2005 after division of its mother company. The company is the most experienced operator and it continues in over 180 year tradition of providing freight services in Slovakia.
ZSSK CARGO is a joint stock company owned by the Ministry of Transport of the Slovak Republic. Nowadays it is the only newtork-wide operator in Slovakia that offers transport services in the freight traffic mainly in Central Europe.  
ZSSK CARGO is the largest rail freight company in Slovakia, transport of wagon-load consignments is a core product of our company. Long-lasting practice, necessary experience, resources, capacities and skilled employees guarantee a high level of our services, which can also be proved by almost 1,400,000 consignments carried last year and certification of our logistic trains. We dispatch over 600 trains per day on Slovak and European railway lines.
The core business activities : 
•	Transport of wagon consignments :  single wagon shipments,
        block trains, logistics trains
•	Intermodal transport
•	Automotive
•	Privite siding and other shipping services
•	Services of safety advisor for transport of dangerous goods
•	East Slovak Transshipment Yards – transshipment of goods 
•	Rental of rolling stock (wagons, locomotives)
•	Maintenance of rolling stock, modernization, inspections,
        modifications.

Name: Brown Eagle
Description: railway and transportation

Name: RAIL SERVICE NET
Description:
RAIL SERVICE NET: We keep your trains rolling!
We offer various services to keep the fleet (locomotives and freight wagons) of our clients operational: maintenance, repairs, technical inspections, but also shunting and train inspections. This allows our customers to concentrate on their core activities. Of course, we comply with an extensive system of national and European admission and maintenance requirements to guarantee safety on the railways.

Name: Alameda Corridor Transportation Authority (ACTA)
Description:
The Alameda Corridor was financed, built, and is operated by the Alameda Corridor Transportation Authority (ACTA).  The project is a series of bridges, underpasses, overpasses and street improvements that separate freight trains from street traffic and passenger trains, facilitating a more efficient transportation network.  The project’s centerpiece is the Mid-Corridor Trench, which carries freight trains in an open trench that is 10 miles long, 33 feet deep and 50 feet wide between State Route 91 in Carson and 25th Street in Los Angeles. Construction began in April 1997. Operations began in April 2002.

The Alameda Corridor is located in southern Los Angeles County, California, running from the ports of Long Beach and Los Angeles 20 miles north to downtown Los Angeles, primarily along and adjacent to Alameda Street. The project extends through or borders the cities of Vernon, Huntington Park, South Gate, Lynwood, Compton, Carson, Los Angeles, and the County of Los Angeles.

ACTA’s principal responsibilities include: dispatching trains, security and maintenance of the infrastructure, and the collection of fees from the railroads for the use of the Alameda Corridor to pay debt service on the outstanding revenue bonds.

Name: Metro Life
Description:
Yolumuza dəyər qat.
 
Burada komanda ruhumuzu və gündəlik fəaliyyətimizin şəhərin ritminə necə töhfə verdiyini paylaşırıq. Metro sadəcə nəqliyyat deyil – təhlükəsizlik, məsuliyyət və inkişaf üzərində qurulmuş böyük bir ekosistemdir.

Name: Railco Africa
Description:
Railco Africa is a leading private rolling stock supplier in Africa
Railco Africa boasts one of the largest and most modern mainline locomotive fleets on the continent.

We pride ourselves on our ability to reliably and safely supply, operate and manage railways in many of the regions’ most challenging environments.

Railco Africa consists of two operational segments – leasing and operations – providing an integrated or independent service based on our clients’ individual needs.

Name: Traction Power Consulting LLC
Description: Our team has extensive hands-on experience working in and on high voltage substations and overhead catenary systems. We provide consulting services for system maintenance, operation, training and safety based on actual field experience. All of our consultants have been qualified electrical workers on systems up to 500kV.

Name: Infinity Hyperloop | IIT Delhi
Description:
Infinity Hyperloop is a student team of IIT Delhi. We are a team of 25+ zealous undergraduate engineers from several disciplines of IIT Delhi working together to empower this world with another mode of transportation technology. 

Our team believes in diligence, discipline, hard work and learning. We are committed to promoting interdisciplinary exchanges of knowledge and ideas. As part of our mission, we intend to develop an autonomous scalable pod and develop new technologies to facilitate the commercialization of the hyperloop system. FGV es va constituir en 1986 després de la culminació del procés de transferències a la Comunitat Valenciana dels serveis de transport que explotava en el seu territori l'empresa Ferrocarrils Espanyols de Via Estreta (FEVE), dependent de l'Administració Central de l'Estat. 

FGV va començar el seu servei comercial l'1 de gener de 1987 a València i Alacant i, des d'aquest moment, ha continuat en ple creixement i desenvolupament.

Name: San Joaquin Regional Rail Commission
Description:
In April 1995, the seven cities and the County of San Joaquin approved a joint powers agreement that created the San Joaquin Regional Rail Commission (SJRRC). The purpose of the SJRRC was to improve existing rail service and implement a rail system in San Joaquin County.  This included pursuing the participation and agreements for commuter rail service with  both Santa Clara and Alameda counties.  The SJJRC JPA established a five-person board of directors with board members appointed by the San Joaquin Council of Governments.

Robert J. Cabral, Chairman of the Rail Commission and a San Joaquin County Supervisor was an early influential force behind the establishment of the San Joaquin Regional Rail Commission and a supporter of rail service serving the Tri-Valley and Silicon Valley areas. He passed away in 2000.
 
In 1997, the San Joaquin Regional Rail Commission (SJRRC), the Alameda Congestion Management Agency (ACCMA) and the Santa Clara Transportation Authority (VTA) approved a Joint Powers Agreement establishing the Altamont Commuter Express Joint Powers Authority (ACE JPA). A board was established, with members comprised of three individuals from each of the participating agencies.

Name: TRAILA
Description:
TRAILA - AHEAD OF THE CURVE

TRAILA is developing a groundbreaking active steering system for rail vehicles, motivated to improve the quality of urban living. 

No longer will you hear rail vehicles screeching around curves. 

TRAILA is developing an active steering system to make rail vehicles run quieter, with improved rolling dynamics and comfort, that will fundamentally provide a benefit to the urban environment and an improvement to the health of the urban population. 

The TRAILA system, when integrated into rail vehicles, brings enormous improvement and cost savings to rail vehicle operators and rail vehicle maintenance teams, as well as extending the life cycle of rail infrastructure due to the reduction of rail wear and tear.

Name: Great Central Railway
Description:
Voted number 12 on the list of the 50 greatest railway journeys in the world the Great Central Railway (GCR) is the UK's only double track, main line heritage railway. It is the only place in the world where full size steam engines can be seen passing each other – just as it was when steam ruled the rails. 

The GCR is a not-for-profit organisation supported by the David Clarke Railway Trust (charity number 1104839). 

Running along an eight-mile nature corridor from Loughborough to Leicester, the Railway was saved by volunteers in 1969 and is now under conservation for enjoyment of future generations.

Trains run every weekend of the year, on bank holidays, and daily throughout the summer season. 

The GCR has won several awards including Independent Railway of the Year, a Gold Award for the East Midlands Best Visitor Experience, and is a Quality Assured Visitor Attraction, as designated by Enjoy England.

Our beautiful First-Class Restaurant Car offers fine dining in vintage style, whilst for extra special occasions, the GCR Pullman offers the quintessential Orient Express experience. For corporate and private events, a GCR Private Charter offers tailored menus designed to delight your guests and create a truly memorable journey through Charnwood’s glorious countryside.

For details on how you can support the GCR, become a volunteer, or buy tickets to our events, please visit our website or call the Booking Office on 01509 632323.

Name: GoldlinQ
Description:
GoldlinQ is entrusted with the delivery and operation of the transformative Gold Coast Light Rail.
This city-shaping infrastructure ensures the Gold Coast, one of Australia’s fastest growing cities and leading tourism destinations, keeps pace with current needs and continues moving forward. 
Our local, expert team leads and oversees the Gold Coast Light Rail, working on behalf of our government partners, and alongside our operation and construction contractors, to ensure our city has one of the world’s best light rail systems.
Already stages 1 and 2 have been embraced, with an increasing number of locals and visitors swapping their cars for the tram between Helensvale and Broadbeach.
And Stage 3 is on its way, connecting to busy Burleigh by 2025.
We continue to champion what's best for the project and the network, always putting safety first and beginning with the end in mind. 
Keeping the Gold Coast Light Rail moving is our passion and our purpose.

Mit der Gründung der Firma im Jahr 2013 begann TRI das damalige Kerngeschäft im Bereich der Fahrzeugaufarbeitung und -vermietung. Aufgrund der stetig wachsenden Nachfrage an Ersatzfahrzeugen im SPNV erweiterte die TRI ihr Aufgabenspektrum seit 2015 und ist seit 2020 ein vollwertiges EVU. Aktuell verfügt TRI über eine Niederlassung in Köln und beschäftigt circa 140 Mitarbeitende. Mit 15 Lokomotiven und rund 100 Reisezugwagen bedient TRI im Regelverkehr Strecken in Nordrhein-Westfalen, Baden-Württemberg und Bayern, sowohl als Subunternehmer als auch in eigener Regie. Description:
The High Desert Corridor (HDC) is a proposed multipurpose transportation route connecting Antelope Valley in Los Angeles County with Victor Valley in San Bernardino County. The first phase is a 54-mile high-speed rail project between the two fast growing regions.

The HDC is funded by the voter-approved Los Angeles County Measure M Expenditure Plan with nearly $170 million in the current and near-term fiscal years as well as $1.9 billion in later years (2063-2067) that could leverage federal, state, and private funds to construct the HDC High Speed Rail Project.

Name: Derby Railway Engineering Society
Description:
The Derby Railway Engineering Society (DRES) was founded in 1908 to serve the needs of the railway engineering community in Derby, England, a prestigious function which it continues to this day.

DRES, today, performs the following functions:

Organises LECTURES inclined towards engineering which affects the railways.
VISITS to places of railway and engineering interest
Hosting NETWORKING EVENTS
The Society does this to:

Promote knowledge sharing and exchange of free ideas within the Railway and Engineering industry, as well as the railway enthusiasts' circles.
Providing the opportunity for business networking by involving and engaging professionals with an interest in the railways and in engineering.
Helping railway professionals in career development.
and even provide an opportunity for just people interested / enthusiastic about the railways to engage in industry related discussions and lively social contact.
Our membership today includes people from all levels of the railway industry, engineers from other industries,  and also simply those who have a keen interest in railways from an engineering perspective. The society is endorsed by various senior members of the railway industry who form the Vice presidents of the society and actively support our activities. Such a rich mix of people with diverse interests and career backgrounds rarely comes together, as is demonstrated by DRES' members group. 
Most of our lectures are open to members and non-members alike. A nominal fee might apply for non-members depending on the events.

Triomf is an Australian-owned railway signalling design house with ISO9001 certification specialising in heavy rail, light rail and passenger rail signalling design for both new works and maintenance projects. Our signalling design team comprises highly-qualified and experienced engineers who have achieved competency levels with ARTC, CRN and QR. 

Our aim is to deliver quality signalling design services with value to all clients through completion of projects on-time, within budget and most importantly, to the safest standards. At Triomf, we put emphasis on the people who are our clients and maintain flexible offerings tailored to suit diverse requirements.

Name: National Railway Labor Conference
Description:
National Railway Labor Conference is an association of all U.S. Class I freight railroads and many smaller freight and passenger lines.

Through its National Carriers’ Conference Committee (NCCC), the NRLC represents most of its members in national (multi-employer) negotiations with the twelve major rail labor organizations. The recently-concluded round, which began January 1, 2015, covered more than 30 railroads and 145,000 employees.

The NCCC is chaired by the Chairman of the NRLC and includes the senior labor relations executives of following railroads: BNSF Railway Company, CN, CSX Transportation, Inc., Kansas City Southern Railway Company, Norfolk Southern Railway Company, and Union Pacific Railroad.

In addition to national bargaining, the NRLC represents the railroads in the administration of the $2.6 billion industry-wide health and welfare plans for rail employees; on rail labor issues before federal agencies, congressional committees and the courts; and in labor arbitration cases. It also provides training programs for rail management.

The NRLC was formed in 1963 when three regional railroad conferences formed a single, nationwide entity. The organization has been based in the Washington, D.C. area since 1968.

Dal 2002 ASSOFERR ha inoltre raccolto anche l’eredità dell’ASSOCOMBI e nel corso del 2005 dei Soci di AssoTIM. 

Le Aziende associate ad ASSOFERR rappresentano un fatturato medio annuo 2,5 mld di Euro con l’impiego di circa 4.000 dipendenti a cui va sommato un indotto di servizi e clienti.
