Description:
Edge Rail Solutions Pty Ltd will be starting as a 100% new business. The idea behind the Directors (Alexander Dennis & Daniel Whybrow) is to start a Labour hire company with a core focus to begin with on Track construction, maintenance and welding, with the goal to also spread out into the civil construction industry. With Australian infrastructure growing at a rapid rate, it has left space in the industry for highly skilled and experienced human resources to help deliver various projects across NSW and QLD, which we aim to capitalise on. Specialised skills such as aluminothermic welding and turnout construction is highly sort after in both states, which both Alex & Daniel have combined over 20 years’ experience in.
 
 
Alex and Daniel have both started from the bottom of the work force and have moved their way up the chain, together they bring a wealth of knowledge of the industry with their attributes complimenting the idea of the business which is why they have decided to team up to bring Edge Rail Solutions to life

Name: Technicentre de Paris Nord
Description:
Le Technicentre de Paris-Nord c'est 459 hommes et femmes qui réalisent la maintenance des trains « Transilien » des lignes H, K et la moitié de ceux affectés à la ligne D. Soit 170 rames du réseau. Les installations s’étendent sur 12 hectares pour 12 km de voies. Il gère également les sites de Crepy en Valois, Creil et Persan Beaumont.

Tournés vers l’avenir, précurseurs de la maintenance prédictive, les ingénieurs, techniciens et autres personnels y développent un savoir-faire industriel afin de porter au plus haut niveau, la sécurité ferroviaire, la fiabilité et la ponctualité des trains, ainsi que le confort offert au voyageur.

Au sein de Transilien pour le compte des lignes, il place l’Humain au cœur de la performance et de la réussite de l’offre de transport ferroviaire du groupe SNCF.

Name: TCA RAIL
Description:
TCA Rail NV est une entreprise belge spécialisée dans le transport ferroviaire de marchandises, située à Aubange, au cœur du triangle logistique entre la Belgique, le Luxembourg et la France.
Nous offrons des solutions de mobilité durables, fiables et transfrontalières, adaptées aux besoins de nos partenaires industriels et logistiques.
Grâce à une équipe expérimentée, une approche orientée client et un engagement fort envers la sécurité et les normes RID, TCA Rail connecte l'Europe avec efficacité et précision.

Name: CRO Management Sdn Bhd
Description: We are a consulting provider for the construction of railway operation. We work on behalf of companies and authorities in the field of railway construction and railway operation. Our service is PMO for system works, operation training, works train management, rules & procedures development, operational staff, and T&C operation. We supply locomotive and wagon for construction, RRV, electric trolly and railway safety equipment.

Name: SB Railcar LLC
Description: We at SB Railcar LLC offer Railcar and Locomotive Sales, Leasing and Storage Solutions for the commercial rail industry. We offer all types of railcars including Tankcars, Hoppers, Gondolas, Flatcars, Boxcars and more. We also will be happy to help with any railcar or locomotive assets that your company is looking to sell or sub-lease. Contact us today to see how we can help you.

Name: Rail Competence Center
Description: Rail Competence Center offers training and certifications for the Belgian railway industry.

Name: G-CATLINE
Description:
G-CATLINE intervient sur les travaux et la maintenance des caténaires.
Nous pouvons travailler autant sur les caténaires 1500v, 25000v, midi, caténaires type tramways et trolley bus. Le savoir-faire est au cœur de notre travail.
Nous proposons aussi des prestations de surveillance de travaux et de formation.
Pour tout complément d'information ou demande de travaux, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter ou vous rendre sur notre site www.g-catline.com

Name: Ajay Industries
Description:
At Ajay Industries, we specialize in delivering high-performance industrial solutions for mission-critical applications across Indian Railways, Oil & Gas, Defence and other core infrastructure sectors. With a strong focus on quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we are a trusted partner in supplying specialized lubricants, engineering components, and customized products that meet rigorous industry standards.

With decades of experience and a commitment to excellence, we continue to evolve as a modern, solutions-driven enterprise—empowering India's industrial backbone while expanding into new opportunities through technology and strategic partnerships.

 Government-Approved Vendor
 Experts in Railway Tenders
 Serving Oil & Gas PSUs
 Committed to Sustainable Engineering

Name: Mountain Valley Institute
Description:
MVX was founded by commuters from the South Fraser region in the spirit of hope, but also out of frustration. We have hope that the vision for faster-than-driving regional rail can be a reality in our lifetimes. We are also frustrated by congestion and under-investment in mass transit, especially in the regions surrounding Metro Vancouver.

Our team consists of rail engineers, transportation planners, political leaders, and financial experts. In addition, our team is supported by technical experts in the fields of rail technology, infrastructure costing, and land value capture.

Name: Eress
Description: Eress is an open partnership of infrastructure managers in Europe. Together, we work to standardise and reduce the energy use of trains across Europe. This is achieved through the development, implementation, and supply of our IT solution, that includes energy data Collecting, Exchanging and Settling. This accurate data is used for billing train companies.

Name: Beijing Trans Eurasia International Logistics Co.,Ltd
Description: Beijing Trans Eurasia International Logistics Co.,Ltd was founded in Beijing in June,2010 with main business on multimodal transportation between China(or transit via China) to Russia and Europe.

Name: CER Cargo / CER Poland
Description: CER Cargo to Twój niezawodny partner w kolejowym transporcie towarowym. Łączymy doświadczenie, nowoczesną flotę i profesjonalizm, aby dostarczać usługi na najwyższym poziomie.

Name: Federation of Independent Rail Operators
Description:
Federation of Independent Rail Operators (ZNPK) is an association of employers whose aim is to protect free competition in the rail freight market, support its liberalization and represent the interests of independent carriers, especially in relations with public authorities. 

ZNPK creates a forum for the exchange of knowledge and experience for railway transport companies. For years, it has been fighting for a reduction in rates of access to rail infrastructure in order to increase the share of the rail industry in the freight transport market. As a result, this will contribute to an increase in funds for investments in modern railways, as well as reducing CO2 emissions and minimizing the number of road accidents.

Name: Antena TrenLab Mataró
Description:
Antena TrenLab Mataró és el teu espai d’innovació oberta i emprenedoria en mobilitat sostenible ubicat al TecnoCampus de Mataró, gràcies al marc de col·laboració entre Renfe, l’Ajuntament de Mataró i la Fundació TecnoCampus.

Les 3 entitats s’uneixen per determinar les bases que permetran el desplegament de la xarxa d’antenes especialitzades en solucions i tecnologia aplicades al sector de la mobilitat. Antena TrenLab Mataró esdevé el primer node territorial de Renfe.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Antena TrenLab Mataró es tu espacio de innovación abierta y emprendeduría en movilidad sostenible ubicado en el TecnoCampus de Mataró, gracias al marco de colaboración entre Renfe, el Ayuntamiento de Mataró y la Fundació TecnoCampus.

Las 3 entidades se unen para determinar las bases que permitirán el despliegue de la red de antenas especializadas en soluciones y tecnología aplicadas al sector de la movilidad. Antena TrenLab Mataró se convierte en el primer nodo territorial de Renfe.

Name: WestfalenBahn GmbH
Description:
Die WestfalenBahn GmbH ist ein regional verankertes Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen. Seit 2007 fährt das Unternehmen mit Sitz in Bielefeld Züge des Nahverkehrs in Nordrhein-Westfalen und Niedersachsen. 

Mehr als 400 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter sorgen für Sicherheit, Pünktlichkeit und Komfort in den Zügen und befördern jährlich rund 20 Mio. Fahrgäste auf 6 Mio. Zugkilometern. In dem über 600 Kilometer langen Emsland- und Mittelland-Netz verbindet die WestfalenBahn, ein Tochterunternehmen von Abellio Deutschland, die Städte Emden, Rheine, Münster, Bielefeld, Minden, Hannover und Braunschweig. Dafür werden 28 Elektrotriebzüge eingesetzt, die in eigenen Werkstätten in Minden und Rheine instandgehalten werden. 

Mit der WestfalenBahn zu reisen heißt, komfortabel, sicher und schnell zu reisen. Mit modernsten Zügen und ausgereifter Technik sichern wir Ihre Mobilität. Unser engagiertes Personal bietet Ihnen bestmöglichen Service und sorgt dabei jederzeit für Ihr Wohlbefinden.

Das Unternehmen hat seinen Sitz in Bielefeld in der Zimmerstraße 8 in Bahnhofsnähe. Unser KundenCenter befindet sich gegenüber vom Hauptbahnhof in der Herbert-Hinnedahl-Straße 23. 

Öffnungszeiten: Mo.-Fr.: 08.00 Uhr - 18:00 Uhr
Servicetelefon: 0521-55 7777 50

Name: Rail Aquitaine Est
Description:
L'association Rail Aquitaine Est a pour but de défendre et promouvoir la modernisation et l’amélioration des infrastructures, du matériel et des dessertes, de la ligne ferroviaire Bordeaux – Périgueux – Brive - Tulle. 
Elle défend notamment l'amélioration des temps de parcours entre Bordeaux et Tulle et fédère l'ensemble des acteurs du territoire qui œuvrent pour le développement de cette ligne.

Name: LDZ CARGO
Description:
SIA “LDZ CARGO” is a subsidiary of VAS “Latvijas dzelzceļš”, established in 2007, offering clients a broad range of services, including international and domestic rail freight transportation, full-service rolling stock repair, modernisation, maintenance and equipping, the manufacture and assembly of technological components, as well as international logistics and freight forwarding services. 
LDZ CARGO Ltd. is one of the key players in Latvia’s transport and transit sector and a significant rail freight operator on a European scale.
In June 2025, the Cabinet of Ministers approved the merger of three subsidiaries of the LDz Group. As part of the reorganisation, LDZ CARGO absorbed LDZ Rolling Stock Service and LDZ Logistics.
From 3 October 2025, LDZ CARGO has taken over all commercial activities of the merged entities, becoming an even stronger and more competitive company in the Baltic region.

Name: Akriveia
Description:
3D scanning opens up a world of possibilities when no CAD data exists. Whether you are looking to make modifications to an existing rail vehicle, reverse engineer a component for a car restoration, wanting to develop aftermarket automotive equipment, or anything else which requires an accurate 3D model as a starting point, Akriveia can help.

We can assist with any stage of the process, from the initial 3D scanning and data processing, through to developing engineering modifications, 3D models, build drawings and even the manufacture of parts.

Akriveia is operated by Mike Baker, a Chartered Mechanical Engineer with 20 years experience in the railway rolling stock sector. Alongside his significant experience of Rolling Stock, Mike has a huge passion for anything with an engine. This has resulted in getting involved with a number of automotive scanning projects. In addition to the initial 3D scanning, Akriveia are able to work with an experienced group of suppliers to produce tooling, carbon fibre components, CNC machined components and fabrications.

And if anyone is wondering where the name comes from, Akriveia is Greek for Precision.

Akriveia is a trading name of M&J Engineering Consultants Ltd.

Name: Bhopal Metro Rail Project
Description: Bhopal Metro, an ambitious urban transportation initiative, aims to transform commuting in the capital city of Madhya Pradesh, India. This metro project, covering a distance of approximately 27.87 kilometers, consists of two corridors – Karond Circle to AIIMS (14.99 km) and Bhadbhada Square to Ratnagiri Tiraha (12.88 km). Once operational, it will significantly enhance connectivity, reduce traffic congestion, and improve accessibility for residents and visitors. Stay tuned for updates on this transformative development in urban transportation!

Name: DistriRail
Description:
Distri Rail connects all rail terminals in the port of Rotterdam with the European hinterland. We daily operate 7 trains of each 100 TEU / 2200 TBR to/from Duisburg – Mannheim – Ludwigshafen – Wörth. Distri Rail is one of Rotterdam’s largest privately owned Rail companies. The head office is situated in Rhoon, right in the heart of the Port of Rotterdam, the centre of European container shipping.

Being one of Rotterdam’s leading suppliers in logistics, we operate with our extensive in-house team, backed by a European network of dedicated agencies and representatives. Information is available to our customers and suppliers 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, and 365 days per year. Not only through online accessibility via our system and Electronic-Data-Interchange (EDI) but also through our staff and management.

100% Neutral and Private Rail Operator. At the moment we offer under mentioned destinations for 20/23/26/30/40/45 Ft box- and tankcontainers :

Rotterdam <=> Duisburg (D) 12 x per week
Rotterdam <=> Mannheim (D) 5 x per week
Rotterdam <=> Wörth Rhein (D) 5 x per week
Rotterdam <=> Strassbourg (FR) 3 x per week

www.DistriRail.nl

Name: RIVEF
Description: RIVEF es una empresa especializada en el sector de la construcción ferroviaria participada por Rubau y Vilor. Nos impulsa una clara vocación por la excelencia constructiva, apostando por la calidad, la seguridad y la eficiencia en cada proyecto que desarrollamos.

Name: System-Rail
Description: System-Rail is an SBE firm that offers construction management services in signaling train control, electrification, track, and systems integration.  System-Rail also provides project management, scheduling, documentation, planning, and on-site field coordination services.

Name: EMFESA
Description:
Emfesa S.A. S.M.E. M.P., ofrece soluciones de economía circular en los procesos de gestión de residuos de Adif y Adif AV, a través de las siguientes actividades: 

- Ampliación de los servicios de limpieza integral a toda la geografía ferroviaria (RFIG).

- Gestión de residuos que afloren de las obras, actuaciones y excedentes de almacén custodiados por Adif y Adif AV, implementado para ello principios de economía circular (jerarquía en la gestión de residuos). De este modo se prioriza la reutilización, el reciclaje, la recuperación energética y, por último, el desecho, de tal forma que en un futuro inmediato se puedan gestionar sobre la premisa de residuos cero. 

- Alquiler de dresinas de vía, con o sin vagón, incluido OMI. 

- Emfesa ofrece encargados de trabajos en vía, bajo la habilitación de seguridad en la circulación de ADIF.

Name: iPort Rail
Description:
iPort Rail is a high-volume inland port offering sustainable logistics solutions and connections with regional, national and international supply chains.

Our experienced and highly professional team works closely with customers, from strategic advice to practical support, always focused on the rapid movement of goods. 

We can support cargo journeys from port of entry right up to the warehouse door with a state-of-the-art rail terminal, freight forwarding capability and 91% of the UK population living within four hours of our facility.

In addition to connecting with ports across the UK for international connections, our new rail customs area and AEO status means businesses can move goods to and from Europe through the Channel Tunnel to open up routes that increase reliability and efficiency. 

Throughout, we focus on helping our customers improve their sustainability and cut carbon, saving 37 million tonnes of C02 since we opened in 2018.

For more information, visit our website at www.iportrail.com

Name: Pride Solutions Derby Ltd.
Description:
Pride Solutions Derby: Powering the Railway Industry with Award-Winning Excellence and Cybersecurity Expertise!

With over 10 years of experience, Pride Solutions has revolutionized the rail sector. We are passionate about helping customers achieve their goals while safeguarding critical infrastructure from cyber threats.

Introducing Pride Security, our dedicated cybersecurity consultancy brand. Our team of innovative experts stays one step ahead of ever-evolving cyber risks. By providing advisory services, conducting vulnerability assessments, and supporting penetration testing, we help our clients create a robust security posture that deters attacks and minimizes disruption.

But our mission doesn't stop there. We work tirelessly at every level of the industry, ensuring that everyone, from the cleaner to the minister, is equipped with the knowledge and tools to improve the railway. Together, we can create a more secure future!

Join forces with Pride Solutions Derby and experience the winning combination of world-class rolling stock engineering and cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions. Let us help you protect your journey, every step of the way.

Name: Bergen - Oslo 4 timer
Description:
Ringeriksbanen er gryteklar. Det er bare å sette spaden i jorden. 

Dette er det viktigste prosjektet for å nå målet om Bergen-Oslo på fire timer. Nå må regjeringen og Stortinget vise at de tar klima på alvor. En Nasjonal Transportplan uten Ringeriksbanen vil være en katastrofe for investeringene i fremtidens klimaløsninger. Mange prosjekter er viktige for at vi skal nå målet om Bergen – Oslo på fire timer. Men det viktigste må komme først, derfor må Ringeriksbanen prioriteres.  

Tiden er inne for tog for fly i Norge – det er nå eller aldri!

Name: Rail Welding & Grinding Ltd
Description:
Rail Welding and Grinding Ltd is a leading provider of specialised rail maintenance and repair solutions. With a deep understanding of the railway industry and a commitment to excellence, we offer a comprehensive range of services designed to enhance the performance, safety, and longevity of rail infrastructure.
 
Our company specialises in rail welding and grinding, two critical processes that play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity of railway tracks. We employ a team of highly skilled technicians who are certified and experienced in the latest industry standards and best practices. Using state-of-the-art equipment and cutting-edge technologies, we deliver precise and reliable rail welding and grinding services to meet the diverse needs of our clients.
 
Our skilled welders utilise advanced techniques such as MMA welding and Thermit welding. We adhere to strict quality control measures, conducting thorough inspections and tests to guarantee the integrity and safety of the welds.
 
Rail grinding is an essential maintenance procedure that removes irregularities and defects from the rail surface. Our grinding specialists employ advanced grinding machines equipped with precision tools to eliminate rail imperfections, such as corrugation, fatigue cracks, and head checks. By restoring the rail profile, we enhance ride quality, reduce noise, and minimise the risk of derailments.

Choose Rail Welding and Grinding Ltd for reliable, high-quality rail welding and grinding solutions. With our expertise, advanced equipment, and unwavering commitment to excellence, we ensure that rail infrastructure remains safe, efficient, and reliable for the transportation of people and goods.

Name: TrainVision
Description: TrainVision is a startup venture originating from the NTNU School of Entrepreneurship in Norway and is based on research from The Norwegian Geotechnical Institute. Our mission revolves around revolutionizing railway inspection through innovative technology. TrainVision introduces a new solution by outfitting trains with cameras that capture continuous, high-resolution images of the surrounding terrain along railway lines. These images are then transformed into detailed 3D models, giving geologists a comprehensive visual aid for remote analysis. Together with NGI we are creating a product that is by geologists, for geologists.

Name: Nova 14
Description:
La Région Grand Est a exprimé sa volonté de redonner vie à la ligne Nancy-Contrexéville en désignant Nova 14 comme concessionnaire.
Ce contrat, engagé à long terme sur le territoire, durera 22 ans.

Nova 14 regroupe les expertises de NGE Concessions, Transdev et la Banque des Territoires.

Nova 14 assure la gestion de l'infrastructure et l'exploitation ferroviaire de la Ligne 14 entre Nancy et Contrexéville.

Dans notre volonté d'être plus proches du territoire et de ses acteurs, nous avons implanté notre siège social à Mirecourt.

Notre ambition : redonner vie au train pour une mobilité durable sur nos territoires

Name: Mountain Valley Express (MVX)
Description:
MVX was founded by commuters from the South Fraser region in the spirit of hope, but also out of frustration. We have hope that the vision for faster-than-driving regional rail can be a reality in our lifetimes. We are also frustrated by congestion and under-investment in mass transit, especially in the regions surrounding Metro Vancouver.

Our team consists of rail engineers, transportation planners, political leaders, and financial experts. In addition, our team is supported by technical experts in the fields of rail technology, infrastructure costing, and land value capture.

Name: Permanent Way Institution - Queensland
Description:
Formed in England, in 1884 a group of dedicated railway people, who were responsible for development of railway track across the British Isles, and who felt the need for an avenue for exchange of track design, construction and maintenance.  They realised the educational and social value of communications between all levels of rail personnel engaged on the railway infrastructure and associated structures.

The safety of rail travel has been brought to the present standards, because of a better understanding of the behaviour of the tracks under load; the Institution has played a vital part in gaining this understanding.  Realising this, the Queensland Section was formed in 1986, not only to benefit from those who had gone before, but also to add to the development of still more efficient rail transportation in the years ahead.

Each branch or section arrange regular meetings for the presentation of discussion papers with the exchanging of views together with field and social trips several times each year.  In Britain there are about 29 sections with sections also in Central and South Africa, Nigeria, Hong Kong, Malaysia, South Australia and New South Wales.

Name: Buckland Rail
Description: Buckland Rail is a new leading force in the UK rail services industry, formed through the strategic consolidation of three renowned companies: W.H. Davis, Davis Wagon Services, and Yellow Rail

Name: MADHYA PRADESH METRO RAIL CORPORATION
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn page of Madhya Pradesh Metro Rail Corporation Limited (MPMRCL).
MPMRCL is incorporated to implement metro rail projects in the state.
Our goal is to offer a rail-based Sustainable Urban Transport System. To develop Smart and Healthy Cities that increase the quality of life and better access to goods and services. We aim to generate employment opportunities and mitigate climate change resulting in a livable city environment that is health-supportive with more allocation of road space to people for daily transit routines rather than vehicles.

Name: West Central Railway
Description:
West Central Railway (WCR) is headquartered at Jabalpur. Most of its route is in the states of Madhya Pradesh and Rajasthan with a very little portion in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

There are 3 divisions in West Central Railway:
1. Jabalpur
2. Bhopal
3. Kota

Name: PNW Railcars, Inc.
Description: PNW Railcars is a full-service railcar leasing, maintenance and management company headquartered in Portland, Oregon. Our seasoned team is committed to meeting the rail shipping needs of North America and, to do so, has developed a variety of railcar and leasing solutions for industrial shippers and rail carriers.

Name: Albertaloop
Description:
Albertaloop, a distinguished student organization at the University of Alberta, operates with specialized branches, achieving excellence in hyperloop pod design, infrastructure, business analytics, and cutting-edge technology R&D. Notable accolades include tying for the highest awards at the 2022 & 2023 Canadian Hyperloop Conference (now Hyperloop Global), 2024 Hyperloop Global Conference, and active participation in the 2019 SpaceX Hyperloop Pod Competition.

Our culture thrives on innovation, evident in our exclusive professional development program, the sole initiative of its kind at the University of Alberta. We prioritize strong ties with alumni networks, foster in-depth sponsor partnerships, and embrace diverse faculty and background involvement.

Follow our progress on Instagram @uofahyperloop and explore our website for updates, research publications, and past projects. Partner with us in advancing transportation technology.

Name: Positive Train Control Services,LLC
Description:
Positive Train Control Services, LLC (PTCS) is a veteran-owned rail technology and field services company dedicated to keeping locomotives running smarter, safer, and longer. Founded on the U.S. Air Force core values of Integrity First, Service Before Self, and Excellence in All We Do, we deliver hands-on expertise and cutting-edge solutions that drive reliability across the rail industry.

 What We Do
PTCS provides end-to-end locomotive support services, including:

Locomotive Electronics Installation & Field Service
– PTC, EM2000, IETMS, event recorder, and cab electronics installation
– Full troubleshooting, upgrades, and wire tracing
– Retrofit support for GenSet and conventional locomotives

Lisa AI – Locomotive Intuitive Support Assistant
– Our in-house, AI-powered diagnostic platform
– Built to help technicians interpret fault codes, trace wiring issues, and solve complex locomotive problems faster and more accurately
– Multilingual support and field-tested reliability

ZTR SmartStart Installations
– Fuel-saving idle-reduction technology
– SmartStart IIe installation, commissioning, and integration

Custom Harness & Cable Assembly
– High-quality, custom-built assemblies for locomotive systems
– Designed, built, and tested to railroad standards

Training & Certification
– Hands-on technical training for field service teams
– FRA compliance preparation and safety certifications

 Why PTCS?
We combine real-world rail experience with the power of intelligent tools like Lisa AI to deliver smarter service and lower lifecycle costs. From coast-to-coast field deployments to AI-driven diagnostics, we offer scalable solutions backed by a commitment to excellence.

Let’s move rail forward — together.

Name: Bahnkongress
Description: Mit «Bahn26 – Wohin fährt die Schweiz?» starten wir direkt zu Jahresbeginn in die zentralen Themen der Verkehrspolitik. Expertinnen und Experten aus Fachwelt, Wirtschaft und Politik diskutieren die aktuelle verkehrspolitische Situation, beleuchten Komplexitäten und zukunftsfähige Ansätze.

Name: CETREN
Description:
La Asociación de Acción Ferroviaria, Cetren, nace como respuesta a la necesidad generada en el sector ferroviario de reunir en una sola entidad a todas aquellas empresas implicadas de forma directa o indirecta en dicho sector.

Desde su creación en el año 1980, Cetren ha promovido, fomentado y difundido al ferrocarril como medio de transporte tanto a nivel nacional como internacional.

Atributos que nos caracterizan como independencia, imparcialidad, competencia y experiencia, entre otros, son los que nos llevaron a ser notificados por el Ministerio de Fomento español a la Comisión Europea y al resto de estados miembros como Organismo Notificado español para la evaluación “CE” de la conformidad e idoneidad para el uso de los componentes de interoperabilidad y la verificación “CE” de los subsistemas según las Directivas 96/48/CE y 2001/16/CE primero, la Directiva 2008/57/CE más tarde, y, en la actualidad, la Directiva (UE)2016/797 del Parlamento y del Consejo, de 11 de mayo de 2016, sobre la interoperabilidad del sistema ferroviario dentro de la Unión Europea. Estos mismos atributos han permitido y permiten a Cetren ser Organismo Designado por la Agencia Estatal de Seguridad Ferroviaria en el marco de Dicha Directiva.

En el año 2019 hemos ampliado las actividades tradicionales con el Laboratorio de Ensayos, provisto de profesionales cualificados y de los medios técnicos de última generación necesarios para llevar a cabo las pruebas exigidas en la Especificación Técnica de Interoperabilidad de accesibilidad para las personas con discapacidad y las personas de movilidad reducida.

Cetren es Organismo Certificador y Evaluador Independiente de Seguridad acreditado por la Entidad Nacional de Acreditación, ENAC.

Name: RailCore Consulting
Description:
We Help Rail-Focused Teams Move Smarter, Safer, and More Profitably

RailCore Consulting is the go-to resource for rail operations, logistics optimization, infrastructure and workforce training.

From shippers, railroads and fleet managers to engineering teams and vendor networks, we empower professionals across the rail industry to streamline performance, improve compliance, and make data-driven decisions with confidence.

 What We Offer:

 Targeted rail training modules (new fleet manager training, asset & fleet insights, transportation ops, construction check lists)

 Vendor & network optimization consulting

 Compliance and maintenance strategy development

 Free videos, guides, and tools for growing rail expertise

Whether you're new to rail or managing thousands of railcars, RailCore helps you solve real-world challenges with practical, modern solutions.

 Explore our services, videos, and free training resources at:
 www.RailCoreConsulting.com

 Ready to modernize your rail strategy? Let’s talk.

#RailCore #RailConsulting #RailTraining #FreightRail #FleetManagement #RailOperations #RailSignal #LogisticsExcellence #SignalOperations #RailConstruction

Name: Alsa Rail - Servicios Ferroviarios
Description:
En Alsa somos sinónimo de movilidad y transporte, conectando personas y lugares con soluciones innovadoras y sostenibles. 

Además de nuestro liderazgo en el transporte de viajeros por carretera, somo uno de los principales referentes en el sector ferroviario, proporcionando también soluciones de movilidad de viajeros y mercancías por ferrocarril como está en nuestra razón de ser: Somos un operador integral de movilidad.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios que incluyen la operación de trenes de viajeros y mercancías, la gestión de terminales ferroviarias, las soluciones logísticas sostenibles y todos aquellos servicios auxiliares relacionados con el ferrocarril. Con una flota de locomotoras de última generación, presencia en todo el territorio, un equipo altamente cualificado y una excelencia operativa reconocida, seguimos avanzando hacia una movilidad más conectada, eficiente y sostenible.

Name: Hudson Bay Railway
Description:
Hudson Bay Railway is ideal for hauling perishables, automobiles, frac sand, heavy equipment, scrap, construction or hazardous materials, kraft paper, concentrates, containers, wheat and other grain products. 

Our railway connects with CN in The Pas, running north through Manitoba to the Hudson Bay at the Port of Churchill.

Name: Ironwood Infrastructure Inc.
Description:
We are industry experts who excel at delivering challenging railway infrastructure projects and supporting railway engineering safety. 

We strive to provide the highest quality support for our clients in order to create better and safer railway infrastructure for our communities. 

We offer a variety of services specific to the execution of work in and around the railway corridor.

While working with engineering firms, railways and road authorities, we add valuable expertise to railway projects.

Our services include;

Grade Separations 
•Project management 
•Constructability and staging reviews
•Flagging coordination, track block planning, optimizing work blocks & minimizing operational impacts 
•Construction safety audits. 
•Construction risk assessments 
•Stakeholder engagement & feasability analysis 

Grade Crossings 
•Grade crossing safety management plans and assessments
•Whistle cessation consultation
•Design review for Transport Canada Grade Crossing Regulation & Standards compliance

Dispute Resolution & Consulting 
•Technical consulting for CTA disputes related to railway bridges and crossings

Name: IST Simulations Ltd
Description:
IST Simulations provides railway signalling training simulation equipment to the UK railway industry.

Whether it’s a panel console, a panel on touch-screens, or even a mechanical lever frame you require, IST can provide custom built systems to enable the delivery of high-quality, high-fidelity training to signallers and operations staff with 100% true-to-life equipment and zero safety risk.

All our simulators are custom-built to your exact requirements, and interlocked exactly as per the real thing or as per your control tables. All IST simulations enjoy a comprehensive assessor’s machine on which all aspects of the simulation can be managed.

Our simulations have been used by Network Rail and other main line companies for training delivery, and all are built to comply with Network Rail’s standards for the provision of signalling simulators: NR/L2/OPS/254 and NR/L2/OPS/254/01.

Contact us at admin@istsimulations.co.uk

Name: TechSoc London
Description:
TechSoc are a volunteer led organisation that offer lectures and events based around railway signalling and mass transit systems past, present and future. 

The official title of the Society is “The Signal and Electrical Engineers’ Technical Society". The Society's objective is to further interest in, and knowledge of, railway signalling and allied technical subjects principally, though not exclusively, as applied to London’s underground or other mass transit systems.

The inaugural meeting of the Society took place on 17 January 1962. Its first President was the then Chief Signal Engineer (London Transport), Mr R Dell OBE and its first Chairman Mr V H Smith. The first technical talk was presented on 14th March 1962 by Mr H W Hadaway, an enthusiastic supporter of the Society and ultimately its second President.

The Society continues to offer a programme of technical talks and visits to installations of interest to the membership. Copies of presentations and papers delivered are available to members on-line or from the Society's library.

Name: Cibest UK
Description:
Cibest are industry leaders in Video Surveillance and IT based solutions with over 30 years' experience in the transit sector. Cibest’s extensive in-house software development team provides the most up to date analysis of the mobile transportation industry and the innovative technologies which help our customers achieve their goals. Cibest offers you proven, intelligent, scalable, and tailor-made solutions. We proudly manufacture our own core hardware components in France, including:

• NVRs (Network Video Recorders) Europe’s largest manufacturer of mobile video recorders
• Passenger Information Displays for vehicles, stations and transit terminals
• Passenger Audio Systems for vehicles, stations and transit terminals

Our systems’ architecture ensures interoperability with 3rd party systems using the framework of ITxPT and ONVIF protocols, to future proof your investment. We empower our customers through the deployment of advanced video analytics in digital surveillance. Using a combination of machine and deep learning video analytics, our systems harness information using processes such as people/vehicle detection to advanced object and behaviour recognition. Our solutions include the following core features:

• Passenger Counting through overdoor sensors and/or surveillance cameras
• Internal and External Driver Vision Systems
• Vehicle Energy Management using system feedback from our video analytics
• Pantograph and OLE Monitoring using deep learning AI (worldwide patented technology)
• Collision Detection Systems using a combination of thermal imaging cameras and computer vision
• Remote System Access manage data and maintain system health across your fleet

With over 50,000 vehicles equipped and 500 customers worldwide, our experience, in all aspects of onboard IT based systems, enables us to leverage existing infrastructure and provide cost effective solutions to the transport industry.

Name: Colorado Pacific Rio Grande Railroad
Description:
We run west from a connection with the Union Pacific Railroad at Walsenburg, CO, over La Veta Pass and into the fertile San Luis Valley. At Alamosa the railroad splits West to Monte Vista and South to Antonito. In addition to the Union Pacific (UP), we connect with shortline San Luis Central Railroad (SLC). The highest point on our railroad is La Veta Pass, 9,242 feet above sea level, making this the highest freight line in North America.

Commodities hauled year round include perlite, malt barley, potatoes, rock, and fertilizer.

Between late 2019 and 2023 the railroad was under direction of a federally appointed Chapter 11 Bankruptcy Trustee. This reorganization and sale of the former SLRG resulted in new ownership under the Soloviev Group, with plans to continue freight operations and grow the business.

Name: SIL4 Systems, Inc.

These platforms are used as the core “smart” controlling elements to enable a variety of demanding applications to meet stringent safety requirements and ensure that the target device is acceptably safe for its intended function and environment.

The company name is derived from an industry accepted scale for Safety Integrity Levels (SIL) - SIL 0 through 4, with “4” being the highest level of safety assurance.

SIL4 Systems is uniquely positioned to capitalize on emerging world-wide safety standards and their growing adoption in significant and expanding markets, such as medical, process control, industrial automation, transportation, avionics, defense (mission-critical) and nuclear power.

Name: Arlanda Express/Atrain AB
Description:
Arlanda Express is owned and operated by A-Train AB, which also planned and constructed the new Arlanda rail link. When the link was completed in 1999, the railway facilities were transferred to the Swedish government. In return, we at A-Train AB lease back the link based on an exclusive concession, which gives us the right to operate trains on the link until 2040. Operations are conducted entirely on a commercial basis.

At A-Train, we do not regard ourselves as a transport company in the traditional sense. Instead, we view ourselves as an extension of our passengers’ flight and, in that respect, it is natural that we provide our customers with the same high level of service, comfort and considerations as the airlines. 

During 2002, we were elected Transport Company of the Year and, during the same year, the Arlanda Express was named a Good Environmental Choice by the Swedish Society for Nature Conservation.

The Good Environmental Choice has Europe’s most stringent requirements for the ecolabelling of transport companies and A-Train AB was the first company in Sweden to meet the new rules. The requirements include publishing reports on our various particle emissions and ensuring that they stay within the set limits, plus a special maintenance plan to reduce the use of environmentally harmful cleaning substances.

Since July, 2014, A-Train AB is owned by Portare 1 AB.
Portare 1 AB is owned by State Super (STC Pooled Fund State Super), Sunsuper (Sunsuper Pooled Superannuation Trust), and State Administration of Foreign Exchange (SAFE).

Name: Companhia de Transportes do Estado da Bahia (CTB)

Atualmente, a CTB gerencia, desenvolve e fiscaliza o Sistema Metroviário e o Veículo Leve sobre Trilhos (VLT) na região de Salvador e Lauro de Freitas (SMSL), no Estado da Bahia.
 
Comprometida com valores fundamentais como respeito à diversidade, uso eficiente dos recursos, integração com a comunidade, ética e transparência, a CTB desempenha um papel essencial no planejamento urbano. A empresa assegura que o sistema metroviário e o VLT operem de forma eficiente, segura e integrada, atendendo às necessidades de mobilidade da população e promovendo o desenvolvimento sustentável da região.

Le groupe des Usagers du Train Clermont-Paris est né en 2015 sur facebook. C’est un lieu de libre expression des usagers qui, confrontés de manière croissante aux dysfonctionnements de la ligne, partagent leurs constats et leurs inquiétudes quant à la perte de qualité de la desserte et à ses perspectives d’évolution.
Ce collectif est naturellement ouvert à toute personne, sans condition particulière. Se croisent ici des usagers, des élus, des acteurs du tourisme, des agents de la SNCF, des dirigeants d’entreprises, des représentants associatifs, …

Nous vous invitons donc à signer la pétition et à la partager activement sur vos réseaux.
Le collectif des usagers du train Clermont-FD/Paris

Name: ODEG - Ostdeutsche Eisenbahn GmbH

Die Regionalbahn betreibt im Auftrag der Bundesländer Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Brandenburg, Berlin, Sachsen und Sachsen-Anhalt insgesamt 15 Linien. Name: ULRAIL
Description:
Présentation de ULRAIL

ULRAIL est un centre de formation spécialisé dans le secteur ferroviaire, dédié à former les professionnels de demain et à perfectionner les experts d’aujourd’hui. Nous proposons des parcours de formation complets, adaptés aux besoins spécifiques d’une industrie ferroviaire en constante évolution.

Nos Formations

ULRAIL offre un large éventail de programmes destinés aux métiers ferroviaires, incluant :
	•	Formation technique et opérationnelle : sécurité, maintenance, conduite des trains, et signalisation.
	•	Gestion et conformité : maîtrise des réglementations et standards de sécurité.
	•	Formation continue et perfectionnement : pour les professionnels souhaitant approfondir leurs compétences ou suivre les innovations technologiques.

Pourquoi choisir ULRAIL ?

Nous nous distinguons par une pédagogie axée sur la pratique, une expertise sectorielle et des partenariats avec des acteurs majeurs du secteur ferroviaire. Nos formateurs sont des experts de terrain, assurant des formations opérationnelles et adaptées aux besoins réels de l’industrie.

Notre Mission

Former des professionnels compétents et polyvalents, capables de relever les défis de l’industrie ferroviaire avec rigueur et expertise. Pour nous, une formation de qualité est essentielle pour la sécurité, l’innovation et la performance du secteur.

Contactez-nous

Que vous soyez un professionnel en reconversion, une entreprise souhaitant former ses équipes, ou un jeune diplômé, ULRAIL vous accompagne dans vos ambitions. Suivez notre page pour rester informé de nos formations et actualités du secteur ferroviaire.

Description: The Wheeling & Lake Erie Railway Company is a class II regional railroad that has approximately 840 miles of track in Ohio, Pennsylvania and West Virginia. Any questions regarding our service or new business please contact us at development@wlerwy.com.

Name: HYPED
Description:
Hyperloop is the concept for the future of mass transport. It offers a new means of transporting people and goods quickly, safely, efficiently and with minimised environmental impact.

Hyperloop uses electric propulsion to accelerate a passenger or cargo pod through a low-pressure tube. The autonomous pod levitates slightly using magnets to eliminate friction. It will be faster than an airline and will allow you to travel from London to Edinburgh in 40 minutes. Carbon emissions, noise, delays, weather concerns and pilot error are ultimately eliminated.

HYPED is a University of Edinburgh student society dedicated to accelerating development of Hyperloop technology and implementing Hyperloop in the UK. We have over 50 members in the team working on various aspects of the project including technical design of the prototype, manufacturing, economic feasibility, stakeholder engagement and publicity.

After a successful year, HYPED has advanced to the final stages of SpaceX’s Hyperloop Pod competition, held in California in Summer 2017. We are one of 24 finalists selected to compete, after showing our technical excellence and ambition both in the previous competition and in SpaceX and university presentations. The competition challenges students to design and build a pod to race along a mile-long Hyperloop tube.

HYPED has also been named a winner in the Hyperloop One Global Challenge. Our proposed route linking Edinburgh to London has been selected as a possible location for the very first commercial Hyperloop. In summer 2017, we presented our case at a global conference in Amsterdam, discussing the feasibility of making Hyperloop in the UK a reality.

How can I join or sponsor HYPED?

We’re glad to have you on board, so feel free to contact us at: 

Email: team@hyp-ed.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/hypedinburgh/

Name: Vossloh RailWatch GmbH
Description:
Die Vossloh RailWatch GmbH ist ein Technologieunternehmen und Teil der Vossloh Gruppe und hat ein innovatives Messsystem namens Pulsar entwickelt, welches in Echtzeit den Zustand von Güterwagen während der Vorbeifahrt erfasst. 
Mittels OCR-Erkennung werden UIC-Nummern und Anschriften identifiziert, was eine präzise Zuordnung der Güterwagen ermöglicht. Das kompakte Gehäuse des Pulsars ist mit hochsensiblen Technologien ausgestattet, darunter Kameras, Mikrofontechnik und weitere Sensoren.
Neben der Betrachtung von Güterwagen verfolgen wir die Vision, wie Rolling Stock die Schiene belastet und welche Möglichkeiten es gibt, vorrausschauende Instandhaltung für die Infrastruktur zu ermöglichen. 
Zu den Vossloh RailWatch Kunden gehören, Industrien, Terminals, Häfen, Tunnelbetreiber und Infrastrukturen, die das Ziel der Langfristigen Planbarkeit, höherer Betriebssicherheit und Kosteneffizienz verfolgen.
______
Vossloh RailWatch GmbH is a technology company and part of the Vossloh Group and has developed an innovative measuring system called Pulsar, which records the condition of freight wagons in real time as they pass by. 
UIC numbers and addresses are identified by means of OCR recognition, which enables precise allocation of the freight wagons. The Pulsar's compact housing is equipped with highly sensitive technologies, including cameras, microphone technology and other sensors.
In addition to looking at freight wagons, we are also pursuing the vision of how rolling stock affects the rails and what possibilities there are to enable predictive maintenance for the infrastructure. 
Vossloh RailWatch customers include industries, terminals, ports, tunnel operators and infrastructures that pursue the goal of long-term predictability, greater operational reliability and cost efficiency.

Sur le territoire normand, ce sont en moyenne près de 90 000 voyageurs qui laissent chaque jour leur voiture au garage pour utiliser un train du réseau SNCF NOMAD TRAIN, en Normandie, depuis ou vers Paris.  

En Normandie, nos 2600 agents agissent chaque jour au service du transport des voyageurs en faisant circuler 431 trains TER au quotidien.

Name: Fort Worth & Western Railroad
Description:
Fort Worth & Western Railroad (FWWR) began in 1988, with the purchase of 6.25 miles of track through west Fort Worth from the former Burlington Northern Railroad. Fast forward almost three decades, and FWWR is now a vertically integrated full service railroad operating over 276 miles of track through 8 counties in North Central Texas, from Carrollton to Brownwood. FWWR interchanges with three Class I railroads, Union Pacific, BNSF and CPKC in Fort Worth and one short line railroad, Texas Pacifico at San Angelo Junction.

As a shortline railroad with competitive rates, FWWR concentrates on getting smaller shipments to the larger, Class 1 railroads such as Union Pacific, BNSF Railroad, Kansas City Southern and TXPF. FWWR breaks down into six sub-divisions: Fort Worth Hodge, Fort Worth Cottonbelt, Gorman, Cleburne, Everman and Dublin. FWWR interchanges with Union Pacific at Fort Worth and BNSF at Fort Worth and Brownwood, Texas. Through a “bridge connection”, FWWR also interchanges with Kansas City Southern (KCS) with BNSF at Fort Worth and Texas Pacifico (TXPF) at San Angelo Junction.

Our greatest strength is providing our clients with exceptional customer service and a creative approach to solving their transportation challenges. Our ranks are filled with individuals that have diverse backgrounds and loads of experience creating an exceptionally strong team.

We have direct interline connections with Class I railroads: CN, CSX, FSRR, NS and with regional shortlines: AGR and TASD. Name: Grampet Group
SASRE • The South African Society for Railway Engineering
Description:
SASRE (pronounced ‘sass-ray’) is the South African Society for Railway Engineering. SASRE is an ECSA-recognised voluntary association founded in 1932 with the aim to promote the exchange of knowledge between, broaden the experience and increase the effectiveness of its members, with particular emphasis on railway engineering subjects and associated technologies.

Our membership includes - but is not limited to - engineers, technicians, technologists and artisans working in civil, electrical, electronic and mechanical engineering, as well as those working in transport and logistics and at companies that supply and support the rail industry.

Benefits of SASRE membership include:
 1 × ECSA CPD point¹ per year for SASRE members in good standing² (Category 3: Individual Activities)
 Discounted ECSA annual fees (10% for candidates and 13% for professionals)
 Networking and business opportunities
 Email notifications and calendar reminders for society events
 Elegibility to join SASRE site visits
 Access to recordings and slides for past meeting presentations
¹ SASRE is a recognised ECSA Category A Voluntary Association (VA A 0035)
² SASRE's individual membership fee is only R 100.00 per year

SASRE hosts monthy general meetings that are open to all members, to attend in person in Pretoria or virtually. A member or guest presents on their project, technology or concept and fields questions from members. After the presentation members mingle, network and catch up with colleagues.

We organise industry visits for our members; our latest visit was to the BMW production plant in Rosslyn, Pretoria. Potential future visits include a working site visit with Plasser Rail, and plant visits at Columbus Steels or Ford South Africa.

Please visit our website to view more information and SASRE news, and to apply for membership.

Name: ZEFERINO
Description:
Zeferino SA est une entreprise suisse spécialisée dans les travaux ferroviaires et l’entretien d’infrastructures rail.

Forte d’une expérience reconnue dans le domaine, notre équipe met son savoir-faire au service de clients institutionnels et privés afin de répondre à des projets de toute envergure avec fiabilité, précision et sécurité.

Nous intervenons dans la construction de nouvelles voies ferrées, la modification de tracés existants ainsi que dans les travaux d’entretien et d’assainissement.

Nous proposons des chantiers ferroviaires clé en main, en nous appuyant sur des équipes et machinistes expérimentés ainsi que sur notre parc de machines ferroviaires.

Grâce à notre expertise technique, notre réactivité et nos équipements, Zeferino SA se positionne comme un partenaire de confiance pour vos projets ferroviaires.

Nous proposons des prestations complètes dans les secteurs ferroviaire au service de clients institutionnels et privés actifs dans le rail.

Zeferino SA intervient pour la construction de nouvelles voies ferrées, la modification de tracés existants ainsi que pour des travaux d’assainissement, quelle que soit leur envergure.

Notre expertise nous permet d’accompagner vos projets avec professionnalisme, rigueur et un engagement constant en faveur de la qualité et de la sécurité.

Name: Railway Interchange
Description:
In 2011, Railway Interchange began with feedback from the Class I Railroads for the rail industry to create one trade show covering all facets of the industry. Today, Railway Interchange is North America's largest railway exhibition and educational conference. The 2025 event takes place May 20-22 in Indianapolis, IN.

Recognized as the premier rail industry event, Railway Interchange is attended by over 5,000 rail industry professionals from around the globe. This railway conference showcases the latest technology, product development, services, and research by members of the Railway Engineering-Maintenance Suppliers Association (REMSA), the Railway Supply Institute (RSI), and Railway System Suppliers, Inc. (RSSI).

In addition to the Expo Hall, attendees will be inspired by a keynote address from a top rail industry professional and gain new insight on emerging technology, government regulations, and more during sessions. RSI and its educational partners will provide attendees with the knowledge and expertise to stay at the forefront of the railway supply industry.

Nos Valeurs :
 Passion du Voyage : Chaque trajet est une nouvelle aventure que nous sommes ravis de partager.
 Engagement envers la Qualité : De nos trains modernes à notre service client exceptionnel, nous visons l'excellence à chaque étape.

Rejoignez-nous sur ce Voyage :
Que vous soyez un voyageur avide à la recherche de votre prochaine aventure, une agence de voyage souhaitant collaborer, ou simplement quelqu'un désireux de découvrir la magie du rail européen, RAILWORLD est votre partenaire idéal.

Suivez-nous pour les dernières nouvelles, offres spéciales et témoignages inspirants de nos voyageurs heureux.

Name: OTIF - Intergovernmental Organisation for International Carriage by Rail
Description:
OTIF is an intergovernmental organisation dedicated to international rail transport It has been active since 1893 and is the oldest international organisation in the sector. It now has 50 Member States and 1 Associate Member. The Organisation has its headquarters in Berne, Switzerland
www.otif.org    

OTIF develops unified railway law to connect Europe, Asia and Africa for 125 years!

The Organisation uses simple and effective tools to promote, improve and facilitate international carriage by rail. OTIF provides legal and technical interoperability for international carriage by rail.

Its basic legal instrument is the Convention concerning International Carriage by Rail (COTIF 1999) and its seven Appendices. In 2011, the European Union (EU) acceded to COTIF 1999.

The Organisation’s mission is to promote, improve and facilitate international traffic by rail (Article 2 COTIF 1999). It therefore offers its 50 Member States a framework for cooperation in the railway sector in order to:
-extend and develop the application of COTIF,
-agree on uniform legal regimes,
-envisage and enshrine systems of technical compatibility and harmonisation,
-contribute to the elimination of barriers to border crossing.

OTIF has three major areas of activity: technical interoperability, dangerous goods and railway contract law.

OTIF develops uniform legal regimes for: contracts of carriage of passengers and goods, ancillaries to the contract of carriage, such as the contract of use of wagons or infrastructure, rules for the transport of dangerous goods, technical provisions and the procedure for the technical approval of rolling stock.

OTIF provides its Member States with the legal and technical means to facilitate international traffic by rail, to develop this traffic on their territory and to connect to the railway networks of other Member States. It therefore supplies the means to promote real legal and technical interoperability.

Description:

Elle vous permet de parcourir le Nord de l’Île-de-France, sans passer par Paris, et est en correspondance avec les lignes B, C, D, H et le tramway T8.

Name: Global Ukraine Rail Task Force
Description:
After Russia’s unprovoked and brutal invasion of Ukraine, a group of rail experts came together and created the Global Ukraine Rail Task Force.  

The Task Force is an advisory body and the members are all volunteers working in individual capacities.   

The primary task of the Global Ukraine Rail Task Force is to provide a roundtable to analyse the impact of Russia’s aggressive invasion on Ukraine’s rail sector and to seek solutions. The twin goals are to address the humanitarian crisis enveloping the rail sector as well as rebuilding the rail infrastructure to replace war damage and meet the long term needs of a democratic Ukraine linked to the West.

The Task Force's four objectives are:
1) Address the humanitarian crisis,      
2) Rebuild the Ukrainian rail sector infrastructure,
3) Address passenger rail capacity,
4) Maximise freight capacity.

The Task Force is chaired by:
Jolene Molitoris; Former Administrator of the United States Federal Railroad Administration

Nick Brooks; Secretary General of the Alliance of Passenger Rail New Entrants in Europe – ALLRAIL.

Name: Piper Networks

We’ve designed our technology and platform to improve operations by; providing highly accurate data of where trains and assets are in real-time, improving track worker safety, creating interoperability / compatibility with legacy equipment, and improving speed of delivery for maintenance and signaling projects.

Piper has an existing suite of real-time location systems (RTLS) solutions that utilize various technologies, including: UWB, BLE, GPS-RTK, LTE, RFID, HD Cameras and LiDAR. Our single platform is not only designed to communicate seamlessly with your existing systems, but they can also be interoperable with your legacy equipment. Use Piper’s proven solutions to improve efficiencies and safety, or contact us to develop something specific to your requirements.

Train Navigation
- Determine the location of trains with unmatched positional certainty, even underground or on elevated tracks in the city.
Maintenance of Way Safety
- Piper’s multi-sensor MOW safety solution provides limits compliance, collision avoidance and obstacle detection, and greatly improves track worker safety.
ATP-Overlay
- Piper’s Helix Platform can be integrated to provide ATP functionality such as Vital Train Localization, Red Signal Overrun Protection, Collision Avoidance, and more to improve overall safety and reliability.
Grade Crossing Safety
- Monitor grade crossings remotely to detect occupancy and alert rail system operators and/or train control systems to potential hazards.
Station Safety & PIDS
- Calculate train arrival/departure times to improve rider experience, and keep them safe on the platforms.

Name: SOUTHWEST ASSOCIATION OF RAIL SHIPPERS (SWARS)
Description:
The Southwest Association of Rail Shippers (SWARS) territory includes the Republic of Mexico and the states of Arizona, Arkansas, Southern California (from and including Fresno and points South thereof), Colorado, Kansas, New Mexico, Oklahoma, Texas and Utah.

The objective of the association is to provide an open forum for railroads, shippers and others to meet and discuss matters of mutual interest. Topics include, but are not limited to, service, car supply, scheduling, operating practices, technology, etc. Conferences are held twice a year; in the spring and fall at varying locations  within SWARS’ territory.

SWARS is open to everyone involved in rail transportation including but not limited to rail shippers and receivers, railroads, vendors, 3rd parties, regulators and others.  Membership dues are automatically included in conference registration fees and are valid for one year from the date of such meeting.  To join SWARS, just register and pay for one of our conferences.  Our conference registration fees includes one reception (on the eve of our conference) plus continental breakfast, lunch, two breaks and another reception on the day of our conference.

Nowadays, the technical nature of the rail and tramway markets requires a high level of commitment and that is precisely what Galland is offering through its constant investment in quality, innovation and service.

Name: Xrail AG
Description:
What is Xrail?

Xrail is a production cooperation consisting of seven members, aiming to make European Single Wagonload a more competitive and more sustainable alternative to road transport.

The Xrail Vision

Xrail – the European standard for competitive and sustainable Single Wagonload transport.
 

The Xrail Mission
- Xrail to act as a leading production cooperation, growing in network coverage and transport volumes, supporting the modal shift to rail
- The Alliance to improve reliability, information, performance and ease-of-use of European Single Wagonload, enabling a competitive customer offer and a sustainable business model
- Xrail to push standardization and harmonization of interfaces and procedures to enable full technical interoperability and seamless operations all across Europe
- The Alliance partners to commonly develop smart, technical solutions and ICT platforms and support the automation and digitalization of the members to create customer value and to strengthen intermodal competitiveness of rail
- The Xrail Alliance to bring together talented and agile people from members to boost innovation for the rail freight industry
- The members of the Alliance to team up for lobbying for a better framework for the European Single Wagonload Alliance Networks & Members

The seven partners of the Xrail Alliance are: 

- CFL cargo
- DB Cargo
- Green Cargo
- Hexafret 
- Lineas
- Rail Cargo Group
- SBB Cargo

www.xrail.eu

Name: Railtrans International, a.s.
Description:
Railtrans International a.s with a headquarters located in Bratislava, Slovakia, was founded in November 2011.
RTI holds a license for provision of rail transport services according to Law Nr. 514/2009 as Amended and according to Safety Certificate in Slovakia, Czech Republic, Hungary and Austria.
And as a first Eastern/Central European private rail freight company holding a license to operate in Germany.

The aim of our company is to contribute to continuous quality improvement of our customer services through employment of new approaches and technologies, and to create motivation space for decrease of costs and perspective increase of customer satisfaction.

Name: Compass Rail Services LLC
Description:
Compass Rail is a safety first, service-driven company with industry expertise on multiple levels of the railcar manufacturing and repair industry. Our management team has more than 30 years of combined industry experience giving us a solid foundation to offer our customers detailed solutions for their railcar needs in a safe, reliable, and cost-effective manner.



We understand that your railcars are essential to your business, and we're committed to providing you with the highest quality repair services possible. Our team of experienced technicians use only the latest tools and equipment to get your railcars back on the tracks quickly and safely. 



At Compass Rail, we take pride in being your go-to solution for top-notch railcar repair services throughout the United States. We are committed to keeping your railcars in optimal condition, ensuring the safety and efficiency of your operations.

Name: SPL GRAND EST MOBILITES
Description:
Première région ferroviaire de France hors Ile-de-France, la Région Grand Est s’est engagée dans un
plan d’actions complet afin d’être la région pilote pour la relance du train régional en France.
La SPL « Grand Est Mobilités » constitue un élément majeur de la mise en place d’un modèle
économique performant pour le réseau ferroviaire régional, permettant d’assurer sur le long terme la
croissance forte de l’offre de service et de la fréquentation.

Name: LTE Italia
Description: Il Gruppo LTE Logistik und Transport nasce nel 2020 a Vienna con la costituzione della Holding partecipata da Rhenus (50%) e GKB (50%). L’obiettivo è stato creare un’azienda interamente di capitale privato specializzata nel trasporto ferroviario merci in ambito europeo. Negli anni l’apertura delle società satellite ha permesso l'espansione delle attività in diversi paesi europei. Il 2021 è stata costituita la filiale italiana.

Name: IRIS Certification
Description: IRIS Certification aims to secure higher quality in the rail sector by developing and implementing a global system for the evaluation of companies supplying to the railway industry. Uniform language, assessment guidelines and mutual acceptance of audits create a high level of transparency and trust towards IRIS Certification throughout the supply chain enhancing competition and increasing the quality of rail products. IRIS Certification is a UNIFE-trademarked brand.

Name: eurobahn GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Seit 1999 betreiben wir unter dem Markennamen „eurobahn“ modernen öffentlichen Schienenpersonennahverkehr (SPNV). Seit dem 01. Januar 2022 lautet unser Unternehmensname analog unserem Markennamen, die eurobahn GmbH & Co.KG. Wir verantworten insgesamt vier Verkehrsnetze in Nordrhein Westfalen, Niedersachsen und grenzüberschreitend in die Niederlande. Das gesamte Streckennetz umfasst rund 16,7 Millionen Zug-Kilometer.

Seit Dezember 2016 bedienen wir zudem die innerdeutsche Strecke des Thalys zwischen Köln, Aachen und Dortmund. Um den internationalen Hochgeschwindigkeitszug mit bis zu 320 Stundenkilometern steuern zu dürfen, werden unsere Triebfahrzeugführer*innen zusätzlich hochqualifiziert weitergebildet. 

Mit rund 900 Mitarbeitern (Stand: Januar 2023) – davon knapp 2/3 im Bordbereich tätig– befördern wir täglich rund 100.000 Reisende im Regionalverkehr.

Name: Rail Engineering Solutions (RES)
Description:
Rail Engineering Solutions (RES) | Specialist Support for the UK Rail Industry

At Rail Engineering Solutions, we are proud to be the UK rail industry's trusted partner, offering round-the-clock rolling stock support. From planned maintenance to urgent accident investigations, we ensure the reliability, safety, and efficiency of locomotives and rolling stock across the country.

Our comprehensive services include:

24/7 on-call support anywhere in the UK
Rolling stock inspections and maintenance
Accident investigation and OTDR (On Train Data Recorder) analysis
Storage maintenance solutions
With a focus on minimising downtime and maximising asset performance, we deliver expert engineering and recovery solutions tailored to your needs. Whether responding to derailments or assisting with long-term maintenance, our dedicated team ensures you have a single point of contact and a seamless, professional service every time.

Engineering excellence. Responsive support. Solutions you can trust.

Connect with us to discover how Rail Engineering Solutions keeps the UK rail network moving, 24/7.

Name: Railsponsible
Description:
Railsponsible is an industry initiative, with the aim to continuously improve sustainability practices throughout the railway sector. The initiative was launched in 2015 and is currently facilitated by H&Z Management Consulting and its sustainability platform and community SUSTAINX.

Our vision is a global railway ecosytem where all companies and their suppliers have in place good ethical, social, environmental and business practices. By sharing best practices, building capabilities and promoting transparency along the value chain, we aim to improve environmental and social practices within the railway sector and to meet increasing stakeholder requirements.

With a major focus on procurement practices, Railsponsible focuses on the effective analysis of supply chain related CSR practices and on improving the sustainability practices of all companies along the value chain. 

The initiative is open to all railway operators and companies across the railway sector value chain, along with key industry associations, that share its vision, mission and commitments.

Name: AERRL
Description: European Association of European Rail Rolling Stock Lessors

Name: Talgo Deutschland GmbH
Description:
Die Talgo (Deutschland) GmbH:

In unserem modernen Wartungswerk in Berlin (Warschauer Straße) betreuen wir seit über 30 Jahren moderne Reisezüge und deren Komponenten. 1994 fing es an mit dem Talgo-Hotelzug InterCityNight, heute erbringt unser kompetentes Team aus aktuell rund 130 Mitarbeitern ein breites Spektrum an technischen Dienstleistungen an Loks, Wagen und Triebzügen, von der täglichen Durchsicht bis zu Aufarbeitung, Umbau und Instandsetzung von ganzer Fahrzeuge und deren Komponenten. Nächster Meilenstein für uns ist in Kürze die Aufnahme der Instandhaltung der Talgo-ICE-Züge, die unsere Muttergesellschaft aktuell nach Deutschland liefert.

Die Talgo-Gruppe:

Die Talgo-Gruppe hat ihren Ursprung und Hauptsitz in Spanien, der Name TALGO steht für ein innovatives Reisezugkonzept für den hochwertigen Fern- und Hochgeschwindigkeitsverkehr. Heute legen Talgo-Züge jährlich mehrere zig Millionen Kilometer pro Jahr zurück, in 9 Ländern in Europa, den USA und Asien -Tendenz steigend. Aktuell werden u.a. weit über 100 Talgo-Züge für den Einsatz auf ICE-Strecken in Deutschland geliefert.

Name: Back-on-Track Germany e.V.
Description:
Wir engagieren uns für mehr, bessere und bezahlbare #Nachtzüge – die mit Abstand klimafreundlichste Möglichkeit, längere Distanzen in Europa entspannt zu überwinden.
Mit unserem unabhängigen europäischen Netzwerk sind wir in neun Ländern ehrenamtlich aktiv. Werde Mitglied auf unserer Website.

Name: GVB
Description:
Ieder mens heeft een eigen bestemming en brengt een eigen verhaal met zich mee. Reizigers en medewerkers. Bij GVB verbinden we deze verhalen met bestemmingen. Wij creëren herinneringen voor later en momenten van nu. Van de tram op het Leidseplein tot de veerpont die dagelijks duizenden forenzen het water overbrengt. Wij zijn de schakel die de hoofdstukken van verhalen met elkaar verbindt. 

Unieke diversiteit
Wij werken in het bruisende Amsterdam. Wij zijn onlosmakelijk verbonden met de stad en haar unieke diversiteit aan mensen, culturen en activiteiten. Op ons moeten inwoners, toeristen en forenzen kunnen vertrouwen. En alle medewerkers dragen hier aan bij. Met ieder zijn eigen inbreng. Ook in ons werkgeverschap zie je dit terug. We vinden het belangrijk dat je de diversiteit van de stad ook binnen onze organisatie terugziet en staan voor inclusief werkgeverschap. 

Een wereld op zich
Je kent ons van onze bussen, metro’s, trams en veerponten. Maar GVB is meer dan dat. Achter de schermen schuilt er een dynamische wereld waarin veel medewerkers in allerlei rollen ervoor zorgen dat de stad bereikbaar blijft. Denk naast bestuurders en conducteurs ook aan IT’ers, monteurs, projectmanagers, planners, inspecteurs, engineers en nog veel meer.

In transitie
Wij richten ons op goede, duurzame integrale vervoersoplossingen in de dynamische stad Amsterdam. En dat betekent dat ook wij als organisatie in transitie zijn, zodat we optimaal kunnen inspelen en bijdragen aan alle transities die spelen op het gebied van techniek, data, energie, vervoer, logistiek, etcetera. Bij ons bouw je mee aan de toekomst van het OV. En dat is een prachtige uitdaging! 

Wil jij relevant werk doen bij één van de werkgevers van Amsterdam? Wil je onderdeel zijn van een inclusieve cultuur waarin iedereen van waarde is? Wil je trots zijn op je werk en onderdeel worden van prachtige verhalen?  Verbind de wereld in Amsterdam. Kom werken bij GVB.

Name: Patriot Rail
Description: Patriot Rail is one of North America's safest and most reliable rail and rail services solutions companies, helping to develop innovative solutions while creating optimal value for its customers, stakeholders, and employees in the communities it serves.

Name: Thalys
Description: Thalys and Eurostar are now one! Follow our new high-speed adventure at www.linkedin.com/company/eurostar.

Name: East West Railway Company
Description:
East West Rail is building a better-connected future for the communities between Oxford, Milton Keynes, Bedford and Cambridge.
 
The new railway is being designed to make everyday journeys easier – linking people with schools, public services, jobs and each other. It will open up new opportunities for more people to live where life works for them, with improved access to new homes in vibrant, well-connected communities.
 
By working hand-in-hand with local communities, industry partners, Network Rail and the Department for Transport, we’re developing a railway that reflects the needs of the people who’ll use it for generations to come.
 
Together, we’re focused on creating long-term benefits for the region. Unlocking its potential as a global centre for life sciences and innovation, East West Rail supports sustainable, inclusive economic growth – benefiting those who live and work locally, as well as further afield.

Name: Pro-Rail Alliance
Description: In Germany’s most unconventional transport alliance, 23 non-profit organisations and over 135 companies from every part of the railway sector work closely in permanent collaboration. The motivation is the promotion and improvement of rail transport in Germany.

Name: e2E Rail
Description:
e2E Rail is the leading Railway Supply Chain solutions provider and railway system integrator in India. We streamline entire railway value chain to provide better faster and secure railway projects for the clients.

Funded by two large investors, Zephyr and Venture East, E2E Rail is an emerging leader in railway infrastructure services, focusing on entire Railway Supply Chain Solutions comprising of procurement, engineering, installation, testing and commissioning services across signaling, track and electrification sectors in India and overseas markets. 

We offer and deliver tailor made solutions to our customers across the globe in compliance with their specifications and geographic standards. Our domain expertise ensures that we are able to undertake any type of railway projects and effectively deliver high quality results that are critical to our customers.

E2E Rail's completed projects include work done for London Metro, Delhi Airport Metro Express Link; Port Hedland project in Western Australia; and London Under Ground in the UK. E2E has also worked with most of the leading global signalling OEM companies both in India and overseas markets.

Name: Rhätische Bahn
Description:
Allegra!

The Rhaetian Railway – the largest train operator in the Swiss Alps – is a leading supplier of leisure, commuter and freight transport services. With its unique mountain routes, UNESCO World Heritage status and famous services like the Glacier and Bernina Express lines, it has a 125-year-long history of supplying top-class rail travel experiences throughout Switzerland’s trilingual canton of Graubünden. The Rhaetian Railway, with its workforce of some 1,500 employees, transports 12 million passengers and about 700,000 tons of freight every year over its 384 kilometres (nearly 240 miles) of high-altitude Alpine rail network. www.rhb.ch

Name: East West Railway Company

East West Rail is building a better-connected future for the communities between Oxford, Milton Keynes, Bedford and Cambridge.
