Name: PKP S.A.
Description:
PKP S.A. pełni nadzór właścicielski nad spółkami Grupy PKP w celu zapewnienia jak najwyższej jakości obsługi transportowo-logistycznej pasażerów i towarów.

PKP S.A. jest również jednym z największych właścicieli nieruchomości w Polsce. W zasobach Spółki znajduje się m.in. ok. 96 tys. ha gruntów oraz 52 tys. budynków i budowli. Jej majątek stanowią zarówno obiekty pełniące funkcje związane z transportem i obsługą podróżnych (dworce kolejowe), jak i nieruchomości  stricte komercyjne.  PKP S.A. prowadzi aktywne działania jako zarządca, polegające m.in. na inicjowaniu inwestycji oraz szukaniu sposobów optymalnego zagospodarowania kolejowych gruntów.

Ofert pracy: https://www.pkp.pl/pl/kariera/oferty-pracy

Name: West Midlands Trains
Description:
We are the proud operators of two railway networks - West Midlands Railway and London Northwestern Railway - connecting London, the Midlands and the North West.

Our Linkedin inbox is not monitored around the clock, our social media team are available to help 247 on X, Facebook and Instagram.

West Midlands Railway is the local operator across Birmingham, running the majority of local services as well as trains to many of the surrounding towns and cities, including Redditch, Stratford-upon-Avon, Worcester, Hereford, Shrewsbury and Telford.

Website > wmr.uk

London Northwestern Railway connects London to Liverpool along the west coast mainline calling at major town & cities in between including Watford, Milton Keynes, Northampton, Nuneaton, Tamworth, Coventry, Birmingham, Wolverhampton, Stafford, Crewe and Liverpool.

Website > lnr.uk

Both networks are operated by West Midlands Trains Ltd.

Name: MTR Corporation (Crossrail) Limited
Description:
MTR Corporation (Crossrail) Limited (MTREL) is the former operator of London’s Elizabeth line. At MTREL, we believe in the power of London’s railway network to connect families, friends, colleagues and communities. 

We were awarded the Elizabeth line concession by Transport for London (TfL) in July 2014, initially operating services under the interim TfL Rail branding, connecting Paddington to Reading and Heathrow in the west, and Liverpool Street with Shenfield in the east.

In May 2022, the new Central Section was opened by Her Majesty the Queen, officially launching the new Elizabeth line and offering passengers a new way to travel initially between Paddington and Abbey Wood via Liverpool Street. 

The Elizabeth line is the most significant addition to London’s transport network in a generation, providing new journey options, cutting travel time and supporting regeneration across the capital.  

We are incredibly proud having been part of this transformative new railway, providing world-class customer service and performance.

Name: EPSF (Etablissement public de sécurité ferroviaire)
Description:
L’autorité française de sécurité ferroviaire

L’Établissement public de sécurité ferroviaire (EPSF) exerce, pour le compte du ministère chargé des transports et dans le cadre de la réglementation, les fonctions dévolues à l’autorité nationale de sécurité ferroviaire au sens de la directive (UE) 2016/798. Sa création répond à la nécessité, pour l’État, de disposer d’un organisme disposant de toutes les compétences nécessaires en matière de sécurité ferroviaire tout en étant indépendant des opérateurs ferroviaires. L’EPSF est donc un acteur important de l’ouverture des réseaux ferroviaires. Il est chargé de délivrer un certain nombre d’autorisations et de s’assurer, au moyen d’audits et de contrôles, que les exigences réglementaires sont respectées, et ce en garantissant à tous les opérateurs une égalité de traitement. Il garantit ainsi l’homogénéité des conditions techniques et de sécurité de l’exploitation et contribue à l’interopérabilité des réseaux européens.

L’EPSF compte aujourd’hui une centaine de collaborateurs qui contribuent, en collaboration avec le secteur, à la sécurité ferroviaire. 

Nous recrutons régulièrement des ingénieurs confirmés dans les activités ferroviaires ainsi que des jeunes ingénieurs sensibilisés aux problématiques de sécurité désireux de compléter leurs compétences dans ce domaine.

Name: LTG
Description:
LTG grupė yra viena didžiausių įmonių grupių Lietuvoje, administruojanti šalies geležinkelių tinklą. Jungiame žmones ir verslus, veždami keleivius ir krovinius, valdydami ir nuolat atnaujindami geležinkelių infrastruktūrą, inžinerines bei IT sistemas. Nuo pat Nepriklausomybės paskelbimo augame kartu su Lietuva.

Ko pasiekėme iki šiol?

Tapome didžiausia Baltijos šalyse geležinkelių grupe, aktyviai prisidedame prie Lietuvos verslo plėtros užsienyje, taip pat sėkmingai bendradarbiaujame ir už Lietuvos ribų.

Šiandien LTG grupės komandą sudaro ~ 6 000 darbuotojų, atsakingų už sklandų krovinių ir keleivių judėjimą – ir už tai, kokią valstybę kuriame šiandien. 

----- 

LTG group is one of the largest groups of companies in Lithuania, administering the country's railway network. It connects people and businesses by transporting passengers and goods, managing and constantly updating rail infrastructure, engineering and IT systems. Since the declaration of independence, we have not stopped growing and progressing together with Lithuania.

What have we achieved so far?

We have become the largest railway group in the Baltic States that actively contributes to the development of Lithuanian business abroad, and also successfully cooperates outside Lithuania.

Today the team of LTG group consists of ~ 6 000 employees responsible for the smooth movement of freight and passengers.

Name: Europe's Rail Joint Undertaking
Description: Europe's Rail JU is a public-private partnership in the rail sector, co-financed by the Horizon Europe programme, funding research and innovation and harmonising standards to deliver the railway system of the future. One of its main goals is to help create a Single European Railway Area.

Name: VTG
Description:
Headquartered in Hamburg, VTG GmbH is an international asset owner and logistics company with a strong focus on rail. VTG operates the largest privately-owned fleet of freight wagons in Europe, including around 84,800 rail freight wagons – mostly tank wagons, intermodal wagons, standard freight wagons and sliding-wall wagons. 

This diversified service portfolio gives VTG’s customers a robust platform for international freight transportation, based on which the company develops made-to-measure logistical solutions for any and every industry. Over many years, VTG has accumulated granular expertise across the entire transport chain – expertise that is now flanked by smart technology. The Group likewise combines a wealth of experience with a specialized knowledge of the transportation of liquid and sensitive goods in particular. Its customers include a plethora of leading companies representing the chemicals, petroleum, automotive and paper industries, agriculture and virtually every other sector besides. 

https://www.vtg.com/imprint

Contact:
VTG GmbH
Nagelsweg 34
20097 Hamburg
Tel.: +49 40 2354-0
Fax: +49 40 2354-1199
E-Mail: info@vtg.com

Name: Metrolink
Description: The Southern California Regional Rail Authority (SCRRA) is the joint powers authority that operates METROLINK, the five county premier commuter rail service with a dedicated staff of approximately 250 full time employees and over 800 contract staff.  Metrolink is one of the fastest growing commuter rail systems in the country with seven routes, 55 stations, and 512 miles of track.  Metrolink transports over 40,000 passengers daily and continues to reduce congestion on highways and improve mobility throughout the Southern California region.

Name: CER (Community of European Railway and Infrastructure Companies)
Description: The Community of European Railway and Infrastructure Companies (CER) brings together around 70 railway undertakings, their national associations as well as infrastructure managers and vehicle leasing companies. The membership is made up of long-established bodies, new entrants and both private and public enterprises, representing 73% of the rail network length, 76% of the rail freight business and about 92% of rail passenger operations in EU, EFTA and EU accession countries. CER represents the interests of its members towards EU policy makers and transport stakeholders, advocating rail as the backbone of a competitive and sustainable transport system in Europe. For more information, visit www.cer.be or follow us on X, Bluesky and Instagram.

Description:
Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems (UK) Ltd is a member of the global Knorr-Bremse Group, a world leader in on-board systems and service support for rail vehicles. We equip mass transit vehicles and mainline trains with highly advanced products. 

In addition to complete braking systems for all types of rail vehicles, our product portfolio also encompasses, but is not limited to, entrance systems, climate control/HVAC systems, bogie diagnosis systems, sanding systems and windscreen wipers.

Name: SYSTRA Egypt
Description:
SYSTRA is one of the world's leading engineering and consultancy groups specialising in public transport and mobility solutions. For more than 65 years, the Group has been committed to helping cities and regions to contribute to their development by creating, improving and modernising their transport infrastructure.

With its 10,300 employees, the Group's mission is to connect people and bring territories closer together in the 80 countries where it operates. 

For over five decades, SYSTRA has played a pivotal role in Egypt's key transportation initiatives. From The Cairo Metro to the Tramway of Alexandria and the Port Saïd Tunnels, our legacy spans significant projects. With a team of over 350 experts, we specialize in metro systems, conventional rail, tunnels, consultancy services, high-speed train projects, and beyond. Our commitment remains steadfast in advancing Egypt's transportation landscape through sustainable expertise and innovation.

Name: SYSTRA USA
Description:
SYSTRA USA, Inc. is home to designers, engineers, architects, and construction and program managers who partner with clients that deliver public transportation, educational facilities, and affordable housing to our communities.

A trusted partner to public agencies and operators throughout the United States since 1985, SYSTRA’s commitments to safety, the environment, quality, and ethics are the basis of our daily activities.

Using a collaborative approach built on the firm’s value of Connected Teams, SYSTRA offers clients and partners access to the best skills worldwide via sharing information, tools, best practices, and processes.

Part of SYSTRA Group, a world-leading engineering and consulting firm, SYSTRA USA is supported by more than 10,000 employees worldwide. We are shaped by our shareholders, SNCF (French National Railway) and RATP (Paris Metro operator), and these strong ties allow us to draw on the expertise of talented engineers and innovative solutions developed by pioneers of newly developed technologies.

Name: Metrô BH
Description: Concessionária que administra o metrô da Região Metropolitana de Belo Horizonte

Name: Linha Uni
Description:
A Concessionária Linha Uni é a responsável pela retomada da Linha 6-Laranja de metrô de São Paulo. O empreendimento é uma parceria público-privada (PPP) firmada entre o Governo do Estado em outubro de 2020 e que estabelece um contrato de 24 anos entre a construção e operação. 
A Linha 6 irá atender um fluxo previsto de mais de 600 mil pessoas por dia e gerar cerca de 9 mil empregos. 

Atualmente, a construção e implantação da Linha 6-Laranja é o maior projeto de infraestrutura da América Latina, que contemplará 15 km de linha e 15 estações, e vai conectar o centro da capital à Brasilândia, na zona norte.

A Concessionária Linha Uni possui as Certificações ISOs 9001, 14001, 37001 e 45001.

Name: RailFactor
Description:
RailFactor is a comprehensive online networking platform for railway professionals across the globe. As a one-stop business-oriented hub exclusively dedicated to the rail industry, we bring together railway professionals, companies, suppliers, vendors, and service providers under one roof.
Our in-depth features allow you to search for jobs, find products and services, submit tenders, receive offers from vendors, and connect with other industry professionals all in one place, without jumping from one website to another.
In addition, RailFactor features exclusive rail news, market intelligence updates from around the globe, rail media, rail-related interviews, and stories.
Sign up to www.railfactor.com today to gain access to all of these features and more.

Name: La Transalpine Lyon-Turin
Description:
Présidé par Jacques Gounon, PDG du groupe Getlink (ex Eurotunnel), le Comité pour la Transalpine rassemble les collectivités locales et responsables politiques de tous bords, grandes entreprises, organisations représentatives du monde économique, syndicats professionnels, associations... tous mobilisés pour la réalisation de la liaison ferroviaire fret et voyageurs Lyon-Turin. 
Maillon manquant du Corridor méditerranéen reliant la péninsule ibérique à l'Europe centrale, le Lyon-Turin est une infrastructure stratégique prioritaire pour l'UE, au service des intérêts économiques et écologiques de la France.

Name: Nox Mobility
Description:
At Nox, we believe night trains shouldn’t be left in a nostalgic niche — but become an integral part of sustainable long-distance travel in Europe. 

For too long, overnight trains have meant shared compartments with strangers, low reliability and high prices. We’re here to change that. Our mission is to reinvent night trains from the ground up — with fully private rooms and efficient operations which allow ticket prices as low as short-haul flights.

Nox aims to become Europe’s most desirable long-distance transport brand — reconnecting the continent through a new network of night trains built around three core principles: privacy, efficiency, and affordability.

Name: Digitale Schiene Deutschland
Description:
Revolution im Bahnsystem – unterwegs in die digitale Zukunft. 

Wer künftig einen attraktiveren Bahnverkehr mit mehr Zügen in einer höheren Qualität auf dem Schienennetz will, muss die Chancen der Digitalisierung konsequent nutzen und das System Bahn grundlegend modernisieren. Die Digitale Schiene Deutschland bringt Zukunftstechnologien ins System Bahn. Denn Digitalisierung, Automatisierung und künstliche Intelligenz sind der Schlüssel für eine höhere Kapazität und eine optimale Auslastung des Schienennetzes - und das ohne einen Meter zusätzlicher Gleise. Gleichzeitig wird die Eisenbahn wieder zur Hochtechnologiebranche, mit attraktiven Arbeitsplätzen und Innovationskraft über Deutschland hinaus.

Kapazität – Zuverlässigkeit – Effizienz – Innovation – Umwelt 

Das Fundament dafür legen wir mit der grundlegenden Modernisierung und Digitalisierung der Infrastruktur: Durch den Flächen-Rollout des European Train Control System (ETCS), Digitaler Stellwerke (DSTW) und des integrierten Leit- und Bediensystems (iLBS) wird die Leit- und Sicherungstechnik grundlegend erneuert. Der „Startschuss“ dafür wurde 2020 mit dem sogenannten „Starterpaket“ gegeben. 

Mit der zweiten Stufe der Digitalen Schiene entfaltet das digitale Bahnsystem dann sein volles Potenzial: Züge, die voll automatisiert und in kürzeren Abständen fahren, die in Echtzeit intelligent und automatisiert gesteuert werden, die ihre Umwelt und ihre Position durch Sensorik erkennen – so sieht die Zukunft der Eisenbahn aus. In einer Systemarchitektur wird dafür detailliert, was einzelne Komponenten des Bahnsystems leisten müssen und wie sie zusammenarbeiten sollen. Auf dieser Grundlage werden dann zahlreiche digitale Technologien erprobt und für den Einsatz im System Bahn weiterentwickelt.

Name: High Speed Rail Authority (Australia)
Description:
High speed rail will connect Australian regions, cities and communities – delivering more job and lifestyle choices, greater housing options and new economic opportunities.

With a new world-class railway system at its core, the Australian Government is planning for a future high speed rail network to connect Brisbane, Sydney, Canberra, Melbourne and regional communities across the east coast of Australia. 

The first stage connects Newcastle to Sydney – a nationally significant corridor – with a fast, reliable and regular link between the two largest cities in NSW.

Name: Trivia Trens
Description:
Somos a Trivia Trens, uma empresa que integra a divisão de trilhos do Grupo Comporte.

Responsável pela futura operação e manutenção das Linhas 11–Coral, 12–Safira, 13–Jade e do Expresso Aeroporto, totalizando 129,2km de trilhos na Zona Leste de São Paulo, as linhas conectam mais de 4,6 milhões de pessoas, considerado um dos principais eixos de deslocamento diário da cidade.

Além de operar o sistema ferroviário, atuamos na modernização da infraestrutura, com ampliação e revitalização de estações, requalificação dos trilhos e fechamento de passagens em nível, garantindo mais segurança e conforto para os passageiros, em cada viagem.

Name: Midnight Trains
Description:
Travel better. Offer the best, for you and for the planet. 

Air travel is today leading by far the transportation market between European cities, it is a quasi-monopoly. And yet... 

The experience imposed by commercial airlines is full of stress and discomfort. The speed they sell is an illusion and a 1-hour flight is actually 4 hours long from door to door. Finally and more importantly, air travel produces high carbon emissions.
Midnight Trains was born from these observations: it is time to propose a more comfortable, seamless and sustainable alternative.

We believe that the journey is as important as the destination and that every moment is precious. To connect the largest European cities together, we set ourselves a challenge: create a hotel on rails, by redesigning the night train experience.

The future with Midnight
In 2024, we will launch our first line from our hub in Paris, which will set the foundation of our deployment plan, with one ambition: propose a network of more than 10 destinations with distances from 800 to 1,500 km.

We can not wait to welcome you onboard and shape together the future of travel in a greater, greener and more comfortable way.

Stay tuned ! 
Don’t miss any announcement on the development of our lines, and start travelling with us thanks to our newsletter sent every Friday at midnight sharp : https://www.midnight-trains.com/newsletter (French) and https://www.midnight-trains.com/en/newsletter (English)

Name: Brightline West Trains
Description: Brightline West is a high-speed passenger rail system connecting Las Vegas and Southern California. Brightline West will take cars off the road and offer millions of passengers a fast, efficient, and green way to travel.

Name: TrinityRail
Description: TrinityRail is North America’s premier provider of rail transportation solutions. Our comprehensive platform includes railcar leasing, field support, manufacturing, parts, and maintenance. We also offer innovative fleet management services from RSI Logistics. You can rely on TrinityRail to fully deliver trusted expertise, innovative solutions, and supply chain optimization.

Name: PKP Intercity
Description:
Szybka i wygodna podróż pociągiem – przez Polskę i dalej, po europejskich torach – od ponad dekady kojarzy się z PKP Intercity. Jesteśmy firmą z tradycjami, dbającą o potrzeby pasażerów, sięgającą po najnowocześniejsze rozwiązania, inicjującą i wspierającą ciekawe projekty kulturalne i społeczne.

PKP Intercity działa od 1 września 2001 roku. Jest największym polskim operatorem kolejowym, specjalizującym się w krajowych i międzynarodowych przewozach na długich trasach. Cieszy się zaufaniem pasażerów i opinią najbardziej renomowanego przewoźnika kolejowego w kraju. 

W 2011 roku spółka podpisała umowę z firmą Alstom na dostawę 20 pociągów Pendolino. Będą mogły mknąć po szynach ponad 200 km/godz. Skrócą podróż do największych ośrodków, takich jak Warszawa, Trójmiasto, Kraków, Katowice czy Wrocław, ale także do mniejszych miast – Gliwic, Rzeszowa, Bielska-Białej. Zostanie stworzona dla nich nowa kategoria połączeń EIC Premium, zapewniająca najwyższą jakość i komfort podróży w cenie na każdą kieszeń - dzięki dynamicznemu systemowi sprzedaży biletów.

Inwestycje to też modernizacja i zakupy nowego taboru, także z udziałem funduszy europejskich. W 2008 roku PKP Intercity kupiło 10 nowoczesnych lokomotyw wielosystemowych Siemens Eurosprinter, dla których wybrano imię „Husarz”. W kolejnych latach naprawy i remonty przeszło ponad tysiąc wagonów. W 2013 r. podpisaliśmy umowę na zakup 20 nowoczesnych i komfortowych elektrycznych zespołów trakcyjnych FLIRT firmy Stadler, które na tory wjadą w końcu 2015 roku, a w 2014 r. zawarliśmy umowę na kolejnych 20 składów - najnowocześniejszych konstrukcji bydgoskiej Pesy o nazwie DART.

Name: Green Cargo
Description:
Vi på Green Cargo erbjuder näringslivet säkra, kapacitetsstarka och hållbara transporter till cirka 200 platser i Skandinavien och med partners når vi närmare 1000 i övriga Europa. Vårt transportarbete uppgick till 9,7 miljarder nettotonkm 2024. Nästan 98 procent av vårt totala transportarbete sker med eldrivna lok där elen uteslutande kommer från fossilfria källor. Varje vardag kör vi 31 miljoner nettotonkilometer och ersätter därmed 9 000 lastbilstransporter i vägnätet. Vi har 1 750 anställda, och har en årsomsättning på 4,2 miljarder SEK (2024).

Våra kunder finns inom basindustrin där segment som skog, stål och papper dominerar, men där även kemi och energi, verkstads- och fordonsindustri samt dagligvaruhandel står för betydande volymer. Ett växande segment är intermodala godsflöden av framförallt container- och trailertransporter. Stora transportflöden via exempelvis Sveriges hamnar ger upphov till behov av landtransporter där Green Cargo har en stark position.

Name: Angel Trains
Description:
We are Rail People. Angel Trains is the UK’s largest rolling stock company. We have invested more than £1.5 billion in rolling stock and innovation projects in the last ten years. Helping to modernise and improve UK rail and meet the needs of today’s passengers.  
  
We collaborate with like-minded companies to make our trains more accessible, comfortable and connected. Together, we are creating an environment where people can enjoy the journey as much as the destination.  
  
Taking our iconic Pendolino fleet as an example, together with our friends at Alstom and Avanti West Coast we brought one of the UK's largest upgrade projects to life.
  
We invest in small and medium businesses who drive our innovation in new technologies. From battery and hydrogen power systems to 3D printed parts and high-definition cameras. Our long-term outlook means we can support skilled jobs across the sector, from coast to coast, across the whole country.  
  
We will continue to reimagine our investments, to work with the talented people in our industry and to engineer a brighter, greener, more cost-effective future for UK Rail. Angel Trains. Rail People, Real Expertise.

Name: GATX Rail Europe
Description:
GATX Rail Europe is a leading, full-service railcar lessor offering a high-quality and diversified fleet to over 20 European countries. With an experienced, service-oriented team, GATX is focused on making railcar leasing and rail transport simple, efficient, and seamless. The Company believes its customer focused model, delivers quick solutions and allows customers to focus their attention on their core business. 270+ customers across various industries utilize GATX's more than 36,500 intermodal, freight and tank railcars, resulting in an efficient, environmentally friendly, safe, and cost competitive solution relative to other transport modes. 

The Company has strategically located offices across Europe for localized customer support, a state-of-the-art full-service maintenance and railcar assembly workshop in Poland, and long-standing relationships with numerous third-party maintenance workshops and railcar suppliers across the continent. GATX Rail Europe´s headquarters are located in Vienna, Austria and the Company is part of GATX Corporation, a 125+ year railcar lessor traded on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE ticker: GATX).

Name: Riyadh Transport | النقل العام لمدينة الرياض
Description:
نقدم نظام نقل عام عالمي يربط أحياء الرياض لتعزيز جودة الحياة، ليكون كل درب أسهل، أسرع، وأقرب، تحت إشراف @RCRCSA للاستفسارات والدعم: @RPTSupport أو 19933

We provide a world-class public transport system that connects Riyadh's neighborhoods, enhances quality of life, and makes every journey easier, faster, closer – under the supervision of @RCRCSAFor inquiries and support: @RPTSupport or 19933

Name: Indian Railways (IR)
Description: Indian Railways (IR) is a statutory body under the ownership of the Ministry of Railways of the Government of India that operates India's national railway system. As of 2023, it manages the fourth largest national railway system by size with a running track length of 104,647 km (65,025 mi) and route length of 68,426 km (42,518 mi) of which 60,451 km (37,563 mi) is electrified. With more than 1.2 million employees, it is the world's ninth-largest employer and India's second largest employer.

Name: DB Cargo France
Description:
Née en 2005, DB Cargo France, filiale française du leader européen DB Cargo, est aujourd'hui un acteur important du fret ferroviaire en France. 
DB Cargo France offre à ses clients diverses solutions : du wagon isolé au train complet, du transport combiné, pour permettre le transport de tout type de marchandises en desservant la France du Nord au sud grâce à une organisation en 3 corridors : Nord-Sud, Est-Ouest et division Bulk. 
Grace à notre réseau international, nous pouvons vous accompagner pour franchir les frontières et acheminer vos marchandises en Allemagne, Angleterre, Belgique, Espagne ou bien encore l'Italie.

Name: Caltrain
Description: Caltrain provides commuter rail service along the San Francisco Peninsula, through the Silicon Valley to San Jose and Gilroy.

Name: Arriva Rail London
Description:
Arriva Rail London (ARL) is the train operating company responsible for running the London Overground network under a concession agreement with Transport for London (TfL). The seven-and-a-half-year concession commenced on 13 November 2016 and was extended by two years in 2023 to run until 3 May 2026.

Working in partnership with TfL, ARL strives to deliver improvements for London Overground customers through more frequent services, new trains and improved interchanges, as well as developing stations and lines to meet increasing passenger demand and to support new homes and jobs.

Arriva Rail London is part of the Arriva group. Arriva is a leading provider of passenger transport across Europe, employing around 35,500 people and delivering around 1.5 billion passenger journeys across 10 European countries.

Name: Captrain Italia
Description:
Captrain Italia è la filiale italiana del Gruppo SNCF focalizzata sul trasporto ferroviario delle merci. 

Il Gruppo SNCF, controllato dallo Stato francese, con 202.000 impiegati in 120 nazioni costituisce un punto di riferimento per la mobilità e la logistica a livello mondiale. Il Gruppo si focalizza su due importanti attività: Infrastruttura e Servizi.

Captrain Italia si posiziona sul mercato nazionale ed internazionale proponendo soluzioni e servizi personalizzati per i traffici ferroviari merci, sia combinati che convenzionali.

Nata in Italia nel 1998 come società di rappresentanza commerciale, Captrain Italia ha ottenuto la licenza ferroviaria ed il certificato di sicurezza nel 2006, divenendo la prima filiale del gruppo SNCF in Europa ad operare come impresa ferroviaria. 
Captrain Italia costituisce un tassello importante nella rete europea del Gruppo che garantisce una copertura capillare ai Clienti internazionali.
L’affidabilità dei traffici europei è favorita dell’utilizzo di locomotive interoperabili e da prestazioni logistiche svolte nel pieno rispetto della sicurezza delle persone, delle merci e dell’ambiente. Grazie alla presenza di un reticolo di unità locali in continuo sviluppo (tra cui Milano, Torino, Genova, Trieste, Ventimiglia, Modena, Verona, Pescara, Modane, Treviso), ad una flotta di vagoni e locomotive e soprattutto ad uno staff altamente specializzato e motivato, Captrain Italia offre soluzioni competitive a livello nazionale ed internazionale su tutti gli assi alpini. 

Il centro logistico Cargo Docks di Modena, l’officina Tiber.co specializzata nella manutenzione del materiale rotabile ad Asti e la società di manovre Cargo Rail Italy completano il presidio della catena del valore al servizio dei Clienti.

Name: UNIFE | The European Rail Supply Industry Association
Description:
UNIFE represents the European rail industry's interests at the level of both European and international institutions.
With activities in the fields of
- public affairs
- railway standardisation & technical harmonisation
- railway research
- quality management
it is our mission is to pro-actively develop an environment in which Europe's rail industry can provide competitive railway systems for increased rail traffic.

Name: Mumbai Metro One Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
As the country looks to create world-class infrastructure, Mass Rapid Transit System is being developed across Indian metros to provide a fast, easy and comfortable commute through high-speed trains. Reliance Infrastructure partnered with MMRDA in Mumbai, has successfully implemented & operating a world-class mass rapid transport system for the city of Mumbai.
Versova-Andheri-Ghatkopar Corridor Mass Rapid Transit System (MRTS) project was awarded by Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) through a global competitive bidding process on Public-Private-Partnership (PPP) framework to RInfra led consortium in 2007. This was the first metro project awarded in the country on a PPP basis and entails design, financing, construction, operation and maintenance of about 12 km elevated metro with 12 stations enroute.
Mumbai Metro One Private Limited (MMOPL) has been incorporated for the implementation & operation of this 1st Metro line of Mumbai. R-Infra holds 74% of the equity share capital of MMOPL, while MMRDA holds 26%.
Mumbai Metro is modern, clean, fast and most caring infrastructure of Mumbai. It not only saves 90-min of travel time daily but ensures that every commuter has a Nice day.

Name: Young Rail Professionals (YRP)
Description:
The Professional Network for Young People in the Rail Industry

Young Rail Professionals was founded in 2009 to bring together young people from across the global railway industry, starting with young members from across the UK’s railway related institutions.  It has rapidly expanded, and continues to grow as young people join the industry and get involved with the YRP from both the UK, Europe and across the globe.

As railways experience a great time of growth and investment, it is more important than ever that strong relationships across organisations are built, and best practice shared across the world through a vibrant, dynamic network, making the most of social media and tapping into the skills of rail’s young and enthusiastic employees.  YRP organises networking events designed both to inspire and to entertain, with a now infamous annual Black Tie Dinner event, drawing hundreds of young professionals together for a great evening of networking and relationship development.  YRP also runs an INTOrail programme, providing opportunities to its members to visit schools, colleges and universities to attract the next generation into this dynamic industry.
Location: Across England ,Wales Ireland (Northern and Republic) and Scotland

Name: MTR Corporation (Australia)
Description:
Every day, MTR connects people and communities. As a recognised world-class operator of sustainable rail transport services, we are a leader in safety, reliability, customer service and efficiency.

MTR has extensive end-to-end railway expertise with more than 40 years of railway projects experience from design to planning and construction through to commissioning, maintenance and operations. Going beyond railway delivery and operation, MTR also creates and manages dynamic communities around its network through seamless integration of rail, commercial and property development.

With more than 40,000 dedicated staff*, MTR carries over 12.7 million passenger journeys worldwide every weekday in Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, Sweden, Australia, Macao and the Mainland of China. MTR strives to grow and connect communities for a better future.

MTR in Australia
In Melbourne, we have been operating the 409-km Melbourne metropolitan rail network under our 60%-owned subsidiary, Metro Trains Melbourne Pty. Ltd., since November 2009.

Our new rail service, Sydney Metro Northwest (SMNW) Line, commenced passenger service on 26 May 2019, marking a new era in passenger rail travel in Australia. Operating under Metro Trains Sydney Pty Ltd., our 60%-owned subsidiary, it runs along a 36-km route and serves 13 stations between Tallawong and Chatswood. The line is equipped with state-of-the-art rail service features such as fully automated trains and platform screen doors, and has been commended by the Premier of the New South Wales State Government. 

MTR Corporation, as a shareholder and project leader in the Northwest Rapid Transit Consortium, has reached contractual close in December 2019 for the PPP contract package that extend the existing SMNW by 30 km to the City and Southwest - in total 66 kilometres of rail and 31 metro stations by 2024.

For more information about MTR Corporation, please visit www.mtr.com.hk.

*includes our subsidiaries and associates in HK and worldwide

Name: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation (GMRC) Limited
Description:
Ahmedabad - Gandhinagar Metro rail project is being promoted with the objective of providing safe, fast and eco-friendly transportation services to the public at affordable rates while simultaneously reducing the congestion on the roads. The metro rail project will promote integration with AMTS, BRTS, Railways and other modes of public transit system.

The project aims to be a model project not only for the state of Gujarat, but also for the entire nation. This project holds the advantage of
Very responsive State Government and progressive leadership
Relatively flat terrain
Use of state of the art technology
Minimum land acquisition
Completely elevated track

GMRC Limited is committed to deliver World Class state-of-art technology most cost efficient metro within the shortest time span possible in the country. 
The proposed metro will have entirely elevated structure, ballast-less tracks, driverless air-conditioned coaches, GPS based rail tracking system, train destination indicators & stations with support infrastructure like automated fare collection, parking facilities, etc.

Name: Lobito Atlantic Railway (LAR)
Description:
A Lobito Atlantic Railway (LAR) é uma empresa concessionária de infraestrutura ferroviária e portuária, estabelecida em Angola, que assume a gestão, operação e manutenção de uma das mais extensas e importantes linhas férreas da região africana além do terminal mineiro do porto do lobito. Com um compromisso sólido em impulsionar o desenvolvimento económico e social, a LAR opera ao longo dos 1289 km de linha férrea que ligam o Porto do Lobito à fronteira com a República Democrática do Congo (RDC). Esta rota é importante, para a exportação e importação de mercadorias, facilitada pelo Terminal de Minério no Porto do Lobito.

[EN] Lobito Atlantic Railway (LAR) is a railway and port infrastructure concession company established in Angola, responsible for the management, operation, and maintenance of one of the most extensive and important rail lines in the African region, in addition to the mining terminal at the Port of Lobito. With a strong commitment to driving economic and social development, LAR operates along the 1,289 km railway that connects the Port of Lobito to the border with the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). This route is vital for the export and import of goods, facilitated by the Mining Terminal at the Port of Lobito.

Name: Ontario Northland
Description:
Ontario Northland connects Northern Ontario with efficient, safe, and reliable transportation. We provide Motor Coach and Train passenger services; we also operate Rail Freight services and an experienced Remanufacturing and Repair Centre. Learn how we're connecting northern communities, driving economic growth, and offering you new ways to travel across Ontario at OntarioNorthland.ca.

Ontario Northland is an agency of the Government of Ontario.

Name: Rail Personnel
Description:
RailPersonnel is an internationally recognised recruitment specialist with a solid reputation in the rail industry worldwide for finding clients the people they need. We are committed to matching people and positions by making it easier for people to see what jobs are on offer and to apply with confidentiality. Allowing you to decide if the role is one you are interested in before submitting your details.

By registering your details your resume and preferences can be seen by our recruiters when searching for suitable candidates for a position they are trying to fill. You will also be notified if we have a job that meets your requirements. No one sees your details without your approval and we never send your resume to a client before checking with you first. Allowing you to decide if the role is one you are interested in. 

Visit our website www.railpersonnel.com for further details.

Name: PT Kereta Cepat Indonesia China
Description:
Kereta Cepat Indonesia China is  a  joint venture company which was established on October, 16th 2015 and has been approved by The Ministry of Law and Human Rights of Republic Indonesia on October, 20th 2015. KCIC was established to build a high-speed railway that will extend for 142.3 kilometers long between Jakarta and Bandung in West Java.  The company consists of a consortium of State Owned enterprises (SOEs) named PT Pilar Sinergi BUMN Indonesia, led by a construction company, PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk. and a consortium of Chinese companies, named Beijing Yawan HSR Co..Ltd. 

The High-Speed Railway corridor is known as a pioneer in one of the development of Indonesia modernization vision. There are 4 stations planned to be located along the route namely Halim, Karawang, Walini, and Tegalluar, where the depot position for maintenance and store railway carriage will be in Tegalluar station. The Jakarta-Bandung High-Speed rail trace will pass through various areas including DKI Jakarta, Bekasi City, Bekasi District, Karawang District, Purwakarta District, West Bandung District, Cimahi City, Bandung City, and Bandung District.

Name: České dráhy, a.s.
Description:
Welcome aboard the largest railway carrier in the Czech Republic, České dráhy. The #CD group includes the railway carrier České dráhy and its subsidiaries, including the railway freight carrier ČD Cargo. With its 21,000 employees, the ČD group is among the largest employers in the Czech Republic and among the largest Czech companies in terms of consolidated revenue.

The Czech Republic needs a strong and modern railway. #CeskeDrahy

For more information about České dráhy: www.ceskedrahy.cz or www.cd.cz
For more information about careers at ČD: www.cd.cz/kariera"

Name: The PWI
Description:
The PWI are a welcoming, professional railway engineering community, bringing people together to share, learn and build rewarding railway careers. 

We provide technical knowledge, advice and support to all those engaged in railway engineering systems worldwide. 

As a member of the PWI you will receive a respected quarterly technical journal, access to over 1000 resources in our Knowledge Hub, routes to professional registration, technical education and discounts on our suite of text books and tickets to our very popular technical seminars that focus on the practical aspects of railway engineering.

Take a look at our website for more information.

www.thepwi.org

Name: Gateway Development Commission (GDC)
Description:
The Gateway Program is the most urgent infrastructure program in the country – a comprehensive rail investment program that will improve commuter and intercity services, add needed resiliency and create new capacity for the busiest section of the Northeast Corridor (NEC).  The NEC is the most heavily used passenger rail line in the country hosting more than 2,200 train movements and 800,000 passenger trips daily. 

The Gateway Development Commission (GDC) is a single-purpose bi-State agency with Board members representing Amtrak and the States of New York and New Jersey. GDC is the project sponsor for the Hudson Tunnel Project.

Name: Australian Rail Industry Standards Organisation
Description:
RISSB has now become Australian Rail Industry Standards Organisation (ARISO).

ARISO drives national harmonisation and interoperability by working hand in hand with industry to develop Australian Standards, Codes of Practice, Guidelines and Rules. 

Our collaborative approach to rail standards development and our industry engagement means that private and public operators, suppliers, consultants and industrial unions can all be at the table.

We are the only accredited Standards Development Organisation for the rail industry in Australia and has a catalogue of more than 200 publications covering all aspects of rail. These publications improve safety, facilitate accreditation and safety assurance, reduce costs and increase productivity and efficiency. 

Call us on 07 3724 0000 or visit www.rissb.com.au to find out more about our publications.

Name: Europorte
Description:
Europorte est l’entreprise ferroviaire de Getlink.

Europorte, la filiale du groupe spécialisée dans le fret ferroviaire, est le premier opérateur privé en France à avoir obtenu des pouvoirs publics la licence l’autorisant à développer des services de ce type dans l’ensemble de l’Union européenne.

Europorte comprend principalement 3 filiales commerciales : Europorte France, Europorte Services (la marque de Socorail) et Europorte Proximité.

Par son maillage dense sur le territoire français, Europorte se positionne comme un vecteur de croissance pour Getlink, en intervenant sur l'ensemble de la chaîne logistique du transport ferroviaire de marchandises, depuis la collecte et l'acheminement sur les réseaux secondaires et principaux (Europorte France), le chargement des wagons sur les embranchements privés des sites industriels jusqu'à leur déchargement (Europorte Services), la gestion des infrastructures ferroviaires (ports, sites industriels privés et parapublics) en France, mais aussi en Belgique et la maintenance de locomotives diesel (Europorte Proximité). Europorte conjointement ses différentes activités, très complémentaires, afin d'offrir à ses clients des solutions complètes et sur mesure, répondant à leurs attentes de chaînes logistiques intégrées et de haut niveau de qualité de service.

Name: Urbanloop
Description:
Transport autonome rapide sur rails. Trajets sans arrêt ni correspondance, avec prise en charge immédiate. Véhicules sans batterie !

Autonomous rapid transit on rails. No stop, no transfer routes with immediate pick-up. Vehicles without batteries!

Name: Fondazione FS Italiane
Description: La Fondazione FS italiane custodisce e gestisce il grande Patrimonio storico delle Ferrovie italiane

Name: GTS Rail
Description:
GTS Rail is the GTS group rail division, which has been operating in liberalized market since 2008.
Its mission consists in providing high quality and efficiency traction services both for goods and for passengers. Today's "real" level of liberalization allows to provide services only for goods. GTS services are addressed to any kind of train and customer.
GTS Rail aims at becoming a best practice in the railway world, which, unfortunately, is still characterised by the presence of public, semi-public, national and foreigner subjects.
Efficiency and quality are at the basis of our operational model: they do not remain abstract concepts, rather they pervade our everyday work, values and corporate culture. 
When thinking at railways, the ensuing image and sensation are negative, by definition, since many companies and people have experienced dramatic or even disastrous situations. GTS has the strong will to reverse the common idea of railways as a second-rate, low-quality and obsolete system.
We operate in a 100-years-old market showing a great potential, which has not managed to express itself yet. Suffice it to think that only 4% of goods is transported by train, and the transport of people is inefficient.
"GTS Rail perfectly knows which is the key factor to become a successful company. The railway world is characterised by an incredible passion: our aim is to let all of our co-workers express such passion. If we manage, this means we will have achieved our challenging goals".

Name: Porterbrook
Description: Delivering innovative, sustainable, and reliable rolling stock and asset management at the heart of Britain’s railway.

Name: SMART Transportation Division
Description:
We are the SMART Transportation Division, an AFL-CIO affiliate headquartered near Cleveland, Ohio. We are a broad-based, transportation labor union representing about 125,000 active and retired railroad, bus, mass transit and airline workers in the United States.

With offices in Cleveland and Washington, D.C., the SMART TD is the largest railroad operating union in North America, with more than 500 locals. The SMART TD (formerly UTU) represents employees on every Class I railroad, as well as employees on many regional and shortline railroads. It also represents bus and mass transit employees on approximately 45 bus and transit systems and has recently grown to include airline pilots, dispatchers and other airport personnel.

Disclaimer: SMART-TD reserves the right to remove any comments deemed inappropriate, inflammatory, untruthful, or for any other reason. SMART-TD also reserves the right to ban any commenters for inappropriate comments or for any other reason deemed necessary by SMART-TD. SMART-TD is in no way responsible for the comments posted on this page and the views expressed in the comments are those of the commenters.

Name: Compagnie des Signaux - CSEE
Description: Compagnie des Signaux, a MERMEC Group company, is a global provider of integrated rail transport solutions. We develop innovative and sustainable solutions in the fields of signaling, operation, service and maintenance, as well as digital technology and turnkey systems. The MERMEC Group is present in 21 countries and employs over 3,000 people worldwide.

Name: Ferrovie del Sud Est
Description:
Ferrovie del Sud Est è un operatore di servizi di trasporto passeggeri su ferro e su gomma, nato nel 1931 in Puglia. La sua rete ferroviaria, con 474 km di linea, costituisce, dopo le Ferrovie dello Stato (cui è interconnessa), la più estesa rete omogenea italiana.
Attraverso le quattro province meridionali della regione, collegando fra loro i capoluoghi di Bari, Taranto e Lecce, nonché 85 comuni del circondario, FSE da più di 80 anni è sinonimo di viaggio in Puglia, in treno o in autobus, per lavoro, studio o turismo. Il servizio di trasporto pubblico viene assicurato anche su gomma, ad integrazione di quello su rotaia, a servizio di oltre 130 comuni, da Bari sino a Gagliano del Capo. Nel corso del 2016, Ferrovie del Sud Est è entrata a far parte del Gruppo FS Italiane.

Name: Railway 200
Description:
In 2025 Railway 200 celebrates the 200th anniversary of the birth of the modern railway.  It showcases the role of rail in shaping Britain and the world. It also aims to inspire the next generation of pioneering talent to choose a career in rail, as the industry delivers a simpler, better railway for everyone.

Railway 200 will be a year-long campaign in 2025 of events, activities and other initiatives, delivered by a host of people and organisations around the UK.  Jump onboard and get involved!

On 27 September 1825 George Stephenson’s Locomotion No.1 hauled the world’s first steam-powered passenger train along the Stockton and Darlington railway; a distance of 26 miles.  This historic event, celebrated with great fanfare, is generally regarded as the start of the modern railway.

Name: Amaro
Description:
A leading provider of signalling, power, and telecoms services, we help some of the biggest names in rail, providing engineering and design support to their most complex and challenging projects.

Established in 2011, over the years we’ve forged a reputation for service, flexibility and excellence, offering a level of engineering and value rarely seen amongst our competitors.

Ultimately, however, it’s our team that sets us apart from the rest; a hugely experienced, dedicated group, committed to providing innovative and highly effective solutions to even the most complex of engineering challenges.

Since first opening our doors, we’ve gone from strength to strength, delivering award-winning projects, managing multiple high-profile frameworks and becoming a Network Rail Principal Contractor.

Name: GreenCityTrip
Description: Affordable and sustainable citybreaks by train. GreenCityTrip operates a network of beautiful European destinations and offers direct international rail connections since October 2021.

Name: Správa železnic, state organization
Description:
Pursuant to Act on Rail Systems, Správa železnic provides operation of the nation-wide and regional railways owned by the state, their operability, modernization and development to the extent necessary to ensure the transport needs of the state and transport services.

Správa železnic is the manager of assets comprising the railway infrastructure.

Name: East Japan Railway Company (JR East)
Description:
East Japan Railway Company (JR East) is one of the world’s largest railway companies and a market leader in railway operations and maintenance. Every day, our 44,000 dedicated employees efficiently operate and manage 11,800 trains and our 7,400-kilometer network, including Tokyo metropolitan, high-speed, and regional railways, with cutting-edge technology, serving 16 million passengers. Since our establishment in 1987, following the privatization of Japanese National Railways, we have continuously enhanced our railways to make them safer, more reliable, convenient, and sustainable.

The JR East Group is developing various businesses overseas, primarily in Asia, such as supporting the advancement of the Indian High-Speed Railway, providing rolling stock and maintenance services for the MRT Purple Line in Thailand, and providing technical support to a railway operator in Indonesia. By taking advantage of its combined strengths in the mobility and lifestyle solutions fields, the JR East Group will deploy railway infrastructure systems that have high levels of quality and efficiency and provide lifestyle-enriching solutions mainly in Asia but also in other regions.

Name: Trenitalia Tper
Description:
Due nomi una sola società: Trenitalia Tper (70% Trenitalia 30% Tper) è la nuova impresa ferroviaria che si è aggiudicata la gara europea, bandita dalla Regione Emilia Romagna, per la gestione del trasporto ferroviario regionale.
Con oltre 1450 dipendenti e la flotta di treni regionali più giovane d’Italia, garantisce ogni giorno 900 collegamenti: un’offerta capillare che copre tutta la regione con alcune estensioni Lombardia, Liguria, Piemonte, Veneto e Marche. Fino a 165mila persone trasportate giornalmente.

Name: InRail S.p.A.
Description:
InRail is an Italian railway undertaking providing freight transports in Italy, Slovenia and Croatia with its own locomotives and qualified Personnel.
The Company is part of Autobrennero Group since 2021 and numbers among its partners railway undertakings Rail Traction Company and Lokomotion.

Name: ERMEWA SA
Description:
70 years of expertise. Founded in 1956, Ermewa is a European leader in railcar leasing. The company offers a fleet of more than 50,000 wagons – covering 120 different types – serving freight forwarders, railway undertakings, and industrial players across all sectors: aggregates and worksites, automotive, chemicals, energy, grain, intermodal, palletized goods, steel, and more. It supplies wagons with proven designs and develops tailor‑made solutions to meet the specific requirements of each customer.

Committed to delivering the highest levels of performance and safety, Ermewa maintains close dialogue with its customers to provide innovation, optimal technical and economic solutions while ensuring the safe transport of goods. It thus contributes to the decarbonization of its customers’ supply chain.

Ermewa has been ECM-certified (Entity in Charge of Maintenance) since 2010.
As part of its governance, the company has implemented a Quality Management System certified under the ISO 9001 standard. For many years, its CSR performance has been recognized and awarded by EcoVadis.

Over the past seven decades, the company has expanded its presence across almost all European countries. Today, more than 270 experts work across 18 offices in 14 European countries.

Ermewa is a subsidiary of Streem, one of the world’s leading players in freight railcar and tank container leasing.

Name: Alpha Trains Group
Description:
Alpha Trains, headquartered in Luxembourg, is the leading lessor of rolling stock (passenger trains and locomotives) in Europe. More than 150 employees from 20 countries work in offices in Luxembourg, Antwerp, Cologne, Paris, Madrid and Warsaw. 

Alpha Trains owns more than 1000 locomotives and passenger trains and offers tailor-made leasing solutions, comprehensive know-how in maintenance and vehicle repairs as well as long-term experience in the financing of new build projects. With our current portfolio, we offer vehicles for a wide range of uses across 22 European countries. Alpha Trains' shareholders are APG, Arcus European Trains, PGGM and Swiss Life.

Name: RailwayPeople.com
Description: RailwayPeople.com ,  Search thousands of jobs on the worlds premier railway job site. Receive jobs by email. Register FREE today.

Name: American Short Line and Regional Railroad Association
Description: The American Short Line and Regional Railroad Association has been representing America's small-business short line railroads in Washington, DC for more than a century.

Name: MetroLink
Description:
MetroLink is the proposed high-capacity, high-frequency rail line running from Swords to Charlemont, linking Dublin Airport, Irish Rail, DART, Dublin Bus and Luas services, creating fully integrated public transport in the Greater Dublin Area. 

As well as linking major transport hubs, MetroLink will connect key destinations including Ballymun, the Mater Hospital, the Rotunda Hospital, Dublin City University and Trinity College Dublin.

Much of the 18.8 kilometre route will run underground, an exciting innovation for Irish public transport.

MetroLink will carry up to 53 million passengers annually, cutting journey times from Swords to the city centre to 25 minutes. It will change the way we travel – and how we live.

Follow us to keep abreast of activities including procurement announcements, consultations, updates on the project and articles we'll share about rail, transport in the Greater Dublin Area, reducing carbon emissions from transport and Project Ireland 2040, Ireland's capital investment and planning strategy.

Name: Getlink
Description:
On November 20th, Groupe Eurotunnel has changed its name to Getlink.

This new name, reflecting the dynamism of connection and exchange, marks the Group’s passage into an exciting new era for mobility infrastructures. 

Getlink now leads the businesses of four major commercial brands:
- Eurotunnel, the leader across the Channel with Eurotunnel Le Shuttle and Eurotunnel Le Shuttle Freight,
- Europorte, the leading private rail freight operator in France,
- ElecLink, the future electrical interconnector between the UK and France,
- CIFFCO, the leading private European railway training centre.

Each year, Getlink safely transports more than 22 million passengers, 1.7 million trucks, 2.7 million cars, almost 2 billion tonne-kilometres of freight and, soon, also 1 gigawatt of electricity.

Name: American Industrial Transport - AITX
Description: AITX helps freight customers keep assets moving where reliability and predictability matter most. By integrating leasing, fleet management, repair, and data transparency into a single operating platform, customers benefit from end-to-end railcar solutions that optimize efficiency and improve uptime. Through a network of owned full-service and mobile repair facilities, AITX serves as a long-term partner supporting resilient railcar operations across North America and Europe.

Name: DfT Operator
Description:
DfT Operator (DFTO) is the government’s public sector rail owning group. Our purpose is to bring all currently privately-owned train operators into public ownership in advance of the creation of Great British Railways in 2027.

DfT Operator (DFTO) is responsible for:
- unifying train operators under common ownership – DFTO was given this mandate after the Royal Assent of the Passenger Railway Services (Public Ownership) Bill 2024
- delivering high-performing, safe and reliable services for passengers and best value for taxpayers, through closer integration with Network Rail and partners

The group’s current train operating companies are: 
London North Eastern Railway (LNER)
Northern 
Southeastern 
TransPennine Express (TPE) 
South Western Railway (SWR) 
c2c
Greater Anglia
WM Trains (London Northwestern Railway and West Midlands Railway)

Name: CERTIFER
Description:
CERTIFER is a French railway certification agency established in 1997.

CERTIFER is a major global actor in the independent safety assessment and design checking of railway systems and guided transport (metros, trams, high speed lines) and special equipment (road/rail, piling and lifting).

Headquartered in Valenciennes (France), CERTIFER is present in 15 countries with subsidiaries in Algeria, Australia, Belgium, Brazil, China, France, Italy, Spain, Germany, Austria, The Netherlands, Sweden, Switzerland, Turkey and branch in UAE.

Name: Railserve, Inc.
Description:
With more than 40 years of experience, Railserve is the leading provider of industrial rail services in North America. Our Railserve team of 1,000+ trained personnel and 175+ owned and maintained locomotives, build upon our experience and best practices to safely and efficiently switch railcars, and move materials within industrial, manufacturing, production plants and railyards.

The core offerings of Railserve’s on-site railyard infrastructure management, maintenance and construction services include:
-	Industrial Rail Switching
-	Material Handling
-	Transloading 
-	Terminal Operations
-	Warehousing
-	Light Railcar Repair
-	Nested Track Maintenance

Railserve is part of Marmon Rail, the industry leader in railyard services including locomotive service, railroad track construction, railcar maintenance & repair, tank car manufacturing, leasing, and more. Together, we keep our world moving forward.

Learn more about Railserve at railserve.com.

Name: Vietnam Railway
Description: This page is designed to provide freely accessible and up-to-date information on railway development projects in Vietnam and around the world. It does not engage in economic disputes or endorse specific entities. The page disclaims all liability for any potential benefits or losses arising from the use or reliance on the information presented herein./.

Name: MxV Rail
Description:
MxV Rail is the world’s premier rail advisory because we have the expertise to keep our industry moving forward. 
Toward safer equipment and people. More transformative technology. Toward more efficient operations and fewer emissions. We are driven to keep our industry, our clients and the best ideas moving forward. For decades, the world’s railways have counted on our team of experts to advance our industry, our clients, and the best ideas. We help set the standards. 
MxV Rail is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Association of American Railroads (AAR).

Name: Trenes Argentinos Capital Humano
Description: Desarrollo y transferencia de conocimiento y cultura ferroviaria en los RRHH/técnicos del Sistema Ferroviario Nacional.

Name: Asia Era One
Description:
REIMAGINING THAILAND TO OPEN A NEW CHAPTER FOR THE WORLD, AND INTERCONNECTING ASIA TO BECOMES ONE. 

Asia Era One Co., Ltd is the Interconnecting Mobility Operator of the High-Speed Rail Linking Three airports (Donmuang, Suvranabhumi and U-Tapao) and the City Line Linking to Airport which being the major transport infrastructure development of Eastern Economic Corridor (EEC) investment zone. 

Asia Era One speed up progress of Thai nation by accelerating mobility and building interconnectivity between towns airports and cities, supporting rural and urban people and communities push through the barriers of distance. We also be part of EEC that interconnects main transportation route in Asia to draw people, and businesses from across the world to participate in the vibrant opportunities of Thailand. 

ศูนย์กลางการเดินทางของเอเชีย รถไฟความเร็วสูงขับเคลื่อนไทยสู่ยุคใหม่แห่งอนาคตและความยั่งยืน

บริษัท เอเชีย เอรา วัน จำกัด เป็นผู้ให้บริการการเชื่อมต่อเดินทางสู่ยุคใหม่ ผ่านเครือข่ายการเดินทางด้วยรถไฟความเร็วสูงเชื่อมต่อสามสนามบิน (ดอนเมือง สุวรรณภูมิ และอู่ตะเภา) และรถไฟเส้นทางเมืองที่เชื่อมสนามบิน ซึ่งเป็นโครงการในการพัฒนาโครงสร้างพื้นฐานหลักการพัฒนาเขตพัฒนาพิเศษภาคตะวันออก (Eastern Economic Corridor: EEC) เอเชีย เอรา วัน ศูนย์กลางการเดินทางแห่งเอเชีย ที่จะนำประเทศไทยสู่ยุคใหม่แห่งโอกาสและความเจริญรุ่งเรือง ในฐานะผู้นำด้านเทคโนโลยีการเดินทางรถไฟความเร็วสูงระดับโลกและเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของ EEC เรามุ่งมั่นเชื่อมประเทศไทยกับเอเชียให้เป็นหนึ่งเดียว เชื่อมต่อคุณค่าจากเมืองสู่เมือง, เชื่อมชุมชน, เชื่อมจังหวัดท้องถิ่น และเชื่อมผู้คนจากทั่วโลกให้เดินทางด้วยความรวดเร็วถึงกัน เพื่อประโยชน์ต่อประเทศและคุณภาพชีวิตประชาชน และเพื่อความภูมิใจของคนไทยทุกคน
Location: เขตห้วยขวาง , กรุงเทพมหานคร

Name: Railpool
Description:
RAILPOOL is one of the leading railway vehicle leasing companies offering real expertise for full service from a single source. The company was founded in Munich in 2008 and now operates in 19 European countries.

RAILPOOL is one of the largest providers in Europe with around 500 locomotives and 148 passenger vehicles and an investment total of around 2.3 billion euro. The RAILPOOL fleet covers 85,000,000 kilometers every year and makes an important contribution to the modal shift to rail. RAILPOOL has its own warehouse with more than 4,000 different spare parts and components of an investment value of around 20 million Euros.

RAILPOOL. Flexibility For Rent

Name: ETF Services
Description:
Feroway, la marque d'ETF qui regroupe les activités de conception de systèmes de sécurité ferroviaire, depuis la préparation des travaux, en passant par l’acheminement du matériel, jusqu’à la sécurisation des chantiers. 

Nous proposons une offre multi-métiers : 
-	Conduite des trains de travaux
-	Acheminement des engins (France)
-	Sécurisation des chantiers (annonce humaine, Agent LAM)
-	Gestion de bases arrières 
-	Accompagnement des trains de travaux en zone de chantier (ATTX)
-	Sécurisation électrique (perchage)
-	Formation travaux et tâches essentielles de sécurité
-	Poste de commandement H24 et 7j/7

Ces missions, nous les assumons en favorisant naturellement la régularité, la ponctualité mais surtout et l’intégrité physique des Femmes et des Hommes sur le terrain. Nous le faisons en déployant une culture de la sécurité à tous les niveaux, renforcée par la qualité de notre dispositif de formation et un robuste Système de Management de la Sécurité.

Name: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Limited
Description:
Texmaco has been consistently the best performer in the Industry & stood out as the market leader. One out of every four freight cars running on Indian rail-roads has rolled out of Texmaco Works. These comprise both conventional & custom-built wagons, catering to diverse requirements, such as Petroleum. Chemicals, Cement, Alumina and Transformers etc.
Currently, the company has taken the lead in turning out the New Generation, Commodity-Specific and High Payload Freight Cars in Stainless Steel construction for Indian Railways.

Name: ARADHNA ENGINEERING WORKS
Description: Operating for over 40 years, Aradhana Engineering Works is the one-stop-shop for all your engineering, manpower, business solutions, technical consultancy, spare parts and consumables requirements in the field of railway/ metro management and operations. The quality of our service speaks for itself. We are committed to provide 24/7 service 365 days a year.

Name: Matterhorn Gotthard Bahn
Description:
Die Matterhorn Gotthard Bahn (MGBahn) gehört zur BVZ Bahngruppe.

Die BVZ-Gruppe erbringt öffentliche Verkehrs- und Tourismusdienstleistungen in den Kantonen Wallis, Uri und Graubünden. Das Kerngeschäft besteht aus dem Regionalverkehr der MGBahn zwischen Disentis bzw. Göschenen und Zermatt sowie dem Zugshuttle Täsch–Zermatt, dem Autoverlad am Furkapass und den Gütertransporten zwischen Visp und Zermatt. (Service Public).

Die touristischen Angebote rund um die international bekannten Topmarken Gornergrat und Glacier Express der Immobilienbereich sowie die Beteiligungen an der Matterhorn Terminal AG Täsch und Zermatt Bergbahnen AG bilden den privatwirtschaftlichen und gewinnorientierten Sektor der Gruppe.

Die BVZ-Holding erwirtschaftete 2024 einen Umsatz von über CHF 200 Mio. und beschäftigte mehr als 700 Mitarbeitende. Die Transportdienstleistungen der Bahnen wurden von mehr als 10 Millionen Reisenden genutzt.

Name: National Egyptian Railway Industries Company (NERIC)
Description:
A private joint-venture company formed by a group of Egyptian companies in partnership with Governmental entities. The main objective of the company is to establish a rolling stock plant in a prospective area of tentatively 300,000 m2 located in East Port Said Industrial which is part of the Suez Canal Economic Zone.

NERIC plant will be a major milestone in Egypt’s strategic industrialization plan in general, and the rolling stock sector to achieve the goals set forth in Vision 2030. A great number of new railway infrastructure projects are currently under study, designing or in execution phase, which demonstrates the increasing role that the railway sector will play in the coming years.

NERIC seeks the development of the rolling stock manufacturing value chain locally through deepening the localization of certain components with the support from the international OEM’s.

Name: KTM Berhad
Description: KTMB is Malaysia’s leading rail transport industry player, moving passengers and cargo throughout Peninsular Malaysia.

Name: Schweizerische Südostbahn AG
Description:
Die SOB ist eine innovative, regionalverankerte  und unabhängige Bahnunternehmung im Raum Zentralschweiz – Ostschweiz. Sie bietet attraktive, sichere und zukunftsorientierte Verkehrsangebote.

Unser grösstes Anliegen ist die optimale Betreuung unserer Kunden. Mit modernem Rollmaterial, schnellen, pünktlichen Verbindungen und modernen Infrastrukturen bauen wir unser Angebot und die Frequenzen kontinuierlich aus.

Name: NS International
Description:
Wanneer u met de trein de grens over reist, komt u terecht bij NS International. Wij zorgen ervoor dat u naar duizenden Europese bestemmingen kunt reizen. NS International staat voor zorgeloos reizen: snel, gemakkelijk en comfortabel.
 
NS International is onderdeel van de Nederlandse Spoorwegen. 
Meer inzicht in zaken als woonwerk-verkeer en zakelijke mobiliteit? Volg de Nederlandse Spoorwegen op LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/company/NederlandseSpoorwegen

Name: TransPod
Description:
TransPod is pioneering a new era of high-speed transportation focusing on innovation, sustainability, and efficiency. Our mission is to develop the next generation of ground transportation systems, offering faster, cleaner, and more affordable alternatives to traditional travel.

At the forefront of this transformation is the TransPod Line, a groundbreaking hyperloop system designed to move passengers and cargo at speeds exceeding 1000 km/h. We aim to reduce travel time between cities through advanced technologies and renewable energy integration, cut carbon emissions, and promote economic growth.

With a global team of engineers, scientists, and industry leaders, TransPod is committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that shape the future of mobility. Join us in creating a more connected and sustainable world.

Name: DB Cargo Italia
Description: Joint Venture between DB Cargo Group and FNM Group

Name: SEP Rail Services
Description:
A unique pre-construction services company, we work with contractors, consultants, construction firms and more, measuring, modelling and engineering the nation’s railways.

Working hand in hand with our clients and partners, we’ve built our reputation upon the quality, reliability and flexibility of our service, developing innovative solutions to complex problems whilst making tomorrow’s railway a better place. With over 80% of our work based upon repeat business, we must be doing something right…

Part of the SEP group, we’ve been adding value to our clients’ projects for over 30 years. Indeed, as one of the UK’s fastest growing railway surveying firms, each year we deliver yet more projects for rail clients throughout the country.

Far from being your run-of-the-mill surveying company, we support our clients throughout the lifetime of their projects, providing the support and information they need to make the right decisions.

A genuinely diverse organisation, we offer a fully integrated, turnkey solution to our clients’ problems, adding value at each and every stage of the operation. In doing so, we help deliver the safe, compliant and timely outcome that they would naturally expect. More often than not, however, we also save them both time and money in the process, exposing efficiencies they didn’t even know existed.

To learn more about SEP Rail Services or to request a quotation, why not get in touch? You can call 01904 403 322, email info@seprail.co.uk or connect with us via LinkedIn.

Name: Sensonic
Description:
Sensonic monitors railway infrastructure via Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS). We combine advanced fiber optic sensing technology with Artificial Intelligence (AI) to turn optical fibres into vibration sensors that gather critical infrastructure information along their length. 

A multitude of insights are revealed, including monitoring of track condition, alerting of landslides and rockfalls, identifying security threats and more. 
 
Sensonic is shaping the future of railway intelligence, delivering insights that enable better railway decisions.

Name: Italcertifer S.p.A.
Description:
L’attività di Italcertifer si pone all’interno del più ampio quadro della liberalizzazione del trasporto ferroviario europeo. l’Unione Europea, sin dai primi anni novanta, ha messo tra i propri obiettivi anche quello di promuovere un mercato comune del trasporto ferroviario. Al riguardo avvia una serie di importanti processi di riforme che, passando per la liberalizzazione dei singoli mercati ferroviari nazionali, puntano alla creazione di un unico grande mercato ferroviario su scala europea, il più possibile libero da norme e particolarismi regionali e soprattutto interoperabile tra i vari stati membri.
Uno dei punti cardine della liberalizzazione del mercato è l’assessment di conformità, alle STI (Specifiche Tecniche di Interoperabilità) ed ai requisiti di sicurezza applicabili ai vari sottosistemi che compongono il sistema ferroviario condotto da un soggetto terzo e indipendente, qualificato dagli Stati Membri in base a criteri definiti nelle Direttive di settore.

Name: CIRO | Chartered Institution of Railway Operators
Description:
The Chartered Institution of Railway Operators (CIRO) was launched in 2000 and exists for its members and the rail industry, promoting best practice and representing the interests of railway operators at all levels. 

We are a focal point for raising standards through operational training, sharing knowledge and expertise to provide our members with the very best developmental opportunities. We also deliver a range of career enhancing courses tailored specifically to the needs of the industry, all of which lead to internationally recognised qualifications.

Seen as the organisation of choice for those seeking to develop their career within the rail sector, membership of the CIRO opens the door to a wealth of professional expertise and networking opportunities.

On the 1st of October 2021 the Institution was granted Royal Chartered status by her Majesty the Queen in recognition of the contribution of the organisation to the Rail industry and its value to it's continued success.

Name: South Florida Regional Transportation Authority / Tri-Rail
Description:
Tri-Rail is Southeast Florida’s commuter rail line, which runs through 19 stations on the 73.5-mile South Florida Rail Corridor between Miami and Mangonia Park. The name refers to the three counties through which the line passes: Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach. Tri-Rail is operated by the South Florida Regional Transportation Authority, an agency of the State of Florida. 

Tri-Rail had its origins when, in 1989 it began to operate as a temporary commuter rail service while construction crews widened Interstate 95 and the parallel Florida’s Turnpike. In 2003, the Florida Legislature transformed the Tri-County Commuter Rail Authority (Tri-Rail) into the South Florida Regional Transportation Authority (SFRTA).

The Authority was created with a vision to provide greater mobility in South Florida, thereby improving the economic viability and quality of life of the community, region and state. The Authority’s mission is to coordinate, develop and implement a viable regional transportation system in South Florida that endeavors to meet the desires and needs for the movement of people, goods and services. The SFRTA currently operates Tri-Rail, which spans Palm Beach, Broward, and Miami-Dade counties. Additional regional services may be added in the future.

Tri-Rail values your comments, conversations and participation through our social media networks. It is our policy to hide comments containing abusive language or those deemed off topic, including commercial solicitations.

Name: CARGOUNIT
Description: CARGOUNIT is a leading locomotive leasing business in CEE. We have got in our fleet almost 240 units including electric and diesel traction locomotives, as well as diesel shunting locomotives. Our clients are major industrial groups in Poland and leading rail freight operators in Central and Eastern Europe. We offer tailor-made leasing solutions which range from wet, through soggy to dry lease solutions. We are one-stop shop with various locomotive types our customers need in their daily operations.

Name: Revue Générale des Chemins de Fer
Description: Écrite par des experts, la revue offre chaque mois un panorama d’analyses du secteur ferroviaire.

Name: ERR European Rail Rent GmbH
Description:
ERR European Rail Rent is a freight wagon rental company with a fleet consisting of more than 7,500 railcars. Based out of Duisburg (Germany), ERR offers a full-range service, providing e.g. intermodal wagons, standard freight wagons, bulk freight and sliding wall wagons. 
The vision of a modern fleet drives ERR every day anew: customers benefit from the constant expansion of the wagon stock and the enhancement of existing types of wagons. In 2018. ERR took a big step forward by purchasing 500 tank wagons. A consistent step on the road to being a partner in all segments.
ERR customers include companies from almost every industrial sector, for example the steel, paper, petro/chem and agricultural industries.

Name: Modern Railway Systems
Description:
Modern Railway Systems is committed to provide each of our customers with the most innovative, cost-effective and safest systems available. Our commitment is to implement these systems in such a manner as to minimize impacts to existing operations and to strive to have our team members function as an integrated team with our customers, their representatives and other contractors involved in our projects.

Our team of seasoned experts deliver a wide range of services to customers in the rail transportation industry. Our primary focus is the train control disciplines, but our capabilities extend to the communications, power distribution and rail operations disciplines as well.

Name: Virginia Railway Express (VRE)
Description:
Virginia Railway Express (VRE) is Virginia’s only commuter rail system serving the Northern Virginia and Washington, D.C. area since 1992. Our service reaches as far west as Manassas and as far south as Spotsylvania County running parallel to the I-95/395 and I-66 Corridors of Statewide Significance (CoSS). 

VRE’s two lines—the 60-mile Fredericksburg Line and the 35-mile Manassas Line—provide direct access to jobs in Alexandria, Arlington, and Washington, DC. VRE provides safe, cost-effective, accessible, reliable, convenient, and customer responsive services to its riders. VRE is jointly operated by the Northern Virginia Transportation Commission (NVTC) and the Potomac and Rappahannock Transportation Commission (PRTC).

Name: RailPulse
Description: RailPulse is a coalition of forward-thinking railcar owners who have joined together to facilitate and accelerate the adoption of GPS and other telematics technology across the North American railcar network to significantly increase visibility, efficiency, and safety. We are creating a new railcar telematics technology platform that will transform rail shipping and enhance the customer experience for companies reliant on our mode to move their goods.

Name: Crossrail Benelux NV
Description: Crossrail Benelux NV is a private Belgian railway company with offices in Belgium and Germany. It provides safe, cost-efficient and high-quality traction services within the framework of the crosser border products of BLS Cargo on the Belgium - Germany - Switzerland - Italy - Corridor and on other Corridors. Sole shareholder of Crossrail NV is Swiss BLS Cargo AG. Our passionate and international team daily creates competitive advantages because we are safe, reliable, customer-focused, lean, innovative and a great team of talented experts. Leadership and commitment as well as appreciative corporate culture, cost-consciousness and entrepreneurial action are our basic attitudes.

Name: Trans-Global Solutions, Inc.
Description:
TGS, a division of Trans-Global Solutions, Inc., is a fully-integrated rail service organization and a leader in the industry. Formerly Econo-Rail Corporation, TGS began in 1976 with the mission to provide superior quality service, safely and reliably.

Industry must connect with mainline railroads. as well as, switch and move cars within their facilities. While these are non-core activities, it is absolutely imperative that these functions work reliably, safely and efficiently, often around the clock.
