We understand the importance for businesses to have access to reliable railroad transportation to get their products to market as quickly and efficiently as possible. We are the single source for all railroad-related services:

- Third-Party Switching Operations
- Safe and Reliable Rail Car Storage Facilities
- Nationwide Rail Car and Locomotive Leasing & Maintenance
- Railroad Construction
- Railroad Repair and Maintenance Services
- Bulk Terminal Development
- Management Services

TGS is the railroad contractor of choice for many Fortune 500 companies. TGS has the expertise to manage complex rail construction and maintenance. For experienced rail contractors, let TGS be your trusted partner.

Name: DigiRail - Formations et expertises ferroviaires
Description:
DigiRail aborde les formations ferroviaires avec une nouvelle approche pédagogique.
Celle-ci associée au progrès en neurosciences et en I.A. a pour objectif d'améliorer la performance de ses formations.

Name: MOTION
Description:
Motion Rail LTD provides specialist Railway Communication services nationwide on Network Rail and London Overground Infrastructure. We employ a workforce comprising of teams of highly skilled operational communication engineers specialising in the following fields;

Telecoms PICOT/CRE, IRSE, TMTH , Signalling TIC, FTN & Legacy Transmission systems & Bearer Circuits, Fibre optic and Copper network cabling, Modems, Ethernet, CISCO, Keymile, VoIP, Concentrator Systems, Telephone systems, GSMR, CCTV, SISS, DOO, PA, Help Points, Battery Support and UPS.

Motion also provide Rail Electrical services and are an NICEIC approved contractor.

Motion hold Licences for Hazardous waste disposal and are carriers specialising in battery and commercial project waste.

Motion also employ approved IRSE Work place assessors, Competence assessors & Technical Mentors

Motion carry out  Survey, Design, Installation, Test and Commission and Decommissioning works on Operational Railway Comms systems including;
Major FTN projects, Re signalling Re Control, Platform extension, Station Remodelling,Migration works, Lift and Shift, Legacy Equipment, E&P, Air conditioning/forced ventilation and Civils. 

We are proud to be accredited  and hold 5 Star RISQS status, as a contactor Motion rail hold an Rail Contractors Certification (RCC)
 We are approved suppliers direct to Network Rail, McNicholas Construction, Bam Nuttal, Atkins, Optilan, Colas, Amey, Alan Dick ADUK, Kellys, Eric Wright Engineering, Costain, Fourway communications, Rail Electrical Services and CGR amongst others.

Name: For.Fer Srl
Description:
For.Fer è Centro di Formazione riconosciuto da ANSF con lo scopo di erogare corsi finalizzati all’ottenimento e al mantenimento delle abilitazioni e competenze per il personale impiegato in attività di sicurezza della circolazione ferroviaria quali: condotta dei treni; formazione dei treni,  accompagnamento dei treni, verifica dei veicoli e manutenzione dei veicoli (nel rispetto del Decreto 10 agosto 2007 n.162).
For.Fer ha sede a Roma. Il suo centro consta di aule didattiche in grado di ospitare rispettivamente 25 e 30 partecipanti, attrezzate con i più moderni sistemi audiovisivi. 
For.Fer è inoltre già in grado di offrire percorsi di formazione aziendale, manageriale e tecnico/professionale attraverso l’erogazione di corsi quali: cultura ferroviaria; tecnica delle circolazione ferroviaria; impianti di segnalamento ferroviario; armamento ferroviario; materiale rotabile; analisi del rischio in ambito ferroviario

Name: GTS Rail Operations Limited
Description: GTS is a new company formed to operate the Elizabeth line on behalf of Transport for London (TfL) — powered by decades of expertise from Go-Ahead, Tokyo Metro, and Sumitomo.

Name: Leo Express
Description:
Leo Express is a carrier that has been operating modern trains on important long-distance routes in the Czech Republic and Slovakia since 2012.  Since 2018, the company also connects Prague and Krakow in Poland with regular trains.  In 2019, the company also launched a regional train service in the Pardubice Region. 

Leo Express also operates a bus service currently connecting Slovakia and Ukraine. 

For the latest jobs at Leo Express, please visit www.le.com/kariera.

Name: Asociación Mexicana de Ferrocarriles
Description:
Trabajamos para impulsar el desarrollo del transporte ferroviario en el país, promoviendo una infraestructura moderna, segura y sostenible que contribuya a la competitividad, la eficiencia logística y el bienestar de la sociedad mexicana.

Como asociación, colaboramos con autoridades gubernamentales, empresas del sector, y organismos internacionales para fomentar una industria ferroviaria innovadora y eficiente, que sea clave para el crecimiento económico y la sostenibilidad ambiental.

Name: VINSPEED
Description:
VinSpeed is at the forefront of revolutionizing Vietnam’s high-speed rail sector. We are driven by a bold mission to modernize transportation infrastructure, master advanced technologies, foster supporting industries, and cultivate a highly skilled technical workforce. 

With a vision to become a regional leader, VinSpeed is not just constructing railways - we are shaping the future of mobility. 

Join us on this meaningful journey, where ambitious goals meet real opportunities for growth, leadership, and impact.

Name: SEP Rail Engineering
Description:
Rail projects demand a complex mix of skills and insights – from initial strategy and economics, through to engineering, people-centred design, operations and asset management.

Success depends on bringing all of these elements together – brilliantly. That’s why our technical expertise is always backed by sharp strategic thinking, whether we’re optimising existing assets and services, or designing and building whole new railways.

Our vision is to be a leading supplier of engineering services to the rail industry whilst ensuring safety and technical excellence is at the heart of everything we deliver.

Name: CargoNet AS
Description:
Intermodal transport based on rail is our core business. Our customers are carriers, freight forwarders, shipping companies and logistics companies. In 2014, CargoNet relieved the roads in Norway of about 525 articulated lorries every day, throughout the year.  

Our shuttle trains carry trailers, swap bodies and containers from 20 to 45 feet as well as tanks. CargoNet carries freight for industry and commerce in an efficient shuttle net of intermodal terminals in Norway with connections to/from Sweden and the rest of Europe.

Name: InoRail
Description:
InoRail Limited was formed in 2015 as a specialist rail engineering and design consultancy bringing together individuals with extensive experience across all rail infrastructure types, including intercity, suburban, freight, light rail, metro, stations and depots. This experience has been gained working nationally throughout the UK and internationally on commissions in the Middle East and Asia.

Our product offering encompasses railway systems consultancy, focusing upon track and civil engineering. This is complimented by a Construction Management capability, with further expertise in Project and Engineering Management. Our key service streams can be categorised as follows;

• Consultancy & Infrastructure Design
• Project and Engineering Services
• Infrastructure Survey and Gauging

InoRail is able to provide a comprehensive multi-disciplinary through-life design service, from feasibility, through design, development and construction. We are able to offer fully integrated design solutions from initial scope definition following the design stage gates as prescribed by Network Rail’s GRIP guidelines.

Our aim is to provide a specialised and client-focused service, delivering technical excellence through robust partnering, design integration and agile working. We are able to work collaboratively as part of larger integrated project teams and can coordinate and deliver cost effective bespoke solutions in a pragmatic manner.

The business is able to mobilise at short notice and has experience delivering projects in the most challenging environments. We are committed to technological developments, deploying the latest technology and techniques to maximise efficiency and quality.

We are confident that if you choose to work with InoRail Limited we will deliver a level of service where the whole is much greater than the sum of its parts

Name: NRE A TRM Equity Company
Description: NRE, headquartered in Mt. Vernon, Illinois, is a vertically integrated provider of new and remanufactured locomotives, locomotive products and wheel services. Founded in 1984 by Lawrence Beal, NRE has grown to encompass fifteen facilities and affiliates making it the world's largest independent supplier of new and remanufactured locomotives; new and rebuilt mechanical materials; electrical components; technical support and field services. NRE continues its history of solid growth using its highly skilled workforce and state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities to provide quality products and services to its customers worldwide.

Name: Rail Link
Description:
As professionals in the rail industry, we understand its unique demands. Leveraging this expertise, we created Rail Link, networking events designed to connect key stakeholders in the rail sector and facilitate strategic relationship-building and business opportunities.

Our venues offer unparalleled environments for professional networking. With the addition of industry leading talks preceding each event, Rail Link serves as the ideal platform for industry connections.

We aim to welcome railway and building services companies of all sizes throughout Europe, supporting the renewal of existing connections and the formation of new business relationships. Rail Link provides businesses in the rail and building services supply chains with a unique opportunity to present their services and products to a targeted audience at a competitive cost. Industry leaders send procurement managers to this event to discover innovative solutions and new suppliers.

Exhibitors are invited to book a stand by contacting us via email. Each stand includes a 6ft table, tablecloth, and two chairs, with space for pop-up banners and product displays. Larger spaces are available upon request.

Expo attendance is free. To optimise networking opportunities, all staff from exhibiting and visiting companies must register for the event. Registered attendees will receive identification badges via email. Visitor registration for our events are now open at https://www.eventbrite.ie/o/94931792223

Please note that while there is a fee for exhibitor spaces and talks access, visitor registration is complimentary. There are no restrictions on the number of staff attendees, allowing companies to fully maximise networking potential.

Name: ASAVRAIL
Description:
ASAVRAIL is a specialist rail engineering consultancy delivering Design, Engineering Management, Project Management, and Resource Management for Railway Systems and Electrical Power (E&P) across the UK, Ireland, and international rail markets.

We support single-discipline and multi-discipline rail projects, combining delivery capability with strong engineering governance, technical assurance, and compliance oversight to ensure safe, coordinated, and reliable outcomes.

ASAVRAIL has award-winning expertise in Rail Engineering and the Digital Railway, with recognised capability in Railway Signalling Power Systems and Trackside LV Systems, supported by wider experience across Signalling, Telecoms, Civils & Structures, and Systems Integration.

Design activities are delivered through a combination of in-house capability and trusted specialist partners, enabling scalable delivery while maintaining technical control, quality, and accountability.

In addition to delivery services, ASAVRAIL provides Design Technical Assurance, competence and compliance management, engineering governance, and technical interface management, supporting effective integration of systems, products, and innovations into operational railways.

ASAVRAIL is the founder and organiser of the Rail Technical Conference (RTC) and actively supports the rail workforce through CPD, technical collaboration, and knowledge-sharing initiatives with industry experts, manufacturers, and supply-chain partners.

With over 25 years of engineering experience, ASAVRAIL delivers rail projects with a balance of practical delivery capability and technical authority, supporting safe, compliant, and confident project outcomes.

Name: NAH.SH GmbH
Description:
Die NAH.SH GmbH ist der Verkehrsverbund für Schleswig-Holstein. Ziel der NAH.SH GmbH ist es, Bahn und Bus im echten Norden weiter voran zu bringen und mit anderen Verkehrsmitteln zu verknüpfen.
Natürlich hat die NAH.SH GmbH auch einen langen Namen: Nahverkehrsverbund Schleswig-Holstein GmbH.

Name: Zonegreen
Description:
With more than 25 years’ experience delivering rail depot and workshop safety technology, Zonegreen has established an unrivalled reputation for quality, safety and reliability.

Zonegreen is part of the Sentric group, which consists of three additional sister companies - Kirk in the US, Castell in the UK and STI in France. Sentric group produces uncompromising safety solutions for businesses whose people and equipment operate in harsh and safety critical environments. 
Sentric group is part of the Halma Group. 

TOGETHER FOR A SAFER TOMORROW 
Our brands and businesses have been leading the industry in keeping people safe at work in their sectors for over 100 years. Together we have the expertise and experience to help our customers reduce risk, keep costs down and businesses protected and compliant. But most importantly, ensuring everyone gets home safe at the end of the day. 

NO COMPROMISE ON SAFETY 
We believe there is no place for compromise when it comes to ensuring safety in harsh and safety-critical work environments.

To learn more about Zonegreen visit our websites: 
www.zonegreen.com 
www.sentricsafetygroup.com 
www.halma.com

Name: G3A Multimodal Transport
Description:
G3A was founded in 2023 and is focused on multimodal transportation and storage services across Egypt for best practice processes and solutions.  
Our client base consists of other medium and enterprise-sized businesses as well as local and government organizations.
Our services include:
•	Multimodal Transportation
•	Storage services

Name: Kevin Speed
Description: Up to you to design your life with high speed for every day

Name: ERFA-European Rail Freight Association
Description:
ERFA – the voice of rail new entrants
 
ERFA today represents 32 private and independent railway companies from across Europe, who operate across the European network. The association represents the whole value chain of rail transportation:
- Freight Railway undertakings
- Wagon keepers
- Freight forwarders
- Leasing companies
- National rail associations
- Intermodal operators

The association was established in Brussels in 2002 by a handful of new rail freight operators. It was established as the voice of new entrants to support the European vision for a liberalised railway market.  
All ERFA members share a commitment to work towards a non-discriminatory, competitive and innovative Single European Railway market by promoting attractive, fair and transparent market conditions for all rail enterprises.

Name: CRWS - Canadian Railway Services
Description: Canadian Railway Services is a consulting engineering firm specialized in railway rolling stock. Our team has expertise in design and repair of car structures and related equipment. CRWS can provide a multitude of design and engineering support and solutions. From car interior design to onsite inspections, CRWS can get the job done.

Name: PKP CARGO INTERNATIONAL Group
Description: PKP CARGO INTERNATIONAL is an important provider of international rail and multimodal transport in Central Europe. As part of one of Europe’s largest logistics networks, we deliver reliable, efficient freight services with a focus on sustainability. We operate our own terminal in Paskov, serve rail sidings, and have in-house facilities for wagon and locomotive repairs. Our experienced team offers comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to our clients' needs.

Name: Westbahn
Description: Die Westbahn bietet die schnellsten Verbindungen zu den günstigsten Ticketpreisen. Entdecken Sie die Städte Wien, St. Pölten, Amstetten, Linz, Wels, Vöcklabruck, Salzburg, Innsbruck, Kufstein, Wörgl, Stuttgart, Lindau, St. Johann im Pongau, Saalfelden, Rosenheim oder München. Informieren Sie sich auch über unsere neuen Ziele im Bundesland Vorarlberg in den österreichischen Alpen. Von Wien aus fährt unsere moderne und schnelle Westbahn InterCity-Flotte im 30-Minuten-Takt ab Wien Westbahnhof.

Name: Affective Rail
Description:
Affective Rail is one of the leading Rail Infrastructure Maintenance Contractors in NSW. Our Organisation is strong in resources, equipment, experience & people.  
Affective Rail proudly employs a team of over 100 highly qualified and experienced staff. Led by a management team of over 40 years combined experience, we deliver a service that is superior, environmentally sustainable and safe.

Name: db gebrauchtzug | db usedtrain
Description:
Willkommen bei DB Gebrauchtzug – Ihrem Partner für gebrauchte Schienenfahrzeuge.
 
Seit 2014 bieten wir eine breite Palette an gebrauchten Schienenfahrzeugen für den Personenverkehr an. Ob Sie Ihre Flotte erweitern oder kurzfristige Lösungen benötigen, wir haben die passenden Fahrzeuge für Ihren Regel- oder Sonderverkehr im Nah- und Fernverkehr.
Wir unterstützen Sie nicht nur bei der Auswahl der richtigen Bauart / Baureihe, sondern begleiten Sie auch während des gesamten Projektverlaufes. Ob geplante Umbauarbeiten oder ein Transport abseits der Schiene – wir beraten Sie gerne und finden mit Ihnen zusammen eine gemeinsame Lösung. 
 
Gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden haben wir in der Vergangenheit bereits viele interessante Projekte umgesetzt, wie z. B. den Transport von Reisezugwagen über den Seeweg nach Afrika oder die kurzfristige Verstärkung des Ferienverkehrs an die Ostsee im Sommer.
 
Wir haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, die Zuverlässigkeit auf der Schiene stetig zu erhöhen. Um Ihnen bei einem Fahrzeugmangel eine geeignete Mobilitätslösung anbieten zu können, stehen für Sie auch in diesem Fall verschiedene Fahrzeugtypen, im Rahmen der Vermietung, zur Verfügung.
 
Jedoch kann auch ein Fahrzeugüberschuss zur Last werden und hierfür bieten wir Ihnen die Vermarktung Ihrer Schienenfahrzeuge über unsere Vertriebsstrukturen an. Wir vermarkten Ihr Fahrzeug im Rundum-sorglos-Paket, damit Sie sich weiterhin auf den operativen Eisenbahnbetrieb konzentrieren können.
 
Entdecken Sie unsere Produkte in den Bereichen Fahrzeugverkauf, Vermietung und der Vermarktung Ihrer Fahrzeuge. Unser Ziel ist es, den Lebenszyklus gebrauchter Schienenfahrzeuge zu verlängern und damit die Mobilitätswende nachhaltig zu unterstützen.

Name: South African Heavy Haul Association
Description:
The South African Heavy Haul Association (SAHHA) is a non profit organisation that is dedicated to the pursuit of excellence in heavy haul railway operations, engineering, maintenance and technology in South Africa. It strives to accomplish this mission through the acquisition of knowledge by organizing regional forums and events.
SAHHA is a local chapter of the 43-year-old International Heavy Association (IHHA), whose mission is dedicated to the pursuit of excellence in Heavy Haul operations, engineering, maintenance and technology.
The International Heavy Haul Association (IHHA) is a worldwide non-governmental, scientific and technological association of heavy haul railways and their advocates. The IHHA is incorporated as a not-for-profit association.

Name: Northern Plains Rail Services
Description:
Northern Plains Railroad (NPR) began operations in January of 1997 on a railroad branch formerly known as the "Wheat Lines" and has grown tremendously since our beginning. We now lease 388 miles of branch line track in North Dakota and Minnesota from Canadian Pacific Railway (CPR), and operate lines owned by Mohall Railroad, Inc. (MRI), and Mohall Central Railroad, Inc. (MHC), which were purchased from the Burlington Northern Santa Fe (BNSF).  

Northern Plains Rail Services  - Based in the Midwest, we serve both the US and Canada, offering a full line of services to assist you in track maintenance, rehab projects, rail car and locomotive repairs and maintenance, along with industrial switching services.  We are a full service railroad company.

Name: Rotterdam Rail Feeding B.V.
Description:
Rotterdam Rail Feeding (RRF) is a railroad company specialized in high quality short line and feeder rail services. Our highly flexible and skilled employees are one of our biggest strengths. With our dedicated locomotives equipped with the required safety systems we operate in the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium. 

Because of our unique strategy we have become the leading independent rail service provider in the Port of Rotterdam and on the main corridors towards the German and Belgium borders.


‘At RRF, customers are the focus of our operations. We listen carefully to what customers say and work hard to develop creative, flexible logistics packages that address the individualized service needs. This will result in cost reduction and higher margin for the customer.’

A lean organization, designed to be close to our customers
Our staff is well-educated and trained to meet your requirements, with the capacity to deal with almost any
situation. Within RRF we apply best practices to conduct business with personalized involvement and a commitment to strong relationships with our customers and other stakeholders. We have the local touch that characterizes the entrepreneurial spirit of our organization.
Like we say in Rotterdam: Geen woorden maar daden……!

Name: Palmetto Railways
Description: Palmetto Railways, a division of the South Carolina Department of Commerce, is a Class III short line and terminal switching rail carrier located in Charleston, South Carolina.

Name: AllTranstek, LLC
Description: AllTranstek specializes in rail fleet management, technical consulting and engineering, rail mileage accounting, systems development, and on-site training and inspection.  AllTranstek manages over 325,000 railcars of all types for some of North America’s largest companies, including multiple listed on the Fortune 100. With a company history since 1994 and a combined employee industry experience of over 2000 years, we have the knowledge that moves you ahead.

Name: Succession Planning for Railroads Investing in the Next Generation (SPRING) LLC
Description:
Welcome to SPRING! 

We congratulate you for deciding to start planning for your company's future workforce. SPRING or Succession Planning for Railroads Investing in the Next Generation is here to be the communication bridge for employers and candidates in the rail industry. Whether you are a railroad, supplier, contractor, or transit operation, we are here to help you during you time of need, a time when retirements are at an all time high, and transitions are occurring everyday in our industry. We have over 35 tech schools to Ivy League institutions, which include a network of over 300,000+ alumni, supporting our growing talent pools, as well as experienced railroaders looking for their next career. Once we connect you with our growing community of talent, we are here to help you retain that talent through thoughtful training and custom mentorship programs developed on-site at your company. We are committed to sharing the great opportunities your company has to offer in the rail industry. We are also committed to our veteran community to help our men and women who served find their next mission in the rail industry.   Join us as a member, or a sponsor today, to support our mission and spring your company into the future.

SPRING's President remarks, "We intend to inspire talent to join and remain in the rail industry for a promising career and sustain rail heritage and knowledge as this industry continues to grow." - Michele L. Malski

When you are ready to start your discussion about your legacy plan, and your future company, we are here to help you build your next generation of railroaders!

Thank you for your time and consideration!

Follow us here and on Facebook as well!

www.springrecruits.com

Name: UGL Regional Linx
Description:
UGL Regional Linx was established in 2021, after parent company, UGL Limited was selected to deliver operations and maintenance of rail infrastructure for the Country Regional Network (CRN). This network ensures the safe movement of people and goods throughout the regions of NSW, and links Sydney with many important regional centres.  

UGL Regional Linx commenced operations on January 30 2022 and works on behalf of the client, Transport for NSW (TfNSW) and will be responsible for managing an important network of assets. As part of its operation, UGL Regional Linx’s scope of work includes:
•	Network operations
•	Rail infrastructure maintenance and implementation of a new train control system - UGL’s proprietary system, Sigview.
•	Asset and property management, and 
•	Safety, access, performance, and environmental management. 

UGL Regional Linx has made a strong commitment to local and indigenous employment, further strengthening the organisation’s commitment to regional NSW. As part of its operations, UGL Regional Linx established its head office and Network Control Centre in the heart of the Central West, Orange, NSW. 

The CRN network includes: 
•	2,386 route kilometres of operational passenger and freight rail lines, including 996 km of branch line track used predominantly for haulage of grain, with lower mass and speed limits than other parts of the network
•	3,139 route kilometres of non-operational lines
•	27,000 hectares of land and infrastructure
•	1,312 level crossings (300 active)
•	1,200 property assets (including 356 heritage sites)
•	600 rail under bridges and 384 road overbridges

The CRN is a crucial piece of infrastructure to regional NSW and UGL Regional Linx is committed to ensure that it delivers for all customers, from rail passengers to farmers and industry.

Name: VECTURIS
Description:
VECTURIS is a private railway operator providing transport services worldwide for passengers, mining products and commercial cargo.

OUR MISSION is to promote social and economic development, adding value by improving operation systems. The company implements a pro-active and transparent model of management while focusing on new technologies adapted to the environment and to its objectives.

Name: Rotem SRS Co., Ltd.
Description: Professional Company for Global Railway Mobility Service

Name: EULYNX
Description: EULYNX is an initiative of railway infrastructure managers with a common goal to define an internationally standardised signalling system, focusing on common interfaces. EULYNX performs continuous development, maintenance and change management of the standards, and supports the implementation of the standards.

Name: Railway Assurance Ltd
Description:
Dubbed the Railway Safety Experts, Railway Assurance are a dynamic team of highly experienced and approachable individuals offering a range of services within the Railway Sector to ensure the safety of the public. 
Current high-profile projects include HS2, Transpennine Route Upgrade, Northern Rail, Maddison Square Gardens, Victoria Phases 3,4 and 5 and many more. 
Our cost-effective safety management process along with our specialisation in assurance services is what makes Railway Assurance a cut above the rest. No project is too big or too small! The full range of services and further contact details can be seen on railwayassurance.co.uk.

Name: Kinkisharyo International
Description: At KINKISHARYO International, our mission has always been to provide high-quality urban transit products and services to our customers, on time and at a reasonable cost. We tailor designs beyond moving people safely and reliably to deliver customized products and services. To get a true sense of KINKISHARYO, what makes us different and what we can do, start by taking a look at just a few of the places we’ve been...http://www.kinkisharyo.com/projects/. We succeeded every time because we listened to the client, understood their needs and developed a customized solution. In addition to designing and manufacturing passenger railcars, KINKISHARYO prides ourselves on being the first Light Rail Vehicle manufacturer to maintain its own fleet in North America. We also offer vehicle overhauls, upgrades, modifications, repairs and more out of our facility in Piscataway, NJ. Our long tradition of partnering with transit agencies to provide customization and innovation has resulted in successful sustainable projects delivered with superior performance.

Name: Rail Baltica in Latvia / Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas
Description:
In accordance with the Rail Baltica Global Project implementation structure and the delegation agreement, Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas is the national implementing body of the Rail Baltica project in Latvia.

The purpose of Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas is to ensure the development of the assets, services and knowledge necessary for the delivery and management of the strategic railway infrastructure of national importance, by implementing common Baltic States infrastructure management model and integration of the Rail Baltica railway line into the Single European Railway Area.

Company is a special purpose vehicle responsible for:
-	Construction of Rail Baltica mainline in Latvia 
-	Acquisition of land and real estate for the construction of Rail Baltica in Latvia
-	Design and construction of Rail Baltica railway service facilities including passenger and freight stations and terminals
-	Development of infrastructure management model and delivery of performant railway infrastructure management organization

We develop and deliver:
-	Main multimodal mobility hub in Riga, Latvia - Riga Central station 
-	Air and rail integration - Riga International Airport station 
-	 16 stations – multimodal regional mobility hubs on Rail Baltica in Latvia
-	Railway infrastructure maintenance facilities in Iecava and Skulte
-	Salaspils freight station and intermodal freight handling terminal

Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas is a 100% state-owned company founded in 2014. 
Co-financed by the European Union - Connecting Europe Facility (~85%) and Republic of Latvia (~15%).

Name: Train Driver Foundation
Description:
Struggling to pass train driver psychometric tests or interviews?

Train Driver Foundation helps aspiring train drivers prepare for the real demands of UK train operator recruitment - using industry-accurate insight from experienced hiring managers.

We specialise in:

• Psychometric test preparation (including concentration, reaction, SJT &  MMI assessments)
• Train driver interview preparation
• Rail-specific CV support
• E-learning and guided preparation resources

Our approach is practical, ethical, and based on how candidates are actually assessed.

 Start with our free preparation resources:
www.traindriverfoundation.com

Name: CSP Logitren
Description: Logitren Ferroviaria S.A. is a transportation trucking and railroad company based out of Av. de Blasco Ibáñez nº18 - 1º  1ª, Valencia, Valencian Community, Spain.

Name: SEMAF
Description:
SEMAF es el Sindicato Español de Maquinistas Ferroviarios.
Representamos al 85% de todos los Maquinistas en España.
Fundado en 1986 para trabajar por los avances profesionales, laborales y sociales de los Maquinistas.
SEMAF ostenta la Presidencia y la Secretaría General de ALE - Federation of European Train Drivers Unions, desde donde trabaja con los organismos europeos para el desarrollo del Ferrocarril en la Unión.

Name: PJ Messtechnik GmbH / PJ Monitoring GmbH
Description:
PJM is an internationally renowned system specialist for rail transport and has successfully implemented projects in 30 countries on 6 continents since 2006. The company’s main areas of focus are:

PJ Monitoring GmbH is a technology leader in the automation and digitalisation of rail freight transport. The wide range of digital train functions as well as the automated brake test are unique.

PJ Messtechnik GmbH is an accredited test centre in accordance with ISO/IEC 17025 and carries out tests worldwide for the approval of rail vehicles.

PJ Motion specialises in approval management in accordance with the 4th Railway Package and has extensive expertise in the field of operational and vehicle integration of brake testing.
EMC Rail Services GmbH focuses on EMC measurements. The company was founded in 2025 by Martin Joch and Udo Kappel.

RCC Railway Competence and Certification GmbH is an accredited inspection body in accordance with ISO/IEC 17065 and specialises in certifications and safety assessments.

PJM was founded in 2006. Our teams ensure that everything is ‘100% Made in Austria’: R&D, hardware and software development, production and administration are all carried out exclusively in Austria.

Name: SJ Norge
Description: Train operator. We drive Norway's most beautiful railway lines under the brand name "SJ NORD". These are the Dovre line, the Nordland line, the Røros line, the Rauma line, the Trønder line, the Meråker line and the Salten Pendle. We focus on delivering quality and excellent customer service.

Name: Network Rail Wales and Borders
Description: We operate 1,500 miles of railway and more than 15,000 passenger services every period. The route links major towns and cities, including Cardiff, Newport, Swansea, Wrexham and Shrewsbury – connecting people, businesses and communities.

Name: INTERNATIONAL HEAVY HAUL ASSOCIATION
Description: INTERNATIONAL HEAVY HAUL ASSOCIATION is a company based out of 2808 FOREST HILLS CT, VIRGINIA BCH, Virginia, United States.

Name: DGEX Solutions
Description:
DGEX-Solutions est le résultat d'une démarche d'intrapreunariat, initiée  mi-2015. DGEX-Solutions regroupe aujourd'hui 150 personnes au coeur de SNCF Réseau.
C'est une formidable aventure  au service du transport public. Les liens créés sont nombreux, avec les start-up, les grandes écoles d'ingénieurs, les universités et depuis peu des gestionnaires d'infrastructure étrangers.

DGEX Solutions développe et réalise des solutions innovantes, crée des liens entre les enjeux  ferroviaire, l'informatique et la recherche opérationnelle.
L’entité est devenue un acteur essentiel de l'innovation et la transformation de SNCF Réseau, et poursuit l'objectif de réaliser des outils simples, rapidement, au service du système ferroviaire.

DGEX-Solutions réalise des études d'exploitation, en France et bientôt à l'international: l'équipe regroupe les meilleurs spécialistes de ce domaine.

Nous contribuons ainsi à tous les projets majeurs de la SNCF: les travaux de Paris Nord et plus généralement d'Île de France. le programme H00, la régénération des postes de signalisation, la nouvelle  Gestion Opérationnelle des Circulations...

Name: Rotterdam Rail Feeding B.V.
Description:
Rotterdam Rail Feeding (RRF) is a railroad company specialized in high quality short line and feeder rail services. Our highly flexible and skilled employees are one of our biggest strengths. With our dedicated locomotives equipped with the required safety systems we operate in the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium. 

Because of our unique strategy we have become the leading independent rail service provider in the Port of Rotterdam and on the main corridors towards the German and Belgium borders.


‘At RRF, customers are the focus of our operations. We listen carefully to what customers say and work hard to develop creative, flexible logistics packages that address the individualized service needs. This will result in cost reduction and higher margin for the customer.’

A lean organization, designed to be close to our customers
Our staff is well-educated and trained to meet your requirements, with the capacity to deal with almost any
situation. Within RRF we apply best practices to conduct business with personalized involvement and a commitment to strong relationships with our customers and other stakeholders. We have the local touch that characterizes the entrepreneurial spirit of our organization.
Like we say in Rotterdam: Geen woorden maar daden……!

Name: NIPPON KOEI MOBILITY
Description: Nippon Koei Mobility is the first Japanese-owned independent railway and public transport system consultant that brings global expertise to a local market. With over 70 years of experience addressing system engineering needs, we are equipped to offer innovative solutions, leveraging only the latest technology tailored for the Asian market

Name: NS Rail
Description: Location d'engins Rail Route avec opérateur

Name: Technicentre Industriel de Rennes - SNCF Voyageurs Matériel
Description: Site industriel basé au cœur de Rennes Métropole , le Technicentre industriel de Rennes est le centre d'excellence freinage de SNCF Voyageurs . Pièces de frein pour tout type de matériel roulant ferroviaire et urbain mais aussi centre de maintenance pour des chaines courtes de rénovation de rames

Name: LTG Cargo Polska
Description:
LTG Cargo Polska ma na celu wzmocnienie logistycznych łańcuchów dostaw i poprawę mobilności dużych ładunków między Litwą, a Polską.

LTG Cargo Polska sp. z o.o. jest w 100% własnością litewskiej kolejowej spółki towarowej AB LTG Cargo, która jest częścią litewskiej spółki państwowej AB Lietuvos Geležinkeliai i zajmuje 8. miejsce pod względem ruchu towarowego w UE.

Usługi:
- Transport kolejowy towarów - przewóz ładunków organizowany jest zgodnie z potrzebami klienta. Firma obsługuje wszystkie grupy towarowe.
- Usługi spedycyjne - we współpracy z polskimi przewoźnikami kolejowymi, LTG Cargo Polska organizuje kolejowe przewozy towarowe ropy naftowej, nawozów sztucznych oraz innych gałęzi przemysłu np. samochodowego, spożywczego (zboża).
- Transport naczep - trasa: do / z Kowna (Litwa) - Duisburg (Niemcy). 
- Transport kontenerów
 
Więcej o nas: https://ltgcargo.pl/

Name: DVF
Description: DVF - Travaux Ferroviaires

Name: Mississippi Export Railroad
Description:
Strategically located in on the Mississippi Gulf Coast, MSE is a short line railroad providing economical logistics solutions from the southeast US to Western Canada.  It is the north-south corridor connecting the Canadian National Railroad (CN) and the CSX Transportation (CSXT) while linking in Mobile, AL, to the Norfolk Southern (NS), CG Railway (CGR), Alabama and Gulf Coast Railway (AGR), in Hattiesburg, MS, to the NS, and in Jackson, MS, to the Kansas City Southern (KCS) through haulage agreements. 

Beyond rail freight movement, MSE offers railcar maintenance, cleaning, and storage (5 yards storing up to 1,600 cars), locomotive repair, track maintenance, industry switching, barge access, transloading, and access to the Ports of Pascagoula and Mobile.  Further, MSE has multiple certified project-ready industrial sites with warehousing opportunities. Serviced by MSE rail, sites are within close proximity to major highways, interstates, and waterways.

Name: FUTUR en TRAIN
Description:
FUTUR en TRAIN (Association pour le développement de la formation et la promotion des métiers ferroviaires, régie par la loi de 1901) a été créée en décembre 2015 sous l'impulsion des entreprises ferroviaires publiques et privées adhérentes de l'UTP (Union des transports publics et ferroviaires). 
Cette association porte une double vocation : 
-développer l'offre de formation initiale et continue, en partenariat avec les ministères et la branche ferroviaire 
-promouvoir les formations et métiers du secteur via des manifestations d'informations, des actions et outils visant à promouvoir les métiers et le secteur.

Les entreprises à ce jour adhérentes de l'association FUTUR en TRAIN sont  :  DB EUROCARGORAIL, EUROSTAR,  GETLINK, SNCF, SNCF VOYAGEURS, SNCF RESEAU, TRENITALIA, TRANSDEV, CAPTRAIN, TRANSKEO

Name: RegionAlps
Description: Acteur de référence de la mobilité en Valais, RegionAlps transporte plus de 11 millions de voyageurs chaque année. En proposant des solutions innovantes et attrayantes, la compagnie participe activement au développement durable du canton. Elle exploite le trafic ferroviaire régional entre Brigue et St-Gingolph, ainsi qu'entre Martigny et Le Châble / Orsières. Cinq lignes de bus entre Viège et Loèche complètent le réseau de transport public. La société a été fondée en 2003 par CFF, TMR et le Canton du Valais.

Name: DB Cargo Belgium
Description: DB Cargo is een van ’s werelds toonaangevende aanbieders van geïntegreerde logistieke diensten. Met onze 94.600 werknemers verspreid over meer dan 2000 vestigingen in 130 landen, nemen we internationaal een leidinggevende positie in. Sinds 2013 zijn we actief in België en Nederland.

Name: Tag der Schiene
Description:
Gemeinsam feiern wir eine faszinierende Art der Fortbewegung!
Ob Groß ob Klein, ob Nord oder Süd, ob als Transportmittel für Güterströme, als schneller Weg zur Arbeit oder als Ausganspunkt für die nächste Urlaubsreise – Die Eisenbahnen in Deutschland begeistern die Menschen.

Zum Tag der Schiene zeigt die gesamte Branche, was in ihr steckt. Herzlich willkommen zu den Festtagen der Schiene!


Impressum: www.tag-der-schiene.de/impressum/
Datenschutz: https://tag-der-schiene.de/datenschutz/

Name: Rail Baltica Latvija
Description:
In accordance with the Rail Baltica Global Project implementation structure and the delegation agreement, Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas is the national implementing body of the Rail Baltica project in Latvia.

The purpose of Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas is to ensure the development of the assets, services and knowledge necessary for the delivery and management of the strategic railway infrastructure of national importance, by implementing common Baltic States infrastructure management model and integration of the Rail Baltica railway line into the Single European Railway Area.

Company is a special purpose vehicle responsible for:
-	Construction of Rail Baltica mainline in Latvia 
-	Acquisition of land and real estate for the construction of Rail Baltica in Latvia
-	Design and construction of Rail Baltica railway service facilities including passenger and freight stations and terminals
-	Development of infrastructure management model and delivery of performant railway infrastructure management organization

We develop and deliver:
-	Main multimodal mobility hub in Riga, Latvia - Riga Central station 
-	Air and rail integration - Riga International Airport station 
-	 16 stations – multimodal regional mobility hubs on Rail Baltica in Latvia
-	Railway infrastructure maintenance facilities in Iecava and Skulte
-	Salaspils freight station and intermodal freight handling terminal

Eiropas Dzelzceļa līnijas is a 100% state-owned company founded in 2014. 
Co-financed by the European Union - Connecting Europe Facility (~85%) and Republic of Latvia (~15%).

Name: EVM RAIL
Description:
EVM Rail intende sviluppare e promuovere servizi ferroviari e ricercare nuove soluzioni di trasporto su rotaia da offrire ai propri clienti come alternativa vantaggiosa ed ecologica alle altre forme di trasporto, come per esempio quello su gomma.

EVM Rail si propone come un’Impresa Ferroviaria estremamente snella, focalizzata e notevolmente specializzata nella produzione di treni tradizionali completi trasportanti merci rappresentate prevalentemente da materie prime (come per esempio i cereali, il ferro, ecc.), senza escludere dal proprio business la possibilità di effettuare il trasporto intermodale di unità di traffico combinato (contenitori, semirimorchi stradali ecc).

EVM Rail è in grado di offrire ai propri clienti, grazie all’esperienza pluriennale dei propri esperti ferroviari, servizi di consulenza con l’obiettivo ricercare nuove sinergie e soluzioni innovative.

Name: HŽ Infrastruktura d.o.o.
Description: HŽ INFRASTRUKTURA d.o.o. za upravljanje, održavanje i izgradnju željezničke infrastrukture – HŽ Infrastructure Limited Liability Company for Management, Maintenance and Building of Railway Infrastructure

Name: RailAdventure UK Ltd
Description: RailAdventure is a neutral service provider for the rail industry. From rolling out the first, newly developed prototype to transferring the latest vehicles in a series to the customer, we look after our customers’ products during this phase and handle rail operations.

Name: Western Dimensional Ltd.
Description:
Western Dimensional is a specialized transportation and logistics company based in Ontario, Canada.
We are railroaders, truckers, engineers, and operators with decades of experience in the transportation and heavy lift industries. We provide innovative “rail first” solutions for transporting heavy-lift and project cargo throughout North America.


Our services include:

•      Dimensional rail transport
•      Factory to foundation logistics
•      Rail shunting and distribution facility management
•      Heavy transport and rigging

Name: Brazil on Rails
Description: Reunir empresas nacionais e multinacionais em um ambiente estratégico para a realização de negócios, formação de parcerias e networking de alto impacto durante Feiras Internacionais de relevância global.

Name: ECORAIL TRANSPORT
Description:
ECORAIL TRANSPORT, membre du Réseau Européen CAPTRAIN, est un transporteur ferroviaire français qui met en place les solutions les plus performantes pour l'acheminement de vos marchandises en France métropolitaine. 

Avec une structure qui allie flexibilité, écoute et réactivité, ECORAIL TRANSPORT utilise ses moyens propres, ceux de ses clients et du réseau CAPTRAIN Europe.

En relation permanente avec SNCF Réseau, ECORAIL TRANSPORT organise avec son personnel formé et qualifié le trajet de vos marchandises en toute sécurité, et assure le suivi y compris sur route, si nécessaire, pour les “derniers kilomètres”. 

ECORAIL TRANSPORT est à même de répondre aux demandes de tous les chargeurs sur l’ensemble du territoire national et via le réseau CAPTRAIN sur toute l'Europe.

ECORAIL TRANSPORT est présent sur la Région Ouest, en Région Centre Val de Loire, au cœur de Tours métropole Val de Loire, sur les Deux-Sèvres en Région Nouvelle Aquitaine et en Ile de France.

ECORAIL TRANSPORT organise l'acheminement complet de vos produits suivant vos besoins en favorisant le fret ferroviaire sur le réseau existant puis par la route pour les “derniers kilomètres”.

Choisir les solutions ECORAIL TRANSPORT, c’est faire le choix d’un transport de marchandises compétitif, efficace, rapide sans aléas et respectueux de l’environnement. :
• 6 fois moins d'énergie consommée que le transport routier
• 8 fois moions d'émmissions polluantes
• 9 fois mois d'émmissions de CO2

Les solutions ECORAIL TRANSPORT favorisent votre stratégie RSE (Responsabilité Sociale des Entreprises) et QSE (Qualité – Sécurité – Environnement).

Choisir le fret ferroviaire, c'est choisir de loin le moyen de transport le moins polluant. Le fret train émet deux à trois fois moins de gaz à effet de serre que les transports terrestres et aériens.

N'hésitez pas à visiter notre site web, ecorailtransport.fr, pour mieux nous découvrir ou pour nous rejoindre.
Location: Saint Pierre Des Corps, Centre Val de Loire

Name: Hong Kong Tramways
Description:
Hong Kong Tramways has been serving Hong Kong since 1904 and operates nowadays a fleet of 165 tramcars including 2 antique party tramcars, 1 unique “TramOramic Tour” sightseeing tramcar, and 1 unprecedented Tram No.18 which focuses on providing premium social gathering experiences. Tramways is the world’s largest fleet of double-deck tramcars in operation, carrying up to 200,000 passengers every day. It has been keeping up efforts in developing a worldwide recognized icon, while offering the greenest, the most affordable, and the most joyful transport mode in Hong Kong.

Hong Kong Tramways is owned by RATP Dev Group.

Name: Metro de Málaga
Description: Cuenta oficial de Metro de Málaga, sociedad concesionaria de la Junta de Andalucía.

Name: CRRC（Hong Kong）Co.Ltd
Description:
CRRC(Hong Kong)Co. Ltd. is one of the subsidiaries of CRRC Corporation Limited, and also the overseas concession business platform company of CRRC.
CRRC is the world's largest supplier of rail transit equipment with the most complete product lines and leading technologies. Its main businesses cover the R&D, design, manufacture, repair, sale, lease and technical services for rolling stock, urban rail transit vehicles, engineering machinery, all types of electrical equipment, electronic equipment and parts, electric products and environmental protection equipment, as well as consulting services, industrial investment and management, asset management, and import and export.

Name: Rail First
Description:
Rail First Asset Management is Australia’s leading provider of tailored rail locomotive and rolling stock leasing, maintenance, repair, acquisition, build / rebuild solutions for rail operators, shippers, logistics providers supporting complex supply chains. 

Rail First supports customers with:

Leasing of Locomotives and Wagons:
With one of the largest rail fleets in the country, we offer tailored lease options to support a wide range of intermodal, agricultural, and bulk mineral transportation needs.

Buying or Building New Wagons or Locomotives:
We also offer a unique “Purchase to Lease / Build to Lease”, which gives customers access to new equipment while maintaining all of the flexibility and cash advantages of a lease.

Rollingstock Maintenance:
Rail First provides servicing, maintenance, painting, and overhaul services across all wagon and locomotive types. 

Crew Van Overhaul and Rebuild:
We provide unique building and major overhaul capabilities for crew vans servicing the requirements of Australia’s long haul interstate network.

Wagon Construction:
Rail First is proud to be the only domestic manufacturer of intermodal equipment in Australia.  We can build 40’ and 60’ skeletal and 48’ well wagons to meet your needs.

Our sites are strategically located in Adelaide, Sydney and Regional NSW on the rail network in Australia. We are continually expanding the scope of our leasing solutions and our service and workshop facility footprint nationally. 
Rail First Asset Management has been in operation since the privatisation of the rail industry in the late 1990’s, originally as a subsidiary of the Sasser Family Holdings, Inc. (SFH) a 4th generation, family-owned transportation asset services company with experience dating back to 1928 in the USA. 
The group is now owned by Amber Infrastructure Group and DIF Capital Partners, which also have significant experience globally in asset management, leasing and financing.

Name: SEP Rail Design
Description: With a wealth of rail expertise, our in-house design team covers every stage of the project life cycle, supporting the leading names in rail by solving even their most complex of challenges. Proactively innovating and adapting whilst maintaining an absolute devotion to safety, our design and engineering specialists deliver both exceptional quality and value by default, building legacies for generations of rail users to come.

Name: Keolis Compagnie du Métro du Grand Paris lignes 16/17
Description: Keolis est un des leaders mondiaux de la mobilité partagée et le partenaire privilégié des Autorités Organisatrices de Mobilité. Ensemble, nous coconstruisons des solutions de transport en commun sûres, performantes et durables qui renforcent l'attractivité des territoires.

Name: NEXRAIL.lease
Description:
Nexrail is Europe’s most innovative full-service locomotive leasing platform with a focus on non-electrified use-cases. 
Nexrail's mission is to transition the European railway market toward zero-emission by co-developing and leasing innovative full-battery, hybrid, dual-mode, and other sustainable traction solutions. 
With a growing fleet of 130+ locomotives, we serve freight and shunting operators across Germany, France, Italy, Belgium, and Luxembourg.

Name: Routes into Rail
Description:
Routes into Rail’s aim is to promote the wide range of career opportunities and paths in the rail industry.

The brand was created to better connect with an audience of school leavers, University students and career-switchers to become more aware of the rail industry as a chosen sector to work in.

The website promotes the wide spectrum of jobs within the industry ranging from train driving and maintenance roles, through to engineering, architecture, and communications roles.

Routes into Rail is funded by industry and powered by the National Skills Academy for Rail (NSAR).

Name: TRANSWAGGON Group
Description: As the most flexible logistics partner in rail freight transport, we have been developing innovative, climate-neutral and reliable transport solutions for our clients since 1965.

Name: Midwest Association of Rail Shippers (MARS)
Description:
The Midwest Association of Rail Shippers (MARS) is headquartered in the Chicago area. General membership territory comes from the provinces of Manitoba and Saskatchewan and the states of Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Michigan, Minnesota, Missouri, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, South Dakota and Wisconsin.

Its objective is to provide an open forum for resolving transportation and car supply issues, coupled with programs designed to educate and inform the membership in areas of railroad operating practices, freight car supply, new innovations in transportation and legislative matters. Meetings are held twice a year, in January and July.

Name: Alcarail Pty Ltd
Description:
Alcarail provides Engineering, Design, Construction and Project Management services for delivering major and complex railway projects.

At Alcarail, we work collaboratively with our clients - listening to their needs, shaping practical strategies, and delivering projects on time. Our services focus on creating value by proactively managing risk and ensuring commercial certainty.

As part of our business operational model, we scale to fit our client's needs. This flexible, collaborative, and adaptive method delivers optimised budget utilisation (no over-resourcing), consistent quality & compliance across all stages, seamless integration with your team and transparent governance & communication throughout the project systems. 

Our team brings extensive, hands-on expertise in the rail operating environment, systems engineering and assurance, and the interfaces between signalling, communications, train control, OCS, and ETCS. This capability drives stronger interoperability and maintenance outcomes. We helped lead the first ETCS projects in Australia and New Zealand.

Our services: 

- Design & Documentation — concept to IFC; design reports, drawings, specifications
Document Review — standards compliance, signalling principles, IDC/IDR, ITPs, as-built checks
- Project & Construction Advisory — constructability, staging/possessions, brownfield cutovers, site engineering support
- Professional Services – Project Delivery Advisory & Strategy — governance, delivery models, risk/commercial, scheduling
- Engineering — ETCS, signalling, communications, OCS, and train control systems
- Rail Systems Delivery — feasibility through design, construction, testing & commissioning, operations readiness, and handover
- Systems Engineering & Safety Assurance — requirements management, assurance evidence
- System Integration — interface management and interoperability across all sub-systems, integration testing and commissioning

Name: SNCF Hubs & Connexions
Description: SNCF Hubs & Connexions is part of SNCF Group, the world leader in mobility. It is a subsidiary within SNCF Gares & Connexions, a division of SNCF Réseau.

Name: Lineardraft | a Zebraware product
Description:
Lineardraft, a Zebraware product, is a 3D BIM software solution - the most efficient way to design overhead line electrification.

The core principle of Lineardraft is simple: use intuitive design tools and automation to significantly reduce cost and increase capacity, all whilst maintaining capability and assurance. 

Lineardraft allows the simultaneous design of 2D layouts & 3D models, has powerful automation tools allowing for complex change in seconds, and produces data-rich assets with customisable outputs, facilitating a seamless design-to-build transition helping the industry move towards standardisation. 

Lineardraft has already been used on HS2, the Transpennine Route Upgrade, Midland Mainline Upgrade, Wales & Borders – Core Valley Lines, and the Fife Electrification project, among other worldwide projects.

Zebraware’s vision is to continue to provide cutting-edge software that supports the OCS/OLE design process, empowering the rail industry to achieve decarbonisation and create a sustainable future.

We work with some of the largest engineering and infrastructure owners in the world, including SNCF, SPL Powerlines, Systra, WSP, AECOM, Jacobs, Mott MacDonald and Arup.

For enquiries and more information visit lineardraft.com, or contact us at enquiries@zebraware.com

Name: FuoriMuro Impresa Ferroviaria S.r.l.
Description: FuoriMuro is the Railway Undertaking providing every day since 2012 the only freight service connecting various areas of Northern Italy with France through the border of Ventimiglia. The Company is part of a network of Company Partners operating in rail transport, shunting, maintenance, innovative logistics and training which also includes InRail S.p.A. and multimodal transport operator Metrocargo Italia S.r.l. and which numbers today more than 400 employees and an expected turnover of approx. Euro 80 million in 2022.

Name: RTB CARGO GmbH
Description: RTB CARGO is active in European rail freight transport and transports goods across borders from major seaports into the heart of Europe. RTB CARGO operates in Germany, Austria, Hungary, Belgium and the Netherlands with its own employees, locomotives and licences. Neighbouring countries are operated in cooperation with partner companies. RTB CARGO has locations in the ports of Rotterdam and Antwerp, as well as in Aachen, Salzburg and Györ.

Name: Captrain Portugal
Description: Captrain Portugal S.A., originally called Takargo, appears as the first Portuguese private operator in rail freight transport. It is committed to implement a culture of excellence focused on customer satisfaction, valuing employees, complying with safety rules, and following good environmental practices.

Name: Pan Am Railways
Description:
Pan Am Railways is now a part of CSX Transportation.

In 2022, Pan Am Railways was acquired by and became part of the CSXT Transportation network. For more information for safely and securely moving your freight with CSX, visit csx.com.

Name: RAYHAWK
Description: At RAYHAWK, we’re redefining rail operations with intelligent automation. Our fully automated system uses machine learning, advanced sensing, and a precision gantry to open, close, and inspect railcars—eliminating the need for workers to climb on top. The result: safer, faster, and more reliable rail operations, bringing smarter, more efficient solutions to the industry.

Name: Inlandsbanan
Description:
Inlandsbanan är en koncern som består av moderbolaget Inlandsbanan AB samt dotterbolagen Destination Inlandsbanan AB och Inlandståg AB. Inlandsbanan AB ägs av 19 kommuner längs banan. På uppdrag av staten förvaltar Inlandsbanan AB infrastrukturen för järnvägsanläggningen mellan Gällivare och Mora. 

Uppdraget från våra ägare är att driva en verksamhet som stödjer tillväxtarbetet efter hela Inlandsbanans sträckning. I det uppdraget ingår att aktivt arbeta för att hela inlandsbanan samt angränsande tvärbanor åter öppnas för trafik. Vi arbetar för att öka såväl godstransporterna som persontrafiken på banan. 

Vi ska i alla delar av vår verksamhet sträva efter att de miljömässiga konsekvenserna av våra aktiviteter minimeras och att verksamheten därmed ska innebära påtagligt positiva effekter på miljön.

Name: Northern Railway
Description:
Northern Railway (NR) is headquartered at New Delhi. Most of its route spans across nine states/Union Territories - Delhi, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Punjab, Uttarakhand & Uttar Pradesh and the Union Territories of Chandigarh, Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh.

There are 5 divisions in Northern Railway:
1. Ambala
2. Delhi
3. Ferozpur
4. Lucknow
5. Moradabad

Name: AlloFerro
Description:
AlloFerro est une société d'expertise et d'accompagnement spécialisée dans les travaux ferroviaires.
Fort de 15 années d'expériences diverses liées aux infrastructures Voie et Caténaire, Laurent WATON a créé cette société avec l'ambition de répondre aux besoins des Entreprises, tout au long du cycle de vie des projets ferroviaires.

~ Les spécialités ~
- AMOA/MOE/Direction de Travaux : Package indispensable pour accompagner efficacement aussi bien les donneurs d'ordres que les entreprises réalisatrices. Tous ces rôles ont été pratiqués (par Laurent WATON) ce qui permet de cadrer les missions et les responsabilités.

- Expertise technique : Avec plus de 500 Chantiers réalisés dans les 10 dernières années, il n'existe pas de chantiers sans solution technique. "Il n'y a que notre cerveau qui nous limite".
AlloFerro propose de vous assister dans la réalisation d'études de faisabilité, de diagnostics, de contrôles et de supervision de travaux.

- Accompagnement réglementaire : AlloFerro peut vous assister dans la réalisation de démarches administratives, l'obtention d'autorisations et la mise en place de procédures techniques ou de sécurité.

- Gestion de projet : AlloFerro peut prendre en charge la gestion complète de vos projets ferroviaires, de la phase de conception à la phase de réalisation.

- Audit Structurel : AlloFerro peut vous aider à respecter les réglementations en vigueur dans le domaine ferroviaire avec des Préconisations en réalisant un Audit en profondeur de vos règlements. 

~ Nos valeurs ~
- Professionnalisme/Rigueur : AlloFerro est une entreprise sérieuse et rigoureuse qui s'engage à fournir des services de qualité à ses clients avec naturellement une confidentialité dans la gestion de chacune des missions.

- Abnégation/Pugnacité : Répondre aux besoins de nos clients et améliorer la performance des projets ferroviaires.

Collaboration : AlloFerro croit au travail en équipe et à la collaboration avec nos clients pour garantir le succès des projets.

Name: Toshiba Railway Europe GmbH
Description:
Toshiba Railway Europe is part of Toshiba Group, the Japanese technology and manufacturing company with more than 100,000 employees worldwide. Toshiba has always been committed to the development of society through new technologies, many of which focus on critical infrastructure such as railway systems. 

Toshiba Railway Europe was founded in 2018 as a subsidiary of Toshiba Infrastructure Systems and Solutions Corporation in order to offer sustainable solutions for the European railway market. We operate across two office sites in Germany. Our headquarter is in Kiel, and a branch office is situated in Düsseldorf. 

Imprint 
https://www.toshiba-railway.eu/imprint/ 
Privacy Policy

We strive to develop designs that offer safety as a paramount consideration, not only with regarding the installer the maintainer and the eventual decommissioning of the equipment. At a start of project we will seek out items/elements of the projects and throughout the life of the project continually review our designs to ensure we either eliminate and to reduce the likelihood and/or the consequences to ALARP. 

The Aureos Technical Solutions team have experience of all types of electrification equipment used on the UK from the traditional OLEMI, including the Mark 1 and Great Eastern Conversation to that of the modern types that are now being used in the UK such as Furrer+Frey and the new Network Rail Series 2 design.

Name: Union Station Redevelopment Corporation
Description:
Since Union Station Redevelopment Corporation’s (USRC) creation in 1983, USRC has been charged with overseeing Washington DC’s historic landmark Union Station as it evolves into a world-class multimodal facility, meeting the needs of more than 100,000 visitors a day. 

First opened in 1907, Washington, DC’s Union Station was once heralded as the largest train station in the world. However, over the years, great demand on the stationandpoor maintenance brought about thedeterioration of the historic structure. In 1981, Congress passedtheUnion Station Redevelopment Actwith the intention to preserve the historic integrity of the station while advancing its useful purpose to the region.Once passed,the act resulted in the founding of Union Station Redevelopment Corporation torepresent the best interests of the station.  

USRC’s Mission is to Preserve and restore Union Station’s historic and architectural significance, Maintain the station’s long-term function as a multimodal transportation center, Enhance the retail and amenities within the station , and Advance the Station Expansion Project and participate in private development coordination .

Jako pionierzy, wykorzystujemy czeskie urządzenia diagnostyczne Hakam S oraz Knorr MI8 HUB – pierwsze tego typu rozwiązania w Polsce przeznaczone do badań wagonów przegubowych.

Innowacyjność kontynuujemy, stosując holenderskie podnośniki Holmatro, co umożliwia bezpieczną i skuteczną pracę na wielu typach wagonów. 

MK-RAIL bierze pełną odpowiedzialność za cały proces serwisowy – od zamówienia części, przez zarządzanie naprawą, aż po dokumentację fotograficzną i doradztwo postserwisowe, które pomaga naszym Klientom lepiej zrozumieć i zapobiegać przyszłym problemom. 

MK-RAIL nie tylko naprawia, ale i edukuje, dzieląc się wiedzą na temat przyczyn awarii i ich zapobiegania. Dzięki temu nasi Klienci mogą cieszyć się dłuższą żywotnością swoich wagonów oraz mniejszymi kosztami eksploatacji.

Obserwuj nas, by być na bieżąco z najnowszymi trendami w zakresie mobilnego serwisu wagonów towarowych.

Name: SAIEE Railway Chapter
Description:
The first track for steam-powered locomotives was a line of about 3.2 kilometres by the Natal Railway Company, linking the town of Durban with Harbour Point, opened on 26 June 1860. Cape Town had already started building a 72-kilometre line, track gauge 1,435 mm, linking Cape Town to Wellington in 1859. However Cape railway construction began a massive expansion, after the formation in 1872 of the Cape Government Railways. Railway lines in other provinces "link-up" was established in 1898, creating a national transport network.  

Electrification of the railways began in the 1920s with the building of the Colenso Power Station for the Glencoe to Pietermaritzburg route and the introduction of the South African Class 1E. 

The establishment of the Railway Chapter will bridge the gap and ensure that technical/general knowledge and case studies learned and shared locally and at International level for the advancement of Southern African Railways development. In addition, this will also provide an opportunity for technical advancements originating from South Africa to be shared at the international stage. Also the engineering complexity of railway engineering is not acknowledged by the education sector and communities at large.


For example, considering the historic physical clearances that existed in the era preceding railway electrification, Rail Operators face the same restrictions that other railways have had to deal with in this regard. In addition to electrical locomotives, diesel powered locomotives also traverse the same lines. Whereas some international solutions might be viable for electric traction in its context, the additional factor relating to heat and gases emitted from diesel locomotives have not been considered adequately. Hence it is realized that for example reduced clearances adopted in some railways are not necessarily applicable elsewhere.

Nos domaines d’intervention couvrent notamment :

• l’optimisation des coûts d’exploitation et des processus de manœuvres,
• l’assistance technique sur les projets matériels (choix, modernisation, remotorisation, compatibilité réseau),
• les solutions de réenraillement et la gestion des situations dégradées,
• la formation réglementaire du personnel ferroviaire (P1 – accrocheur, P2 – chef de manœuvre, P3 – conducteur), certifiée Qualiopi.

Notre positionnement est volontairement indépendant de tout constructeur ou loueur, afin de garantir une analyse objective, techniquement fondée et économiquement pertinente.

Nous intervenons en France et à l’international, auprès de sites industriels, technicentres, ports, plateformes logistiques et réseaux urbains (métro, tramway).

LS FERROVIAIRE s’adresse aux organisations recherchant une expertise terrain de haut niveau, combinant rigueur réglementaire, approche opérationnelle et vision économique.

Augsburger Localbahn GmbH
Description: Die Augsburger Localbahn GmbH ist ein modernes Eisenbahnunternehmen mit über 135-jähriger Geschichte und zählt zu den größten Privatbahnen in Bayern. Als Eisenbahninfrastrukturunternehmen (EIU) betreiben wir ein 40 Kilometer langes Gleisnetz im Augsburger Stadtgebiet, das die Industriegebiete in den Stadtteilen Haunstetten, Lechhausen und Göggingen erschließt. Name: Indian Railways, Govt. of India
Description:
Indian Railways is a state-owned enterprise under the Ministry of Railways that operates India's national railway system. It is one of the world's largest rail networks, serving as the country's primary mode of long-distance transport and a vital part of its infrastructure.

Key Facts:

#Size: It manages the world's fourth largest national railway system by size, with a vast network of over 69,000 route kilometers.

#Operations: It operates around 13,000 passenger trains daily, connecting over 7,300 stations and carrying billions of passengers annually.

#Employment: With more than 1.2 million employees, it is India's second largest employer and the world's ninth-largest employer.

#Electrification: As of early 2025, over 97% of the broad-gauge network has been electrified, with a goal of achieving net-zero carbon emissions by 2030. 

Services and Bookings:

#Online Services: The Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) manages online ticketing, catering, and tourism services.

#Ticket Booking: Train tickets can be booked online through the IRCTC website or authorized partner apps/websites.

Enquiry Systems:

#Passengers can check PNR status, train schedules, and real-time running status using the National Train Enquiry System (NTES) through its website or mobile app "Rail One".

#Website: www.ndianrail.gov.in provides tools for reserved train information, seat availability, and arrival/departure status at stations. 

Modernization and Future Projects:

~ Indian Railways is undergoing significant modernization, including: 
Introduction of semi-high-speed Vande Bharat Express train-sets.

~ Work on India's first bullet train (high-speed rail) corridor between Mumbai and Ahmedabad.

~ Upgrading infrastructure and safety systems, such as the removal of all unstaffed level crossings.

~ The upcoming rollout of Vande Bharat sleeper trains and Amrit Bharat trains with AC coaches.

(Disclaimer: This is an unofficial page of Indian Railways)

Name: Techkol - Technika Kolejowa
Description: Techkol - Technika Kolejowa to wiodący dostawca usług serwisowych dla taboru kolejowego. Specjalizujemy się w przeglądach, naprawach i modernizacjach wagonów towarowych. Nasz doświadczony zespół zapewnia profesjonalną obsługę i wsparcie techniczne.

Name: East Central Railway
Description: The East Central Railway (abbreviated ECR) is one of the 19 railway zones in India. It is headquartered at Hajipur and comprises Sonpur, Samastipur, Danapur, Pt. Deen Dayal Upadhyaya, and Dhanbad divisions.

Name: Niederbarnimer Eisenbahn
Description:
Bei der Niederbarnimer Eisenbahn (NEB) blicken wir auf über 120 Jahre Tradition und Innovation im öffentlichen Nahverkehr zurück. 

Täglich sind unsere Mitarbeitenden an Standorten in Berlin und Brandenburg im Einsatz sowie auf der Schiene unterwegs. Als Betreiber des Heidekrautbahn-Netzes und zehn weiterer Regionalbahnstrecken setzen wir auf moderne Antriebstechnologien und nachhaltige Mobilität. Unsere neuen Fahrzeuge mit Wasserstoff- und batterieelektrischem Antrieb, innovative Fahrplankonzepte und hohe Servicestandards machen uns zu einem Vorreiter der Verkehrs- und Energiewende. Die Reaktivierung der Stammstrecke der Heidekrautbahn unterstreicht unser Engagement für die Region Berlin und Brandenburg.  

Wir sind ein traditionsreiches und zugleich zukunftsorientiertes Unternehmen und bieten unseren Mitarbeitenden mit einem abwechslungsreichen Arbeitsplatz, attraktiver Vergütung, betrieblicher Altersvorsorge, Schulungs- und Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen sowie Arbeitgeberzuschüssen zu Jobticket, Dienstbike und Gesundheitsangeboten zahlreiche Vorteile.  

Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und gestalten Sie mit uns die Zukunft der Mobilität in Berlin und Brandenburg – innovativ und nachhaltig.

Impressum: http://www.neb.de/impressum/

Name: Kansas City Streetcar Authority
Description: Welcome to KC Streetcar! Running from the River Market on the north end to Union Station and Crown Center on the south, KC Streetcar connects all the downtown Kansas City, Missouri neighborhoods with 16 platform stops and 2.2 miles of track. Shop local produce, couture, antiques and KC memorabilia; drop the commute between work and home; enjoy the culture of art galleries, events, concerts and plays; satisfy your hunger/thirst/cravings with a variety of culinary offerings … it’s all part of a normal day in downtown Kansas City!

Name: APNA TECHNOLOGIES & SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Apna Technologies & Solutions (ApnaTech) designs, develops, manufactures, and maintains Integrated Diagnostic Products that improve the safety and efficiency of assets for the Railways. We are committed to achieving excellence and efficiency in developing railway diagnostic solutions.

Our solutions are backed by rigorous innovation and cutting-edge technology. However, we understand that providing the most advanced technology is not good enough. Therefore, our solutions have been designed with in-depth knowledge of the unique needs of our clients. And they are aligned with the environment and ecosystem in which they operate.

ApnaTech is part of the Patil Group, established in 1933.

Name: GIO Rail Group of Companies
Description:
Making rail work for you.

GIO Rail Holdings is a unique railway service provider. We understand railway transportation. We know things don’t always go as planned. GIO is here to allow you to do what you do best, whether that’s running a railway, or being a freight customer. We’re there, working invisibly in the background, to keep things flowing smoothly. 

You have enough to worry about, and the reliability of your service providers shouldn’t be one. 

Visit www.giorail.com for more details.

Name: GCF SPA ALGÉRIE
Description:
Sous la tutelle du Ministère des Travaux Publics et des Infrastructures de Base, la société par actions Groupe Public de Construction Ferroviaire (GCF) dénommée par abréviation GCF Spa a été crée en mai 2024 par résolution du Conseil des Participations de l'Etat N°184:23/05/2024 (CPE).
Le Groupe GCF spa rassemble quatre sociétés: SETIRAIL, INFRAFER, INFRARAIL et RAILELECTR, spécialisées dans la construction et développement d'infrastructure ferroviaire, des travaux publics, de l'électrification, des études, de la maintenance des voies ferrées et de la production des matériaux de construction et d'agrégats
.Grâce à son expertise reconnue et à un effectif de ressources humaines hautement qualifiées, GCF Spa joue un rôle central dans le développement et la modernisation du réseau ferroviaire national.
Le Groupe GCF se distingue par sa capacité à fournir des solutions complètes, allant de l'étude, la production de matériaux à la réalisation de grands projets d'infrastructure, tout en intégrant les dernières avancées en matière de technologie.
Soucieux de l'excellence opérationnelle, GCF met également un accent particulier sur la formation continue de ses équipes, un atout majeur pour anticiper et accompagner les évolutions du secteur ferroviaire, cette approche permet au groupe de consolider son leadership et de contribuer au développement du secteur ferroviaire plus durable et performant

Name: Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Schweiz AG
Description:
Am Schweizer Standort in Wallisellen arbeiten ca. 60 hochmotivierte Mitarbeitende, welche in den Disziplinen Marketing, Sales, Accountmanagement, Projektmanagement, Engineering, Qualität, Ordermanagement, Supply Chain Management & Logistics, Service Operation, Field Service, Finance & Controlling und Human Recources tätig sind. Zu unseren Kunden gehören namhafte Schienenfahrzeugbauer als auch alle Bahnbetreiber in der Schweiz. Die Stärke der Knorr-Bremse Rail Systems Schweiz AG ist die Nähe zu den Kunden und die jahrzehntelange Erfahrung im Bahnbusiness. Wir tragen massgebend dazu bei, dass der Schienenverkehr in der Schweiz und Holland auf höchstem Niveau funktioniert. 
Als Weltmarktführer für Bremssysteme und andere Systeme für Schienenfahrzeuge ist die Division Rail Vehicle Systems (RVS) von Knorr-Bremse der weltweite Treiber der Revolution im Schienenverkehr und der Mobilität der nächsten Generation. Die Division liefert hochinnovative Systemlösungen, die den Transport von Menschen und Gütern auf der Schiene zuverlässiger und besser vernetzt, sicherer und sauberer sowie komfortabler und effizienter machen.
Knorr-Bremse RVS bietet höhere Kapazität, grössere Verfügbarkeit und maximale Sicherheit für den Nah-, Fern- und Güterverkehr.  
Bei allen Aktivitäten weltweit verfolgt Knorr-Bremse RVS das Ziel, einen Mehrwert für seine Kunden zu schaffen und einen wirksamen und positiven Beitrag für Gesellschaft und Umwelt zu leisten. Diesen Anspruch verfolgt der Unternehmensbereich jeden Tag aufs Neue und hat dabei sowohl die Bedürfnisse seiner Partner als auch die Zukunft unseres Planeten fest im Blick.
