Name: Anapet Taşımacılık A.Ş.
Description:
Akaryakıt taşımacılığında güven her şeydir. Bu yüzden 2015 yılında faaliyete başladığımız günden bu yana, akaryakıtın demiryolu ile sevkiyatında uzmanlaşmayı seçtik. Ekonomik ve en güvenli yol olan demiryolu taşımacılığını yepyeni fikir ve projelerle geliştirdik. 2021 yılında sayısı 310'u bulan lisanslı vagonlarımız sayesinde taşıma hacmimiz 700 bin tona ulaşmış durumda. Ulusal ve uluslararası mevzuatlar, yönetmelikler çerçevesinde tehlikeli madde taşımacılığının gerektirdiği tüm hassasiyeti gösteriyor, farklı tipte vagonlarımızla ülkemizin demiryolu bağlantılı her tesisine uyum sağlıyoruz. 

2021 yılında ECM(Bakımdan Sorumlu Kuruluş) olarak Dört fonksiyonu ile hizmete başlanmıştır.   
Yönetim Fonksiyonu
Bakım Geliştirme Fonksiyonu
Filo Bakım Yönetmi Fonksiyonu
Bakım Temini Fonksiyonu

Biz Anapet’iz, Türkiye’nin enerjisini istikrarla ve güvenle taşıyoruz.

Name: ACTOM Signalling
Description:
ACTOM Signalling is a business unit of ACTOM (Pty) Ltd, a leader in railway signalling, automation and control systems, with a comprehensive turnkey capability and an extensive range of railway signalling products.

We offer the following products and services: Planning and design, Research and development, Manufacturing of signalling products, Testing and commissioning, Product support, Refurbishment/repair of products, Signalling maintenance, Project Management and Turnkey railway signalling projects.

Our standard ACTOM railway signalling products include:
•	Electronic Interlocking
•	Electronic Track Warrant and Electronic Train Authorisation
•	Yard Automation
•	Protected level crossings
•	Axle counters and FSDT (Fail Safe Data Transceiver)
•	Remote Control System (CS90)
•	Hydraulic MkII Linear Lock Points Machine
•	Rail Mounted Points Lock
•	B1 Switchmatic Points Machine
•	Universal Integrated Points Drive Unit
•	Style 63 Points Machine (Conversion Kit)
•	Jeumont HVITC Track Circuit
•	Mechanical Points Indicators
•	Self-Normalising Trailable Cylinder (Spring Points)
•	Semaphore Operating Device (Hydraulic upgrade)
•	Colour Light Signals 
•	Interlocked Circuit Controller (Crank Handle box)

ACTOM Signalling thrives on high quality customer service, and offers a variety of solutions to meet and exceed your railway signalling needs.

Name: Independent Rail Retailers
Description: We represent almost all the independent rail retailers in Britain, helping to bring over £0.5bn of new incremental revenue to rail every year. We have led the industry in the development and adoption of digital ticketing, and are funding the rollout of infrastructure to spport this nationwide. We support the train operators in providing online retailing and many other services for most of them. We encourage modal shift, reach new customers who would not otherwise travel by rail, and innovate and improve constantly, to the benefit of customers, train operators and government alike.

Name: BeNEX GmbH
Description: Die BeNEX GmbH ist eine deutschlandweit aktive Holding des Finanzinvestors INPP Public Infrastructure Germany GmbH & Co. KG, die Beteiligungen an Regionalbahnen bundesweit hält und die entsprechenden Märkte bearbeitet. Mit einem Marktanteil von ca. 4% und 317 Mio. Umsatz ist BeNEX eines der drei größten privaten Regionalbahnunternehmen Deutschlands. Haupttätigkeiten der BeNEX sind die Beteiligung an Ausschreibungen für bestehende und neue Konzessionen, die Beschaffung und Finanzierung der Fahrzeugflotten für Konzernunternehmen sowie die Durchführung von Projekten zur Optimierung der operativen Beteiligungen.

Name: OFP-SUD OUEST
Description: Opérateur Ferroviaire de Proximité assure une interface souple avec les autres opérateurs ferroviaires présents sur le domaine portuaire concédé. Tous ces éléments confortent la Chambre de Commerce et d’Industrie Bayonne Pays Basque une fois de plus dans son action et dans l’ambition d’un retour à la hausse continue des trafics du port de Bayonne.

Name: Rail Reliability
Description:
Rail Reliability is a South East of England based company set up by two directors who have both been through railway apprenticeships who have now become seasoned consultants in the field.

Our aim is to supply proficient and experienced Project Managers, Engineers and Technicians to deliver a first class service. The evaluation of competence commences from the beginning of the recruitment process and is maintained throughout the working life of each Individual.

This is implemented to guarantee that every employee aligns with our customised competency guidelines and to ensure the fair and consistent assessment of our employees, to achieve and maintain the standard of performance expected by our client.

At Rail Reliability, our emphasis lies in quality over quantity, ensuring we supply the highest level of skilled personnel, being either apprentice trained or time served on the railway.

Comprehending the significance of rail safety, our commitment is to consistently provide a secure, top tier support, actively seeking optimal solutions promptly to maximise rolling stock availability. In line with this, we endeavour to maintain a positive working relationship and a thorough understanding of the clients needs.

Liaising with the client directly we supply support where required at an engineering or management level. Our support extends to areas such as Engineering assistance, Technical Support, Fault Finding, Maintenance and Material Logistics. Our team is meticulously selected to the role required, emphasising on expertise in the rolling stock field.

Name: Ghana Railway Development Authority (GRDA)
Description:
The Ghana Railway Development Authority is a statutory body established by the Railway Act, 2008 (Act 779) to ensure the development and modernization of the railway systems, both national and sub-urban in Ghana.

 OBJECTIVES
 i.    To promote the development of railways and railway services. 
 ii.   To hold, administer and improve the Railway Assets.
 iii.  To promote the development and management of suburban railway.

VISION
A provider of world-class, safe, efficient and reliable Rail transportation system that supports the socio-economic development of Ghana.


MISSION
To develop, manage and regulate a safe, reliable, sustainable and efficient Railway system for the movement of persons and goods in partnership with key stakeholders.

Name: LNSO - Ligne Nouvelle du Sud-Ouest
Description:
La Ligne Nouvelle du Sud-Ouest (LNSO) est un chantier ferroviaire dans le Sud-Ouest de la France pour doubler les lignes ferroviaires entre Bordeaux, Toulouse et Dax.

La LNSO répond à trois enjeux de mobilité : 1) les mobilités du quotidien dans le Sud-Ouest ; 2) les mobilités longue distance en France et en Europe ; 3) le fret ferroviaire.

La Ligne Nouvelle du Sud-Ouest bénéficiera aux territoires à l’échelle du Sud-Ouest, de la France comme de l’Europe. Elle est une solution d’intérêt général, une réponse attendue au service de l’intérêt collectif, de l’amélioration de la vie quotidienne et en faveur de l’habitabilité de la planète. C’est pourquoi l’investissement rassemble l’ensemble des territoires bénéficiaires : Etat français, collectivités territoriales et Union européenne.

Quelques dates :
2024 : début des travaux au nord de Toulouse et au sud de Bordeaux
2027 : construction de la ligne nouvelle
2032 : mise en service de la section Toulouse - Bordeaux

LNSO est financée par l’Etablissement public Société du Grand Projet du Sud-Ouest pour le compte de 24 collectivités territoriales et par l’État qui en ont confié à SNCF Réseau et Gare & Connexions la maîtrise d’ouvrage. Pour les actualités institutionnelles, suivez la page "Société du Grand Projet du Sud-Ouest - SGPSO”. Pour des actualités liées aux travaux ferroviaires, suivez la page "Agence GPSO - Grand Projet du Sud-Ouest”.

Name: InterEngineer GmbH
Description:
Was wir tun, tun wir mit Leidenschaft.

Die InterEngineer GmbH ist ein Safety Compliance-Beratungsunternehmen, das seit 2006 im Bereich Maschinen-, Automobil- und besonders der Bahntechnik tätig ist.

Unsere Experten haben sich in den letzten Jahren immer weiter auf die Erbringung von Dienstleistungen für Hersteller der Bahntechnik spezialisiert, die Produkt- und Funktionalitätsvorgaben in Europa und insbesondere Deutschland einhalten müssen. InterEngineer berät und unterstützt Kunden operativ auf dem Gebiet der Sicherheit im Engineering bis hin zum Sicherheitsbericht. Dabei steht nicht nur die Regelkonformität des Produktes im Vordergrund, sondern besonders der optimale Prozess des Genehmigungsverfahrens und der Produktsicherheit.

Wir arbeiten in einer außergewöhnlichen Umgebung.

Ob an unserem Hauptsitz in Kollmar direkt an der Elbe oder unserem technischen Büro in Wolfenbüttel, wir arbeiten in einer außergewöhnlichen Umgebung mit individuellem Charme und familiärer Atmosphäre. 

Bei uns steht Nachwuchsförderung an erster Stelle.

Studenten und Berufseinsteigern bieten wir vielfältige Einstiegsmöglichkeiten von Werkstudententätigkeiten, einem Praktikum oder Dualem Studium, einer Bachelor- oder Masterarbeit bis hin zum Direkteinstieg mit individuellen Förder- und Entwicklungsprogrammen. Auch Berufserfahrenen bieten wir die Möglichkeit der individuellen fachlichen Entfaltung, denn bei uns werden Sie zum Experten. Über unseren Rail Safety Campus bilden wir Sie zum zertifizierten “Rail Safety Engineer“ aus.

Name: Ci4Rail
Description:
We are a young fresh startup based on deep expertice in railway to connect persistent railway sector with innovative and game changing technologies like IIoT and Machine Learning. 

Transparency about the condition of electronic systems such as brakes, doors, air conditioning, restroom etc. is the basic prerequisite for continuous optimization. With Know your train, we offer a modular, flexible, scalable computer and service concept for use in the vehicle and in the cloud to make data and thus the status of all systems centrally accessible. We focus on ONE computer platform for all applications.

Name: Status Rail
Description:
Status Rail Pty. Ltd. is a professional engineering services company specialising in the development of railway signalling systems and the design of complete signalling schemes, supporting projects from concept to commissioning. 

We have capability to develop and independently verify designs, complete train control systems, and sub-systems spanning the entire project life cycle with experience across legacy (relay) and modern (CBI) technology. We are passionately committed to the professional development and mentoring of all our staff, colleagues and business partners.    

-Engineering design and consulting services 

-Principles level design of signalling layouts, schemes and control tables 

-Application-level design of cable running, track circuits bonding and axle counter architectures 

-Circuit designs of CBI and Relay circuit locations 

-Complex fringe interfaces between different interlocking technologies 

-Level crossing and pedestrian crossing signal interlocking 

Design verification and independent third-party reviews 

-Safety management, hazard and risk assessment and failure mode analysis 

-Subject matter advice 

-Development of project scope, delivery strategy, specifications of technical and operational requirements. 

-Design and drafting of compliant signalling drawings using Bentley Microstation 

-Engineering testing and site services 

-Tester in Charge 

-Preparation of testing and commissioning work packages 

-Lead test teams for equipment and strap and function testing 

-Project and design site and construction interface engineering 

-Testing support 

We pride ourselves on our attention to detail, our high standard of workmanship, our professionalism and dedication to outstanding results. We value the opportunity of working with stakeholders across all facets of the industry and are continuously looking for new ways to improve and grow.

Name: BKW Rail SA
Description: BKW Rail AG est une entreprise privée spécialisée dans la technique ferroviaire électrique, dont le siège se trouve à Ibach (SZ). Issue de la fusion de DG Rail et Elbatech en 2025, l'entreprise n'a cessé de croître et a réussi à s'imposer sur le marché. Notre cœur de métier réside dans le montage d'installations radio pour tunnels, de lignes de contact pour le secteur ferroviaire et pour le secteur des transports urbains, le montage d'installations de câble et d'installations de sécurités. Nos collaborateurs disposent des qualifications et formations techniques et sécuritaires requises dans le domaine ferroviaire.

Name: New York & Atlantic Railway
Description:
The New York & Atlantic Railway (NYA) is a vital freight rail link for one of the world’s largest metropolitan markets. Operating over 270 miles of track across Long Island, Brooklyn, and Queens, we connect businesses directly to the entire North American rail network through partnerships with Canadian Pacific, CSX, Norfolk Southern, and other regional railroads.

For nearly 30 years, NYA has helped local businesses thrive by providing frequent, reliable service with excellent highway access, including direct connections to Interstate 495. Our operations move the goods that keep the region’s economy strong, while also removing more than 120,000 trucks from the road each year, easing congestion and reducing emissions.

We’re proud of our track record:
•	Tripled freight volumes since partnering with LIRR three decades ago
•	Award-winning safety and training programs that put people first
•	Supporting 80+ local businesses with efficient, sustainable shipping 
        solutions
•	Strong partnerships with labor and workforce organizations, including 
        excellent contract negotiations with the BLET
•	Ongoing commitment to community initiatives that improve the lives of 
        local families
•	Consistent and careful coordination, integrating our service with the 
        busiest commuter train network in the country

With New York City’s demand for goods expected to grow by 40% over the next three decades, NYA is committed to helping businesses expand efficiently and sustainably while keeping our communities moving forward.

Name: Competency Australia
Description: Competency Australia is a Registered Training Organisation (RTO) providing training and assessment services to the railway industry.  We specialise in rail signalling, telecommunications and operations training.  We have been providing quality training to the railway industry since 2010.

Name: Amicale ESCV/ESCI/SUP'RESEAU
Description: Fondée en 1962, l’Amicale regroupe des cadres et cadres supérieurs en activité de SNCF Réseau, anciens élèves de l'école Sup'Réseau (Anciennement ESCV/EST/ESCI).

Name: National Rail Skills Hub
Description: Helping to grow Australia's rail workforce for the future.

Name: Railroad Industries Incorporated

Name: PSCCT, Perpignan Saint-Charles conteneur terminal
Description:
Le Terminal transfrontalier de PERPIGNAN MEDITERRANEE et d’OCCITANIE Pyrénées-Méditerranée a été construit en 1985 afin de favoriser le report modal en développant le fret sur le réseau ferroviaire.
  
La Société Anonyme d'Economie Mixte locale PERPIGNAN SAINT CHARLES CONTENEUR TERMINAL* exploite depuis 2013 ce site d’une superficie de 100 000m² capable d’accueillir des trains de 750m de long. 

Outil structurant pour le territoire, notamment par sa proximité avec la frontière franco-espagnole, ce Hub de transports combinés spécialisé dans les échanges Nord / Sud a connu une phase importante d’agrandissement et de modernisation entre 2008 et 2010. Cette transformation a permis de le hisser au rang de partenaire clés du report modal au niveau régional, national et international. 

PERPIGNAN SAINT CHARLES CONTENEUR TERMINAL propose aux acteurs de la chaîne de transport multimodal un ensemble complet de prestations : réception et expédition de trains, manœuvres ferroviaires, transbordements trains-camions ou camions-trains, vérification, manutention et stockage d’unité de transport intermodal, quelle que soit leur nature : caisses débâchables, remorques P400, conteneurs maritimes, citernes…, et quel que soit leur contenu. 

Le terminal compte aujourd’hui une trentaine de salariés, génère près de 200 emplois indirects et effectue plus de 45 000 transbordements par an, soit une moyenne de 180 par jour. Le terminal accueille les chauffeurs sur un site sécurisé disposant d’un grand parking, de sanitaires, douches et un espace de restauration et de détente. Ouvert à tous les opérateurs de transport, le terminal traite aujourd'hui des allers-retours de trains quasi-quotidiens avec 6 liaisons directes et 4 liaisons avec transbordements. (Contactez-nous pour davantage de renseignements.) 

Aujourd'hui, l’activité de PERPIGNAN SAINT CHARLES CONTENEUR TERMINAL permet d’éviter le rejet de 60 000 tonnes de CO2 par an, à la faveur de la de la transition écologique.

Name: Western Canadian Rail & Transportation Club WCRTC
Description:
It all started on a crisp Canadian winter evening in Ottawa, ON, the kind where the air outside was biting, but the warmth of a cozy pub made you forget the chill. Five industry professionals, each a leader in their respective field, sat around a table, Old Fashion's in hand, chatting about the ups and downs of their work. The conversation flowed from casual banter to the challenges of staying connected in an ever-evolving industry. It was the perfect mix of ambition, experience, and the raw honesty that comes with a drink in hand.

As the hours passed, their conversation shifted. They talked about the lack of a truly dedicated space for industry professionals to connect beyond the usual events and conferences. Something more personal. Something where real relationships could be built, ideas could be shared, and everyone – no matter their level – could grow and thrive.

One of them, feeling inspired, grabbed the nearest napkin (because who needs a fancy notebook when you’re brainstorming great ideas, right?). With a few quick sketches and words, they outlined the concept of a new industry club — a network where professionals could meet regularly, collaborate, and support one another’s growth. No formalities. No rigid structure. Just a group of people committed to helping each other succeed.

The table was buzzing with excitement. The idea was born. They didn’t need fancy pitches or proposals – all it took was a shared vision, a drink, and a napkin. By the time the night ended, they’d laid out the foundation for what would become The Western Canadian Railway & Transportation Club, a community driven by real connection, growth, and mutual support.

The club started as a simple idea over drinks, but quickly grew into a movement, bringing together hundreds of professionals eager to network, learn, and collaborate in ways they never had before.  Our goal is to expand our network, foster new opportunities, and continuously evolve as a hub for a Western Canadian legacy

Description:

Mest hållbara transportslaget
Vi har ett kvalitetssystem som innefattar extra lok- och vagnkapacitet som alltid säkrar avgång i rätt tid. Med oss kan du få en kundanpassad och hållbar järnvägslösning som möter alla dina behov.

Vår järnvägstrafik ersätter hundratals lastbilar varje dag. Under 2019 transporterade våra tåg motsvarande 37 000 lastbilar med släp, vilket innebär stora miljömässiga vinster. Uppskattningsvis ger vår järnvägstrafik en minskning av CO2-utsläppen med cirka 35 000 ton per år, vilket är 6% av vad motsvarande transporter skulle släppa ut med lastbil. Inget annat transportslag kommer i närheten av järnvägens låga utsläppsnivåer, inte ens fordon som drivs med biobränsle. Vår ambition är att skapa en koldioxidfri transportkedja vid avstånd över 100 km, och här är järnvägen en avgörande pusselbit.

 
Våra järnvägslinjer
Real Rail Sweden AB trafikerar följande linjer i båda riktningar:

Helsingborg/Nässjö-Umeå/Luleå

Bij SVO-rail kun je jezelf zijn. Wij zoeken een opdracht die bij jou past.

Als SVO-rail hebben we een missie: een duurzame bijdrage te leveren aan de economische ontwikkeling van Nederland door hoogwaardige kennis toe te voegen aan het spoor. Zo maken wij het verschil in het oplossen van mobiliteitsvraagstukken. En daar hebben we jou voor nodig.

	•	Transporcie kolejowym kruszywa, węgla, podkładów i TNWR na wagonach własnych oraz Klienta,
	•	Transporcie specjalistycznym maszyn torowych, taboru kolejowego i wagonów z/do naprawy,
	•	Spalinowej obsłudze pierwszej i ostatniej mili na terenie całej Polski,
	•	Wynajmie lokomotyw lekkich i ciężkich z pełną obsługą trakcyjną,
	•	Kompleksowej obsłudze bocznic kolejowych.

Firma działa na terenie całej Polski, a jej tabor – w tym lokomotywy manewrowe i pociągowe – zapewnia bardzo wysoki współczynnik sprawności. Dzięki wyposażeniu pojazdów w urządzenia GPS, Trainspeed gwarantuje stały monitoring realizacji usług, co podnosi poziom bezpieczeństwa oraz efektywności operacji transportowych.
Trainspeed Sp. z o.o. łączy wyjątkową jakość świadczonych usług z najwyższymi standardami bezpieczeństwa, co czyni ją wiarygodnym partnerem w transporcie kolejowym.

Zapraszamy do współpracy!
Trainspeed to firma, która z powodzeniem łączy innowacyjność, profesjonalizm i dbałość o szczegóły. Już dziś zapraszamy do współpracy firmy, które poszukują niezawodnego partnera w zakresie transportu kolejowego i obsługi trakcyjnej.

 Nasze cele:

2.	Edukacja i rozwój: Organizujemy szkolenia, webinaria i konferencje, aby kobiety mogły zdobywać nowe umiejętności i rozwijać się zawodowo. Wspieramy również mentoring i coaching.
3.	Zarządzanie: Dążymy do zwiększenia liczby kobiet na stanowiskach kierowniczych i zarządczych. Wspieramy programy rozwoju przywództwa i umiejętności zarządzania.
4.	Sieci kontaktów: Tworzymy przestrzeń dla kobiet, gdzie mogą wymieniać się doświadczeniami, budować relacje i wspierać się nawzajem.
 Dowiedz się więcej o nas na naszej stronie internetowej: Forum Kobiet w Infrastrukturze i Transporcie
Dołącz do naszej społeczności i razem przyczyniajmy się do rozwoju zawodowego kobiet w tych ważnych sektorach!

Name: Raileasy Ltd
Description:
Raileasy, launched in 2007, was the first privately funded, independent train ticket retailer to enter the market. We offer our services in desktop, mobile, and app formats, and our in-house Customer Support team is rated as "Excellent" by Trustpilot.

We are also the organisation that developed the original split ticketing algorithm, and since its launch in 2014, we have saved our customers over £42m. Our split ticketing brand, trainsplit.com, consistently finds cheaper fares compared to train operators and ticketing company sites and apps.

In addition to selling directly to the public, Raileasy provides dedicated rail ticketing services to a wide range of partners, including corporates, associations, charities, football clubs, transport providers, and the education and travel and tourism sectors.

We offer a full range of options tailored to suit the requirements of our partners, including simple affiliate links, iframe journey planners, white-label sites, and an API which gives new entrants access to a market leading journey planner, cheaper fares, and a range of consumer usability benefits.


Helping you travel more sustainably, we can compare each rail journey to the equivalent journey by car and calculate the emission savings.

Our Raileasy Corporate product has a range of corporate tools for all types of businesses, including:
- Various payment options, including lodged card, direct debit, and payment on invoice

- une innovation pour la régularité et la fréquence des trains en mass transit qui modernise et optimise la circulation des trains en Ile-de-France, renforçant ainsi la fiabilité et la performance du réseau. 
- en clair, c'est LA solution qui va permettre aux trains de circuler de manière ultra performante surtout aux heures de pointe

Seat & sleeper reservations
Rail Rover & Ranger tickets
Rail-Sail tickets to Ireland, Northern Ireland, Channel Islands & Isle of Man
Book by phone on 01388-661394  (Mon-Sat 09:00-12:25 then 13:00-16:00)





WHERE IT ALL BEGAN
 
Bishop Trains opened the doors at 9am on Saturday 21st January 2012, initially as a model railway shop but with big plans to become a rail travel agent running alongside the model railway side of the business.
 
When we first opened we were situated in the building now occupied by our good friends, Caps Off, a building that many locals will remember as the Bishop Auckland Driving Test Centre.
 
Given that the local area was pretty much devoid of a dedicated model railway shop, pretty much straight away the business became busy with many regular customers and unlike most similar shops we opened 7 days a week including public holidays.
 
During this time work was taking place behind the scenes in planning the travel centre and discussions with Northern Rail were ongoing. In the meantime, we opened a much-needed waiting room for passengers using the station.

Zwei Drittel der in den Schweizerischen Rheinhäfen umgeschlagenen Güter werden über die Bahn an- oder abtransportiert, ein Drittel von Lkws übernommen. Ohne enge Verbindungen zu den Verkehrsträgern Schiene und Strasse funktioniert die logistische Verflechtung der Hafenstrukturen in die europäischen Verkehrsnetze nicht. Ein effizientes Bindeglied von multimodalen Transportketten – also Transporten mit mehreren Verkehrsträgern zu sein, ist die Stärke der Häfen.

Die Umschlagsanlagen der Hafenbetriebe bieten für alle Güterverkehrsarten einen Umschlag auf die Bahn – egal ob Container, trockene oder flüssige Massengüter, Stück- oder Schwergüter. Beide Hafenbahnhöfe liegen sehr gut erreichbar am Schienengüterverkehrskorridor Rotterdam-Basel-Genua und bieten den Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen einen offenen Netzzugang an.

Description:
PROTOR GROUP Sp. z o.o. to partner technologiczny i serwisowy w branży kolejowej z ponad 80-letnimi tradycjami wynikającymi z funkcjonowania historycznych zakładów naprawczych, których kontynuacją jesteśmy. 

Nasze zakłady w Pyskowicach i Dąbrowie Górniczej realizują kompleksowe usługi utrzymania, naprawy oraz modernizacji taboru kolejowego — od wagonów towarowych po lokomotywy spalinowe i elektryczne — obsługując zarówno rynek polski, jak i klientów z Europy Środkowej.

Jako ECM-certyfikowany partner utrzymania taboru, oferujemy pełen zakres usług technicznych od przeglądów P1–P5, przez naprawy bieżące i awaryjne, po modernizacje podzespołów i układów technicznych. Dzięki inwestycjom w nowoczesne narzędzia, systemy zarządzania i procesy operacyjne, minimalizujemy czas przestojów i optymalizujemy koszty użytkowania taboru, co przekłada się na niezawodność Twojej floty.

Oferujemy także dzierżawę wagonów towarowych — z opcją kompleksowej opieki technicznej — wspierając operacje transportowe partnerów w przewozie materiałów sypkich i ładunków specjalistycznych.

Kluczowe kompetencje i obszary działalności

 Utrzymanie i naprawa wagonów towarowych
 Przeglądy na poziomach P1–P5
 Obsługa wagonów węglarek, cystern, platform, wagonów specjalistycznych
 Optymalizacja procesów i redukcja czasu przestojów

Name: Westwind Eisenbahnservice Gmbh
Description:
Wir sind ein führendes Unternehmen in der Bereitstellung von hochqualifizierten Lokführern für den Güterverkehr in Deutschland. Unser Fokus liegt darauf, Unternehmen im Bereich der Frachtlogistik mit erfahrenen und gut ausgebildeten Lokführern zu unterstützen, die höchsten Sicherheitsstandards entsprechen und den reibungslosen Betrieb von Güterzügen gewährleisten.

Unser Team besteht aus professionellen Lokführern mit umfangreicher Erfahrung im Frachtverkehr, die regelmäßig Schulungen und Weiterbildungen durchlaufen, um stets auf dem neuesten Stand der Technik und Vorschriften zu bleiben. Dabei legen wir großen Wert auf die Einhaltung strenger Sicherheitsrichtlinien und bieten maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für unsere Kunden.

Dank unserer Expertise und Flexibilität sind wir in der Lage, sowohl kurzfristige als auch langfristige Personallösungen anzubieten. Egal ob für regelmäßige Transporte oder besondere Anforderungen – wir finden für jedes Projekt die passende Lösung.

Unsere Leistungen:

Bereitstellung von qualifizierten Lokführern für den Güterverkehr
Flexibilität bei kurz- und langfristigen Personallösungen
Einhaltung der neuesten Sicherheitsstandards und gesetzlicher Vorschriften
Kontinuierliche Schulungen und Weiterbildungen unserer Mitarbeiter
Maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für individuelle Kundenanforderungen
Unser Ziel ist es, durch zuverlässigen und sicheren Personaleinsatz einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur Effizienz und Stabilität der Frachtlogistik in Deutschland zu leisten.

Name: Railroad & Industrial Preservation Society, Inc.
Description:
The non-profit Railroad & Industrial Preservation Society, Inc. was formed in 2021 by a group of historians interested in preserving and providing stewardship for railroad and industrial artifacts. The Society  has embarked upon the full operational restoration of Lehigh & New England Railroad #611 – one of America’s most historic diesel locomotives. 

Built in 1948, t#611 is the last surviving intact diesel electric locomotive from the LNE, which served the coal, slate and cement regions of eastern Pennsylvania along with northwestern New Jersey and southern New York. The locomotive later worked for the Ford Motor Company at the River Rouge steel mill in Dearborn, MI and for a variety of shortlines in Ohio and Indiana.

Die Schienen-Infrastrukturgesellschaft Prignitz mbH (kurz SIP) betreibt in Norddeutschland mehrere Anschlussbahnen als Eigentümer oder Anschlussbahnleiter. Dabei handelt es sich um Schienenwege, die zur Erschließung von Geländen dienen, die nicht unmittelbar zu der Eisenbahninfrastruktur in der Region gehören.

Die Anschlussbahnen der SIP bedienen oftmals Hafengelände oder Gewerbeparks.

Im Rahmen ihrer Leistungen stellt die SIP ihre Anschlussbahnen für Dritte zur Verfügung. Zu den grundlegenden Aufgaben gehören zudem die Verwaltung der Anlagen, die Wartung und Instandhaltung. Mit der Stellung eines Anschlussbahnleiters übernimmt die SIP Aufgaben in der Personalgestellung für Anschlussbahnen ohne entsprechenden eigenen Anschlussbahnleiter.

Gerne unterstützen wir zudem Unternehmen in der Einrichtung von Anschlussbahnen (auch Werksanschluss oder Werkgleis genannt) bei der Planung und Umsetzung.

Name: Evoll Engenharia
Description:
A Evoll Engenharia é uma empresa brasileira especializada em soluções de engenharia ferroviária que transformam eficiência operacional em vantagem competitiva sustentável. Sediada em Campo Grande, MS, unimos P&D aplicado, prototipagem e testes instrumentados para desenvolver tecnologias que reduzem custos operacionais, aumentam a disponibilidade de ativos e promovem a descarbonização do transporte ferroviário de cargas.

Nossa expertise abrange inspeções técnicas especializadas, desenvolvimento de soluções inovadoras e engenharia aplicada ao setor ferroviário, sempre com foco em entregar resultados mensuráveis para operadoras ferroviárias, fabricantes de material rodante e gestores de infraestrutura logística.

Nosso produto principal, o M-Truck, é um truque ferroviário de esterçamento passivo articulado que representa um avanço técnico significativo para o setor. Validado em testes rigorosos documentados em Ata Notarial, o sistema demonstrou performance superior aos truques convencionais: 76% menos atrito comparado a truques de três peças, 48% menos atrito versus truques amortecidos, e 23% mais eficiência energética (km/L) em condições padronizadas.

O M-Truck apresenta comportamento "à prova de descarrilamento", oferecendo maior estabilidade operacional, redução expressiva no desgaste de rodas e trilhos, menor consumo de combustível/energia e aumento da vida útil de ativos ferroviários. Com arquitetura de retrofit, o sistema pode ser implementado sem exigir nova infraestrutura, acelerando o retorno sobre investimento.

Conecte-se conosco: www.m-truck.tech
Location: Campo Grande, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Simulador Ferroviario Línea Gral. Roca - UNLa
Description:
Le damos la bienvenida a la página oficial de LinkedIn del proyecto de desarrollo universitario de Simulador Ferroviario.
https://simulador-ferroviario.super.site/
En esta plataforma, presentamos con satisfacción nuestro proyecto en desarrollo centrado en la creación de un simulador ferroviario. Somos un equipo interdisciplinario de estudiantes comprometidos en la creación de una herramienta educativa y aplicada que busca llevar la experiencia ferroviaria a un entorno virtual de alta fidelidad.

Nuestro objetivo es desarrollar un simulador que ofrezca una representación precisa y detallada de los aspectos operativos y logísticos de la industria ferroviaria. A través de la integración de tecnología de punta y la colaboración con profesionales de la industria, estamos trabajando para garantizar que nuestro simulador sea tanto una herramienta educativa efectiva como una plataforma que contribuya al entrenamiento y la comprensión de la operación ferroviaria.

A medida que avanzamos en este proyecto, mantenemos un compromiso firme con la excelencia y la relevancia. Damos la bienvenida a la oportunidad de conectar con otros profesionales, estudiantes y entusiastas interesados en el ámbito ferroviario y en la tecnología de simulación.

Les invitamos a seguir nuestra página para recibir actualizaciones periódicas sobre nuestro progreso y logros. Agradecemos su interés y apoyo en nuestro viaje hacia la creación de un simulador ferroviario de calidad y relevancia.

Name: 4R Projekty i Usługi

Projektujemy urządzenia SRK, elektroenergetykę kolejową i telekomunikację praktycznie na całym obszarze Polski w formule Projektuj i Buduj. Współpracujemy z większością Wykonawców i Producentów urządzeń srk na rynku polskim.

W zakresie urządzeń i systemów sterowania ruchem kolejowym, przygotowujemy opracowania dotyczące większości systemów i urządzeń zabudowanych na sieci PKP PLK S.A.: począwszy od mechanicznych (kluczowych i scentralizowanych), przekaźnikowych (m.in. typu E, PB, COB63), komputerowych (różnych producentów), systemów zabezpieczenia ruchu na przejazdach drogowo-kolejowych oraz systemów liniowych (blokady liniowe), urządzenia dSAT.

Współpracujemy też z innymi biurami projektowymi w zakresie opracowań branżowych.

Oferujemy pracę z wysokiej klasy specjalistami posiadającymi doświadczenie i uznanie na rynku krajowym w zakresie systemów sterowania ruchem kolejowym. Jeśli chcesz pracować w projektach na terenie całego kraju, rozwijać się zawodowo, dołącz do naszego młodego i ambitnego zespołu!

Name: Northumberland Line Community Rail Partnership (NLCRP)
Description:
Founded in 2024, we ultimately seek to fulfil the aims of the DfT Community Rail Strategy. 
We aim to help everyone to visit the area sustainably by train or utilise it for commuting or social needs - so whether it be for work or leisure, and we aim to work with and for local communities.

We work in partnership with Northern - the train company operating along the Northumberland Line Railway, providing a link between the rail industry and the public.

Our work is varied, 
*Increase awareness of the benefits of rail travel, rail services and products
*Encourage active travel and illustrate how travel by train is an opportunity for everyone
*Improve information provision at stations and in local communities
*Strive for good facilities, and speedy opening, at the railway stations along the Northumberland Line Railway
*Work with local communities, businesses, attractions to highlight how rail travel can be a benefit
*Increase local community involvement and eventually aiming to implement and support the Station Adoption scheme
*Strengthen links between the train operating company, the local communities and businesses
*In due course, work with schools and colleges, raising awareness of rail safety, career opportunities within the rail industry

We are hopeful of progressing on an appropriate timescale for a new CRP, to reach DfT accredited rail partnership status, and thereby undergoing an annual inspection to maintain accredited status thereafter.

Transportation consultancy specialising in visioning, blueprinting and specifying approaches to Traffic Management and Decision Support to maximise benefits from ETCS capabilities, and supporting railway infrastructure owners and undertakings to prepare the business changes to make best use of the emerging technology.

History
Following its foundation in 1999, Binary’s first two decades focused on providing wide-ranging expertise and advice to the Australian and Swiss transport sectors regarding major rail infrastructure projects. A particular focus was on transferring the Swiss experience with evaluating ETCS-suitable train control proposals to Australian suburban railways and in developing customer-friendly public transport concepts e.g. for the mid-term vision for Sydney's suburban rail system.
 
After acquisition by Emch+Berger AG Bern in 2021, Binary turned its focus towards the digital revolution taking place in the railway sector. The company took on key personnel with experience in both European and Australian markets driving organisational understanding of digitised railways and developing conceptual, business and technical solutions to achieve business goals.
 
Binary collaborates closely with the Emch+Berger TMS and Railway Systems teams, who have an extensive wealth of on-going experience with major European ETCS projects including those in Denmark, Germany, Switzerland, Finland, and Norway, in areas ranging from TMS and Decision Support to ETCS, IXL, standards, vehicles, timetabling, business change, and more.

Name: SOUTHWOLD RAILWAY TRUST
Description:
The Southwold Railway was a remarkable 3 foot narrow gauge railway linking the fashionable Suffolk seaside resort of Southwold with the Great Eastern main line at Halesworth 8¾ miles inland. Opened in 1879, it gently wound its way towards the sea through the beautiful valley of the River Blyth, with intermediate stations at Wenhaston, Blythburgh and Walberswick. After almost 50 years the line closed suddenly in April 1929, and we at the Southwold Railway Trust are dedicated to preserving the memory of this special little railway and re-opening as much of the old route as we can.
SOUTHWOLD RAILWAY TRUST is a Registered Charity (No. 1117041) and  a Company registered in England No. 5894122.

The society operates steam, diesel, petrol and electric operated locomotives and carries with its rolling stock roughly more than 20.000 passengers a year around in its opening season, around the roughly 5km of track, which exists of at least more that 5 different mainline routes.

Nuestro objetivo es contribuir al desarrollo de un transporte ferroviario más seguro, eficiente y sostenible, acompañando a nuestros clientes en todas las fases de sus proyectos: desde el diseño hasta la puesta en servicio. Nos integramos en los equipos de trabajo como un compañero más, haciendo que la gestión de riesgos sea un proceso claro, ágil y accesible.

 Especialización técnica
Estamos especializados en la evaluación y gestión de riesgos conforme al Reglamento (UE) 402/2013 (MCS 402), desarrollando expedientes de seguridad para cambios técnicos y elaborando la documentación necesaria para la aprobación de proyectos ferroviarios. También formamos y acompañamos a equipos técnicos en la aplicación práctica de esta metodología.

 Cómo trabajamos
Cada proyecto comienza con un análisis personalizado de necesidades, continúa con el diseño de una propuesta técnica adaptada y finaliza con una ejecución coordinada y transparente. Además, ofrecemos acompañamiento posterior para garantizar que cada cliente se sienta seguro y respaldado en todo momento.

 Lo que nos diferencia
Más allá de la capacidad técnica, en ALVEL destacamos por nuestra cercanía, flexibilidad y orientación a la confianza. Fomentamos la colaboración entre las partes interesadas, asegurando que todos los procesos se desarrollen de forma integrada, eficiente y conforme a la normativa vigente.

 En ALVEL creemos que la seguridad no es solo un requisito: es una forma de trabajar.

Description:
Volunteers are the lifeblood of any community organisation, without them the Walhalla Goldfields Railway would not exist and we thank them most sincerely.

Volunteers are ordinary people, individuals just like you, who have made themselves part of our railway and helped create something very special. You don’t have to be a railway fan to join in because it’s all about a sense of belonging, of making an effort and contributing to something worthwhile that adds value to our community.

Our members are diverse in age and skills but share a common bond of interest and enthusiasm, of camaraderie and friendship, of satisfaction and achievement. New volunteers are welcomed and valued, with the Walhalla Goldfields Railway providing the necessary training and resources in a friendly environment.

Volunteers include maintenance crew, railway guards, train drivers, shop assistants, historians and many other roles. Whatever your skills or your strengths we can find a place for you in our unique and spectacular railway and you can help us preserve an important part of Australia’s heritage.

If you’ve always wanted to be part of our community here in Walhalla why not apply today and join our magnificent team of volunteers. Call the office on 51656280 or email office@walhallarail.com.au

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

SteelWheels.Co is where railroad consulting meets real-world experience.
We’re not a think tank—we’re a do tank.

Built by a collective of field-proven professionals with decades of experience across every class and corner of the rail industry, we exist to bridge the gap between strategy and execution. From Class I operations to shortline revival, from trackbed to boardroom, SteelWheels.Co delivers transformative, grounded solutions.

We know the language of the railroad—spoken in steel, sweat, signals, and trust. Our clients bring us in when things aren’t just off track, but misaligned at a deeper level: culture, compliance, continuity, or customer confidence. We don’t offer off-the-shelf playbooks. We show up, embed, listen, assess, and act. With discipline. With clarity. With results.

At our core, we believe performance flows from purpose. That culture eats policy for breakfast. That trust is infrastructure. And that the best-run railroads are built from the inside out.

Services include:
	•	Operational turnaround & field performance audits
	•	Safety, compliance & FRA-readiness programs
	•	Infrastructure & asset strategy
	•	Terminal/crewroom culture restoration
	•	Stakeholder alignment & customer trust repair
	•	Embedded leadership & crisis stabilization
	•	Start-to-finish rail project planning & execution
	•	Custom SaaS advisory for railroad digital transformation

If you’re tired of lip service and looking for a team that can roll up its sleeves and deliver—SteelWheels.Co is ready.

Rail wisdom. Real results.

Name: CONNECTA-3
Description:
CONNECTA-3 aims at contributing to the Shift2Rail’s next generation of TCMS architectures and components with wireless capabilities. The research and development work will address the third phase of activities of the Shift2Rail Multi-Annual Action Plan (MAAP) on TD1.2 – TD Next Generation TCMS to reach higher Technology Readiness level (TRL) up to TRL6/7 expected.

This project covers the implementation and validation of the new technological concepts, standard specifications and architectures for the Train Control and Monitoring System defined within CONNECTA-1 and prototyped in CONNECTA-2. CONNECTA-3 Members will ensure that all the new TCMS technologies and developments will be implemented according to market needs and will be taken to market by the industry. Finally, the project aims to impact the performance at the railway system level by introducing breakthrough technologies that should revolutionize the TCMS concepts for the future.

Name: Cotswold Line Promotion Group
Description:
We are a voluntary organisation which was formed on 11 March 1978 with the aim of safeguarding and promoting improvements to rail and bus feeder services along the Oxford to Hereford railway, known as the North Cotswold Line.

The line had been at risk of full or part closure at the time, but the group has worked with successive train operators to increase frequency and quality of train services and station facilities since then.

Membership is currently around 1,700, and we believe that we are the second largest rail user group in the country, after the Friends of the Settle and Carlisle Railway. We always welcome new members as this enhances our position when engaging with the rail industry and with national and local government.

Name: Railpower, Inc.
Description:
In 2025, Railpower, Inc. launched a bold new chapter for the brand.  This new chapter has positioned the company as the industry’s leading developer of zero-emission hybrid switching locomotives utilizing batteries, fuel cells and hydrogen for next-generation rail technology.

Railpower has long been a recognized name in the rail industry, with a legacy rooted in pioneering hybrid and low-emission locomotive technology. Founded in 2001, Railpower introduced groundbreaking locomotive designs that combined battery power with a compact diesel engine to improve fuel efficiency and reduce emissions. The company’s innovative platforms including the GG20B, RP20BD, and other low-emission models were deployed across North America, helping railroads meet increasingly stringent environmental regulations.

Name: Secretaría Nacional del Ferrocarril
Description:
La Secretaría Nacional del Ferrocarril de Panamá lidera el proyecto ferroviario más ambicioso en la historia del país: una vía estratégica que conectará la Ciudad de Panamá con la frontera de Costa Rica, impulsando la descentralización económica, la competitividad y la integración regional. 

Nuestra misión es construir un sistema ferroviario sostenible y de clase mundial que complemente la plataforma logística panameña, fortalezca la conectividad multimodal y genere nuevas oportunidades de desarrollo para las comunidades a lo largo de su trazado. 

Con visión de futuro y compromiso con la sostenibilidad, trabajamos para dejar un legado que transforme la movilidad, dinamice la economía y posicione a Panamá como pionero en la conectividad ferroviaria regional.

Name: Nottingham Transport Heritage Centre
Description:
We are a volunteer-run company, home to numerous heritage vehicles, including buses, coaches, lorries and trains. At the Nottingham Transport Heritage Centre we showcase these unique and historic vehicles, some of which have been preserved and are ready for action as well as vehicles which are still under restoration. Most of the home fleet can be seen during events that are ran throughout the year.
Our centre is also home to the Great Central Railway Nottingham the preserved Great Central Main Line north of Loughborough, including Rushcliffe Halt and the branch to Ruddington Fields Station. On the line we run trains on selected weekends throughout the year to allowing visitors to experience travelling aboard heritage trains through the Nottinghamshire Countryside.
Reunification of the Great Central Railway Mainline and Great Central Railway North is well underway which will soon connect the two lines together allowing travel from Leicester to Nottingham.
To support our railway, buy tickets for events or get involved with volunteering visit our website at www.gcrn.co.uk/ or call us on 0115 9405705

Name: Waiting for the Train
Description:
Passenger train service was discontinued to Western NC in the 1970s.  A third of the state of North Carolina is isolated without any intercity public transportation, rail, bus or otherwise.

In 2023 two new neighbors, who moved into their homes one week apart, started a conversation about the whistle of the freight train they could hear at night.  Not a week later they read about the possibility of passenger rail returning to the region. In speaking with other neighbors and the local mayor, they formed Waiting For The Train, a citizens' group dedicated to working with all the communities along the line to help make that a reality.

It is clear that passenger rail is an essential common good, for the health of our economy, for the preservation of our natural beauty and for human connection.

Dennis Thiel, Senior Consultant und Geschäftsführer der InterEngineer Switzerland GmbH, betont die Bedeutung der Mobilität durch Bahntechnik in der Schweiz. Sein Ziel ist es, Geschäftsbeziehungen zu stärken und das Geschäftsfeld in der Schweiz nachhaltig auszubauen.

Förderung von Nachwuchstalenten:

Name: Transmark LTD.
Description:
Transmark is located in the heart of Southern Alberta, 3. Highway 4 runs adjacent to Transmark and is a part of the CANAMEX Corridor, directly connecting to Interstate 15 in Montana.

The Transmark rail facility is serviced daily by Canadian Pacific Railroad.

In 2001 Transmark began operations with 5 rail tracks {15,000 feet), a high-throughput dual lane 25,000 bushels per hour drag conveyer (train to truck) loading system, and a shuttle wagon. Transmark was originally built to handle large amounts of inbound commodities to supply the cattle feeding industry in Southern Alberta.

As of 2022 Transmark can store up to 1,500 railcars utilizing 68 tracks (119,000 feet). The strategic location provides customers with a unit train staging and storage location with first class railcar repair shops directly on site. Transmark continues to grow and is currently developing 35 acres to provide top tier service to its customers.

I.      Моментальный Расчет с Помощью Калькулятора:

1.	Расчет ставки железнодорожного тарифа по территориям следования вагона.

2.	Использованию систем анализа для повышения эффективности железнодорожных перевозок. Анализ и учет сверхнормативных простоев и штрафов

Name: RAILGAP
Description:
EGNSS satellite technology has already been identified as one of the game-changer technologies of the ERTMS and Command and Control System (CCS) evolutions aiming at saving investments and operational costs. Although, in the last years the item regarding the introduction of the satellite assets to allow the ERTMS to operate seamlessly with GNSS-based Virtual Balises functionally has been deeply investigated and analysed, there are still barriers preventing a large adoption of EGNSS.

RAILGAP will contribute to filling this gap through the development of innovative and advanced methodology related tools for designing accurate and reliable references, such as the development of innovative High Accuracy and High Precision Ground Truth and Digital Maps. RAILGAP is the first
project that will use Commercial trains to collect massive data from the fields overcoming main limitations.

RAILGAP is well identified as a relevant initiative to the EGNSS work program applications fostering green, safe and smart mobility. The prospect is to further enhance the recognized “green” characteristic of the rail transport consuming less than 2% of electricity in Europe and generating 1/10 of CO2 emission per passenger respect to airplanes. The adoption of EGNSS for train positioning is crucial to cut the lifecycle cost of railway transports and increase the railway capacity, reliability and punctuality to minimise the consumption of energy per passengers km.

Name: Dubai Metro Rails
Description:
DubaiMetroRails.com is a digital platform dedicated to helping commuters, tourists, and residents navigate Dubai’s world-class metro network with ease and confidence.

The website serves as a comprehensive guide to the Dubai Metro, offering up-to-date information on routes, station details, fare structures, timings, and new line developments. It covers the Red, Green, and upcoming Blue Lines, helping users efficiently plan their journeys across the city’s expanding rail ecosystem.

DubaiMetroRails.com was created with the goal of simplifying metro travel for everyone—whether it’s a resident commuting daily or a visitor exploring Dubai’s landmarks. Through detailed station pages, route maps, and fare calculators, it ensures every trip on the Dubai Metro is seamless and informed.

- Station-by-station guides with nearby landmarks, shopping, and dining recommendations
- Fare and zone-based ticketing insights, including Nol card usage 
- Updates on the upcoming Blue Line expansion and Route 2020 integration
- Blog resources featuring travel tips, attraction guides, and RTA updates.

The site’s mission is to make Dubai’s metro commute smarter, greener, and more connected. By combining metro knowledge with local insights, it continues to support Dubai’s vision of sustainable and efficient urban transportation.


DubaiMetroRails.com is your go-to digital guide to exploring Dubai’s metro network. From fare details and station maps to travel tips and expansion updates, we help residents and visitors navigate the city with ease. Our mission is to make every metro journey in Dubai smarter, faster, and more useful.

Name: Ment2Rail
Description:
Welcome to the Ment2rail Linkedin page!
After more than a decade of proven experience in rail freight (at Lineas, one of Europe’s main private rail freight operators) Ment2Rail will be your bespoke consultancy partner for inquiries regarding rail freight regulations.
Main focus is safety and regulations compliancy; this vision linked to an ‘on-the-job’ approach can help your company and staff in their daily operations and increase efficiency through compliant operations.
Ment2Rail provides expertise in 4 work areas:
Mentorship
Offering trainings and coaching for wagon inspectors, commercial and operational staff. Focus will be on GCU regulations and UIC loading guidelines. Trainings can be given in Dutch, French and English.
Monitoring
Compliance follow-up of complex rail freight regulations in an evolving European market and regulatory framework. Ment2Rail can offer compliancy checks, copy, training and translations (in Dutch, English, French, Spanish and German).
Maximize safety
Maximize safety in load securing, offer expertise for current load securing projects and new projects, review and expertise incidents, assist in field operations.
Modal shift
With a ‘Ment to Rail’ mentality, the gained expertise and twenty year experience in a variety of  transport modalities (road, rail, sea and air), offer bespoke consultancy in intermodal solutions.

Interested? Do not hesitate to reach out and find out how Ment2Rail can assist your business.

Name: Wantage Grove Station Supporters Group
Description:
'Wantage Grove Station Supporters Group' is a group of volunteers who would like to see the Oxfordshire railway station re-opened, which was unfortunately closed in December 1964 due to the Dr Beeching cuts.

The Great Western main line is still in use to this day, but GWR trains don't stop between Swindon and Didcot Parkway.

The railway line originally opened in 1846 and used to serve the Wantage and Grove community for 118 years.

Since 1964 the Wantage, Grove and surrounding villages community has grown significantly and it's now around c.34,000!

Growth in the Vale of White Horse District Council area is set to continue to grow 137,900 in 2020 to 174,000 by 2030 (+36,100, +26%).  Therefore, this is why we need the railway station to re-open in South Oxfordshire!

Name: BT Ingenium
Description:
BT Ingenium was founded in 2018 and provides engineering and management consulting services in the field of Railway Engineering / RAMS / SIL Design / Product HW/FW Design and ISO 9001 quality management.

The Company is the result of the experience of its founder and Technical Director, who has been working in the railway sector for 30 years and that in recent years, thanks to various consultancy activities carried out in the field of metalworking companies in the industrial sector, has widened the scope of skills offers in the area of quality management and design and management of the life cycle of functional safety systems in compliance with IEC 61508 (SIL2 / 3).

BT Ingenium srl offers technical and methodological consulting services in the R & D area and management of ISO 9001 quality systems to small and medium-sized companies in the railway and industrial market.

In the railway market the focus of skills is related to the design of electronic systems on board the rolling stock, the RAMS analysis from the subsystem up to the complete rolling stock, homologation process (Reg. UE 402/2013, ANSF 1/2016, ANSF 1/2019, ANSF 1/2015, TSI), SIL (EN 50129, EN 50128, EN 50657)  and the F & S (Fire and Smoke) compliance analyzes according to EN 45545 standard series.

In the industrial market the focus of skills is in the Quality management area with support to management for analysis, optimization and reorganization of business processes for the purpose of continuous improvement.

Consulting on the management of the SIL design life cycle and the design of Safety Critical electronic systems in compliance with IEC 61508 (qualified trainer for TUV certification body training services)

Name: NIGI Partners
Description:
NIGI Partners propose des services de conseil en ingénierie pour accompagner les sociétés dans la réussite et les évolutions de leurs projets dans le domaine du transport ferroviaire. 

Par notre expérience en conduite de projets complexes et nos connaissances techniques dans le domaine de la signalisation ferroviaire, nous apportons de réelles plus-values, à savoir :

Une mise en œuvre pragmatique et collaborative :
  - Une approche de la conduite de projets Lean terrain et mobilisatrice 
  - Une méthodologie structurée et systématique, moyen pertinent de valoriser rapidement les gains sur le terrain

Un ancrage de l’amélioration continue dans les modes de management :
  - Une analyse des pratiques de management (management visuel, rôles et responsabilités, animation de l’Amélioration Continue…) 
  - Un accompagnement progressif dans l’évolution des pratiques et des comportements managériaux
  - Une pérennisation par la mise en place de routines standardisées

Un accompagnement en mode coaching :
  - Une méthode : l’ancrage en interne, selon 3 modes de coaching
    > Faire pour : coaching par l’exemple - Conduite de projets d'amélioration
    > Faire avec : coaching par l’appui - Expertise dans les outils du Lean Six Sigma
    > Faire faire : coaching ponctuel - Accompagnement dans le temps 
  - Un objectif : rendre les acteurs autonomes à la suite de la mission

Du coaching et un apprentissage orienté action :
  - Nous sommes convaincus que l’apprentissage des pratiques et méthodologies doit se faire sur le terrain : cas concrets, projets d’application 
  - Nous visons à ce que les entreprises qui ont fait appel à nos services puissent à leur tour être des relais de compétences.

Pour plus d'informations, vous pouvez nous joindre à l'adresse suivante :

contact@nigi-partners.com

Name: International Sleeper Trains Ltd
Description:
Sleeper train services are no ordinary train services. They need to meet an elevated level of comfort, dignity and joy, to ensure customers can experience a successful night’s sleep on board and realise the benefits of choosing a train over a car or a plane. We want sleeper train customers to be rewarded for making that choice.

That means making sleeper trains and the experience of being on board a sleeper train, the most human-friendly, user-informed and considerate of any other train service. Understanding what customers need and want from a sleeper train service, now and in the future, becomes more than a customer experience point; it reconnects travel with being human.

International Sleeper Trains (IST) Ltd optimises sleeper travel with behavioural and operational insight. We do this by combining the technical and operational expertise you expect from a sleeper train consultancy with powerful behavioural science and user insight, to create solutions that are socially as well as functionally successful.

Name: Avon Valley Railway Heritage Trust
Description: Opened in 1869 by the Midland Railway as a route between the Midlands and the South Coast the Avon Valley Railway was later linked to the iconic Somerset & Dorset Railway. Closed under the Beeching Axe of the 1960s the line was preserved by an enthusiastic group of volunteers. today, some 50 years on, three miles of track has been re-laid, locomotives and carriages restored, and the sound of steam can once again be heard along the Avon Valley between Bristol and Bath. The Avon Valley Railway Heritage Trust seeks to restore, preserve, exhibit and operate railway locomotives, carriages, wagons, vehicles and other artefacts of historical interest for the benefit and education of the public.

Name: Tose Tejarat Toos
Description: Торгово-транспортная группа «Садро»- это интегрированная торговая компания, делающая бизнес динамичным и простым, чтобы помочь нашим клиентам расти и развиваться. Мы работаем с 2009 года с командой опытных инженеров по продажам и маркетингу. Специалисты нашей компании обеспечивают клиентам высококачественное сервисное обслуживание а также являются экспертами в вопросах внешнеэкономической деятельности, таможенного оформления, железнодорожных перевозок и логистики. Наша компания позволяет осуществлять доставку грузов «от двери до двери» и контролировать все этапы интермодальной транспортной цепочки. Большая часть операций Группы сосредоточена на международных перевозках в направлении Ирана, Среднюю Азию, и стран СНГ. Цели группы «Садро заключается в предоставлении всех услуг, связанных с экспортом и импортом, таких как: договор купли-продажи, железнодорожные перевозки, морских, воздушных и автомобильных транспортов, хранение и складирование и плановая передача товаров. За многолетний срок работы в сфере предоставления транспортно-экспедиторских услуг наша транспортная компания накопила большой положительный опыт на международные железнодорожные перевозки грузов таким странам как: Иран, Туркменистан, Кыргызстан, Узбекистан, Таджикистан и др.страны. «Садро» это взаимовыгодное сотрудничество на долгие годы и надежные грузоперевозки.

Name: Spa Valley Railway
Description: The Spa Valley Railway is a volunteer-run heritage railway based in Tunbridge Wells, Kent.  The line runs for a little over 5 miles between Tunbridge Wells West station and Eridge where it connects with mainline services. Trains are hauled by steam engines or heritage diesel engines.  The railway is supported by the Tunbridge Wells & Eridge Railway Preservation Society and operated by the Wealden Railway Company.

Name: SFM Serveis Ferroviaris de Mallorca
Description:
Serveis Ferroviaris de Mallorca (SFM) se constituye en 1994 como resultado del proceso de transferencia a la Comunidad Autónoma de las Illes Balears de los servicios que explotaba hasta el momento la empresa Ferrocarriles Españoles de Vía Estrecha (FEVE), dependiendo de la Administración Central del Estado. El objetivo de SFM es gestionar los servicios y las infraestructuras que controla como empresa pública para contribuir al crecimiento y mejora de la movilidad en la isla de Mallorca. Con ésta finalidad, se está trabajando la reapertura de las antiguas líneas ferroviarias, cerradas en el pasado y en el diseño y trazado de nuevas redes y rutas. 

Serveis Ferroviaris de Mallorca, gestiona de forma conjunta dos marcas:  La red de ferrocarriles y el Metro de Palma.

SFM quiere ofrecer una red de transporte público que favorezca el desarrollo la isla de Mallorca, que reduzca el impacto ambiental y al mismo tiempo satisfaga las necesidades de movilidad de los ciudadanos con un nivel de calidad y precios óptimos. 

Es por ello que SFM ha diseñado un plan de actuación con el objetivo de potenciar la locomoción en la isla de Mallorca, intentar ofrecer un transporte rápido, eficaz, barato, cómodo, seguro y ecológico. Todo ello, teniendo presente la necesidad de potenciar y mejorar los servicios, sobre todo a nivel de seguridad y prestaciones, la necesidad de construir y poner en funcionamiento nuevas infraestructuras y la recuperación y funcionamiento de vías férreas y estaciones en estado de deterioro. 

Estos tres ejes se completan con un proyecto de adaptación de la línea a las demandas de los viajeros y la adaptación a los tiempos actuales, a través de la oferta de billetes y bonos del día, creación de un servicio, instalación de máquinas expendedoras, etc.

Name: Twindej Norway

Med kreativitet, flexibilitet och tyngdpunkt inom tekniken har företaget sedan dess levererat kompetens till marknaden genom entreprenad, tekniska tjänster och utbildning. Vi är självförsörjande på utbildningar för den egna tjänsteverksamheten och utbildar marknaden i behov av lagstadgad säkerhet, kravställd kvalitet och systemteknik. Lagandan och den identitet som vi byggt upp karaktäriseras av att vi vågar utmana och prova annorlunda och smarta lösningar för att åstadkomma medarbetarglädje och nya affärsmöjligheter. Idag har vi ett väl fungerande koncept med digitaliserad utbildning och utveckling som vi gärna delar med oss av.

Name: Rail Charter Service
Description:
Rail Charter Service (RCS) est une société innovante qui transforme la façon de concevoir le voyage en train. Avec une vision claire de faire du voyage en train une expérience unique, pratique, agréable et écologique, nous réinventons la manière dont nous vous déplaçons en vous offrant une solution de privatisation de trains de voyageurs à la demande.
 

Créée en 2023, RCS a été bâtie sur une passion pour le voyage, un profond respect pour l'environnement, et le désir de fournir une alternative éco responsable au transport aérien et routier sur de longues distances. Avec une attention constante portée à l'innovation, à la qualité du service et à l'excellence opérationnelle.


Notre solution unique d'affrètement de trains de passagers à la demande offre une flexibilité et une commodité sans précédent. Grâce à notre savoir-faire, nos clients B2B peuvent désormais réserver et  privatiser un voyage en train selon leurs souhaits et préférences, permettant une expérience de voyage personnalisée et sans stress.
 

En tant qu'entreprise, RCS s'engage à promouvoir la durabilité à tous les niveaux. Nous travaillons constamment à améliorer nos services pour minimiser notre impact sur l'environnement tout en offrant un service de haute qualité à nos clients.

Notre force ? Une connaissance approfondie des infrastructures ferroviaires suisses, une équipe hautement qualifiée et une capacité d’intervention 24/7 sur l’ensemble de la Romandie. Nous proposons également un service de piquet pour les urgences et dérangements sur les lignes de contact.

Pourquoi choisir Flow-Rail ?

Name: BehindTheBarriers
Description:
The show that helps to infiltrate silos, creates connections, and break down the walls we have in our rail industry. I have spent over 18 years in the sector and through this journey I’ve always thought we don’t truly understand or appreciate who the people are within our industry and their challenges, big or small, their values and motivations.  
Whether it’s because of the organisations we work in, the disciplines we are categorised into, the locations we work from, or the role we undertake. Ultimately… we all have barriers, and I’ll be getting behind these by talking to people from across our industry to help you, the listener, create connections and an awareness that you are not alone… We all have similarities, and we are all, in our own way striving for the same thing… A Safer, Better industry for now, and for the future. I’ll be asking the guests to share their honest opinions, stories, challenges, and key lessons they have learnt in their career for you to take away and use. I’ll be asking the questions you all want to hear the answers too. I’ll also be asking what the guests’ visions and commitments are to improve our industry for now and for the future.  
Remember… the foundation of accomplishment is relationship, so let’s start to get behind the barriers.

Name: BT Ingenium
Description:
BT Ingenium was founded in 2018 and provides engineering and management consulting services in the field of Railway Engineering / RAMS / SIL Design / Product HW/FW Design and ISO 9001 quality management.

The Company is the result of the experience of its founder and Technical Director, who has been working in the railway sector for 30 years and that in recent years, thanks to various consultancy activities carried out in the field of metalworking companies in the industrial sector, has widened the scope of skills offers in the area of quality management and design and management of the life cycle of functional safety systems in compliance with IEC 61508 (SIL2 / 3).

BT Ingenium srls offers technical and methodological consulting services in the R & D area and management of ISO 9001 quality systems to small and medium-sized companies in the railway and industrial market.

In the railway market the focus of skills is related to the design of electronic systems on board the rolling stock, the RAMS analysis from the subsystem up to the complete rolling stock, homologation process (Reg. UE 402/2013, ANSF 1/2016, ANSF 1/2019, ANSF 1/2015, TSI), SIL (EN 50129, EN 50128, EN 50657)  and the F & S (Fire and Smoke) compliance analyzes according to EN 45545 standard series.

In the industrial market the focus of skills is in the Quality management area with support to management for analysis, optimization and reorganization of business processes for the purpose of continuous improvement.

Consulting on the management of the SIL design life cycle and the design of Safety Critical electronic systems in compliance with IEC 61508 (qualified trainer for TUV certification body training services)
