Votre projet d’infrastructure est soumis aux contraintes d’exploitation ferroviaires ?

 Je peux vous aider à traiter ces sujets très spécifiques !!

J’ai travaillé pendant 30 ans au sein de SNCF Réseau et Gares & Connexions dans les directions de projet, en passant par les différents postes : conducteur de travaux, chef de projet puis directeur de projet. J’ai donc œuvré en tant que Maitre d’œuvre et Maitre d’ouvrage.

 La prise en compte des contraintes d’exploitation ferroviaire dans les études et les travaux est réellement mon cœur de métier.

J’ai accompagné SNCF Gares & Connexion pour l’ensemble des aspects ferroviaires de la phase AVP du projet Gare Nice Aéroport. C’est l’exemple le plus récent de mon travail :

 Analyse des contraintes d’exploitation ferroviaire
 Méthodes, rendements et organisation des travaux
 Mission OPC sur l’ensemble de l’opération
 Programmation capacitaire : FIC – RP0
 Dossier d’organisation PRéDO
 Assistance à l’élaboration du Dossier de Conception Spécifique (Référentiels IG 94589 et 90033)

Mes compétences en ingénierie ferroviaire font dire à mes clients que j’ai une parfaite connaissance de la culture et des procédures de SNCF Réseau ce qui les rassure et les conforte dans l’atteinte de leurs objectifs.

Mon action présente également l’avantage de réduire les coûts, de consolider les plannings et bien plus encore !!

 La circulation des trains, les travaux en gare vous inquiètent ? 

 Je peux vous accompagner en apportant les actions adaptées en lien avec SNCF Réseau pour vous rassurer tout en optimisant votre action.

 N’hésitez pas à me contacter pour un bilan et une proposition d’accompagnement adaptée à chacun de vos besoins.

Name: Elizabethtown Industrial Railroad
Description:
The Elizabethtown Industrial Railroad, reporting marks EZR is a 1.2 mile short line railroad serving the Conewago Industrial Park in Elizabethtown PA. EZR interchanges with Norfolk Southern Railroad at Conewago PA. 
EZR is your "First Mile - Last Mile" connection to all points on the North American Rail Network including Canada and Mexico. Beginning with Norfolk Southern we can move your products virtually anywhere!
For freight customers not having direct rail service, EZR can even reach beyond the rails. By working with our transloading and trucking partners, we can move your freight directly to and from your door and still deliver the cost savings and environmental benefits of rail service.

Name: Stratus Folio
Description: Stratus Folio is an industry-leading Rail Fleet brokerage with an experienced team dedicated to finding the most efficient and cost-effective solutions for our clients. We assist with railcar leasing, subleasing, storage, and repair. Our relentless dedication to accuracy, consistency, and customer service positions us to foster long-term relationships with our customers and be a reliable partner for their rail fleet needs.

Name: BLET Ohio State Legislative Board
Description: The Ohio State Legislative Board for the Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen. We represent our members in matters of legislatition, regulation, and health and safety. Since 1863.

Name: Związek Samorządowych Przewoźników Kolejowych
Description: Jesteśmy organizacją skupiającą samorządowych przewoźników kolejowych, którzy odgrywają kluczową rolę w zapewnianiu zrównoważonego transportu publicznego w Polsce. Naszym celem jest wspieranie regionalnych przewozów kolejowych, które łączą społeczności lokalne, poprawiają dostępność transportową i wspierają rozwój gospodarczy regionów.

Name: RailSolutions LLC
Description: Valuation, consulting and advisory services for financial institutions, railroads, and private fleet owners who actively invest in railroad equipment

Name: Rubi Railtec Southeast Europe
Description: Unsere lokalen Mitarbeiter verfügen über ein breites Netzwerk sowie vertiefte Kenntnisse der Kultur und regulatorischen Vorgaben. Ergänzt durch Schweizer Know-how ermöglichen wir Anbietern von bahntechnischen Maschinen, Systemen oder speziellen Anlageteilen einen idealen Einstieg in den balkanischen Eisenbahnmarkt. Wir erarbeiten mit Ihnen Konzepte wie und bei wem Sie Ihre Produkte erfolgreich präsentieren können.

Name: METUSAN FUTURE GmbH
Description: As a subsidiary and company of the DVORAK Group, the startup METUSAN FUTURE GmbH is breaking new ground in the field of mechatronics and sensor development for railway infrastructure.

Name: City-Bahn Chemnitz
Description: Als Eisenbahnunternehmen im Herzen der „Stadt der Moderne“ sind wir Pulsgeber des Chemnitzer Modells und innovativer Verkehrsanbieter der Region. Auf der Schiene verbinden wir Eisenbahn und städtisches Straßenbahnnetz zu einem leistungsfähigen integrierten öffentlichen Personennahverkehrssystem und bieten den Menschen im mittelsächsischen Ballungsraum eine zuverlässige und umsteigefreie Verkehrsanbindung an die Chemnitzer Innenstadt. Unser Name ist Programm und so sorgen unsere mehr als 200 Mitarbeitenden der City-Bahn Chemnitz tagtäglich dafür, dass unsere Fahrgäste pünktlich und sicher an ihr Ziel kommen – im Interesse der Umwelt und für eine nachhaltige regionale Verkehrsentwicklung.

Name: Trainkos Sh.A
Description: Trainkos Sh.A është kompani e krijuar pas ndarjes së Hekurudhave të Kosovës Sh.A. Kompania Trainkos merret me transportin e  udhëtarëve, mallrave si dhe kontejnerave.

Name: BlueWren Consultants
Description:
BlueWren Consultants comprise of Rail industry experts who offer professional advice, guidance, and actionable solutions to businesses experiencing issues with their projects. Ranging from project mangement, staging, design, engineering or general readiness implementation and much more!

We offer a personable and collaborative approach, ensuring integration with core teams or stakeholders for best pratice and efficient deliverables. Providing project mangement support, consulting, assurance, risk mangement, value engineering and much more.

Name: FERROVIAIRE
Description:
Une entreprise créée en 2023 pour répondre aux besoins en services de sécurité ferroviaire.

Avec plus de 8 ans d’expérience dans le domaine de la sécurité ferroviaire, je m’engage à apporter le meilleur de mon parcours sur chaque chantier.

Mon activité principale est chef sécurité R RTE20100 pour des travaux tels que génie civil, travaux de voie, sondages, remplacements, etc. J’ai également d’autres fonctions tels que coordinateur et déclenchement.

N’hésitez pas à me contacter que ce soit pour un soutien temporaire ou pour une supervision à long terme.

Name: Momentum Trains
Description:
Momentum Trains is an international consortium comprising CAF, UGL Rail Services, Pacific Partnerships, CAF Investment Projects and DIF Infrastructure V Coöperatief.

Momentum Trains will design, build, finance and maintain the new regional rail fleet and the new purpose-built Mindyarra Maintenance Centre in Dubbo. 

The new trains will improve safety, amenities, accessibility and reliability for customers who travel from Sydney to many regional centres in NSW, as well as Canberra, Melbourne and Brisbane.

Momentum Trains and its consortium partners (CAF, UGL and CPB Contractors) are committed to providing opportunities for regional NSW businesses, Aboriginal businesses, social enterprises and Australian disability enterprises to participate in the Regional Rail supply chain where possible.

Name: Global Train Services LLC
Description:
Global Train Services (GTS) relentlessly pursues the implementation of advanced train control systems, namely positive train control (PTC).  Founder and CEO, Eileen Reilly, has successfully developed, implemented, and lobbied for advanced rail safety systems for the last three decades, with a focus on PTC for the past 23 years. Eileen leads a team of experienced railroad and technology professionals to assist railroads with meeting the deadlines required  by Rail Safety Improvement Act of 2008. 

As of January 15, 2020, GTS is a member of the ASLRRA's Preferred Provider Program. We offer PTC implementation and support services, and grant writing services at a discounted rate through the Associations Member Discount Program to ASLRRA members.

GTS capabilities Include:

PTC Consultation (All aspects)
Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) Filings (PTCDP, PTCIP, PTCSP)
Successful preparation CRISI Grants, (All components)
Software Development
All functionality needed for testing
Project Management

Name: Alleanza Rail, LLC
Description:
Alleanza Rail is an industrial switching company, based in Alabama, that provides a safe and efficient means of interfacing with its industrial customers and the Class 1 railroads. Our team has over 70 years of combined experience and knowledge to customize a solution to safely meet your fleet needs while maintaining costs.
Alleanza Rail can provide new track construction, as well as maintenance of way for both industrial facilities and short line railroads. Our comprehensive inventory of specialized equipment allows our highly trained personnel to be productive and efficient while maintaining a safe work environment. Our services include industrial yard maintenance, switch installation (electric and manual), as well as tie replacement, thermite welding, frog and switch point welding, and repairs.

Name: UTL AG
Description:
Die Umwelt + Transportlogistik AG wurde 2002 gegründet, kurz nach ihrer deutschen Schwestergesellschaft UTL GmbH (Gründung 2001). Ursprünglicher Unternehmenszweck war die Abwicklung von Zügen der Baustellenlogistik, von Logistikleistungen im Bereich Bauzügen und von Gleisbauzügen – stets im Dreiländereck Schweiz, Deutschland und Österreich rund um den Bodensee.

Mit der Zeit kamen Aufgaben im Bereich des Personalverleihs für Kunden im Güter- und Personenverkehr hinzu. Seit dem Jahr 2005 verfügen wir über eine Bewilligung zum grenzüberschreitenden Personalverleih. Aber auch bei der Planung und Umsetzung von Gütertransporten und Logistik- sowie Entsorgungsaufgaben haben wir die nötige Expertise und Erfahrung – über die Landesgrenzen hinaus. Nachhaltigkeit und Recycling stehen dabei stets im Fokus.

Name: PTSI Transportation
Description:
With almost half a century of service to the railway and transportation industry, PTSI Transportation has found its market niche in areas not well served by other consultancies. For the railway and transit industries in particular, these include customer and on board service, marketing, operations training tools and management systems and standards. Railway passenger equipment and motor coach service and operations are additional specialties.

The heart of PTSI Transportation and its capabilities lies in its team of some 40 transportation professionals. The team has collective experience of about 1,500 years, and includes persons who have been out “on the ground and in the field” as well as those with doctoral degrees, and professional engineers and planners. We bring a multinational perspective with associates and advisors from Britain and Australia as well as the United States.

Our headquarters are centrally located in the New York/New Jersey metropolitan area, within sight of (and about twenty-five minutes from) the skyscrapers of Manhattan.

Name: FRASCA
Description:
Chez FRASCA, nous sommes spécialisés dans la pose, le renouvellement et l'entretien de voies ferrées en France, essentiellement en Ile-de-France.

En tant que filiale de TSO, leader des infrastructures ferroviaires depuis 1927, nous bénéficions de synergies pour relever les défis techniques et environnementaux.

Travailler dans le ferroviaire, c'est œuvrer pour un moyen de transport plus respectueux de l'environnement, contribuant ainsi à un avenir durable.

Name: Tenax Protection
Description:
With over 30 years of combined rail experience across Australia, the United Kingdom, and South Africa, the founding members of Tenax Protection identified a critical shortage of suitably trained, experienced, and supported Safeworking professionals.

Established in early 2019 with a team of four handpicked Train Field Protection Coordinators (TFPCs), Tenax Protection set out with a clear vision: to provide the Victorian railway network with highly competent and well-supported Safeworking personnel.

Since our inception, we have experienced significant and consistent growth, driven by our commitment to quality and excellence. From a small team, we have expanded rapidly to meet the growing demand for our services, and our trajectory continues to trend upward.

Tenax Protection remains dedicated to upholding the highest standards in Safeworking and contributing to the safe and efficient operation of Victoria's railways.

Name: General Resources Vietnam Company Limited
Description:
GRC is an EPC solution provider active in the field of mass rapid transit E&M engineering works with its headquarters situated in Taiwan.
Within its 35 years of establishment, GRC has collaborated with well-known mass transit industry players across the globe.
Our scope of services includes but is not limited to engineering and construction management services covering the systems of, signalling, telecommunication, power supply, platform screen doors, SCADA(Supervisory Control And Data Acquisition), and automatic fare collection.
GRC is proud of its past accomplishments and aims to continually provide the most optimized solutions for our partners in the future.
To create a mutually benefitting environment to facilitate the development of infrastructure projects in the Asia-Pacific and South-East Asia regions. Currently, GRC has operations in Taiwan, Hong Kong, China, and Vietnam with also supportive resources in Singapore and Malaysia.
Location: Thao Dien ward, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: LSFB - Landesanstalt Schienenfahrzeuge Berlin
Description:
Die Landesanstalt Schienenfahrzeuge Berlin (LSFB) ist eine Anstalt öffentlichen Rechts. Unser Gewährträger ist das Land Berlin.

Wir sind die künftige Eigentümerin der neuen S-Bahn-Fahrzeuge für die Teilnetze Stadtbahn und Nord-Süd. Deren Hersteller und zukünftiger Instandhalter wird derzeit im Rahmen einer Europaweiten Ausschreibung von den Ländern Berlin und Brandenburg gesucht und ausgewählt. 

Unsere Hauptaufgaben sind die Finanzierung und Überwachung des Fahrzeugbaus sowie der anschließenden Instandhaltung. Wir werden die Fahrzeuge nach Fertigstellung dem oder den zukünftigen Verkehrsunternehmen (EVU) zur Nutzung überlassen.

Sie möchten mehr über uns wissen? Dann schauen Sie gern auf unserer Website vorbei oder schreiben uns eine Mail an info@lsfb.berlin.

Name: HFC Rail
Description:
At We are committed to building solid relationships with industry partners and ensuring the safe construction of railway infrastructure solutions Australia wide.

With a proven track record of successfully delivering services to clients such as ARTC, Transport for NSW, Rhomberg, Laing O'Rourke, John Holland, NSW Ports, Downer, and others, we proudly offer exceptional services in:

Aluminothermic Welding and Rerailing
Turnout Renewals and Refurbishments
Track Reconditioning and Reconstruction
Track Construction
Light Rail Construction – Trelleborg and Pandrol Systems
Track Slab Construction
Ballast Undercutting and Boghole Removal
Drainage Works
CSR Works
Level Crossing Upgrades
Steel Replacement – Closures, GIJs, Turnout Steel Components
Partial Re-Sleepering (PRS) for Plain Line and Turnouts
Crane Rail Welding and Installation – Gantrex/Thermit/Gantrail
Culvert Installation

Name: RHT RailHaul Technologies Inc.
Description:
Our core technology is a Distributed Power, Energy Harvesting and Traction (D-PEHT) system. The RailHaul D-PEHT system is deployable across multiple freight rail applications. Applied to existing freight rolling stock, D-PEHT is integrated via the standard signals from the control locomotive.

RailHaul is also working with clients that require a purpose designed and built rail shuttle system (for example the Halifax Port Authority). In these cases, RailHaul – through its technology partners - is integrating sensors and controls with the self-propelled freight rail cars to provide for remote operation of “RailHaul Shuttles”.

Name: 3PT
Description: Expert in public transport

Name: RISAS
Description: RISAS has been designed by the rail industry to ensure that duty holders and other major customers, such as ROSCOs, are able to rely upon common third party assessments by accredited Railway Industry Supplier Approval Bodies (RISABs).

Name: Corporación del Patrimonio Ferroviario
Description:
Somos la Corporación del Patrimonio Ferroviario (ACCPF), fundada en 1984 y actualmente únicos operadores de trenes turísticos y larga distancia de Chile, mediante contrato con la Empresa de los Ferrocarriles del Estado.

La Corporación del Patrimonio es una entidad privada sin fines de lucro que tiene a cargo los servicios turísticos “Tren del Recuerdo” entre Santiago, San Antonio y Limache, además del servicio de larga distancia Santiago – Concepción. A su vez, a través de la filial Los Andes, operamos la Góndola Carril entre Los Andes y Río Blanco.

La Corporación del Patrimonio ferroviario tiene por objetivos restaurar, conservar y operar material rodante patrimonial, ya que mantiene en custodia un centenar de equipos. Una de las últimas restauraciones fue el Automotor AES-11 de origen argentino que es exhibido en el Día del Patrimonio Cultural.

En el año 2010 y luego de un complejo proceso de re organización debido a que había perdido la operación de los trenes, un nuevo directorio propone una estrategia de desarrollo a la Empresa de los Ferrocarriles del Estado de Chile, quienes acogen esta iniciativa, conscientes de la renovación de la corporación. De esta manera, se vuelve a operar el Tren del Recuerdo, esta vez con un proyecto sólido y permanente desde mayo de 2011.

Asimismo, durante 2019 y gracias al trabajo permanente, la Corporación recibe el mandato de EFE para operar el servicio de Larga Distancia Santiago-Concepción, que se concreta en el verano de 2020.

A partir de 2021 y luego de la emergencia sanitaria, la ACCPF retoma el servicio Santiago-Concepción, operando los fines de semana festivos y la temporada estival de vacaciones.

Name: Fasser Engenharia
Autocom Rail Services
Description: Railroad Railcar Repair

Name: 12k Trains SA
Description: 12k Trains Group Limited is a Pan African trains and logistics company riding on the success of electric trains...

Name: Fort Wayne Railroad Historical Society, Inc.
Description: The Fort Wayne Railroad Historical Society, Inc. (FWRHS) is an award-winning, 501(c)3 non-profit corporation founded in 1972 and dedicated to providing outstanding, hands-on, educational experiences with historic railroad equipment and artifacts significant to Northeast Indiana.

Name: RIN - Rail Innovation Network
Description: La Rail Innovation Network (RIN) tiene como objetivo crear una poderosa colaboración entre la academia y la industria, con el objetivo de impulsar un cambio en la innovación en el sector ferroviario y acelerar la adopción de las nuevas tecnologías y productos desde la fase de investigación hasta su posterior aplicación en el mercado a nivel mundial.

Name: RIFA (Rail Industry Fire Association)
Description: RIFA is a global association established with the objective to share information, experience, and best practice in the management of fire safety throughout the Railway Industry.

Name: nuorail
Description: Nuorail develops advanced driver assistance systems for railways, enhancing energy efficiency and operational reliability. Our technology solves complex real-time optimization problems involving hundreds of variables—within milliseconds.

Name: International Rail Training & Consultancy Ltd
Description: A company set up to help organisations to reduce the risk when planning, managing and operating Plant working in the Rail Industry through maximising their employees’ skills. Provision of digital POS and ALO systems to ensure all records accessible at any time, provision of tools to reduce risk of knowledge fade and reduce paperwork.

Name: Eleda Rail
Description:
Snabbt växande helhetsleverantör av tjänster för järnväg spårväg och tunnelbana.

Eleda Rail är en helhetsleverantör av tjänster för järnväg, spårväg och tunnelbana. Vi erbjuder helhetslösningar inom, markarbeten, BEST-arbeten och innehar en gedigen kompetens inom projektledning. Vi utför alla typer projekt inom om- och nybyggnation samt underhåll. Vi skapar värde genom att utveckla de bästa lokala marknadsledande företagen i kombination med fördelarna med att ingå i en större grupp med kunskapsutbyte inom och mellan våra företag. Baserat på en nära kunddialog utvecklar vi bättre och sammanhållna erbjudanden till våra kunder.

Verksamheten byggs inom ramen för en ledande och snabbt växande leverantör av infrastrukturlösningar i utvalda nischer inom eldistribution, teknik, vatten och transport i Norden – Eleda.

Name: Cambridge University Railway Club (CURC)
Description:
Founded in 1911 from the Cambridge University branch of The Railway Club, Cambridge University Railway Club (CURC) is the second oldest railway enthusiast club in the world. Today its members’ interests cover the whole of the railway scene, both in Britain and throughout the world. The club is primarily run by students and staff of the University of Cambridge. The club is not all about train talk, but a direct pathway to potential graduate employers, and we have a celebrated history of CURC alumni who now work at the most senior levels within the industry. The CURC tries to arrange an event in Cambridge every week during Full Term, with at least one event holding a Member’s Formal to allow the conversation continue with the speaker over dinner. On most occasions this involves an invited speaker giving an illustrated talk on a specific subject, and this is almost always a professional from within the rail industry or preservation.

We are one of the few students railway societies in the United Kingdom, and we would like to build up more relationships. Please do get in touch if you wish to find out more. The club would like to maintain a good relationship with all members, and we would love to hear from any current and graduated members of the club.

Name: Rio Grande Pacific Technology
Description:
Rio Grande Pacific Technology (RIOTECH) harnesses over 130 years of combined operational and technical experience to create signal engineering design and technology software solutions for our customers

We develop innovative, turnkey solutions to the challenges faced by transit agencies, freight railroads, and short line railroads across the United States that:

- Enhance safety
- Increase operational efficiency
- Elevate our clients’ bottom line
- Strengthen our clients’ operating performance through analytics and reporting capabilities

Name: Unikol
Description:
UNIKOL – Kompleksowe usługi kolejowe

Jesteśmy polską firmą z siedzibą w Kostrzynie nad Odrą, specjalizującą się w transporcie kolejowym, obsłudze bocznic oraz naprawie i utrzymaniu taboru.

 Licencja przewoźnika kolejowego – realizujemy transport towarowy na terenie całej Polski.
 Profesjonalna obsługa bocznic kolejowych – zapewniamy kompleksowe usługi manewrowe i logistyczne.
 Własna lokomotywownia i doświadczony zespół – prowadzimy remonty, modernizacje oraz utrzymanie lokomotyw i wagonów.

Dzięki wieloletniemu doświadczeniu i szerokiemu zapleczu technicznemu współpracujemy z największymi firmami z branży kolejowej.

 Unikol – Twój partner w transporcie kolejowym i utrzymaniu taboru.

Name: Indonesia Railway Diaspora
Description:
Indonesia Railway Diaspora is a community established in a LinkedIn chat group by Bedy Kharisma back in 2019. The purpose of the community is to connect Indonesians working or studying in the overseas railway industry across the value chain, from manufacturers to operators, engineering and business consultants, and researchers, and to share as much knowledge as possible to help build Indonesia's railway practices. We have so far gathered 40+ members in 7+ countries of residence, and the number is continuously growing. 

Join us as we continue to bridge the gap and bring global railway expertise to Indonesia. We will be back with more exciting discussions on hot railway topics.

Name: TRAIN & TECHNICAL SERVICE GmbH
Description:
Die Firma TRAIN  & TECHNICAL SERVICE GmbH ist spezialisiert auf die Bereitstellung von Wagenmeistern sowie Triebfahrzeugführern. 

Unsere Personale:
ca. 50 Wagenmeister (Alle Stufe 4 + Rangierbegleiter)
ca. 20 Triebfahrzeugführer
2 ZF RB Bau
2 Disponenten

Name: Online Rail Courses
Description:
Online Rail Courses helps HM Forces leavers and career changers start new careers in rail through flexible, accessible online training.

Our flagship programme 'Introduction to Rolling Stock' is designed to bridge the skills gap by providing:
• Rail-Specific Knowledge: How electric and diesel trains work and how they interact with rail infrastructure
• Commercial Awareness: Understanding the industry structure and how various rail companies operate
• Industry Standards & Compliance: Insight into the safety-critical and regulated environment of modern railways
• Practical Career Support: Guidance on researching train companies, CV preparation, and interview techniques.

Created by a former RAF engineer with over 16 years of hands-on rail experience, the course delivers the knowledge, confidence, and industry insight that employers value. ORC are proud to be the only online rail training provider recognised as a Preferred Supplier by the MOD’s Career Transition Partnership (CTP).

This is just the beginning. With more courses in development, the mission is to make the rail industry accessible to anyone ready for a fresh start.

Name: KG Rail
Description:
KG Rail to firma świadcząca kompleksowe usługi w zakresie kontroli, szkoleń oraz zarządzania dokumentacją w branży kolejowej. Specjalizujemy się w zapewnianiu najwyższych poziomów bezpieczeństwa oraz jakości w ruchu kolejowym, oferując szeroki zakres usług wsparcia funkcjonowania przedsiębiorstwa w obszarze pracy maszynistów, rewidentów taboru, ustawiaczy oraz innych pracowników mających bezpośredni wpływ na bezpieczeństwo ruchu kolejowego.

Nasze główne obszary działania to:
- Prowadzenie dokumentacji.
- Kontrole pracy, pojazdów, dokumentacji i wyposażenia.
- Jazdy instruktażowe oraz egzaminy.
- Szkolenia okresowe oraz usługi Ośrodka szkolenia.
 
KG Rail to zespół profesjonalnych praktyków z wieloletnim doświadczeniem, oferujących szeroką gamę usług skierowanych dla poprawy bezpieczeństwa, efektywności i jakości. Dzięki doświadczeniu i innowacyjnym rozwiązaniom nasza firma skutecznie wspiera rozwój przedsiębiorstw kolejowych oraz zapewnia wysoki poziom kompetencji pracowników.

Name: Preßnitztalbahn
Description: Die schönste Schmalspurbahn in Sachsen.

Name: Seoul Metro
Description: Seoul Metro operates one of the world’s largest urban railway networks, comprised of Subway Lines 1 to 8 and the second and third sections of Subway Line 9 (288 stations, 311.7 kilometers).

Name: ETF Services RH
Description:
ETF services est spécialisée dans le transport ferroviaire et les missions de sécurité ferroviaire. Elle assure la traction des trains de travaux, les manœuvres sur bases arrières et l'annonce humaine qui protège les acteurs des chantiers en zone dangereuse.

L'ADN d'ETF Services c'est votre sécurité et celle de vos transports ferroviaires.

Nous proposons une offre multi-métiers : 
- Conduite des trains de travaux
- Acheminement des engins (France)
- Sécurisation des chantiers (annonce humaine, Agent LAM)
- Gestion de bases arrières 
- Accompagnement des trains de travaux en zone de chantier (ATTX)
- Sécurisation électrique (perchage)
- Formation travaux et tâches essentielles de sécurité
- Poste de commandement H24 et 7j/7

Ces missions, nous les assumons en favorisant naturellement la régularité, la ponctualité mais surtout et l’intégrité physique des Femmes et des Hommes sur le terrain. Nous le faisons en déployant une culture de la sécurité à tous les niveaux, renforcée par la qualité de notre dispositif de formation et un robuste Système de Management de la Sécurité.

ETF Services, est animée par six valeurs qui guident ses actions, ses réalisations et son ambition : devenir pour nos Clients le partenaire de référence en sécurité des chantiers ferroviaires.

Satisfaction Client
De nos clients et des bénéﬁciaires de nos ouvrages

Esprit d’équipe
Travailler ensemble, pour être plus performant

Prévention
S’engager au quotidien pour la santé et la sécurité de tous nos collaborateurs.

Performance responsable
Réussir, dans le respect des équilibres sociaux et environnementaux.

Innovation
Sortir des sentiers battus, trouver pour chaque projet la solution sur-mesure.

Esprit d’entrepreneur
Aimer se dépasser, pour conquérir de nouveaux marchés.

Name: AlbanRail
Description:
Since 2007, AlbanRail has been a trusted provider of Railway Signalling and civil Infrastructure solutions across the UK. With over 23 years of combined Railway industry staff experience. We specialise in delivering safe and successful Signalling Installations, new projects, re-signalling, cable route works, and moderate civil groundwork, including cable laying, devegetation, and foundation preparation.

Our skilled and qualified team handles the preparation, delivery, and Installation of Signalling Assets and Equipment to meet all industry standards and Client requirements. We also excel in cable and wire Termination, Modifications, Testing Support , Commissioning, and the De-commissioning and Recoveries of outdated Systems.

Die 1912 eröffnete, rund 8,81 km lange Stammstrecke zweigt in Sursee von der SBB-Hauptstrecke Olten–Luzern ab und führt das Surental abwärts über Geuensee und Büron bis Triengen, wo sich Depot und Werkstätte befinden. Seit Oktober 2018 verfügt die ST über die Eisenbahninfrastruktur-Konzession (EBK) für den Streckenabschnitt Hinwil–Bäretswil, der von den SBB übernommen wurde, sowie seit Dezember 2018 den Streckenabschnitt Bäretswil–Bauma, der vom Dampfbahn-Verein Zürcher Oberland (DVZO) langfristig gepachtet wurde.

Name: Water-Trak Limited
Description: Water-Trak is an innovative solution to the rail industry problem of low adhesion, often referred to as "leaves on the line" or slippery rail. Water-Trak exploits the findings of rail industry research going back to the 1970s which highlighted the critical role that water plays in low adhesion. A dry rail, even with contamination, gives excellent adhesion - with friction coefficients as high as 0.3 to 0.5. A fully wetted contaminated rail, for example during rain, still provides a good level of adhesion with friction coefficients above 0.1. However, a small amount of moisture combined with contaminants such as iron oxides or leaf matter can lead to very poor adhesion. The friction coefficient can drop as low as 0.01, leading to serious problems for train braking and traction. By delivering a small amount of water ahead of the leading axles of the trains, Water-Trak creates "rainy day" conditions, providing the train driver with optimised and predictable braking. Water-Trak is currently in service on two train classes operated by Northern Trains and is soon to be fitted to two further train classes, operated by South Western Railway.

Our mission at CJ Performance Consulting Ltd is to support and advice UK and European railway companies to enter the French railway market.
As you may know, the French railway market is transitioning from the historical operator, SNCF to name it, to a competitive Concession market model, especially for Regional and Intercity lines. This is an unprecedented lifetime opportunity in term of market share redistribution, and no UK or European operator can afford to miss out.
Two key barriers of entry that CJ Performance Consulting Ltd remove: 1-Knowledge in the French market and the way of working from the historical operator SNCF, 2-the language barrier, and French culture – Apologies on this point but you must be French to understand French people.

Für den sicheren Betrieb auf allen Strecken sorgt unser modernes elektronisches Stellwerk (ESTW).
Im Juni 2012 sind die Leitstelle, der Betriebssitz und der Firmensitz der EVS in das neu sanierte Bahnhofsgebäude, in die Rhenaniastraße 1, 52222 Stolberg, gezogen.

Name: Mumbai Metro Rail Project
Description:
Mumbai Metro Rail Project 

The Mumbai Metro Rail Project, spearheaded by the Government of Maharashtra and Maharashtra Metro Rail Corporation Limited (MahaMetro), is a transformative initiative to revolutionize Mumbai’s public transport system. With a vision to reduce traffic congestion and enhance connectivity, the metro network spans over 300 km, connecting key residential, commercial, and business districts.

Key Objectives:
Enhanced Connectivity: The metro network aims to connect critical areas, including South Mumbai, Andheri, Borivali, and Thane, improving daily commute efficiency.

Traffic Decongestion: With rising traffic congestion, the metro offers a sustainable alternative, reducing dependence on private vehicles.

Sustainability Focus: Designed with energy-efficient systems and eco-friendly technologies, the metro prioritizes environmental sustainability.

Economic Growth: By improving connectivity, the metro stimulates real estate development and attracts investments, boosting local economies.

Job Creation: The project creates significant employment opportunities during both construction and operational phases.

Key Corridors:
Metro Line 1 (Versova - Ghatkopar), operational since 2014, has reduced travel time.

Metro Line 2A (Dahisar - DN Nagar) enhances access to western suburbs.

Metro Line 3 (Colaba - Bandra - SEEPZ), Mumbai’s first underground metro line, will significantly improve travel across the city.

Metro Line 7 (Dahisar East - Andheri East) will ease commuting for thousands.

Impact:
The Mumbai Metro aims to ease pressure on the suburban rail system, providing a reliable, efficient, and safe transportation option. It is expected to improve the quality of life, foster economic growth, and contribute to a sustainable urban future for Mumbai.

#MumbaiMetro #PublicTransport #UrbanDevelopment #Infrastructure #SmartCities #MahaMetro #Sustainability

Name: Eastern Carolina Rail
Description:
The mission of Eastern Carolina Rail is to engage the resources of Southeastern North Carolina, through both public and private efforts, to restore rail passenger service from Wilmington to Raleigh, North Carolina. 

Eastern Carolina Rail is a non-profit corporation incorporated under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Eastern Carolina Rail's initiative has garnered significant public support. With federal and state funding available, the mission is to rally further public and private support, recognizing that this collective effort will transform this initiative into a tangible reality.

Following the initial blueprint released by the North Carolina Department of Transportation (NCDOT) of the 2005 Southeastern North Carolina Passenger Rail Study, Eastern Carolina Rail has played a pivotal role in bringing light to the initiative, engaging public and private sector stakeholders, and engaging with public officials to gain the needed support to restoring passenger rail service to the region. The rail link will create opportunities for the Port of Wilmington and Wilmington International Airport, modernizing transportation infrastructure interconnectivity throughout the region and easing highway congestion. The proposed Raleigh-to-Wilmington route via Goldsboro would strengthen national security and regional access during natural disasters by providing a needed contingency freight rail route to serve the Wilmington Metropolitan Statistical Area, Military Ocean Terminal Sunny Point, and the State Port (Port of Wilmington). 

Wilmington and numerous commercial entities, towns, and communities will experience an economic boom along the proposed route.

Our model is simple: senior attention end-to-end, outcomes over activity, and clear, transparent communication. 

We work shoulder to shoulder with our client teams to de-risk the critical path, and our clients lean on us to clear governance gates with credible cases and executable plan. Name: Australian Rail Apprentice Network
Description:
Australian Rail Apprentice Network (ARAN) - Building Capability for Future Rail Safety Managers** 

Welcome to ARAN's official LinkedIn page, where the rail industry's present meets its future through innovative solutions and forward-thinking strategies!

 Our Primary Focus: Building Capability for Future Rail Safety Managers

Safety is paramount in the rail industry. As part of our collaboration with Alium Works (RTO 45669), ARAN is committed to developing rail safety traineeships. Our targeted training programs are designed to shape the next generation of rail safety managers, equipping them with the skills, knowledge, and expertise required to ensure a safe and robust rail network.

 The Challenges We Face 

As outlined by the National Rail Action Plan, the rail sector in Australia faces several pressing challenges, including:

- A massive skills shortage, affecting various roles such as drivers, engineers, technicians, and tunnellers.
- The need to adapt to new technologies and digital transformation.
- Issues with portability, career pathways, and diversity in the workforce.

With an investment exceeding $155 billion in the next 15 years, these challenges must be addressed to ensure the success of Australia's rail projects.

 **ARAN & Alium Works - Pioneering Rail Safety Traineeships** 

Our Australian-first collaboration is poised to:

- Create tailored training programs focused on rail safety management.
- Attract, train, and retain suitable candidates passionate about rail safety.
- Foster national unity in skills development and career mobility.
- Encourage diversity and clear understanding of career paths within the rail sector.

 **Join Us in Building a Safer Rail Future** 

If you are a Training Manager, Learning & Development Manager, HR Professional, or Project Manager passionate about safety and talent growth in the rail industry, we want to collaborate with you.

 **Ready to Make an Impact?**  contact@aranetwork.com.au

Name: Isfahan Laboratory of Railway Engineering
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of the Railway Engineering Laboratory at the University of Isfahan. We are a leading research facility dedicated to advancing the field of railway engineering through cutting-edge research, innovation, and collaboration.

At the Railway Engineering Laboratory, we strive to address the complex challenges and opportunities in the railway industry. Our multidisciplinary team of researchers, engineers, and experts work together to develop and implement sustainable solutions that enhance the safety, efficiency, and reliability of railway systems.

Through our state-of-the-art facilities, advanced simulation tools, and extensive industry partnerships, we conduct research in various areas of railway engineering, including track design and maintenance, train dynamics, signaling and control systems, rolling stock optimization, and sustainable transportation technologies.

Our laboratory serves as a hub for knowledge exchange and collaboration between academia, industry professionals, and government agencies. We actively engage in research projects, knowledge dissemination, and training programs to promote the growth and development of the railway sector.

By fostering innovation and excellence in railway engineering, we aim to contribute to the advancement of transportation infrastructure, promote sustainable mobility solutions, and support economic development. Join us in exploring new frontiers in railway engineering and shaping the future of transportation.

Follow our LinkedIn page to stay updated on our latest research breakthroughs, industry partnerships, events, and opportunities to collaborate. Connect with our team of experts and become a part of our network dedicated to transforming the railway industry for a better tomorrow.

Name: Minerva Transport Planning Company Proprietary Limited
Description:
Minerva Transport Planning Company (MTPCo) was devised by its director, David Bannister, as a niche provider of specialised rail operations and strategy advice. David identified that a gap in the market existed, with smaller firms offering services for operations or strategy - but not both - and larger engineering firms providing the capability, without a specialised focus. 
MTPCo is founded on the belief that rail operations and strategy are intrinsically linked, rather than mutually exclusive. An operational plan for a railway is of little benefit if it does not fit into the broader strategy for the transportation network. Similarly, a grand transport strategy is meaningless if it cannot be realistically operated. In bridging the divide between these specialties, MTPCo is able to provide agencies and operators with a holistic solution to their short and long term rail planning issues.
The company is named after Minerva, the Roman goddess of wisdom and strategy. Minerva was chosen as the namesake of the company as the qualities she embodies – such as consideration, planning, and understanding – are critical to developing rail operations and strategies.

Name: Rail Freight Corridor North Sea–Rhine–Mediterranean
Description:
The former Rail Freight Corridors (RFCs) Rhine-Alpine and North Sea–Mediterranean have officially merged into the new RFC North Sea–Rhine–Mediterranean (NSRM), aligning with the European Transport Corridor (ETC) framework under Regulation (EU) 2024/1679. This strategic move enhances European rail freight by creating a more integrated, efficient, and sustainable transport network. Spanning seven countries—The Netherlands, Belgium, Luxembourg, France, Germany, Switzerland, and Italy—the NSRM corridor includes 12,150 km of railways, 5,000 km of roads, and 5,030 km of inland waterways, linking key industrial and logistical hubs from the North Sea to the Mediterranean.

The merger supports the EU’s TEN-T Regulation goals for a high-quality transport network by 2050, with milestones in 2030 and 2040. It emphasizes improved cross-border coordination, investment planning, and innovation. Developed with input from infrastructure managers and national ministries, the NSRM Implementation Plan defines operational and governance frameworks, supported by a Transport Market Study analyzing freight flows and terminal capacities.

Key benefits include harmonized operations, coordinated ERTMS deployment, streamlined timetabling, and better communication with stakeholders. The corridor also advances the EU Green Deal by encouraging a modal shift from road to rail. Ongoing stakeholder engagement through advisory groups and consultations ensures transparency and responsiveness. NSRM invites public and private partners to help shape a faster, safer, and more sustainable future for European rail freight.

Steamrail Victoria is a non-profit organisation dedicated to the restoration and operation of vintage steam, diesel and electric locomotives and carriages.

The Vintage Train travels all over the Victorian railway network offering a variety of tours for all tastes, including weekend excursions to interesting and popular destinations.

The Steamrail carriage fleet comprises some thirty cars including sitting, sleeping and specialist vehicles. These vehicles date back to the early 20th century and feature comfortable seating, varnished wood panelling and opening windows. Trains have a kiosk car and most include a licensed bar.

The Newport Railway Workshops were built in the 1880s and were actually the birthplace of many of our locomotives and carriages. These facilities enable us to keep our historic fleet in tiptop shape, and to carry out current restoration projects.

We welcome new members as well as new volunteer workers. We are always in need of assistance in a huge variety of tasks that keep Steamrail operating. People interested in visiting the workshops to see preservation in action are always welcome.

Name: The Canton Railroad Company
Description:
The Canton Railroad Company (Canton RR) is a 100% stock owned by the Maryland Transporation Authority, a Maryland Department of Transportation business unit. 
 
The Canton RR was chartered in 1906 and is the preeminent short line in Maryland and is a Class III short-line switching carrier based in Baltimore, Maryland.  The railroad owns approximately 17 miles of track, most of which are located within the City of Baltimore, with one mile of track stretching into Baltimore County.  As well as six switching locomotives, several rail cars, operating equipment, and has an office building that supports its Baltimore operations.  Canton RR provides freight service to 30 industries in the area—transporting products ranging from canned goods to fuel oil—through delivery to/from both CSX Transportation and Norfolk Southern railroads.  It is important to note that the Canton RR owns the rail access to the Seagirt Marine Terminal at the Port of Baltimore.

The Canton RR is nationally recognized for its safety record and has received numerous industry awards over the last five years, including an eight-year history of no lost time employee injuries.

The Canton Railroad Company is an eight-time ASLRRA Safety Award Recipient.

La CIM srl rifornisce il mercato dell’infrastruttura ferroviaria internazionale, dei migliori impianti per la produzione di traverse ferroviarie. Un’esperienza di progettazione e industrializzazione riconosciuta da tutti i player, che affidano la produzione di traverse all’azienda, prediligendo il metodo di lavoro e il processo produttivo targato CIM e certificando di fatto, la qualità dei prodotti.
Ci siamo prefissi, da sempre, di raggiungere obiettivi tali da sembrare, talvolta, impossibili.

Nel farlo, abbiamo voluto con determinazione, tenere conto di valori, per noi imprescindibili:
Innovazione, Eticità, Velocità e Rispetto per l’Ambiente.

Lo facciamo ogni giorno con il desiderio di lasciare un’impronta importante per un futuro che sarà il risultato delle nostre scelte presenti.

Name: Metro Dublin
Description:
For over 110 years, Dublin has envisioned an underground rail system but remains one of only five EU capitals without a metro, joining Valletta, Luxembourg City, Nicosia, and Ljubljana. While much of Europe has embraced modern transit solutions, Dublin has been held back by delays, broken promises, and rising costs—creating a persistent “CAN’T DO” mentality. This stagnation fuels pollution from half a billion car journeys annually, underscoring the urgent need for change.

62 Stations, 95km, 6 Integrated Lines Metro for Dublin. Metro Dublin is not just a transit project; it is a cornerstone for economic, social, and environmental progress. It offers a critical and valuable asset for governments, investors, contractors, rail operators, and suppliers, fostering partnerships that deliver significant economic opportunities and meaningful societal change. For the public, Metro Dublin promises improved mobility, reduced congestion, and an enhanced quality of life.

This project envisions Dublin as a sustainable, competitive, and globally connected city. By tackling longstanding challenges, Metro Dublin ensures measurable economic, social, and environmental benefits, securing Dublin’s place among modern, forward-thinking urban centres.

Description:
NCK Innovations to prężnie rozwijająca się spółka, założona w 2023 roku przez zespół ekspertów z bogatym doświadczeniem akademickim i projektowym. Naszą misją jest dostarczanie najwyższej jakości usług w zakresie pomiarów wibroakustycznych maszyn i pojazdów, skoncentrowanych na diagnostyce drganiowej i termowizyjnej oraz ocenie oddziaływania tych zjawisk na środowisko. Zajmujemy się również tworzeniem i zmianami dokumentacji oraz szkoleniami branżowymi.
 
W NCK Innovations łączymy sprawdzone metody z najnowszymi osiągnięciami nauki, aby dostarczyć naszym klientom usługi najwyższej jakości. Wykorzystujemy zarówno znane i sprawdzone metody, jak i innowacyjne rozwiązania, które nie są powszechnie stosowane w przemyśle, ale które wykazują dużą, praktyczną skuteczność. 
 
Nasze podejście pozwala nam na dostarczenie usług, które są precyzyjne, efektywne i dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb każdego klienta.

Name: HRail
Description: Hrail brings leading expertise in complex and multi-disciplinary infrastructure delivery - brownfield and greenfield construction specialising in rail systems, integration, and planning of complex staging and highly constrained environments. Hrail's approach to problem solving is founded in systems thinking,  with core strengths in de-risking projects at the outset leveraging graphical and visual problem solving.

Name: ER. bahn-consulting GmbH
Description:
Im Jahr 1994 wurde mit dem Eisenbahnneuordnungsgesetz der Grundstein für einen liberalisierten Eisenbahnverkehr auf Deutschlands Schienen gelegt. Heute, über zwanzig Jahre später, ist die Grundidee des Wettbewerbs auf Schienen zur Realität geworden. Zahlreiche private Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen bieten heute Personen- und Güterverkehre in einem preissensiblen Wettbewerb an. Für den Betrieb eines Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmens oder von Eisenbahninfrastruktur, die Durchführung von Zugfahrten oder die Entwicklung und Zulassung von Innovationen für das System Bahn ist jedoch viel Wissen, Know-how und Fachpersonal erforderlich.

Und jetzt kommen wir ins Spiel. Die ER. bahn-consulting GmbH ist Ihr Partner für Themen rund um Personal, Consulting, Training und Infrastruktur in der Eisenbahnbranche.

Name: 125 Group
Description: Preservers of the HST story. Proud owners of powercars 43044, 43048, 43089 & 43159 alongside a number of MK3 coaches.

Name: ContecRail
Description:
ContecRail er en dansk ejet jernbanevirksomhed med speciale med speciale i gods- og entreprenørkørsel på bane, samt vedligehold af jernbanemateriel.
ContecRail er leveringsdygtig i trækkraft og vogne, lokomotivførere og rangister, samt et ledelsesteam med bred og dyb erfaring i jernbanedrift, logistik- og sikkerhedsstyring indenfor jernbanen.
ContecRail har base i Glostrup, men kørsel sker over hele Danmark. 
ContecRail´s vedligeholdelsesværksteder ligger Køge og Kalundborg.

Name: Miro Rail
Description:
We enable regional rail to return to NZ by designing and manufacturing fast battery electric railcars here in christchurch. 

In Aotearoa where we have a small and dispersed population traditional trains come with huge costs and struggle to fill their carriages, whereas individual railcars are responsive to scattered demand. 

National passenger rail all but disappeared over 20 years ago because it was too slow. It took almost twice as long as either driving or flying. 

But this doesn’t have to be the case. Our new design takes its inspiration from bullet trains and aeroplanes, so it hugs the track for higher speeds than have previously been possible on our tracks. And with over 3,500 kms of track, we have a lot of great journeys to bring back.

We have 150 towns on the train lines. the potential to connect millions of people faster is massive. 

With local design, local manufacturing, and local partners, our fast electric railcar is 100% kiwi.

And we get all this high speed travel with 97% fewer emissions than driving or flying. 

With the infrastructure that already exists and the leaps we’ve made over the last decade with battery electric technology, fast electric railcars are our secret weapon in fighting the climate crisis. 

Sign up now to learn how you can help. 

Let‘s get there faster.

Name: Integrated.Travel
Description: Integrated Travel System is an Alberta registered non-profit that is an advocate for the return of passenger rail service in North America. We aim to improve the travel experience of business travellers and tourists and decrease the reliance on the automobile.  Contact us to learn more.

Name: Sydney Rail Services
Description:
Sydney Rail Services (SRS) is an Australian-owned rail freight operator dedicated to delivering safe, efficient, and customer-focused transport solutions across New South Wales and beyond.

With a strong focus on compliance under the Rail Safety National Law, SRS combines modern systems, experienced staff, and strategic partnerships to ensure reliability and transparency for every service. Our operations are supported by advanced scheduling and rostering systems, real-time tracking, and a safety management framework built on continuous improvement.

What we do:
	•	Rail freight haulage across Sydney, regional NSW, and interstate connections
	•	Passenger charter and heritage rail operations under strict safety protocols
	•	End-to-end logistics support with integrated scheduling and resource management
	•	Compliance-driven operations aligned with ONRSR, ARTC, and Sydney Trains requirements

Why SRS?
Our team is committed to building trusted, long-term relationships with customers. By combining technical capability with operational discipline, we deliver freight solutions that are not only cost-effective but also resilient, sustainable, and tailored to the needs of our clients.

At SRS, our mission is clear: to keep freight moving safely, reliably, and efficiently—every time.

Name: Maestranza Busler
Description:
BÜSLER es una empresa especializada en soluciones integrales para el sector ferroviario, reconocida por su compromiso, precisión y excelencia operativa. Nos destacamos por satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes con altos estándares de calidad, tiempos de entrega rigurosamente cumplidos y un enfoque técnico que combina experiencia, innovación y responsabilidad.
Nuestro equipo está conformado por profesionales altamente capacitados y apasionados por su labor, quienes abordan cada proyecto con una mentalidad resolutiva y meticulosa. Esta cultura de trabajo nos permite ofrecer productos y servicios personalizados, adaptados a los más exigentes requerimientos del rubro ferroviario, desde mantenimiento estructural y fabricación de piezas, hasta mejoras de infraestructura y soporte técnico especializado.

¿Qué nos hace una empresa ejemplar?
 Puntualidad garantizada: cumplimiento estricto de los plazos acordados.
 Calidad certificada: trabajamos bajo procedimientos estandarizados y trazables.
 Compromiso total: asumimos cada proyecto como si fuera propio.
 Atención cercana y personalizada: escucha activa, seguimiento continuo y comunicación transparente.
 Orientación a resultados: nuestro foco está en la eficiencia y el valor entregado.
 Mejora continua: incorporamos tecnologías y procesos que optimizan nuestro rendimiento.
 Seguridad y responsabilidad: protegemos a nuestro equipo, entorno y clientes.
En BÜSLER, no solo fabricamos y reparamos, construimos confianza sobre rieles.

Name: RailStaff
Description:
RailStaff was launched in 1997 after the UK Rail Industry was privatised and it quickly became established as a leading rail publication in the UK, due to its positive support of the industry.

From boardroom directors to on-track staff, RailStaff offers a monthly mix of ‘what you need to know’.

We are part of the Rail Media group.

Name: Gibela Engineering Research Chair
Description:
The Gibela Engineering Research Chair at Stellenbosch University is a dynamic research group, sponsored by the Gibela Rail Consortium. Gibela has been contracted by the South African Government to manufacture, maintain and support 600 X’trapolis MEGA trains to renew the fleet of the Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa.

The Chair aims to create a niche in monitoring applications and asset management technologies for the Gibela X’Trapolis Mega trains by combining the potential of sensors, data, models and analytics in digital services. The Chair strives to uphold a culture of academic excellence whilst remaining people centric, optimistic and future-focused to achieve impacts in local and international rail research.

Name: Association Le Train 634269
Description:
LeTrain634269 est une association loi 1901 créée le 27 janvier 2022.

L’association se donne pour objectif :
–  de promouvoir et défendre la réouverture dans sa continuité de la ligne ferroviaire Clermont-Ferrand Saint-Etienne (ligne 784 000 du réseau ferré national), trait d’union des ex régions Auvergne et Rhône-Alpes, entre les départements de la Loire et du Puy-de-Dôme, colonne vertébrale des mobilités connectée au cœur du réseau TER AUVERGNE-RHÔNE-ALPES par Thiers et Boën (tronçon suspendu à tout trafic depuis mai 2016) et d’assurer l’information, la représentation et la défense des usagers des transports de Clermont-Ferrand à Saint-Etienne auprès des pouvoirs publics, des collectivités territoriales, des exploitants de transport public, des médias et de tous les organismes publics ou privés, cela suppose que le tronçon Thiers Boën soit rétabli.

– De participer à l’amélioration de la qualité, de l’attractivité et de la sécurité des transports publics,
– De favoriser l'aménagement, le développement économique et touristique du territoire,
– D’agir pour améliorer le service public afin de répondre aux besoins des usagers et des entreprises,
– D’engager tous moyens pour répondre à ces objectifs.

L’association est ouverte à tous les publics, en préservant à ses activités un caractère non lucratif, laïque et apartisan. En toutes circonstances, l’association garantit un fonctionnement démocratique et transparent et préserve le caractère désintéressé de sa gestion.

Name: Le Collectif BSP
Description:
Créé en 2014, le collectif BSP est une association loi 1901. L’association se définit comme un bureau d’étude citoyen, qui élabore et propose des travaux de recherche en matière de mobilité par une approche croisée entre transport et urbanisme. 
Elle vise à offrir une vision prospective propre aux spécificités des territoires du Nord-Est de la Nouvelle Aquitaine dans laquelle le ferroviaire est une composante incontournable.

Le collectif regroupe des personnes issues de toutes les composantes de la société civile, soucieuses de ces questions et désireuses de porter des propositions concrètes pour l’évolution de leur cadre de vie. Depuis 2018 l’association fédère également les soutiens de la démarche et peut compter sur l’adhésion de nombreux acteurs territoriaux, collectivités, entreprises, syndicats et associations qui portent collégialement une approche globale des mobilités à partir des étoiles ferroviaires existantes.

Les travaux du collectifs s’organisent autour de 3 axes :

_ Élaborer et promouvoir les projets TramTrain Limousin et RERPérigord-Limousin, pendant rural des RER métropolitains : études et faisabilités, contribution à des projets connexes en lien avec le ferroviaire et la mobilité, retour d’expérience.

_ Accompagner les acteurs du territoire et sensibiliser les publics variés sur les questions de mobilité et d’aménagement

_ Fédérer les collectivités territoriales, les acteurs économiques, syndicats, usagers et associations autour de la démarche et d’un projet de mobilité global pour le territoire.

Name: Snowdon Mountain Railway / Rheilffordd yr Wyddfa
Description:
Snowdon Mountain Railway (SMR) consists of a diverse range of railway assets from the rack & pinion, signalling, lineside buildings through to viaducts, cuttings and passing loops at three stations, Halfway, Clogwyn and the Summit along its 8km length. SMR is privately owned under Heritage Great Britain (HGB) who own and operate a variety of heritage sites within the UK.

SMR value their people, fulfilling their commitments through a highly performing professional team of appointed Managers, who consistently deliver safe and reliable transportation for their passengers. Together we work every day to achieve excellence.

Snowdon Mountain Railway is owned and operated by Heritage Great Britain PLc, operators of several other tourist attractions in the United Kingdom.

Name: M&EE ALO Technology Sub-Group
Description:
The M&EE ATSG was formed following a challenge from Network Rail whether the Industry was working safely and efficiently when Plant was working with Any Line Open. It’s aim is to identify technology that can be used for ALO purposes and help bring to market to make ALO safer and more productive. The objectives include:
 
Providing a focus on ALO, working collaboratively to prevent duplication of effort and wasting investment. Review technology to see if more efficient and smarter ways of working are possible. To review and where appropriate, challenge the rules and standards with respect to ALO. To promulgate information and understanding of ALO.

Name: Arzesh Afarinan Fadak Holding Co.
Description:
Arzesh Afarinan Fadak Holding have been operating as one of the main players in the country's rail industry for more than two decades, and are the oldest and largest. During this period, we have been able to establish our position in the country's transportation industry and develop our brands by looking at the international markets, with the help of experienced Iranian experts and managers, as well as with some important companies in the world's transportation industry. Our expertise-oriented approach and our passion for progressing in line with the world's modern technologies have led us to produce the first generation of five-star Iranian trains "Fedak 1" under the supervision of the Swedish company Prose, as well as the first and the largest dedicated railway catering in the Middle East in the form of a company. 
Fadak Holding's wide range of activities is diverse; From the transportation industry to the investment, food, and tourism industries, our specialists and managers will have the experience of working in different industries and discovering new worlds. There are no barriers to growth and development in Fadak, and everything depends on people's will and ability.

Name: Groupe Mirault
Description:
Le Groupe Mirault, c’est avant tout une famille d’entrepreneurs unis par une même vision : bâtir, connecter et faire rayonner le Nord du Québec depuis plus de 30 ans.
Né en Abitibi-Témiscamingue, le groupe a grandi autour de valeurs fortes — le travail, la fiabilité, la passion et l’innovation — qui se reflètent dans chacune de ses entreprises.

Aujourd’hui, le Groupe Mirault englobe plusieurs domaines complémentaires :
 La logistique ferroviaire, avec des solutions intégrées qui soutiennent le transport responsable et la croissance industrielle du Nord.
 L’énergie, où notre savoir-faire contribue à l’efficacité et à la sécurité de l’approvisionnement régional.
 L’immobilier, à travers le développement et la gestion de projets commerciaux, résidentiels et hôteliers durables.
 L’hôtellerie virtuelle, une nouvelle génération d’hébergement qui combine technologie, flexibilité et hospitalité moderne.
 Le divertissement, avec Toukiparc, un espace familial unique qui fait partie intégrante du tissu communautaire.
 La construction, moteur essentiel de nos projets d’expansion et de nos infrastructures régionales.

Chaque projet porte la signature Mirault : un engagement réel envers la qualité, la durabilité et le développement local. Ensemble, ces activités forment un écosystème cohérent où chaque initiative alimente la suivante, au service d’une même ambition : créer de la valeur durable pour nos communautés et pour les générations à venir.

Le Groupe Mirault n’est pas seulement un nom : c’est une famille d’idées, de talents et de projets qui bâtit le futur de l’Abitibi avec cœur, détermination et fierté.

Name: Inbetriebnahmegesellschaft Transporttechnik mbH
Description:
Die IGT ist eine Kombination aus Ingenieurbüro und einem Eisenbahnverkehrsunternehmen (EVU) mit einer von der ERA ausgestellten gültigen Sicherheitsbescheinigung.  

Durch die Kombination aus Ingenieurbüro und EVU können wir Ihnen im technischen Bereich ein vollumfassendes Dienstleistungsspektrum beginnend mit der Erstellung der funktionalen Anforderungsspezifikation über die Systemvalidierung bis zur Sicherheitsnachweisführung anbieten.

Im betrieblichen Sektor sind wir der Spezialist für Probefahrten mit Eisenbahnfahrzeugen und Transporte von Eisenbahnfahrzeugen. Für uns beginnt die betriebliche Dienstleistung mit der Beantragung aller notwendigen Genehmigungen und Zustimmungen, den notwendigen Sicherheitsbewertung gem. CSM-Verordnung und den Unbedenklichkeitserklärungen zur Erfüllung aller genehmigungsrechtlichen Voraussetzungen gegenüber den Aufsichtsbehörden und dem jeweiligen Eisenbahninfrastrukturbetreiber.

In unseren Geschäftsfeldern bieten wir Ihnen effiziente, ganzheitliche und prozessorientierte Lösungen an.

Name: Rail Wagon Association
Description:
The Rail Wagon Association Limited (RWA) is a trade association, incorporated as a Private Company Limited by Guarantee, representing the interests of companies involved in rail freight wagons based in the UK.  This includes wagon owners, keepers, users, designers, manufacturers, hirers, ECMs, consultants, maintainers and operators.


The purpose of the RWA is to undertake the role of a professional trade body for its members by representing their interests in liaison with other industry participants, the DfT, the UIC (via UIP membership) and any other appropriate bodies.

RWA facilitates the sharing of information, the discussion of relevant engineering and safety issues and developing appropriate responses.  RWA does not have any manufacturing, services, or supply chain operations.

Description: The PT Solution's SNAAP Transportation provides a sustainable solution to personal rapid transit. Name: Advanced Transport Solutions (ATS)
Description:
We are a young and determined team, with more than 18 years’ experience in railway transport and logistics field. 

Our mission is to provide to our clients transport adapted solutions and personalized logistics services.

Our know-how, open-mind, flexibility and international connections help us to offer a wide range of optimized and adapted solutions for our clients.

Name: Torvion
Description:
Torvion is a deep-tech company redefining the future of railway braking. We are developing the world’s first Linear Induction Motor (LIM) brake, a breakthrough technology that delivers consistent and weather-independent performance. By removing the dependence on friction, we enhance safety, improve reliability, and extend the life of railway infrastructure.

Rail transport underpins modern society, yet for decades it has faced persistent limitations from wheel-rail adhesion. At Torvion, we are breaking that barrier. Our mission is to enable a safer, more efficient, and more sustainable railway network that can operate reliably in all conditions and support the growing demands of global mobility.

To achieve this, we combine cutting-edge engineering with a commitment to collaboration and innovation. Founded at Delft University of Technology, Torvion brings together expertise in electromagnetics, transport systems, and entrepreneurship. Our work is guided by a simple belief that technology should advance safety, sustainability, and human progress.

We are building the next standard in rail braking. Join us as we shape the future of rail transport.

Name: Baltic Railsupport
Description:

Unsere Mitarbeiter sind hochqualifiziert und erfahren. Sie verfügen über das erforderliche Know-how, um alle Arbeiten an Lokomotiven fachgerecht auszuführen. Wir verwenden modernste Diagnose- und Reparaturtechniken, um die Lokomotiven unserer Kunden schnell und effizient wieder instand zu setzen.

Wir sind uns unserer Verantwortung für die Sicherheit des Bahnverkehrs bewusst. Deshalb arbeiten wir nach höchsten Sicherheitsstandards.

Sie betreiben Lokomotiven und suchen nach einem kompetenten und flexiblen Partner für Instandhaltungsleistungen?  Warten Sie nicht auf Werkstattslots, weit entfernt von Ihrem Abstellort. Kontaktieren Sie Baltic Railsupport! Bei uns ist Ihre Lokomotive in guten Händen.

Name: V-Rail
Description:
V-Rail aims to connect Africa with a modern railway network. With the current state of infrastructure, freight transport is usually very time consuming and expensive. This leads to businesses having to pay more when they have a tight deadline or when they need to deliver perishable products.

V-Rail is going to revolutionise freight by introducing trains as a modern alternative to road transport. Our services include procurement, leasing, and sale of new and reasonably used locomotives, as well as rail freight and passenger operations.

Name: PKP CARGO SERVICE sp. z o.o.
Description:
Działalność usługowa wspomagająca transport lądowy obejmuje swoim zakresem głównie wykonawstwo usług manewrowych na obszarze bocznic. Stosownie do wydanych przez organy korporacyjne decyzji właścicielskich PKP CARGO SERVICE sp. z o.o., zainicjowana w drugiej połowie roku 2009 działalność w tym obszarze usług, w roku 2010 została ukierunkowana na aktywne uczestnictwo Spółki w postępowaniach przetargowych na kompleksową obsługę bocznic kolejowych. Dokonane zostały niezbędne zmian w zakresie dostosowania kompetencji organów Spółki do zaciągania zobowiązań wynikających z potrzeb zawieranych umów wykonawczych. Wieloletnie doświadczenie i solidna praca zaowocowały długoletnimi kontraktami. 
Połączenie potencjału Grupy i wysoko wykwalifikowanej kadry specjalistów pozwoliło stworzyć firmę, która oferuje kompleksowy pakiet usług, dostosowanych do indywidualnych potrzeb odbiorców oraz zapewnia optymalizację kosztów i dbałość o czas realizacji usługi.

Name: LatRailNet
Description: JSC "LatRailNet" is a subsidiary company of the SJSC "Latvian Railway" that according to the Railway Law performs the essential functions of the public-use railway infrastructure manager - decision making on capacity allocation and train path assignment, including both the determination and assessment of accessibility and the allocation of individual train paths and decision-making on infrastructure charging, including the determination and collection of the charges.

Name: INFRACERT d.o.o.
Description:
Infracert d.o.o. as a Notified Body (under number NB 3014)  accredited by the Directive (EU) 2016/797-NB 2738, and provides the service of carrying out the verification process to determine the conformity of the subsystem with the Technical Specifications for Interoperability (TSI) for the following structural subsystems:

Name: RTR – Round Table Rolling Stock
Description:
Multiple trends are influencing the railway ecosystem and the market environment has changed in many ways.

Name: Environmental Remediation & Recovery
Description:
Environmental Remediation and Recovery, Inc. (ER&R) is a rail car cleaning and transloading facility conveniently located minutes from Interstate 57 in Mounds, Illinois and directly served by the Canadian National (CN).

ER&R provides a unique service in cleaning food grade railroad cars. ER&R is also Kosher certified for Kosher Upgrade and Kosher Maintenance cleaning. 

ER&R offers direct delivery without the need of a short-line railroad saving customers additional expenses. Our team stays in contact with the customer during the cleaning process to answer any questions.  Once cleaning is complete, we request disposition and release the cleaned rail cars back to the desired location, or the customer can provide disposition up front with shopping instructions.

Cleaning capabilities include (but not limited to): cleaning of Non-Pressurized Tank Cars, Gravity Hoppers, Pneumatic Style Hopper Cars, and removal and disposal of residual heel up to nearly full cars of rejected product prior to required wash per customer needs. 

Commodities cleaned include (but not limited to): molasses, beet by-products, corn syrup, floorwater, steepwater, vegetable oils (corn, soybean, palm, peanut, canola, etc.), glycerin, ethanol, bio-products, germ meals, gluten products, flour, starch, and other feed products. We also can quote on special projects for large heel amounts for disposal as needed.

We can also provide project work where customers may have a fleet of cars needing cleaning for compliance, end of lease, scrap etc. We work with the customer on how many cars we can take at a time and rotate in and out to provide turnaround as quickly as possible.

Our cleaning process is documented with photos.  Upon completion of our railcar cleaning process, we apply completion seals and create cleaning certificates to verify our work for your records.

We also provide dry bulk transport truck washouts and transloading services onsite.

Name: DirecTrainSystems
Description: DirectTrains is developing a novel transport technology aimed at solving capacity and congestion issues using existing infrastructure. The ‘Dynamic Coupling’ concept integrates aerospace technology into rail operations. Leveraging their aviation expertise, the DirectTrains team introduces a system that couples/decouples trains on the move. Our solution reimagines rail as a smart, modular, low-emission network-without laying new tracks. The Dynamic Coupling (DC) system includes a wagon attached to a moving train and a software platform managing coupling points. This enables feeder trains to join or leave express lines, extending service to underserved areas while saving energy and costs. The result: faster delivery, broader access, and reduced reliance on trucks. Tested in Europe, with pilot projects planned in Israel and the U.S., DirectTrains provides a flexible, climate-resilient rail solution for global delivery. By transforming existing infrastructure into an efficient ecosystem, DirectTrains promotes sustainable mobility, cuts carbon, preserves biodiversity, and aligns with ESG standards. It's smarter logistics by rail, free from road congestion and pollution. DirectTrains seeks visionary partners from rail and logistics industries for collaboration.

Herzlich willkommen bei NAMTOR, dem Unternehmen, das Ihnen bei der Verwirklichung all Ihrer

Die Welt entwickelt sich immer rasanter, so dass der Eisenbahninfrastruktur eine wachsende

Jedes Land in Europa gibt immer mehr Geld für die Modernisierung und den Ausbau seiner

wissen wir alle, dass diese niemals die größte Kraft der Welt ersetzen können - den Menschen
(bzw. die Arbeit der menschlichen Hände).
Und hier kommen wir ins Spiel.
Wir sind ein dynamisch wachsendes Unternehmen, das seit 2019 auf dem Markt tätig ist. Wir
arbeiten als Subunternehmer für Großunternehmen, die sich auf den Gleisbau spezialisiert
haben. Wir unterstützen Unternehmen bei der Durchführung von Arbeiten im Zusammenhang mit
dem Bau und der Modernisierung des Eisenbahnnetzes.
Was uns auszeichnet? Wir sind ein Familienunternehmen, bei dem der Mensch im Mittelpunkt
steht. Unser Team ist kein Zufall. Jeder unserer Mitarbeiter ist ein gleichwertiges Mitglied in
unserem Team. Dank unseres sorgfältig ausgesuchten Teams sind wir in der Lage, auch sehr
anspruchsvolle Aufträge auszuführen.
Unsere technischen Einrichtungen unterstützen uns bei der reibungslosen und umfassenden
Auftragsabwicklung. Wir sind bemüht, unsere Ressourcen zu erweitern und gleichzeitig auf die
Umwelt zu achten, weshalb wir zunehmend in innovative und umweltfreundliche Technologien
investieren.

Name: Expresso Planalto Central
Description:
When we think about trains, we think fast, quiet and clean. We think reliable, comfortable and safe. We think past, present and future. Nothing beats the effectiveness of a mode of transport that’s been constantly evolving for over two hundred years.

The size of its importance is proportional to its challenges and complexities. Developed countries are constantly chasing the improvement of its rail network, and the developing ones struggling to build its own.

Challenges and opportunities are two faces of the same coin. That’s why in 2019, OTMZA LABS was founded in Brasília – Brazil. After decades of state exclusivity on its railway infrastructure planning, the private sector was allowed to plan and build its own railroads, under the Law 14.273/2021. Since the prerogatives of Transit-Oriented Development were thoroughly described in the law, we made our choice.

And we chose Mobility

Name: National Railway Heritage Awards
Description:
The National Railway Heritage Awards are dedicated to encouraging and rewarding best practice in the re-use, restoration and continued upkeep of Britain's rich heritage of railway and tramway buildings and structures.

The Awards began in 1979 and was initially focused on the heritage railway preservation movement. Since Privatisation in the 1990’s, the Awards have broadened to encompass the infrastructure of the national rail network and entries from the national sector now form a substantial part.

The Awards are a Charitable Incorporated Organisation (CIO): as an independent Trust our charitable status was originally confirmed by the Charity Commission in December 2006.

The Awards would not be possible without the generous support of our Sponsors drawn from across the railway industry.

Our deliverables include:
 RAM Plan & Safety Plan
 RAM Analysis & Prediction
 Reliability Modelling
 Comprehensive Safety Analyses (PHA, SHA, SSHA, IHA, OSHA, FHA)
 Component & Functional FMECA
 FTA (Fault Tree Analysis) & SIL Allocation
 RCIL (Reliability Critical Item List) & SCIL (Safety Critical Item List)
 SRACs & Safety Case Preparation

All documentation is meticulously prepared to meet customer and regulatory standards, ensuring compliance with ISA (Independent Safety Assessor) requirements for SIL certification.

We adhere to internationally recognized standards, including:
 EN 50126 (Parts 1 & 2), EN 50129, EN 62267
 MIL-HDBK-338B, MIL-STD-1629A, 217-F

At SHINKA, we leverage these standards efficiently to deliver high-quality, compliant, and structured documentation, helping rail projects achieve certification and operational excellence.
